text: Come, Agni, praised with song, to feast and sacrificial offering: sit As Hotar on the holy grass!
meaning: अग्न आ याहि वीतये गृणानो हव्यदातये नि होता सत्सि बर्हिषि
sanskrit_iast: agna ā yāhi vītaye gr̥ṇāno havyadātaye ni hotā satsi barhiṣi

text: O Agni, thou hast been ordained Hotar of every sacrifice, By Gods, among the race of men.
meaning: त्वमग्ने यज्ञानाꣳ होता विश्वेषाꣳ हितः देवेभिर्मानुषे जने
sanskrit_iast: tvamagne yajñānām̐ hotā viśveṣām̐ hitaḥ devebʰirmānuṣe jane

text: Agni we choose as envoy, skilled performer of this holy rite, Hotar, possessor of all wealth.
meaning: अग्निं दूतं वृणीमहे होतारं विश्ववेदसम् अस्य यज्ञस्य सुक्रतुम्
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ dūtaṃ vr̥ṇīmahe hotāraṃ viśvavedasam asya yajñasya sukratum

text: Served with oblation, kindled, bright, through love of song may Agni, bent On riches, smite the Vritras dead!
meaning: अग्निर्वृत्राणि जङ्घनद्द्रविणस्युर्विपन्यया समिद्धः शुक्र आहुतः
sanskrit_iast: agnirvr̥trāṇi jaṅgʰanaddraviṇasyurvipanyayā samiddʰaḥ śukra āhutaḥ

text: I laud your most beloved guest like a dear friend, O Agni, him Who, like a chariot, wins us wealth.
meaning: प्रेष्ठं वो अतिथिꣳ स्तुषे मित्रमिव प्रियम् अग्ने रथं न वेद्यम्
sanskrit_iast: preṣṭʰaṃ vo atitʰim̐ stuṣe mitramiva priyam agne ratʰaṃ na vedyam

text: Do thou, O Agni, with great might guard us from all malignity, Yea, from the hate of mortal man!
meaning: त्वं नो अग्ने महोभिः पाहि विश्वस्या अरातेः उत द्विषो मर्त्यस्य
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ no agne mahobʰiḥ pāhi viśvasyā arāteḥ uta dviṣo martyasya

text: O Agni, come; far other songs of praise will I sing forth to thee. Wax mighty with these Soma-drops!
meaning: एह्यू षु ब्रवाणि ते ऽग्न इत्थेतरा गिरः एभिर्वर्धास इन्दुभिः
sanskrit_iast: ehyū ṣu bravāṇi te 'gna ittʰetarā giraḥ ebʰirvardʰāsa indubʰiḥ

text: May Vatsa draw thy mind away even from thy loftiest dwelling place! Agni, I yearn for thee with song.
meaning: आ ते वत्सो मनो यमत्परमाच्चित्सधस्थात् अग्ने त्वां कामये गिरा
sanskrit_iast: ā te vatso mano yamatparamāccitsadʰastʰāt agne tvāṃ kāmaye girā

text: Agni, Atharvan brought thee forth by rubbing from the sky, the head Of all who offer sacrifice.
meaning: त्वामग्ने पुष्करादध्यथर्वा निरमन्थत मूर्ध्नो विश्वस्य वाघतः
sanskrit_iast: tvāmagne puṣkarādadʰyatʰarvā niramantʰata mūrdʰno viśvasya vāgʰataḥ

text: O Agni, bring us radiant light to be our mighty succour, for Thou art our visible deity!
meaning: अग्ने विवस्वदा भरास्मभ्यमूतये महे देवो ह्यसि नो दृशे
sanskrit_iast: agne vivasvadā bʰarāsmabʰyamūtaye mahe devo hyasi no dr̥śe

text: O Agni, God, the people sing reverent praise to thee for strength: With terrors trouble thou the foe
meaning: नमस्ते अग्न ओजसे गृणन्ति देव कृष्टयः अमैरमित्रमर्दय
sanskrit_iast: namaste agna ojase gr̥ṇanti deva kr̥ṣṭayaḥ amairamitramardaya

text: I seek with song your messenger, oblation-bearer, lord of wealth, Immortal, best at sacrifice.
meaning: दूतं वो विश्ववेदसꣳ हव्यवाहममर्त्यम् यजिष्ठमृञ्जसे गिरा
sanskrit_iast: dūtaṃ vo viśvavedasam̐ havyavāhamamartyam yajiṣṭʰamr̥ñjase girā

text: Still turning to their aim in thee the sacrificer's sister hymns Have come to thee before the wind.
meaning: उप त्वा जामयो गिरो देदिशतीर्हविष्कृतः वायोरनीके अस्थिरन्
sanskrit_iast: upa tvā jāmayo giro dediśatīrhaviṣkr̥taḥ vāyoranīke astʰiran

text: To thee, illuminer of night, O Agni, day by day with prayer, Bringing thee reverence, we come.
meaning: उप त्वाग्ने दिवेदिवे दोषावस्तर्धिया वयम् नमो भरन्त एमसि
sanskrit_iast: upa tvāgne divedive doṣāvastardʰiyā vayam namo bʰaranta emasi

text: Help, thou who knowest lauds, this work, a lovely hymn in Rudra's praise, Adorable in every house!
meaning: जराबोध तद्विविड्ढि विशेविशे यज्ञियाय स्तोमꣳ रुद्राय दृशीकम्
sanskrit_iast: jarābodʰa tadviviḍḍʰi viśeviśe yajñiyāya stomam̐ rudrāya dr̥śīkam

text: To this fair sacrifice to drink the milky draught art thou called forth: O Agni, with the Maruts come!
meaning: प्रति त्यं चारुमध्वरं गोपीथाय प्र हूयसे मरुद्भिरग्न आ गहि
sanskrit_iast: prati tyaṃ cārumadʰvaraṃ gopītʰāya pra hūyase marudbʰiragna ā gahi

text: With homage will I reverence thee, Agni, like a long-tailed steed, Imperial lord of holy rites.
meaning: अश्वं न त्वा वारवन्तं वन्दध्या अग्निं नमोभिः सम्राजन्तमध्वराणाम्
sanskrit_iast: aśvaṃ na tvā vāravantaṃ vandadʰyā agniṃ namobʰiḥ samrājantamadʰvarāṇām

text: As Aurva and as Bhrigu called, as Apnavana called, I call The radiant Agni robed with sea.
meaning: और्वभृगुवच्छुचिमप्नवानवदा हुवे अग्निꣳ समुद्रवाससम्
sanskrit_iast: aurvabʰr̥guvaccʰucimapnavānavadā huve agnim̐ samudravāsasam

text: When he enkindles Agni, man should with his heart attend the song: I kindle Agni till he glows.
meaning: अग्निमिन्धानो मनसा धियꣳ सचेत मर्त्यः अग्निमिन्धे विवस्वभिः
sanskrit_iast: agnimindʰāno manasā dʰiyam̐ saceta martyaḥ agnimindʰe vivasvabʰiḥ

text: Then, verily, they see the light refulgent of primeval seed, Kindled on yonder side of heaven.
meaning: आदित्प्रत्नस्य रेतसो ज्योतिः पश्यन्ति वासरम् परो यदिध्यते दिवि
sanskrit_iast: āditpratnasya retaso jyotiḥ paśyanti vāsaram paro yadidʰyate divi

text: Hither, for powerful kinship, I call Agni, him who prospers you, Most frequent at our solemn rites.
meaning: अग्निं वो वृधन्तमध्वराणां पुरूतमम् अच्छा नप्त्रे सहस्वते
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ vo vr̥dʰantamadʰvarāṇāṃ purūtamam accʰā naptre sahasvate

text: May Agni with his pointed blaze cast down each fierce devouring fiend: May Agni win us wealth by war!
meaning: अग्निस्तिग्मेन शोचिषा यꣳसद्विश्वं न्या३त्रिणम् अग्निर्नो वꣳसते रयिम्
sanskrit_iast: agnistigmena śociṣā yam̐sadviśvaṃ nyā3triṇam agnirno vam̐sate rayim

text: Agni, be gracious; thou art great: thou hast approached the pious man, Hast come to sit on sacred grass.
meaning: अग्ने मृड महाꣳ अस्यय आ देवयुं जनम् इयेथ बर्हिरासदम्
sanskrit_iast: agne mr̥ḍa mahām̐ asyaya ā devayuṃ janam iyetʰa barhirāsadam

text: Agni, preserve us,from distress consume our enemies, O God, Eternal, with thy hottest flames
meaning: अग्ने रक्षा णो अꣳहसः प्रति स्म देव रीषतः तपिष्ठैरजरो दह
sanskrit_iast: agne rakṣā ṇo am̐hasaḥ prati sma deva rīṣataḥ tapiṣṭʰairajaro daha

text: Harness, O Agni, O thou God, thy steeds which are most excellent! The fleet ones bring thee rapidly.
meaning: अग्ने युङ्क्ष्वा हि ये तवाश्वासो देव साधवः अरं वहन्त्याशवः
sanskrit_iast: agne yuṅkṣvā hi ye tavāśvāso deva sādʰavaḥ araṃ vahantyāśavaḥ

text: Lord of the tribes, whom all must seek, we worshipped Agni set thee down, Refulgent, rich in valiant men.
meaning: नि त्वा नक्ष्य विश्पते द्युमन्तं धीमहे वयम् सुवीरमग्न आहुत
sanskrit_iast: ni tvā nakṣya viśpate dyumantaṃ dʰīmahe vayam suvīramagna āhuta

text: Agni is head and height of heaven, the master of the earth is he He quickeneth the waters' seed.
meaning: अग्निर्मूर्धा दिवः ककुत्पतिः पृथिव्या अयम् अपाꣳ रेताꣳसि जिन्वति
sanskrit_iast: agnirmūrdʰā divaḥ kakutpatiḥ pr̥tʰivyā ayam apām̐ retām̐si jinvati

text: O Agni, graciously announce this our good fortune of the Gods, And this our newest hymn of praise! 9, By song, O Agni, Angiras! Gopavana hath brought thee forth Hear thou my call, refulgent one!
meaning: इममू षु त्वमस्माकꣳ सनिं गायत्रं नव्याꣳसम् अग्ने देवेषु प्र वोचः
sanskrit_iast: imamū ṣu tvamasmākam̐ saniṃ gāyatraṃ navyām̐sam agne deveṣu pra vocaḥ

text: Agni, the Sage, the Lord of Strength, hath moved around the sacred gifts, Giving the offerer precious things.
meaning: तं त्वा गोपवनो गिरा जनिष्ठदग्ने अङ्गरः स पावक श्रुधी हवम्
sanskrit_iast: taṃ tvā gopavano girā janiṣṭʰadagne aṅgaraḥ sa pāvaka śrudʰī havam

text: His heralds bear him up aloft, the God who knoweth all that lives, The Sun, that all may look on him. 12, Praise Agni in the sacrifice, the Sage whose holy laws are true The God who driveth grief away.
meaning: परि वाजपतिः कविरग्निर्हव्यान्यक्रमीत् दधद्रत्नानि दाशुषे
sanskrit_iast: pari vājapatiḥ kaviragnirhavyānyakramīt dadʰadratnāni dāśuṣe

text: Kind be the Goddesses to lend us help, and kind that we may drink: May their streams bring us health and wealth
meaning: उदु त्यं जातवेदसं देवं वहन्ति केतवः दृशे विश्वाय सूर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: udu tyaṃ jātavedasaṃ devaṃ vahanti ketavaḥ dr̥śe viśvāya sūryam

text: Lord of the brave, whose songs dost thou in thine abundance now inspire, Thou whose hymns help to win the kine?
meaning: कविमग्निमुप स्तुहि सत्यधर्माणमध्वरे देवममीवचातनम्
sanskrit_iast: kavimagnimupa stuhi satyadʰarmāṇamadʰvare devamamīvacātanam

text: Sing to your Agni with each song, at every sacrifice for strength. Come, let us praise the wise and, everlasting God even as a well-beloved friend,
meaning: शं नो देवीरभिष्टये शं नो भवन्तु पीतये शं योरभि स्रवन्तु नः
sanskrit_iast: śaṃ no devīrabʰiṣṭaye śaṃ no bʰavantu pītaye śaṃ yorabʰi sravantu naḥ

text: Agni, protect thou us by one, protect us by the second song, Protect us by three hymns, O Lord of power and might, bright God, by four hymns guard us well!
meaning: कस्य नूनं परीणसि धियो जिन्वसि सत्पते जोषाता यस्य ते गिरः
sanskrit_iast: kasya nūnaṃ parīṇasi dʰiyo jinvasi satpate joṣātā yasya te giraḥ

text: O Agni, with thy lofty beams, with thy pure brilliancy, O God, Kindled, most youthful one! by Bharadvaja's hand, shine on us richly, holy Lord!
meaning: यज्ञायज्ञा वो अग्नये गिरागिरा च दक्षसे प्रप्र वयममृतं जातवेदसं प्रियं मित्रं न शꣳसिषम्
sanskrit_iast: yajñāyajñā vo agnaye girāgirā ca dakṣase prapra vayamamr̥taṃ jātavedasaṃ priyaṃ mitraṃ na śam̐siṣam

text: O Agni who art worshipped well, dear let our princes be to thee, Our wealthy patrons who are governors of men, who part, as gifts, the stall of kine!
meaning: पाहि नो अग्न एकया पाह्यू३त द्वितीयया पाहि गीर्भिस्तिसृभिरूर्जां पते पाहि चतसृभिर्वसो
sanskrit_iast: pāhi no agna ekayā pāhyū3ta dvitīyayā pāhi gīrbʰistisr̥bʰirūrjāṃ pate pāhi catasr̥bʰirvaso

text: Agni, praise-singer! Lord of men, God! burning up the Rakshasas, Mighty art thou, the ever-present, household-lord! home-friend and guardian from the sky.
meaning: बृहद्भिरग्ने अर्चिभिः शुक्रेण देव शोचिषा भरद्वाजे समिधानो यविष्ठ्य रेवत्पावक दीदिहि
sanskrit_iast: br̥hadbʰiragne arcibʰiḥ śukreṇa deva śociṣā bʰaradvāje samidʰāno yaviṣṭʰya revatpāvaka dīdihi

text: Immortal Jatavedas, thou bright-hued refulgent gift of Dawn, Agni, this day to him who pays oblations bring the Gods who waken with the morn!
meaning: त्वे अग्ने स्वाहुत प्रियासः सन्तु सूरयः यन्तारो ये मघवानो जनानामूर्वं दयन्त गोनाम्
sanskrit_iast: tve agne svāhuta priyāsaḥ santu sūrayaḥ yantāro ye magʰavāno janānāmūrvaṃ dayanta gonām

text: Wonderful, with thy favouring help, send us thy bounties, gracious Lord. Thou art the charioteer, Agni, of earthly wealth: find rest and safety for our seed!
meaning: अग्ने जरितर्विश्पतिस्तपानो देव रक्षसः अप्रोषिवान्गृहपते महाꣳ असि दिवस्पायुर्दुरोणयुः
sanskrit_iast: agne jaritarviśpatistapāno deva rakṣasaḥ aproṣivāngr̥hapate mahām̐ asi divaspāyurduroṇayuḥ

text: Famed art thou, Agni, far and wide, preserver, righteous, and a Sage. The holy singers, O enkindled radiant one, ordainers, call on thee to come.
meaning: अग्ने विवस्वदुषसश्चित्रꣳ राधो अमर्त्य आ दाशुषे जातवेदो वहा त्वमद्या देवाꣳ उषर्बुधः
sanskrit_iast: agne vivasvaduṣasaścitram̐ rādʰo amartya ā dāśuṣe jātavedo vahā tvamadyā devām̐ uṣarbudʰaḥ

text: O holy Agni, give us wealth famed among men and strengthening life! Bestow on us, O helper, that which many crave, more glorious still through righteousness!
meaning: त्वं नश्चित्र ऊत्या वसो राधाꣳसि चोदय अस्य रायस्त्वमग्ने रथीरसि विदा गाधं तुचे तु नः
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ naścitra ūtyā vaso rādʰām̐si codaya asya rāyastvamagne ratʰīrasi vidā gādʰaṃ tuce tu naḥ

text: To him, who dealeth out all wealth, the sweet-toned Hotar-priest of men, To him like the first vessels filled with savoury juice, to Agni let the lauds go forth.
meaning: त्वमित्सप्रथा अस्यग्ने त्रातरृतः कविः त्वां विप्रासः समिधान दीदिव आ विवासन्ति वेधसः
sanskrit_iast: tvamitsapratʰā asyagne trātarr̥taḥ kaviḥ tvāṃ viprāsaḥ samidʰāna dīdiva ā vivāsanti vedʰasaḥ

text: With this mine homage I invoke Agni for you, the Son of Strength, Dear, wisest envoy, skilled in noble sacrifice, immortal messenger of all.
meaning: आ नो अग्ने वयोवृधꣳ रयिं पावक शꣳस्यम् रास्वा च न उपमाते पुरुस्पृहꣳ सुनीती सुयशस्तरम्
sanskrit_iast: ā no agne vayovr̥dʰam̐ rayiṃ pāvaka śam̐syam rāsvā ca na upamāte puruspr̥ham̐ sunītī suyaśastaram

text: Thou liest in the logs that are thy mothers: mortals kindle thee. Alert thou bearest off the sacrifleer's gift, and then thou shinest to the Gods.
meaning: यो विश्वा दयते वसु होता मन्द्रो जनानाम् मधोर्न पात्रा प्रथमान्यस्मै प्र स्तोमा यन्त्वग्नये
sanskrit_iast: yo viśvā dayate vasu hotā mandro janānām madʰorna pātrā pratʰamānyasmai pra stomā yantvagnaye

text: He hath appeared, best prosperer, in whom men lay their holy acts: So may our songs of praise come nigh to Agni who was born to give the Arya strength!
meaning: एना वो अग्निं नमसोर्जो नपातमा हुवे प्रियं चेतिष्ठमरतिꣳ स्वाध्वरं विश्वस्य दूतममृतम्
sanskrit_iast: enā vo agniṃ namasorjo napātamā huve priyaṃ cetiṣṭʰamaratim̐ svādʰvaraṃ viśvasya dūtamamr̥tam

text: Chief Priest is Agni at the laud, as stones and grass at sacrifice. Gods! Maruts! Brahmanaspati! I crave with song the help that is most excellent.
meaning: शेषे वनेषु मातृषु सं त्वा मर्तास इन्धते अतन्द्रो हव्यं वहसि हविष्कृत आदिद्देवेषु राजसि
sanskrit_iast: śeṣe vaneṣu mātr̥ṣu saṃ tvā martāsa indʰate atandro havyaṃ vahasi haviṣkr̥ta ādiddeveṣu rājasi

text: Pray Agni of the piercing flame, with sacred songs, to be our help; For wealth, famed Agni, Purumilha and ye men! He is Suditi's sure defence.
meaning: अदर्शि गातुवित्तमो यस्मिन्व्रतान्यादधुः उपो षु जातमार्यस्य वर्धनमग्निं नक्षन्तु नो गिरः
sanskrit_iast: adarśi gātuvittamo yasminvratānyādadʰuḥ upo ṣu jātamāryasya vardʰanamagniṃ nakṣantu no giraḥ

text: Hear, Agni who hast ears to hear, with all thy train of escort Gods! With those who come at dawn let Mitra, Aryaman sit on the grass at sacrifice.
meaning: अग्निरुक्थे पुरोहितो ग्रावाणो बर्हिरध्वरे ऋचा यामि मरुतो ब्रह्मणस्पते देवा अवो वरेण्यम्
sanskrit_iast: agniruktʰe purohito grāvāṇo barhiradʰvare r̥cā yāmi maruto brahmaṇaspate devā avo vareṇyam

text: Agni of Divodasa, God, comes forth like Indra in his might. Rapidly hath he moved along his mother earth: he stands in high heaven's dwelling-place.
meaning: अग्निमीडिष्वावसे गाथाभिः शीरशोचिषम् अग्निꣳ राये पुरुमीढ श्रुतं नरो ऽग्निः सुदीतये छर्दिः
sanskrit_iast: agnimīḍiṣvāvase gātʰābʰiḥ śīraśociṣam agnim̐ rāye purumīḍʰa śrutaṃ naro 'gniḥ sudītaye cʰardiḥ

text: Whether thou come from earth or from the lofty lucid realm of heaven, Wax stronger in thy body through my song of praise: fill full all creatures, O most wise!
meaning: श्रुधि श्रुत्कर्ण वह्निभिर्देवैरग्ने सयावभिः आ सीदतु बर्हिषि मित्रो अर्यमा प्रातर्यावभिरध्वरे
sanskrit_iast: śrudʰi śrutkarṇa vahnibʰirdevairagne sayāvabʰiḥ ā sīdatu barhiṣi mitro aryamā prātaryāvabʰiradʰvare

text: If, loving well the forests, thou wentest to thy maternal floods, Not to be scorned, Agni, is that return of thine when, from afar, thou now art here.
meaning: प्र दैवोदासो अग्निर्देव इन्द्रो न मज्मना अनु मातरं पृथिवीं वि वावृते तस्थौ नाकस्य शर्मणि
sanskrit_iast: pra daivodāso agnirdeva indro na majmanā anu mātaraṃ pr̥tʰivīṃ vi vāvr̥te tastʰau nākasya śarmaṇi

text: O Agni, Manu stablished thee a light for all the race of men: With Kanva hast thou blazed, Law-born and waxen strong, thou whom the people reverence.
meaning: अध ज्मो अध वा दिवो बृहतो रोचनादधि अया वर्धस्व तन्वा गिरा ममा जाता सुक्रतो पृण
sanskrit_iast: adʰa jmo adʰa vā divo br̥hato rocanādadʰi ayā vardʰasva tanvā girā mamā jātā sukrato pr̥ṇa

text: The God who giveth wealth accept your full libation poured to, him! Pour ye it out, then fill the vessel full again, for so the God regardeth you.
meaning: कायमानो वना त्वं यन्मातॄरजगन्नपः न तत्ते अग्ने प्रमृषे निवर्तनं यद्दूरे सन्निहाभुवः
sanskrit_iast: kāyamāno vanā tvaṃ yanmātr̥̄rajagannapaḥ na tatte agne pramr̥ṣe nivartanaṃ yaddūre sannihābʰuvaḥ

text: Let Brahmanaspati come forth, let Sunrita the Goddess come, And Gods bring to our rite which yields a fivefold gift the hero, lover of mankind!
meaning: नि त्वामग्ने मनुर्दधे ज्योतिर्जनाय शश्वते दीदेथ कण्व ऋतजात उक्षितो यं नमस्यन्ति कृष्टयः
sanskrit_iast: ni tvāmagne manurdadʰe jyotirjanāya śaśvate dīdetʰa kaṇva r̥tajāta ukṣito yaṃ namasyanti kr̥ṣṭayaḥ

text: Stand up erect to lend us aid, stand up like Savitar the God, Erect as strength-bestower when we call on thee with priests who balm our offerings!
meaning: देवो वो द्रविणोदाः पूर्णां विवष्ट्वासिचम् उद्वा सिञ्जध्वमुप वा पृणध्वमादिद्वो देव ओहते
sanskrit_iast: devo vo draviṇodāḥ pūrṇāṃ vivaṣṭvāsicam udvā siñjadʰvamupa vā pr̥ṇadʰvamādidvo deva ohate

text: The man who bringeth gifts to thee, bright God who fain wouldst lead to wealth, Winneth himself a brave son, Agni! skilled in lauds, one prospering in a thousand ways.
meaning: प्रैतु ब्रह्मणस्पतिः प्र देव्येतु सूनृता अच्छा वीरं नर्यं पङ्क्तिराधसं देवा यज्ञं नयन्तु नः
sanskrit_iast: praitu brahmaṇaspatiḥ pra devyetu sūnr̥tā accʰā vīraṃ naryaṃ paṅktirādʰasaṃ devā yajñaṃ nayantu naḥ

text: With hymns and holy eulogies we supplicate your Agni, Lord Of many families who duly serve the Gods, yea, him whom others too inflame.
meaning: ऊर्ध्व ऊ षु ण ऊतये तिष्ठा देवो न सविता ऊर्ध्वो वाजस्य सनिता यदञ्जिभिर्वाघद्भिर्विह्वयामहे
sanskrit_iast: ūrdʰva ū ṣu ṇa ūtaye tiṣṭʰā devo na savitā ūrdʰvo vājasya sanitā yadañjibʰirvāgʰadbʰirvihvayāmahe

text: This Agni is the Lord of great prosperity and hero, strength, Of wealth with noble offspring and with store of kine, the Lord of battles with the foe.
meaning: प्र यो राये निनीषति मर्तो यस्ते वसो दाशत् स वीरं धत्ते अग्न उक्थशꣳसिनं त्मना सहस्रपोषिणम्
sanskrit_iast: pra yo rāye ninīṣati marto yaste vaso dāśat sa vīraṃ dʰatte agna uktʰaśam̐sinaṃ tmanā sahasrapoṣiṇam

text: Thou, Agni, art the homestead's Lord, our Hotar-priest at sacrifice. Lord of all boons, thou art the Potar, passing wise. Pay worship, and enjoy the good!
meaning: प्र वो यह्वं पुरूणां विशां देवयतीनाम् अग्निꣳ सूक्तेभिर्वचोभिर्वृणीमहे यꣳसमिदन्य इन्धते
sanskrit_iast: pra vo yahvaṃ purūṇāṃ viśāṃ devayatīnām agnim̐ sūktebʰirvacobʰirvr̥ṇīmahe yam̐samidanya indʰate

text: We as thy friends have chosen thee, mortals a God, to be our help. The Waters' Child, the blessed, the most mighty one, swift conqueror, and without a peer.
meaning: अयमग्निः सुवीर्यस्येशे हि सौभगस्य राय ईशे स्वपत्यस्य गोमत ईशे वृत्रहथानाम्
sanskrit_iast: ayamagniḥ suvīryasyeśe hi saubʰagasya rāya īśe svapatyasya gomata īśe vr̥trahatʰānām

text: Present oblations, make him splendid: set ye as Hotar in his place the Home's Lord, worshipped With gifts and homage where they pour libations! Honour him meet for reverence in our houses.
meaning: त्वमग्ने गृहपतिस्त्वꣳ होता नो अध्वरे त्वं पोता विश्ववार प्रचेता ताक्षि यासि च वार्यम्
sanskrit_iast: tvamagne gr̥hapatistvam̐ hotā no adʰvare tvaṃ potā viśvavāra pracetā tākṣi yāsi ca vāryam

text: Verily wondrous is the tender youngling's growth who never draweth nigh to drink his mother's milk. As soon as she who hath no udder bore him, he, faring on his. great errand, suddenly grew strong.
meaning: सखायस्त्वा ववृमहे देवं मर्तास ऊतये अपां नपातꣳ सुभगꣳ सुदꣳससꣳ सुप्रतूर्तिमनेहसम्
sanskrit_iast: sakʰāyastvā vavr̥mahe devaṃ martāsa ūtaye apāṃ napātam̐ subʰagam̐ sudam̐sasam̐ supratūrtimanehasam

text: Here is one light for thee, another yonder: enter the third and, be therewith united. Beautiful be thy union with the body, beloved in the Gods' sublimest birthplace!
meaning: आ जुहोता हविषा मर्जयध्वं नि होतारं गृहपतिं दधिध्वम् इडस्पदे नमसा रातहव्यꣳ सपर्यता यजतं पस्त्यानाम्
sanskrit_iast: ā juhotā haviṣā marjayadʰvaṃ ni hotāraṃ gr̥hapatiṃ dadʰidʰvam iḍaspade namasā rātahavyam̐ saparyatā yajataṃ pastyānām

text: For Jatavedas, worthy of our praise, will we frame with our mind this eulogy as 'twere a car; For good, in his assembly, is this care of ours. Let us not, in thy friendship, Agni, suffer harm!
meaning: चित्र इच्छिशोस्तरुणस्य वक्षथो न यो मातरावन्वेति धातवे अनूधा यदजीजनदधा चिदा ववक्षत्सद्यो महि दूत्या३ं चरन्
sanskrit_iast: citra iccʰiśostaruṇasya vakṣatʰo na yo mātarāvanveti dʰātave anūdʰā yadajījanadadʰā cidā vavakṣatsadyo mahi dūtyā3ṃ caran

text: Agni Vaisvanara, born in course of Order, the messenger of earth, the head of heaven, The Sage, the sovran, guest of men, our vessel fit for their mouth, the Gods have generated.
meaning: इदं त एकं पर ऊ त एकं तृतीयेन ज्योतिषा सं विशस्व संवेशनस्तन्वे३ चारुरेधि प्रियो देवानां परमे जनित्रे
sanskrit_iast: idaṃ ta ekaṃ para ū ta ekaṃ tr̥tīyena jyotiṣā saṃ viśasva saṃveśanastanve3 cāruredʰi priyo devānāṃ parame janitre

text: Even as the waters from the mountain ridges, so sprang the; Gods, through lauds, from thee, O Agni. To thee speed hymns and eulogies, as horses haste, bearing him who loves the song, to battle.
meaning: इमꣳ स्तोममर्हते जातवेदसे रथमिव सं महेमा मनीषया भद्रा हि नः प्रमतिरस्य सꣳसद्यग्ने सख्ये मा रिषामा वयं तव
sanskrit_iast: imam̐ stomamarhate jātavedase ratʰamiva saṃ mahemā manīṣayā bʰadrā hi naḥ pramatirasya sam̐sadyagne sakʰye mā riṣāmā vayaṃ tava

text: Win to protect you, Rudra, lord of worship, priest of both worlds, effectual sacrificer, Agni, invested with his golden colours, before the thunder strike and lay you senseless!
meaning: मूर्धानं दिवो अरतिं पृथिव्या वैश्वानरमृत आ जातमग्निम् कविꣳ सम्राजमतिथिं जनानामासन्नाः पात्रं जनयन्त देवाः
sanskrit_iast: mūrdʰānaṃ divo aratiṃ pr̥tʰivyā vaiśvānaramr̥ta ā jātamagnim kavim̐ samrājamatitʰiṃ janānāmāsannāḥ pātraṃ janayanta devāḥ

text: The King whose face is decked with oil is kindled with homage offered by his faithful servant. The men, the priests adore him with oblations. Agni hath shone forth at the flush of morning.
meaning: वि त्वदापो न पर्वतस्य पृष्ठादुक्थेभिरग्ने जनयन्त देवाः तं त्वा गिरः सुष्टुतयो वाजयन्त्याजिं न गिर्ववाहो जिग्युरश्वाः
sanskrit_iast: vi tvadāpo na parvatasya pr̥ṣṭʰāduktʰebʰiragne janayanta devāḥ taṃ tvā giraḥ suṣṭutayo vājayantyājiṃ na girvavāho jigyuraśvāḥ

text: Agni advanceth with his lofty banner: through earth and heaven the Bull hath loudly bellowed He hath come nigh from the sky's farthest limit: the Steer hath waxen in the waters' bosom.
meaning: आ वो राजानमध्वरस्य रुद्रꣳ होतारꣳ सत्ययजꣳ रोदस्योः अग्निं पुरा तनयित्नोरचित्ताद्धिरण्यरूपमवसे कृणुध्वम्
sanskrit_iast: ā vo rājānamadʰvarasya rudram̐ hotāram̐ satyayajam̐ rodasyoḥ agniṃ purā tanayitnoracittāddʰiraṇyarūpamavase kr̥ṇudʰvam

text: From the two fire-sticks have the men engendered with thoughts, urged by the hand, the glorious Agni, Far-seen, with pointed flame, Lord of the Homestead.
meaning: इन्धे राजा समर्यो नमोभिर्यस्य प्रतीकमाहुतं घृतेन नरो हव्येभिरीडते सबाध आग्निरग्रमुषसामशोचि
sanskrit_iast: indʰe rājā samaryo namobʰiryasya pratīkamāhutaṃ gʰr̥tena naro havyebʰirīḍate sabādʰa āgniragramuṣasāmaśoci

text: Agni is wakened by the people's fuel to meet the Dawn who cometh like a milch-cow. Like young trees shooting up on high their branches, his flames. are mounting to the vault of heaven.
meaning: प्र केतुना बृहता यात्यग्निरा रोदसी वृषभो रोरवीति दिवश्चिदन्तादुपमामुदानडपामुपस्थे महिषो ववर्ध
sanskrit_iast: pra ketunā br̥hatā yātyagnirā rodasī vr̥ṣabʰo roravīti divaścidantādupamāmudānaḍapāmupastʰe mahiṣo vavardʰa

text: Set forth the gleaming one, the song-inspirer, not foolish with. the foolish, fort-destroyer, Who leadeth with his hymns to thought of conquest, gold-bearded, richly splendid with his armour
meaning: अग्निं नरो दीधितिभिरण्योर्हस्तच्युतं जनयत प्रशस्तम् दूरेदृशं गृहपतिमथव्युम्
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ naro dīdʰitibʰiraṇyorhastacyutaṃ janayata praśastam dūredr̥śaṃ gr̥hapatimatʰavyum

text: Thou art like heaven: one form is bright, one holy, like Day and Night dissimilar in colour. All magic powers thou aidest, self-dependent! Auspicious bethy bounty here, O Pushan!
meaning: अबोध्यग्निः समिधा जनानां प्रति धेनुमिवायतीमुषासम् यह्वा इव प्र वयामुज्जिहानाः प्र भानवः सस्रते नाकमच्छ
sanskrit_iast: abodʰyagniḥ samidʰā janānāṃ prati dʰenumivāyatīmuṣāsam yahvā iva pra vayāmujjihānāḥ pra bʰānavaḥ sasrate nākamaccʰa

text: As holy food, Agni, to thine invoker give wealth in cattle, lasting, rich in marvels! To us be born a son and spreading offspring. Agni, be this thy gracious will to us-ward!
meaning: प्र भूर्जयन्तं महां विपोधां मूरैरमूरं पुरां दर्माणम् नयन्तं गीर्भिर्वना धियं धा हरिश्मश्रुं न वार्मणा धनर्चिम्
sanskrit_iast: pra bʰūrjayantaṃ mahāṃ vipodʰāṃ mūrairamūraṃ purāṃ darmāṇam nayantaṃ gīrbʰirvanā dʰiyaṃ dʰā hariśmaśruṃ na vārmaṇā dʰanarcim

text: Stablished to fill the juice with vital vigour, giver of wealth, guard of his servant's body, The great Priest, born, who knows the clouds, abider with men, is seated in the waters' eddy.
Let the song, honouring the best, with longing honour the Asura's most famous sovran, The deeds of him the mighty, deeds like Indra's, the manly one in whom the folk must triumph!
meaning: शुक्रं ते अन्यद्यजतं ते अन्यद्विषुरूपे अहनी द्यौरिवासि विश्वा हि माया अवसि स्वधावन्भद्रा ते पूषन्निह रातिरस्तु इडामग्ने पुरुदꣳसꣳ सनिं गोः शश्वत्तमꣳ हवमानाय साध स्यान्नः सूनुस्तनयो विजावाग्ने सा ते सुमतिर्भूत्वस्मे
sanskrit_iast: śukraṃ te anyadyajataṃ te anyadviṣurūpe ahanī dyaurivāsi viśvā hi māyā avasi svadʰāvanbʰadrā te pūṣanniha rātirastu iḍāmagne purudam̐sam̐ saniṃ goḥ śaśvattamam̐ havamānāya sādʰa syānnaḥ sūnustanayo vijāvāgne sā te sumatirbʰūtvasme

text: In the two kindling-blocks lies Jatavedas like the well-cherished germ in pregnant women,-- Agni who day by day must be entreated by men who watch provided with oblations.
meaning: प्र होता जातो महान्नभोविन्नृषद्मा सीददपां विवर्ते दधद्यो धायी सुते वयाꣳसि यन्ता वसूनि विधते तनूपाः
sanskrit_iast: pra hotā jāto mahānnabʰovinnr̥ṣadmā sīdadapāṃ vivarte dadʰadyo dʰāyī sute vayām̐si yantā vasūni vidʰate tanūpāḥ

text: Agni, from days of old thou slayest demons: never shall Rakshasas in fight o'ercome thee. Burn up the foolish ones, raw flesh devourers: let none of them escape thine heavenly arrow!
meaning: प्र सम्राजमसुरस्य प्रश्स्तं पुꣳसः कृष्टीनामनुमाद्यस्य इन्द्रस्येव प्र तवसस्कृतानि वन्दद्वारा वन्दमाना विवष्टु
sanskrit_iast: pra samrājamasurasya praśstaṃ pum̐saḥ kr̥ṣṭīnāmanumādyasya indrasyeva pra tavasaskr̥tāni vandadvārā vandamānā vivaṣṭu

text: Bring us most mighty splendour thou, Agni, resistless on thy way: Prepare for us the path that leads to glorious opulence and strength!
meaning: अरण्योर्निहितो जातवेदा गर्भ इवेत्सुभृतो गर्भिणीभिः दिवेदिव ईड्यो जागृवद्भिर्हविष्मद्भिर्मनुष्येभिरग्निः
sanskrit_iast: araṇyornihito jātavedā garbʰa ivetsubʰr̥to garbʰiṇībʰiḥ divediva īḍyo jāgr̥vadbʰirhaviṣmadbʰirmanuṣyebʰiragniḥ

text: May the brave man, if full of zeal he serve and kindle Agni's flame, Duly presenting sacred gifts, enjoy the Gods' protecting help.
meaning: सनादग्ने मृणसि यातुधानान्न त्वा रक्षाꣳसि पृतनासु जिग्युः अनु दह सहमूरान्कयादो मा ते हेत्या मुक्षत दैव्यायाः
sanskrit_iast: sanādagne mr̥ṇasi yātudʰānānna tvā rakṣām̐si pr̥tanāsu jigyuḥ anu daha sahamūrānkayādo mā te hetyā mukṣata daivyāyāḥ

text: Thy bright smoke lifts itself aloft, and far-extended shines in heaven, For, Purifier! like the Sun thou beamest with thy radiant glow.
meaning: अग्न ओजिष्ठमा भर द्युम्नमस्मभ्यमध्रिगो प्र नो राये पनीयसे रत्सि वाजाय पन्थाम्
sanskrit_iast: agna ojiṣṭʰamā bʰara dyumnamasmabʰyamadʰrigo pra no rāye panīyase ratsi vājāya pantʰām

text: Thou, Agni, even as Mitra, hast a princely glory of thine own. Bright, active God, thou makest fame increase like means of nourishment.
meaning: यदि वीरो अनु ष्यादग्निमिन्धीत मर्त्यः आजुह्वद्धव्यमानुषक्शर्म भक्षीत दैव्यम्
sanskrit_iast: yadi vīro anu ṣyādagnimindʰīta martyaḥ ājuhvaddʰavyamānuṣakśarma bʰakṣīta daivyam

text: At dawn let Agni, much-beloved, guest of the house, be glorified, In whom, the everlasting one, all mortals make their offerings blaze.
meaning: त्वेषस्ते धूम ऋण्वति दिवि सं च्छुक्र आततः सूरो न हि द्युता त्वं कृपा पावक रोचसे
sanskrit_iast: tveṣaste dʰūma r̥ṇvati divi saṃ ccʰukra ātataḥ sūro na hi dyutā tvaṃ kr̥pā pāvaka rocase

text: Most moving song be Agni's: shine on high, O rich in radiant light! Like the chief consort of a King riches and strength proceed from thee.
meaning: त्वꣳ हि क्षैतवद्यशो ऽग्ने मित्रो न पत्यसे त्वं विचर्षणे श्रवो वसो पुष्टिं न पुष्यसि
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hi kṣaitavadyaśo 'gne mitro na patyase tvaṃ vicarṣaṇe śravo vaso puṣṭiṃ na puṣyasi

text: Exerting all our strength with thoughts of power we glorify in speech Agni your dear familiar friend, the darling guest in every house.
meaning: प्रातरग्निः पुरुप्रियो विष स्तवेतातिथिः विश्वे यस्मिन्नमर्त्ये हव्यं मर्तास इन्धते
sanskrit_iast: prātaragniḥ purupriyo viṣa stavetātitʰiḥ viśve yasminnamartye havyaṃ martāsa indʰate

text: His beam hath lofty power of life: sing praise to Agni, to the God Whom men have set in foremost place, like Mitra for their eulogy!
meaning: यद्वाहिष्ठं तदग्नये बृहदर्च विभावसो महिषीव त्वद्रयिस्त्वद्वाजा उदीरते
sanskrit_iast: yadvāhiṣṭʰaṃ tadagnaye br̥hadarca vibʰāvaso mahiṣīva tvadrayistvadvājā udīrate

text: To noblest Agni, friend of man, chief Vritra-slayer, have we come- Who with Srutarvan, Riksha's son, in lofty presence is inflamed.
meaning: विशोविशो वो अतिथिं वाजयन्तः पुरुप्रियम् अग्निं वो दुर्यं वचः स्तुषे शूषस्य मन्मभिः
sanskrit_iast: viśoviśo vo atitʰiṃ vājayantaḥ purupriyam agniṃ vo duryaṃ vacaḥ stuṣe śūṣasya manmabʰiḥ

text: Born as the loftiest Law commands, comrade of those who grew with him. Agni, the sire of Kasyapa by faith, the mother, Manu, Sage.
meaning: बृहद्वयो हि भानवे ऽर्चा देवायाग्नये यं मित्रं न प्रशस्तये मर्तासो दधिरे पुरः
sanskrit_iast: br̥hadvayo hi bʰānave 'rcā devāyāgnaye yaṃ mitraṃ na praśastaye martāso dadʰire puraḥ

text: We in King Soma place our trust, in Agni, and in Varuna, The Aditya, Vishnu, Surya, and the Brahman-priest Brihaspati.
meaning: अगन्म वृत्रहन्तमं ज्येष्ठमग्निमानवम् य स्म श्रुतर्वन्नार्क्षे बृहदनीक इध्यते
sanskrit_iast: aganma vr̥trahantamaṃ jyeṣṭʰamagnimānavam ya sma śrutarvannārkṣe br̥hadanīka idʰyate

text: Hence have these men gone up on high and mounted to the heights of heaven: On! conquer on the path by which Angirasas travelled to the skies!
meaning: जातः परेण धर्मणा यत्सवृद्भिः सहाभुवः पिता यत्कश्यपस्याग्निः श्रद्धा माता मनुः कविः
sanskrit_iast: jātaḥ pareṇa dʰarmaṇā yatsavr̥dbʰiḥ sahābʰuvaḥ pitā yatkaśyapasyāgniḥ śraddʰā mātā manuḥ kaviḥ

text: That thou mayst send us ample wealth, O Agni, we will kindler thee: So, for the great oblation, Steer, pray Heaven and Earth to come to us!
meaning: सोमꣳ राजानं वरुणमग्निमन्वारभामहे आदित्यं विष्णुꣳ सूर्यं ब्रह्मानं च बृहस्पतिम्
sanskrit_iast: somam̐ rājānaṃ varuṇamagnimanvārabʰāmahe ādityaṃ viṣṇum̐ sūryaṃ brahmānaṃ ca br̥haspatim

text: He runs when one calls after him, This is the prayer of him who prays. He holds all knowledge in his grasp even as the felly rounds the wheel.
meaning: इत एत उदारुहन्दिवः पृष्ठान्या रुहन् प्र भूर्जयो यथा पथोद्यामङ्गिरसो ययुः
sanskrit_iast: ita eta udāruhandivaḥ pr̥ṣṭʰānyā ruhan pra bʰūrjayo yatʰā patʰodyāmaṅgiraso yayuḥ

text: Shoot forth, O Agni, with thy flame: demolish them on every side! Break down the Yatudhana's strength, the vigour of the Rakshasa!
meaning: राये अग्ने महे त्वा दानाय समिधीमहि ईडिष्वा हि महे वृषं द्यावा होत्राय पृथिवी
sanskrit_iast: rāye agne mahe tvā dānāya samidʰīmahi īḍiṣvā hi mahe vr̥ṣaṃ dyāvā hotrāya pr̥tʰivī

text: Worship the Vasus, Agni! here, the Rudras and Adityas, all Who know fair sacrifices, sprung from Mann, scattering blessings down!
meaning: दधन्वे वा यदीमनु वोचद्ब्रह्मेति वेरु तत् परि विश्वानि काव्या नेमिश्चक्रमिवाभुवत्
sanskrit_iast: dadʰanve vā yadīmanu vocadbrahmeti veru tat pari viśvāni kāvyā nemiścakramivābʰuvat

text: Agni, thy faithful servant I call upon thee with many a gift, As in the keeping of the great inciting God.
meaning: प्रत्यग्ने हरसा हरः शृणाहि विश्वतस्परि यातुधानस्य रक्षसो बलं न्युब्जवीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: pratyagne harasā haraḥ śr̥ṇāhi viśvataspari yātudʰānasya rakṣaso balaṃ nyubjavīryam

text: To Agni, to the Hotar-priest offer your best, your lofty speech, To him ordainer-like who bears the light of songs.
meaning: त्वमग्ने वसूꣳरिह रुद्राꣳ आदित्याꣳ उत यजा स्वध्वरं जनं मनुजातं घृतप्रुषम्
sanskrit_iast: tvamagne vasūm̐riha rudrām̐ ādityām̐ uta yajā svadʰvaraṃ janaṃ manujātaṃ gʰr̥tapruṣam

text: O Agni, thou who art the lord of wealth in kine, thou Son of Strength, Bestow on us, O Jatavedas, high renown
meaning: पुरु त्वा दाशिवाꣳ वोचे ऽरिरग्ने तव स्विदा तोदस्येव शरण आ महस्य
sanskrit_iast: puru tvā dāśivām̐ voce 'riragne tava svidā todasyeva śaraṇa ā mahasya

text: Most skilled in sacrifice, bring the Gods, O Agni, to the pious, man: A joyful Priest, thy splendour drives our foes afar
meaning: प्र होत्रे पूर्व्यं वचो ऽग्नये भरता बृहत् विपां ज्योतीꣳषि बिभ्रते न वेधसे
sanskrit_iast: pra hotre pūrvyaṃ vaco 'gnaye bʰaratā br̥hat vipāṃ jyotīm̐ṣi bibʰrate na vedʰase

text: Taught by seven mothers at his birth was he, for glory of the wise. He, firm and sure, hath set his mind on glorious wealth
meaning: अग्ने वाजस्य गोमत ईशानः सहसो यहो अस्मे धेहि जातवेदो महि श्रवः
sanskrit_iast: agne vājasya gomata īśānaḥ sahaso yaho asme dʰehi jātavedo mahi śravaḥ

text: And in the day our prayer is this: May Aditi come nigh to help, With loving-kindness bring us weal and chase our foes
meaning: अग्ने यजिष्ठो अध्वरे देवां देवयते यज होता मन्द्रो वि राजस्यति स्रिधः
sanskrit_iast: agne yajiṣṭʰo adʰvare devāṃ devayate yaja hotā mandro vi rājasyati sridʰaḥ

text: Worship thou Jatavedas, pray to him who willingly accepts, Whose smoke wanders at will, and none may grasp his flame
meaning: जज्ञानः सप्त मातृभिर्मेधामाशासत श्रिये अयं ध्रुवो रयीणां चिकेतदा
sanskrit_iast: jajñānaḥ sapta mātr̥bʰirmedʰāmāśāsata śriye ayaṃ dʰruvo rayīṇāṃ ciketadā

text: No mortal man can e'er prevail by arts of magic over him Who hath served Agni well, the oblation-giving God.
meaning: उत स्या नो दिवा मतिरदितिरूत्यागमत् सा शन्ताता मयस्करदप स्रिधः
sanskrit_iast: uta syā no divā matiraditirūtyāgamat sā śantātā mayaskaradapa sridʰaḥ

text: Agni, drive thou the wicked foe, the evil-hearted thief away, Far, far, Lord of the brave! and give us easy paths!
meaning: ईडिष्वा हि प्रतीव्या३ं यजस्व जातवेदसम् चरिष्णुधूममगृभीतशोचिषम्
sanskrit_iast: īḍiṣvā hi pratīvyā3ṃ yajasva jātavedasam cariṣṇudʰūmamagr̥bʰītaśociṣam

text: O hero Agni, Lord of men, on hearing this new laud of mine Burn down the Rakshasas, enchanters, with thy flame!
meaning: न तस्य मायया च न रिपुरीशीत मर्त्यः यो अग्नये ददाश हव्यदातये
sanskrit_iast: na tasya māyayā ca na ripurīśīta martyaḥ yo agnaye dadāśa havyadātaye

text: Sing forth to him the holy, most munificent, sublime with his refulgent glow, To Agni, ye Upastutas
meaning: अप त्यं वृजिनꣳ रिपुꣳ स्तेनमग्ने दुराध्यम् दविष्ठमस्य सत्पते कृधी सुगम्
sanskrit_iast: apa tyaṃ vr̥jinam̐ ripum̐ stenamagne durādʰyam daviṣṭʰamasya satpate kr̥dʰī sugam

text: Agni, he conquers by thine aid that brings him store of valiant sons and does great deeds, Whose bond of friendship is thy choice
meaning: श्रुष्ट्यग्ने नवस्य मे स्तोमस्य वीर विश्पते नि मायिनस्तपसा रक्षसो दह
sanskrit_iast: śruṣṭyagne navasya me stomasya vīra viśpate ni māyinastapasā rakṣaso daha

text: Sing praise to him the Lord of light! The Gods have made the God to be their messenger, To bear oblation to the Gods.
meaning: प्र मꣳहिष्ठाय गायत ऋताव्ने बृहते शुक्रशोचिषे उपस्तुतासो अग्नये
sanskrit_iast: pra mam̐hiṣṭʰāya gāyata r̥tāvne br̥hate śukraśociṣe upastutāso agnaye

text: Anger not him who is our guest! He is the bright God Agni, praised by many a man, God Hotar, skilled in sacrifice.
meaning: प्र सो अग्ने तवोतिभिः सुवीराभिस्तरति वाजकर्मभिः यस्य त्वꣳ सख्यमाविथ
sanskrit_iast: pra so agne tavotibʰiḥ suvīrābʰistarati vājakarmabʰiḥ yasya tvam̐ sakʰyamāvitʰa

text: May Agni, worshipped, bring us bliss: may the gift, blessed one! and sacrifice bring bliss. Yea, may our eulogies bring bliss.
meaning: तं गूर्धया स्वर्णरं देवासो देवमरतिं दधन्विरे देवत्रा हव्यमूहिषे
sanskrit_iast: taṃ gūrdʰayā svarṇaraṃ devāso devamaratiṃ dadʰanvire devatrā havyamūhiṣe

text: Thee have we chosen skilfullest in sacrifice, immortal Priest among the Gods, Wise finisher of this holy rite.
meaning: मा नो हृणीथा अतिथिं वसुरग्निः पुरुप्रशस्त एशः यः सुहोता स्वध्वरः
sanskrit_iast: mā no hr̥ṇītʰā atitʰiṃ vasuragniḥ purupraśasta eśaḥ yaḥ suhotā svadʰvaraḥ

text: Bring us that splendour, Agni, which may overcome each greedy fiend in our abode, And the malicious wrath of men!
meaning: भद्रो नो अग्निराहुतो भद्रा रातिः सुभग भद्रो अध्वरः भद्रा उत प्रशस्तयः
sanskrit_iast: bʰadro no agnirāhuto bʰadrā rātiḥ subʰaga bʰadro adʰvaraḥ bʰadrā uta praśastayaḥ

text: Soon as the eager Lord of men is friendly unto Manu's race Agni averteth from us all the Rakshasas!
meaning: यजिष्ठं त्वा ववृमहे देवं देवत्रा होतारममर्त्यम् अस्य यज्ञस्य सुक्रतुम्
sanskrit_iast: yajiṣṭʰaṃ tvā vavr̥mahe devaṃ devatrā hotāramamartyam asya yajñasya sukratum

text: Sing this, beside the flowing juice, to him your hero, much-invoked, To please him as a mighty Bull
meaning: तदग्ने द्युम्नमा भर यत्सासाहा सदने कं चिदत्रिणम् मन्युं जनस्य दूढ्यम्
sanskrit_iast: tadagne dyumnamā bʰara yatsāsāhā sadane kaṃ cidatriṇam manyuṃ janasya dūḍʰyam

text: O Satakratu Indra, now rejoice with that carouse of thine Which is most glorious of all!
meaning: यद्वा उ विश्पतिः शितः सुप्रीतो मनुषो विशे विश्वेदग्निः प्रति रक्षाꣳसि सेधति
sanskrit_iast: yadvā u viśpatiḥ śitaḥ suprīto manuṣo viśe viśvedagniḥ prati rakṣām̐si sedʰati

text: Ye cows, protect the fount: the two mighty ones bless the sacrifice. The handles twain are wrought of gold.
meaning: तद्वो गाय सुते सचा पुरुहूताय सत्वने शं यद्गवे न शाकिने
sanskrit_iast: tadvo gāya sute sacā puruhūtāya satvane śaṃ yadgave na śākine

text: Sing praises that the horse may come; sing, Srutakaksha, that the cow May come, that Indra's might may come
meaning: यस्ते नूनꣳ शतक्रतविन्द्र द्युम्नितमो मदः तेन नूनं मदे मदेः
sanskrit_iast: yaste nūnam̐ śatakratavindra dyumnitamo madaḥ tena nūnaṃ made madeḥ

text: We make this Indra very strong to strike, the mighty Vritra dead: A vigorous hero shall he be.
meaning: गाव उप वदावटे महि यज्ञस्य रप्सुदा उभा कर्णा हिरण्यया
sanskrit_iast: gāva upa vadāvaṭe mahi yajñasya rapsudā ubʰā karṇā hiraṇyayā

text: Based upon strength and victory and power, O Indra, is thy birth: Thou, mighty one! art strong indeed,
meaning: अरमश्वाय गायत श्रुतकक्षारं गवे अरमिन्द्रस्य धाम्ने
sanskrit_iast: aramaśvāya gāyata śrutakakṣāraṃ gave aramindrasya dʰāmne

text: The sacrifice made Indra great when he unrolled the earth, and made Himself a diadem in heaven.
meaning: तमिन्द्रं वाजयामसि महे वृत्राय हन्तवे स वृषा वृषभो भुवत्
sanskrit_iast: tamindraṃ vājayāmasi mahe vr̥trāya hantave sa vr̥ṣā vr̥ṣabʰo bʰuvat

text: If I, O Indra, were, like thee, the single ruler over wealth My worshipper should be rich in kine.
meaning: त्वमिन्द्र बलादधि सहसो जात ओजसः त्वꣳ सन्वृषन्वृषेदसि
sanskrit_iast: tvamindra balādadʰi sahaso jāta ojasaḥ tvam̐ sanvr̥ṣanvr̥ṣedasi

text: Pressers, blend Soma juice for him, each draught most excellent, for him The brave, the hero, for his joy.
meaning: यज्ञ इन्द्रमवर्धयद्यद्भूमिं व्यवर्तयत् चक्राण ओपशं दिवि
sanskrit_iast: yajña indramavardʰayadyadbʰūmiṃ vyavartayat cakrāṇa opaśaṃ divi

text: Here is the Soma juice expressed. O Vasu, drink till thou art full: Undaunted God, we give it thee
meaning: यदिन्द्राहं तथा त्वमीशीय वस्व एक इत् स्तोता मे गोसखा स्यात्
sanskrit_iast: yadindrāhaṃ tatʰā tvamīśīya vasva eka it stotā me gosakʰā syāt

text: Surya, thou mountest up to meet the hero famous for his wealth, Who hurls the bolt and works for man.
meaning: पन्यंपन्यमित्सोतार आ धावत मद्याय सोमं वीराय शूराय
sanskrit_iast: panyaṃpanyamitsotāra ā dʰāvata madyāya somaṃ vīrāya śūrāya

text: Whatever, Vritra-slayer! thou, Surya hast risen upon to-day, That, Indra, all is in thy power.
meaning: इदं वसो सुतमन्धः पिबा सुपूर्णमुदरम् अनाभयिन्ररिमा ते
sanskrit_iast: idaṃ vaso sutamandʰaḥ pibā supūrṇamudaram anābʰayinrarimā te

text: That Indra is our youthful friend, who with his trusty guidanceled Turvasa, Yadu from afar.
meaning: उद्धेदभि श्रुतामघं वृषभं नर्यापसम् अस्तारमेषि सूर्य
sanskrit_iast: uddʰedabʰi śrutāmagʰaṃ vr̥ṣabʰaṃ naryāpasam astārameṣi sūrya

text: O Indra, let not ill designs surround us in the sunbeams' light This may we gain with thee for friend!
meaning: यदद्य कच्च वृत्रहन्नुदगा अभि सूर्य सर्वं तदिन्द्र ते वशे
sanskrit_iast: yadadya kacca vr̥trahannudagā abʰi sūrya sarvaṃ tadindra te vaśe

text: Indra, bring wealth that gives delight, the victor's ever-conquering wealth, Most excellent, to be our aid
meaning: य आनयत्परावतः सुनीती तुर्वशं यदुम् इन्द्रः स नो युवा सखा
sanskrit_iast: ya ānayatparāvataḥ sunītī turvaśaṃ yadum indraḥ sa no yuvā sakʰā

text: In mighty battle we invoke Indra, Indra is lesser fight, The friend who bends his bolt at fiends.
meaning: मा न इन्द्राभ्या ऽ ऽ३ दिशः सूरो अक्तुष्वा यमत त्वा युजा वनेम तत्
sanskrit_iast: mā na indrābʰyā ' '3 diśaḥ sūro aktuṣvā yamata tvā yujā vanema tat

text: In battle of a thousand arms Indra drank Kadru's Soma juice There he displayed his manly might.
meaning: एन्द्र सानसिꣳ रयिꣳ सजित्वानꣳ सदासहम् वर्षिष्ठमूतये भर
sanskrit_iast: endra sānasim̐ rayim̐ sajitvānam̐ sadāsaham varṣiṣṭʰamūtaye bʰara

text: Faithful to thee, we sing aloud, heroic Indra, songs to thee Mark, O good Lord, this act of ours!
meaning: इन्द्रं वयं महाधन इन्द्रमर्भे हवामहे युजं वृत्रेषु वज्रिणम्
sanskrit_iast: indraṃ vayaṃ mahādʰana indramarbʰe havāmahe yujaṃ vr̥treṣu vajriṇam

text: Hitherward! they who light the flame and straightway trim the sacred grass, Whose friend is Indra ever young.
meaning: अपिबत्कद्रुवः सुतमिन्द्रः सहस्रबाह्वे तत्राददिष्ट पौꣳस्यम्
sanskrit_iast: apibatkadruvaḥ sutamindraḥ sahasrabāhve tatrādadiṣṭa paum̐syam

text: Drive all our enemies away, smite down the foes who press around, And bring the wealth for which we long!
meaning: वयमिन्द्र त्वायवो ऽभि प्र नोनुमो वृषन् विद्धी त्वा३स्य नो वसो
sanskrit_iast: vayamindra tvāyavo 'bʰi pra nonumo vr̥ṣan viddʰī tvā3sya no vaso

text: I Hear, as though 'twere close at hand, the cracking of the whips they hold: They gather splendour on their way.
meaning: आ घा ये अग्निमिन्धते स्तृणन्ति बर्हिरानुषक् येषामिन्द्रो युवा सखा
sanskrit_iast: ā gʰā ye agnimindʰate str̥ṇanti barhirānuṣak yeṣāmindro yuvā sakʰā

text: Indra, these friends of ours, supplied with Soma, wait and look to thee As men with fodder to the herd.
meaning: भिन्धि विश्वा अप द्विषः परि बाधो जही मृधः वसु स्पार्हं तदा भर
sanskrit_iast: bʰindʰi viśvā apa dviṣaḥ pari bādʰo jahī mr̥dʰaḥ vasu spārhaṃ tadā bʰara

text: Before his hot displeasure all the peoples, all the men bow down, As rivers bow them to the sea.
meaning: इहेव शृण्व एषां कशा हस्तेषु यद्वदान् नि यामं चित्रमृञ्जते
sanskrit_iast: iheva śr̥ṇva eṣāṃ kaśā hasteṣu yadvadān ni yāmaṃ citramr̥ñjate

text: We choose unto ourselves that high protection of the mighty Gods, That it may help and succour us.
meaning: इम उ त्वा वि चक्षते सखाय इन्द्र सोमिनः पुष्टावन्तो यथा पशुम्
sanskrit_iast: ima u tvā vi cakṣate sakʰāya indra sominaḥ puṣṭāvanto yatʰā paśum

text: O Brahmanaspati, make thou Kakshivan Ausija a loud Chanter of flowing Soma juice!
meaning: समस्य मन्यवे विशो विश्वा नमन्त कृष्टयः समुद्रायेव सिन्धवः
sanskrit_iast: samasya manyave viśo viśvā namanta kr̥ṣṭayaḥ samudrāyeva sindʰavaḥ

text: Much honoured with libations may the Vritra-slayer watch for us: May Sakra listen to our prayer
meaning: देवानामिदवो महत्तदा वृणीमहे वयम् वृष्णामस्मभ्यमूतये
sanskrit_iast: devānāmidavo mahattadā vr̥ṇīmahe vayam vr̥ṣṇāmasmabʰyamūtaye

text: Send us this day, God Savitar, prosperity with progeny Drive thou the evil dream away!
meaning: सोमानाꣳ स्वरणं कृणुहि ब्रह्मणस्पते कक्षीवन्तं य औशिजः
sanskrit_iast: somānām̐ svaraṇaṃ kr̥ṇuhi brahmaṇaspate kakṣīvantaṃ ya auśijaḥ

text: Where is that ever-youthful Steer, strong-necked and never yet bent down? What Brahman ministers to him?
meaning: बोधन्मना इदस्तु नो वृत्रहा भूर्यासुतिः शृणोतु शक्र आशिषम्
sanskrit_iast: bodʰanmanā idastu no vr̥trahā bʰūryāsutiḥ śr̥ṇotu śakra āśiṣam

text: There where the mountains downward slope, there at the meeting of the streams The Sage was manifest by song.
meaning: अद्य नो देव सवितः प्रजावत्सावीः सौभगम् परा दुःष्वप्न्यꣳ सुव
sanskrit_iast: adya no deva savitaḥ prajāvatsāvīḥ saubʰagam parā duḥṣvapnyam̐ suva

text: Praise Indra whom our songs must laud, sole sovran of mankind, the chief Most liberal who controlleth men
meaning: क्वा३स्य वृषभो युवा तुविग्रीवो अनानतः ब्रह्मा कस्तꣳ सपर्यति
sanskrit_iast: kvā3sya vr̥ṣabʰo yuvā tuvigrīvo anānataḥ brahmā kastam̐ saparyati

text: Indra whose jaws are strong hath drunk of worshipping Sudaksha's draught, The Soma juice with barley brew.
meaning: उपह्वरे गिरीणाꣳ सङ्गमे च नदीनाम् धिया विप्रो अजायत
sanskrit_iast: upahvare girīṇām̐ saṅgame ca nadīnām dʰiyā vipro ajāyata

text: O Lord of ample wealth, these songs of praise have called aloud to thee, Like milch-kine lowing to their calves!
meaning: प्र सम्राजं चर्षणीनामिन्द्रꣳ स्तोता नव्यं गीर्भिः नरं नृषाहं मꣳहिष्ठम्
sanskrit_iast: pra samrājaṃ carṣaṇīnāmindram̐ stotā navyaṃ gīrbʰiḥ naraṃ nr̥ṣāhaṃ mam̐hiṣṭʰam

text: Then straight they recognized the mystic name of the creative Steer, There in the mansion of the Moon.
meaning: अपादु शिप्रयन्धसः सुदक्षस्य प्रहोषिणः इन्द्रोरिन्द्रो यवाशिरः
sanskrit_iast: apādu śiprayandʰasaḥ sudakṣasya prahoṣiṇaḥ indrorindro yavāśiraḥ

text: When Indra, strongest hero, brought the streams, the mighty waters down, Pushan was standing by his side.
meaning: इमा उ त्वा पुरुवसो ऽभि प्र नोनवुर्गिरः गावो वत्सं न धेनवः
sanskrit_iast: imā u tvā puruvaso 'bʰi pra nonavurgiraḥ gāvo vatsaṃ na dʰenavaḥ

text: The Cow, the streaming mother of the liberal Maruts, pours her milk, Harnessed to draw their chariots on.
meaning: अत्राह गोरमन्वत नाम त्वष्टुरपीच्यम् इत्था चन्द्रमसो गृहे
sanskrit_iast: atrāha goramanvata nāma tvaṣṭurapīcyam ittʰā candramaso gr̥he

text: Come, Lord of rapturous joys, to our libation with thy bay steeds, come With bay steeds to the flowing juice
meaning: यदिन्द्रो अनयद्रितो महीरपो वृषन्तमः तत्र पूषाभुवत्सचा
sanskrit_iast: yadindro anayadrito mahīrapo vr̥ṣantamaḥ tatra pūṣābʰuvatsacā

text: Presented strengthening gifts have sent Indra away at sacrifice, With night, unto the cleansing bath.
meaning: गौर्धयति मरुताꣳ श्रवस्युर्माता मघोनाम् युक्ता वह्नी रथानाम्
sanskrit_iast: gaurdʰayati marutām̐ śravasyurmātā magʰonām yuktā vahnī ratʰānām

text: I from my Father have received deep knowledge of eternal Law: I was born like unto the Sun.
meaning: उप नो हरिभिः सुतं याहि मदानां पते उप नो हरिभिः सुतम्
sanskrit_iast: upa no haribʰiḥ sutaṃ yāhi madānāṃ pate upa no haribʰiḥ sutam

text: With Indra splendid feasts be ours, rich in all strengthening things, wherewith, Wealthy in food, we may rejoice
meaning: इष्टा होत्रा असृक्षतेन्द्रं वृधन्तो अध्वरे अच्छावभृथमोजसा
sanskrit_iast: iṣṭā hotrā asr̥kṣatendraṃ vr̥dʰanto adʰvare accʰāvabʰr̥tʰamojasā

text: Soma and Pushan, kind to him who travels to the Gods, provide Dwellings all happy and secure.
meaning: अहमिद्धि पितुष्परि मेधामृतस्य जग्रह अहꣳ सूर्य इवाजनि
sanskrit_iast: ahamiddʰi pituṣpari medʰāmr̥tasya jagraha aham̐ sūrya ivājani

text: Invite ye Indra with a song to drink your draught of Soma steeds, juice, All-conquering Satakratu, most munificent of all who live
meaning: रेवतीर्नः सधमाद इन्द्रे सन्तु तुविवाजाः क्षुमन्तो याभिर्मदेम
sanskrit_iast: revatīrnaḥ sadʰamāda indre santu tuvivājāḥ kṣumanto yābʰirmadema

text: Sing ye a song, to make him glad, to Indra, Lord of tawny The Soma-drinker, O my friends!
meaning: सोमः पूषा च चेततुर्विश्वासाꣳ सुक्षितीनाम् देवत्रा रथ्योर्हिता
sanskrit_iast: somaḥ pūṣā ca cetaturviśvāsām̐ sukṣitīnām devatrā ratʰyorhitā

text: This, even this, O Indra, we implore: as thy devoted friends The Kanvas praise thee with their hymns!
meaning: पान्तमा वो अन्धस इन्द्रमभि प्र गायत विश्वासाहꣳ शतक्रतुं मꣳहिष्ठं चर्षणीनाम्
sanskrit_iast: pāntamā vo andʰasa indramabʰi pra gāyata viśvāsāham̐ śatakratuṃ mam̐hiṣṭʰaṃ carṣaṇīnām

text: For Indra, lover of carouse, loud be our songs about the juice Let poets sing the song of praise.
meaning: प्र व इन्द्राय मादनꣳ हर्यश्वाय गायत सखायः सोमपाव्ने
sanskrit_iast: pra va indrāya mādanam̐ haryaśvāya gāyata sakʰāyaḥ somapāvne

text: Here, Indra, is thy Soma draught, made pure upon the sacred grass: Run hither, come and drink thereof
meaning: वयमु त्वा तदिदर्था इन्द्र त्वायन्तः सखायः कण्वा उक्थेभिर्जरन्ते
sanskrit_iast: vayamu tvā tadidartʰā indra tvāyantaḥ sakʰāyaḥ kaṇvā uktʰebʰirjarante

text: As a good cow to him who milks, we call the doer of good deeds To our assistance duy by day.
meaning: इन्द्राय मद्वने सुतं परि ष्टोभन्तु नो गिरः अर्कमर्चन्तु कारवः
sanskrit_iast: indrāya madvane sutaṃ pari ṣṭobʰantu no giraḥ arkamarcantu kāravaḥ

text: Hero, the Soma being shed, I pour the juice for thee to drink Sate thee and finish thy carouse!
meaning: अयं त इन्द्र सोमो निपूतो अधि बर्हिषि एहीमस्य द्रवा पिब
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ ta indra somo nipūto adʰi barhiṣi ehīmasya dravā piba

text: The Soma, Indra, which is shed in saucers and in cups for thee, Drink thou, for thou art lord thereof!
meaning: सुरूपकृत्नुमूतये सुदुघामिव गोदुहे जुहूमसि द्यविद्यवि
sanskrit_iast: surūpakr̥tnumūtaye sudugʰāmiva goduhe juhūmasi dyavidyavi

text: In every need, in every fray we call, as friends, to succour us, Indra, the mightiest of all.
meaning: अभि त्वा वृषभा सुते सुतꣳ सृजामि पीतये तृम्पा व्यश्नुही मदम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tvā vr̥ṣabʰā sute sutam̐ sr̥jāmi pītaye tr̥mpā vyaśnuhī madam

text: O come ye hither, sit ye down: to Indra sing ye forth your song, Companions, bringing hymns of praise
meaning: य इन्द्र चमसेष्वा सोमश्चमूषु ते सुतः पिबेदस्य त्वमीशिषे
sanskrit_iast: ya indra camaseṣvā somaścamūṣu te sutaḥ pibedasya tvamīśiṣe

text: So, Lord of affluent gifts, this juice hath been expressed for thee with strength: Drink of it, thou who lovest song!
meaning: योगेयोगे तवस्तरं वाजेवाजे हवामहे सखाय इन्द्रमूतये
sanskrit_iast: yogeyoge tavastaraṃ vājevāje havāmahe sakʰāya indramūtaye

text: Great is our Indra from of old; greatness be his, the Thunderer Wide as the heaven extends his might.
meaning: आ त्वेता नि षीदतेन्द्रमभि प्र गायत सखायः स्तोमवाहसः
sanskrit_iast: ā tvetā ni ṣīdatendramabʰi pra gāyata sakʰāyaḥ stomavāhasaḥ

text: Indra, as one with mighty arm, gather for us with thy right hand Manifold and nutritious spoil!
meaning: इदꣳ ह्यन्वोजसा सुतꣳ राधानां पते पिबा त्वा३स्य गिर्वणः
sanskrit_iast: idam̐ hyanvojasā sutam̐ rādʰānāṃ pate pibā tvā3sya girvaṇaḥ

text: Praise, even as he is known, with song Indra the guardian of the kine, The Son of Truth, Lord of the brave.
meaning: महाꣳ इन्द्रः पुरश्च नो महित्वमस्तु वज्रिणे द्यौर्न प्रथिना शवः
sanskrit_iast: mahām̐ indraḥ puraśca no mahitvamastu vajriṇe dyaurna pratʰinā śavaḥ

text: With what help will he come to us, wonderful, ever-waxing friend? With what most mighty company?
meaning: आ तू न इन्द्र क्षुमन्तं चित्रं ग्राभꣳ सं गृभाय महाहस्ती दक्षिणेन
sanskrit_iast: ā tū na indra kṣumantaṃ citraṃ grābʰam̐ saṃ gr̥bʰāya mahāhastī dakṣiṇena

text: Thou speedest down to succour us this ever-conquering God of yours Him who is drawn to all our songs.
meaning: अभि प्र गोपतिं गिरेन्द्रमर्च यथा विदे सूनुꣳ सत्यस्य सत्पतिम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi pra gopatiṃ girendramarca yatʰā vide sūnum̐ satyasya satpatim

text: To the assembly's wondrous Lord, the lovely friend of Indra, I Had prayed for wisdom and successs.
meaning: कया नश्चित्र आ भुवदूती सदावृधः सखा कया शचिष्ठया वृता
sanskrit_iast: kayā naścitra ā bʰuvadūtī sadāvr̥dʰaḥ sakʰā kayā śaciṣṭʰayā vr̥tā

text: May all thy paths beneath the sky whereby thou speddest Vyasva on, Yea, let all spaces hear our voice
meaning: त्यमु वः सत्रासाहं विश्वासु गीर्ष्वायतम् आ च्यावयस्यूतये
sanskrit_iast: tyamu vaḥ satrāsāhaṃ viśvāsu gīrṣvāyatam ā cyāvayasyūtaye

text: Bring to us all things excellent, O Satakratu, food and strength, For, Indra, thou art kind to us!
meaning: सदसस्पतिमद्भुतं प्रियमिन्द्रस्य काम्यम् सनिं मेधामयासिषम्
sanskrit_iast: sadasaspatimadbʰutaṃ priyamindrasya kāmyam saniṃ medʰāmayāsiṣam

text: Here is the Soma ready pressed: of this the Maruts, yea, of this, Self-luminous the Asvins drink.
meaning: ये ते पन्था अधो दिवो येभिर्व्यश्वमैरयः उत श्रोषन्तु नो भुवः
sanskrit_iast: ye te pantʰā adʰo divo yebʰirvyaśvamairayaḥ uta śroṣantu no bʰuvaḥ

text: Tossing about, the active ones came nigh to Indra at his birth, Winning themselves heroic might.
meaning: भद्रंभद्रं न आ भरेषमूर्जꣳ शतक्रतो यदिन्द्र मृडयासि नः
sanskrit_iast: bʰadraṃbʰadraṃ na ā bʰareṣamūrjam̐ śatakrato yadindra mr̥ḍayāsi naḥ

text: Never, O Gods, do we offend, nor are we ever obstinate We walk as holy texts command.
meaning: अस्ति सोमो अयꣳ सुतः पिबन्त्यस्य मरुतः उत स्वराजो अश्विना
sanskrit_iast: asti somo ayam̐ sutaḥ pibantyasya marutaḥ uta svarājo aśvinā

text: Evening is come: sing loudly thou Atharvan's nobly singing son: Give praise to Savitar the God!
meaning: ईङ्खयन्तीरपस्युव इन्द्रं जातमुपासते वन्वानासः सुवीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: īṅkʰayantīrapasyuva indraṃ jātamupāsate vanvānāsaḥ suvīryam

text: Now Morning with her earliest light shines forth, dear daughter of the Sky: High, Asvins, I extol your praise.
meaning: न कि देवा इनीमसि न क्या योपयामसि मन्त्रश्रुत्यं चरामसि
sanskrit_iast: na ki devā inīmasi na kyā yopayāmasi mantraśrutyaṃ carāmasi

text: Armed with the bones of dead Dadhyach, Indra, with unresisted might The nine-and-ninety Vritras slew.
meaning: दोषो आगाद्बृहद्गाय द्युमद्गामन्नाथर्वण स्तुहि देवꣳ सवितारम्
sanskrit_iast: doṣo āgādbr̥hadgāya dyumadgāmannātʰarvaṇa stuhi devam̐ savitāram

text: Come, Indra, and delight thee with the juice at all our Soma feasts, Protector, mighty in thy strength
meaning: एषो उषा अपूर्व्या व्युच्छति प्रिया दिवः स्तुषे वामश्विना बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: eṣo uṣā apūrvyā vyuccʰati priyā divaḥ stuṣe vāmaśvinā br̥hat

text: O thou who slayest Vritras, come, O Indra, hither to our side, Mighty one, with thy mighty aids!
meaning: इन्द्रो दधीचो अस्थभिर्वृत्राण्यप्रतिष्कुतः जघान नवतीर्नव
sanskrit_iast: indro dadʰīco astʰabʰirvr̥trāṇyapratiṣkutaḥ jagʰāna navatīrnava

text: That might of his shone brightly forth when Indra brought together, like A skin, the worlds of heaven and earth,
meaning: इन्द्रेहि मत्स्यन्धसो विश्वेभिः सोमपर्वभिः महाꣳ अभिष्टिरोजसा
sanskrit_iast: indrehi matsyandʰaso viśvebʰiḥ somaparvabʰiḥ mahām̐ abʰiṣṭirojasā

text: This is thine own Thou drawest near, as turns a pigeon to his mate: Thou carest, too, for this our prayer.
meaning: आ तू न इन्द्र वृत्रहन्नस्माकमर्धमा गहि महान्महीभिरूतिभिः
sanskrit_iast: ā tū na indra vr̥trahannasmākamardʰamā gahi mahānmahībʰirūtibʰiḥ

text: May Vata breathe his balm on us, healthful, delightful to our heart: May he prolong our days of life
meaning: ओजस्तदस्य तित्विष उभे यत्समवर्तयत् इन्द्रश्चर्मेव रोदसी
sanskrit_iast: ojastadasya titviṣa ubʰe yatsamavartayat indraścarmeva rodasī

text: Ne'er is he injured whom the Gods Varuna, Mitra, Aryam. The excellently wise, protect.
meaning: अयमु ते समतसि कपोत इव गर्भधिम् वचस्तच्चिन्न ओहसे
sanskrit_iast: ayamu te samatasi kapota iva garbʰadʰim vacastaccinna ohase

text: According to our wish for kine, for steeds and chariots, as of old, Be gracious to our wealthy chiefs
meaning: वात आ वातु बेषजꣳ शम्भु मयोभु नो हृदे प्र न अयूꣳषि तारिषत्
sanskrit_iast: vāta ā vātu beṣajam̐ śambʰu mayobʰu no hr̥de pra na ayūm̐ṣi tāriṣat

text: Indra, these spotted cows yield thee their butter and the milky draught, Aiders, thereby, of sacrifice.
meaning: यꣳ रक्षन्ति प्रचेतसो वरुणो मित्रो अर्यमा न किः स दभ्यते जनः
sanskrit_iast: yam̐ rakṣanti pracetaso varuṇo mitro aryamā na kiḥ sa dabʰyate janaḥ

text: That thou much-lauded! many-named! mayst, with this thought, that longs for milk, Come to each Soma sacrifice.
meaning: गव्यो षु णो यथा पुराश्वयोत रथया वरिवस्या महोनाम्
sanskrit_iast: gavyo ṣu ṇo yatʰā purāśvayota ratʰayā varivasyā mahonām

text: May bright Sarasvati, endowed with plenteous wealth and spoil, enriched With prayer, desire the sacrifice.
meaning: इमास्त इन्द्र पृश्नयो घृतं दुहत आशिरम् एनामृतस्य पिप्युषीः
sanskrit_iast: imāsta indra pr̥śnayo gʰr̥taṃ duhata āśiram enāmr̥tasya pipyuṣīḥ

text: Why 'mid the Nahusha tribes shall sate this Indra with his Soma juice? He shall bring precious things to us.
meaning: अया धिया च गव्यया पुरुणामन्पुरुष्टुत यत्सोमेसोम आभुवः
sanskrit_iast: ayā dʰiyā ca gavyayā puruṇāmanpuruṣṭuta yatsomesoma ābʰuvaḥ

text: Come, we have pressed the juice for thee; O Indra, drink this Soma here: Sit thou on this my sacred grass
meaning: पावका नः सरस्वती वाजेभिर्वाजिनीवती यज्ञं वष्टु धियावसुः
sanskrit_iast: pāvakā naḥ sarasvatī vājebʰirvājinīvatī yajñaṃ vaṣṭu dʰiyāvasuḥ

text: Great, unassailable must be the heavenly favour of the Three, Varuna, Mitra, Aryaman.
meaning: क इमं नाहुषीष्वा इन्द्रꣳ सोमस्य तर्पयात् स नो वसून्या भरात्
sanskrit_iast: ka imaṃ nāhuṣīṣvā indram̐ somasya tarpayāt sa no vasūnyā bʰarāt

text: We, Indra, Lord of ample wealth, our guide, depend on one like thee, Thou driver of the tawny steeds!
meaning: आ याहि सुषुमा हि त इन्द्र सोमं पिबा इमम् एदं बर्हिः सदो मम
sanskrit_iast: ā yāhi suṣumā hi ta indra somaṃ pibā imam edaṃ barhiḥ sado mama

text: Let Soma juices make thee glad! Display thy bounty, Thunderer: Drive off the enemies of prayer!
meaning: महि त्रीणामवरस्तु द्युक्षं मित्रस्यार्यम्णः दुराधर्षं वरुणस्य
sanskrit_iast: mahi trīṇāmavarastu dyukṣaṃ mitrasyāryamṇaḥ durādʰarṣaṃ varuṇasya

text: Drink our libation, Lord of hymns! with streams of meath thou art bedewed: Yea, Indra, glory is thy gift.
meaning: त्वावतः पुरूवसो वयमिन्द्र प्रणेतः स्मसि स्थातर्हरीणाम्
sanskrit_iast: tvāvataḥ purūvaso vayamindra praṇetaḥ smasi stʰātarharīṇām

text: Indra hath ever thought of you and tended you with care. The God, Heroic Indra, is not checked.
meaning: उत्त्वा मन्दन्तु सोमाः कृणुष्व राधो अद्रिवः अव ब्रह्मद्विषो जहि
sanskrit_iast: uttvā mandantu somāḥ kr̥ṇuṣva rādʰo adrivaḥ ava brahmadviṣo jahi

text: Let the drops pass within thee as the rivers flow into the sea O Indra, naught excelleth thee!
meaning: गिर्वणः पाहि नः सुतं मधोर्धाराभिरज्यसे इन्द्र त्वादातमिद्यशः
sanskrit_iast: girvaṇaḥ pāhi naḥ sutaṃ madʰordʰārābʰirajyase indra tvādātamidyaśaḥ

text: Indra, the singers with high praise, Indra reciters with their lauds, Indra the choirs have glorified.
meaning: सदा व इन्द्रश्चर्कृषदा उपो नु स सपर्यन् न देवो वृतः शूर इन्द्रः
sanskrit_iast: sadā va indraścarkr̥ṣadā upo nu sa saparyan na devo vr̥taḥ śūra indraḥ

text: May Indra give, to aid us wealth handy that rules the skilful ones! Yea, may the Strong give potent wealth
meaning: आ त्वा विशन्त्विन्दवः समुद्रमिव सिन्धवः न त्वामिन्द्राति रिच्यते
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā viśantvindavaḥ samudramiva sindʰavaḥ na tvāmindrāti ricyate

text: Verily Indra, conquering all, drives even mighty fear away, For firm is he and swift to act.
meaning: इन्द्रमिद्गाथिनो बृहदिन्द्रमर्केभिरर्किणः इन्द्रं वाणीरनूषत
sanskrit_iast: indramidgātʰino br̥hadindramarkebʰirarkiṇaḥ indraṃ vāṇīranūṣata

text: These songs with every draught we pour come, lover of the song, to thee As milch-kine hasten to their calves.
meaning: इन्द्र इषे ददातु न ऋभुक्षणमृभुꣳ रयिम् वाजी ददातु वाजिनम्
sanskrit_iast: indra iṣe dadātu na r̥bʰukṣaṇamr̥bʰum̐ rayim vājī dadātu vājinam

text: Indra and Wishan will we call for friendship and prosperity, And for the winning of the spoil.
meaning: इन्द्रो अङ्ग महद्भयमभी षदप चुच्यवत् स हि स्थिरो विचर्षणिः
sanskrit_iast: indro aṅga mahadbʰayamabʰī ṣadapa cucyavat sa hi stʰiro vicarṣaṇiḥ

text: O Indra, Vritra-slayer, naught is better, mightier than thou Verily there is none like thee!
meaning: इमा उ त्वा सुतेसुते नक्षन्ते गिर्वणो गिरः गावो वत्सं न धेनवः
sanskrit_iast: imā u tvā sutesute nakṣante girvaṇo giraḥ gāvo vatsaṃ na dʰenavaḥ

text: Him have I magnified, our Lord in common, guardian of your folk, Discloser of great wealth in kine.
meaning: इन्द्रा नु पूषणा वयꣳ सख्याय स्वस्तये हुवेम वाजसातये
sanskrit_iast: indrā nu pūṣaṇā vayam̐ sakʰyāya svastaye huvema vājasātaye

text: Songs have outpoured themselves to thee, Indra, the strong, the guardian Lord, And with one will have risen to thee!
meaning: न कि इन्द्र त्वदुत्तरं न ज्यायो अस्ति वृत्रहन् न क्येवं यथा त्वम्
sanskrit_iast: na ki indra tvaduttaraṃ na jyāyo asti vr̥trahan na kyevaṃ yatʰā tvam

text: Good guidance hath the mortal man whom Arya-man, the Marut host, And Mitras, void of guile, protect.
meaning: तरणिं वो जनानां त्रदं वाजस्य गोमतः समानमु प्र शꣳसिषम्
sanskrit_iast: taraṇiṃ vo janānāṃ tradaṃ vājasya gomataḥ samānamu pra śam̐siṣam

text: Bring us the wealth for which we long, O Indra, that which is concealed In strong firm place precipitous.
meaning: असृग्रमिन्द्र ते गिरः प्रति त्वामुदहासत सजोषा वृषभं पतिम्
sanskrit_iast: asr̥gramindra te giraḥ prati tvāmudahāsata sajoṣā vr̥ṣabʰaṃ patim

text: Him your best Vritra-slayer, him the famous champion of mankind I urge to great munificence.
meaning: सुनीथो घा स मर्त्यो यं मरुतो यमर्यमा मित्रास्पान्त्यद्रुहः
sanskrit_iast: sunītʰo gʰā sa martyo yaṃ maruto yamaryamā mitrāspāntyadruhaḥ

text: Indra, may we adorn thy fame, fame of one like thee, hero! deck, Sakra! thy fame at highest feast!
meaning: यद्वीडाविन्द्र यत्स्थिरे यत्पर्शाने पराभृतम् वसु स्पार्हं तदा भर
sanskrit_iast: yadvīḍāvindra yatstʰire yatparśāne parābʰr̥tam vasu spārhaṃ tadā bʰara

text: Indra, accept at break of day our Soma mixt with roasted corn, With groats, with cake, with eulogies!
meaning: श्रुतं वो वृत्रहन्तमं प्र शर्धं चर्षणीनाम् आशिषे राधसे महे
sanskrit_iast: śrutaṃ vo vr̥trahantamaṃ pra śardʰaṃ carṣaṇīnām āśiṣe rādʰase mahe

text: With waters' foam thou torest off, Indra, the head of Namuchi, When thou o'ercamest all the foes.
meaning: अरं त इन्द्र श्रवसे गमेम शूर त्वावतः अरꣳ शक्र परेमणि
sanskrit_iast: araṃ ta indra śravase gamema śūra tvāvataḥ aram̐ śakra paremaṇi

text: Thine are these Soma juices, thine, Indra, those still to be expressed: Enjoy them, Lord of princely wealth!
meaning: धानावन्तं करम्भिणमपूपवन्तमुक्थिनम् इन्द्र प्रातर्जुषस्व नः
sanskrit_iast: dʰānāvantaṃ karambʰiṇamapūpavantamuktʰinam indra prātarjuṣasva naḥ

text: For thee, O Indra, Lord of light, Somas are pressed and grass is strewn: Be gracious to thy worshippers!
meaning: अपां फेनेन नमुचेः शिर इन्द्रोदवर्तयः विश्वा यदजय स्पृधः
sanskrit_iast: apāṃ pʰenena namuceḥ śira indrodavartayaḥ viśvā yadajaya spr̥dʰaḥ

text: We seeking strength, with Soma drops fill full your Indra like a well, Most liberal, Lord of boundless might.
meaning: इमे त इन्द्र सोमाः सुतासो ये च सोत्वाः तेषां मत्स्व प्रभूवसो
sanskrit_iast: ime ta indra somāḥ sutāso ye ca sotvāḥ teṣāṃ matsva prabʰūvaso

text: O Indra, even from that place come unto us with food that gives A hundred, yea, a thousand powers!
meaning: तुभ्यꣳ सुतासः सोमाः स्तीर्णं बर्हिर्विभावसो स्तोतृभ्य इन्द्र मृडय
sanskrit_iast: tubʰyam̐ sutāsaḥ somāḥ stīrṇaṃ barhirvibʰāvaso stotr̥bʰya indra mr̥ḍaya

text: The new-born Vritra-slayer asked his mother, as he seized his shaft, Who are the, fierce and famous ones?
meaning: आ व इन्द्र कृविं यथा वाजयन्तः शतक्रतुम् मꣳहिष्ठꣳ सिञ्च इन्दुभिः
sanskrit_iast: ā va indra kr̥viṃ yatʰā vājayantaḥ śatakratum mam̐hiṣṭʰam̐ siñca indubʰiḥ

text: Let us call him to aid whose hands stretch far, the highly-lauded, who Fulfils the work to favour us
meaning: अतश्चिदिन्द्र न उपा याहि शतवाजया इषा सहस्रवाजया
sanskrit_iast: ataścidindra na upā yāhi śatavājayā iṣā sahasravājayā

text: Mitra who knoweth leadeth us, and Varuna who guideth straight, And Aryaman in accord with Gods.
meaning: आ बुन्दं वृत्रहा ददे जातः पृच्छद्वि मातरम् क उग्राः के ह शृण्विरे
sanskrit_iast: ā bundaṃ vr̥trahā dade jātaḥ pr̥ccʰadvi mātaram ka ugrāḥ ke ha śr̥ṇvire

text: When, even as she were present here, red Dawn hath shone from far away, She spreadeth light on every side.
meaning: बृबदुक्थꣳ हवामहे सृप्रकरस्नमूतये साधः कृण्वन्तमवसे
sanskrit_iast: br̥baduktʰam̐ havāmahe sr̥prakarasnamūtaye sādʰaḥ kr̥ṇvantamavase

text: Varuna, Mitra, sapient pair, pour fatness on our pastures, pour Meath on the regions of the air!
meaning: ऋजुनीती नो वरुणो मित्रो नयति विद्वान् अर्यमा देवैः सजोषाः
sanskrit_iast: r̥junītī no varuṇo mitro nayati vidvān aryamā devaiḥ sajoṣāḥ

text: And, at our sacrifices, these, sons, singers, have enlarged their bounds, So that the cows must walk knee-deep.
meaning: दूरादिहेव यत्सतो ऽरुणप्सुरशिश्वितत् वि भानुं विश्वथातनत्
sanskrit_iast: dūrādiheva yatsato 'ruṇapsuraśiśvitat vi bʰānuṃ viśvatʰātanat

text: Through all this world strode Vishnu: thrice his foot he planted, and the whole Was gathered in his footstep's dust.
meaning: आ नो मित्रावरुणा घृतैर्गव्यूतिमुक्षतम् मध्वा रजाꣳसि सुक्रतू
sanskrit_iast: ā no mitrāvaruṇā gʰr̥tairgavyūtimukṣatam madʰvā rajām̐si sukratū

text: Pass by the wrathful offerer; speed the man who pours libation, drink The juice which he presents to thee!
meaning: उदु त्ये सूनवो गिरः काष्ठा यज्ञेष्वत्नत वाश्रा अभिज्ञु यातवे
sanskrit_iast: udu tye sūnavo giraḥ kāṣṭʰā yajñeṣvatnata vāśrā abʰijñu yātave

text: What is the word addressed to him, God great and excellently wise? For this is what exalteth him. 3, His wealth who hath no store of kine hath ne'er found out recited laud, Nor song of praises that is sung.
meaning: इदं विष्णुर्वि चक्रमे त्रेधा नि दधे पदम् समूढमस्य पाꣳसुले
sanskrit_iast: idaṃ viṣṇurvi cakrame tredʰā ni dadʰe padam samūḍʰamasya pām̐sule

text: Lord of each thing that giveth strength, Indra delighteth most in lauds, Borne by bay steeds, libations' friend.
meaning: अतीहि मन्युषाविणꣳ सुषुवाꣳसमुपेरय अस्य रातौ सुतं पिब
sanskrit_iast: atīhi manyuṣāviṇam̐ suṣuvām̐samuperaya asya rātau sutaṃ piba

text: With wealth to our libation come, be not thou angry with us, like A great man with a youthful bride.
meaning: कदु प्रचेतसे महे वचो देवाय शस्यते तदिध्यस्य वर्धनम्
sanskrit_iast: kadu pracetase mahe vaco devāya śasyate tadidʰyasya vardʰanam

text: When, Vasu, wilt thou love the laud? Now let the Channel bring the stream. The juice is ready to ferment.
meaning: उक्थं च न शस्यमानं नागो रयिरा चिकेत न गायत्रं गीयमानम्
sanskrit_iast: uktʰaṃ ca na śasyamānaṃ nāgo rayirā ciketa na gāyatraṃ gīyamānam

text: After the Seasons. Indra, drink the Soma from the Brahman's gift: Thy friendship is invincible! S. O Indra, lover of the song, we are the singers of thy praise O Soma-drinker, quicken us!
meaning: इन्द्र उक्थेभिर्मन्दिष्ठो वाजानां च वाजपतिः हरिवान्त्सुतानाꣳ सखा
sanskrit_iast: indra uktʰebʰirmandiṣṭʰo vājānāṃ ca vājapatiḥ harivāntsutānām̐ sakʰā

text: O Indra, in each fight and fray give to our bodies manly strength: Strong Lord, grant ever-conquering might!
meaning: आ याह्युप नः सुतं वाजेभिर्मा हृणीयथाः महाꣳ इव युवजानिः
sanskrit_iast: ā yāhyupa naḥ sutaṃ vājebʰirmā hr̥ṇīyatʰāḥ mahām̐ iva yuvajāniḥ

text: For so thou art the brave man's friend; a hero, too, art thou, and strong: So may thine heart be won to us!
meaning: कदा वसो स्तोत्रꣳ हर्यत आ अव श्मशा रुधद्वाः दीर्घꣳ सुतम् वाताप्याय
sanskrit_iast: kadā vaso stotram̐ haryata ā ava śmaśā rudʰadvāḥ dīrgʰam̐ sutam vātāpyāya

text: Like kine unmilked we call aloud, hero, to thee, and sing thy praise, Looker on heavenly light, Lord of this moving world, Lord, Indra, of what moveth not!
meaning: ब्राह्मणादिन्द्र राधसः पिबा सोममृतूꣳ रनु तवेदꣳ सख्यमस्तृतम्
sanskrit_iast: brāhmaṇādindra rādʰasaḥ pibā somamr̥tūm̐ ranu tavedam̐ sakʰyamastr̥tam

text: That we may win us wealth and power we poets, verily, call on thee: In war men call on thee, Indra, the hero's Lord, in the steed's race-course call on thee:
meaning: वयं घा ते अपि स्मसि स्तोतार इन्द्र गिर्वणः त्वं नो जिन्व सोमपाः
sanskrit_iast: vayaṃ gʰā te api smasi stotāra indra girvaṇaḥ tvaṃ no jinva somapāḥ

text: To you will I sing Indra's praise who gives good gifts as well we know; The praise of Maghavan who, rich in treasure, aids his singers with wealth thousandfold.
meaning: एन्द्र पृक्षु कासु चिन्नृम्णं तनूषु धेहि नः सत्राजिदुग्र पौꣳस्यम्
sanskrit_iast: endra pr̥kṣu kāsu cinnr̥mṇaṃ tanūṣu dʰehi naḥ satrājidugra paum̐syam

text: As cows low to their calves in stalls, so with our songs we glorify This Indra, even your wondrous God who checks attack, who takes delight in precious juice.
meaning: एवा ह्यसि वीरयुरेवा शूर उत स्थिरः एवा ते राध्यं मनः
sanskrit_iast: evā hyasi vīrayurevā śūra uta stʰiraḥ evā te rādʰyaṃ manaḥ

text: Loud singing at the sacred rite where Soma flows we priests invoke With haste, that he may help, as the bard's cherisher, Indra who findeth wealth for you
meaning: अभि त्वा शूर नोनुमो ऽदुग्धा इव धेनवः ईशानमस्य जगतः स्वर्दृशमीशानमिन्द्र तस्थुषः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tvā śūra nonumo 'dugdʰā iva dʰenavaḥ īśānamasya jagataḥ svardr̥śamīśānamindra tastʰuṣaḥ

text: With Plenty for his true ally the active man will gain the spoil. Your Indra, much-invoked, I bend with song, as bends a wright his wheel of solid wood.
meaning: त्वामिद्धि हवामहे सातौ वाजस्य कार्वः त्वां वृत्रेष्विन्द्र सत्पतिं नरस्त्वां काष्ठास्वर्वतः
sanskrit_iast: tvāmiddʰi havāmahe sātau vājasya kārvaḥ tvāṃ vr̥treṣvindra satpatiṃ narastvāṃ kāṣṭʰāsvarvataḥ

text: Drink, Indra, of the savoury juice, and cheer thee with our milky draught! Be, for our weal, our friend and sharer of the feast, and let thy wisdom guard us well!
meaning: अभि प्र वः सुराधसमिन्द्रमर्च यथा विदे यो जरितृभ्यो मघवा पुरूवसुः सहस्रेणेव शिक्षति
sanskrit_iast: abʰi pra vaḥ surādʰasamindramarca yatʰā vide yo jaritr̥bʰyo magʰavā purūvasuḥ sahasreṇeva śikṣati

text: For thou--come to the worshipper!--wilt find great wealth to make us rich. Fill thyself full, O Maghavan, for gain of kine, full, Indra, for the gain of steeds!
meaning: तं वो दस्ममृतीषहं वसोर्मन्दानमन्धसः अभि वत्सं न स्वसरेषु धेनव इन्द्रं गीर्भिर्नवामहे
sanskrit_iast: taṃ vo dasmamr̥tīṣahaṃ vasormandānamandʰasaḥ abʰi vatsaṃ na svasareṣu dʰenava indraṃ gīrbʰirnavāmahe

text: Vasishtha will not overlook the lowliest one among you all Beside our Soma juice effused to-day let all the Maruts drink with eager haste!
meaning: तरोभिर्वो विदद्वसुमिन्द्रꣳ सबाध ऊतये बृहद्गायन्तः सुतसोमे अध्वरे हुवे भरं न कारिणम्
sanskrit_iast: tarobʰirvo vidadvasumindram̐ sabādʰa ūtaye br̥hadgāyantaḥ sutasome adʰvare huve bʰaraṃ na kāriṇam

text: Glorify naught besides, O friends; so shall no sorrow trouble you! Praise only mighty Indra when the juice is shed, and say your lauds repeatedly!
meaning: तरणिरित्सिषासति वाजं पुरन्ध्या युजा आ व इन्द्रं पुरुहूतं नमे गिरा नेमिं तष्टेव सुद्रुवम्
sanskrit_iast: taraṇiritsiṣāsati vājaṃ purandʰyā yujā ā va indraṃ puruhūtaṃ name girā nemiṃ taṣṭeva sudruvam

text: No one by deed attains to him who works and strengthens evermore: No, not by sacrifice, to Indra. praised of all, resistless, daring, bold in might. 2 He without ligature, before making incision in the neck, Closed up the wound again, most wealthy Maghavan, who healeth the dissevered parts.
meaning: पिबा सुतस्य रसिनो मत्स्वा न इन्द्र गोमतः आपिर्नो बोधि सधमाद्ये वृधे३ ऽस्माꣳ अवन्तु ते धियः
sanskrit_iast: pibā sutasya rasino matsvā na indra gomataḥ āpirno bodʰi sadʰamādye vr̥dʰe3 'smām̐ avantu te dʰiyaḥ

text: A thousand and a hundred steeds are harnessed to thy golden car: Yoked by devotion, Indra, let the long-maned bays bring thee to drink the Soma juice!
meaning: त्वꣳ ह्येहि चेरवे विदा भगं वसुत्तये उद्वावृषस्व मघवन्गविष्टय उदिन्द्राश्वमिष्टये
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hyehi cerave vidā bʰagaṃ vasuttaye udvāvr̥ṣasva magʰavangaviṣṭaya udindrāśvamiṣṭaye

text: Come hither, Indra, with bay steeds, joyous, with tails like peacock's plumes! Let no men check thy course as fowlers stay the bird: pass o'er them as o'er desert lands!
meaning: न हि वश्चरमं च न वसिष्ठः परिमꣳस्ते अस्माकमद्य मरुतः सुते सचा विश्वे पिबन्तु कामिनः
sanskrit_iast: na hi vaścaramaṃ ca na vasiṣṭʰaḥ parimam̐ste asmākamadya marutaḥ sute sacā viśve pibantu kāminaḥ

text: Thou as a God, O mightiest, verily blessest mortal man. O Maghavan, there is no comforter but thou: Indra, I speak my words to thee.
meaning: मा चिदन्यद्वि शꣳसत सखायो मा रिषण्यत इन्द्रमित्स्तोता वृषणꣳ सचा सुते मुहुरुक्था च शꣳसत
sanskrit_iast: mā cidanyadvi śam̐sata sakʰāyo mā riṣaṇyata indramitstotā vr̥ṣaṇam̐ sacā sute muhuruktʰā ca śam̐sata

text: O Indra, thou art far-renowned, impetuous Lord of power and might. Alone, the never-conquered guardian of mankind, thou smitest down resistless foes.
meaning: न किष्टं कर्मणा नशद्यश्चकार सदावृधम् इन्द्रं न यज्ञैर्विश्वगूर्तमृभ्वसमधृष्टं धृष्णुमोजसा
sanskrit_iast: na kiṣṭaṃ karmaṇā naśadyaścakāra sadāvr̥dʰam indraṃ na yajñairviśvagūrtamr̥bʰvasamadʰr̥ṣṭaṃ dʰr̥ṣṇumojasā

text: Indra for worship of the Gods, Indra while sacrifice proceeds, Indra, as warriors in the battle-shock, we call, Indra that we may win the spoil.
meaning: य ऋते चिदभिश्रिषः पुरा जत्रुभ्य आतृदः सन्धाता सन्धिं मघवा पुरूवसुर्निष्कर्ता विह्रुतं पुनः
sanskrit_iast: ya r̥te cidabʰiśriṣaḥ purā jatrubʰya ātr̥daḥ sandʰātā sandʰiṃ magʰavā purūvasurniṣkartā vihrutaṃ punaḥ

text: May these my songs of praise exalt thee, Lord, who hast abundant wealth! Men skilled in holy hymns, pure, with the hues of fire, have sung them with their lauds to thee.
meaning: आ त्वा सहस्रमा शतं युक्ता रथे हिरण्यये ब्रह्मयुजो हरय इन्द्र केशिनो वहन्तु सोमपीतये
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā sahasramā śataṃ yuktā ratʰe hiraṇyaye brahmayujo haraya indra keśino vahantu somapītaye

text: These songs of ours exceeding sweet, these hymns of praise ascend to thee, Like ever-conquering chariots that display their strength gain wealth and give unfailing help.
meaning: आ मन्द्रैरिन्द्र हरिभिर्याहि मयूररोमभिः मा त्वा के चिन्नि येमुरिन्न पाशिनो ऽति धन्वेव ताꣳ इहि
sanskrit_iast: ā mandrairindra haribʰiryāhi mayūraromabʰiḥ mā tvā ke cinni yemurinna pāśino 'ti dʰanveva tām̐ ihi

text: Even as the wild-bull, when he thirsts, goes to the desert's watery pool, Come to us quickly both at morning and at eve, and with the Kanvas drink thy fill!
meaning: त्वमङ्ग प्र शꣳसिषो देवः शविष्ठ मर्त्यम् न त्वदन्यो मघवन्नस्ति मर्डितेन्द्र ब्रवीमि ते वचः
sanskrit_iast: tvamaṅga pra śam̐siṣo devaḥ śaviṣṭʰa martyam na tvadanyo magʰavannasti marḍitendra bravīmi te vacaḥ

text: Indra, with all thy saving helps assist us, Lord of power and might! For after thee we follow even as glorious bliss, thee, hero, finderout of wealth.
meaning: त्वमिन्द्र यशा अस्यृजीषी शवसस्पतिः त्वं वृत्राणि हꣳस्यप्रतीन्येक इत्पुर्वनुत्तश्चर्षणीधृतिः
sanskrit_iast: tvamindra yaśā asyr̥jīṣī śavasaspatiḥ tvaṃ vr̥trāṇi ham̐syapratīnyeka itpurvanuttaścarṣaṇīdʰr̥tiḥ

text: O Indra, Lord of light, what joys thou broughtest from the Asuras, Prosper therewith, O Maghavan, him who lauds that deed, and those whose grass is trimmed for thee!
meaning: इन्द्रमिद्देवतातय इन्द्रं प्रयत्यध्वरे इन्द्रꣳ समीके वनिनो हवामह इन्द्रं धनस्य सातये
sanskrit_iast: indramiddevatātaya indraṃ prayatyadʰvare indram̐ samīke vanino havāmaha indraṃ dʰanasya sātaye

text: To Aryaman and Mitra sing a reverent song, O pious one, A pleasant hymn to Varuna who shelters us: sing ye a laud unto the Kings!
meaning: इमा उ त्वा पुरूवसो गिरो वर्धन्तु या मम पावकवर्णाः शुचयो विपश्चितो ऽभि स्तोमैरनूषत
sanskrit_iast: imā u tvā purūvaso giro vardʰantu yā mama pāvakavarṇāḥ śucayo vipaścito 'bʰi stomairanūṣata

text: Men with their lauds are urging thee, Indra, to drink the Soma first. The Ribhus in accord have lifted up their voice, and Rudras sung thee as the first.
meaning: उदु त्ये मधुमत्तमा गिर स्तोमास ईरते सत्राजितो धनसा अक्षितोतयो वाजयन्तो रथा इव
sanskrit_iast: udu tye madʰumattamā gira stomāsa īrate satrājito dʰanasā akṣitotayo vājayanto ratʰā iva

text: Sing to your lofty Indra, sing, Maruts, a holy hymn of praise Let Satakratu, Vritra-slayer, slay the foe with hundred-knotted thunderbolt!
meaning: यथा गौरो अपा कृतं तृष्यन्नेत्यवेरिणम् आपित्वे नः प्रपित्वे तूयमा गहि कण्वेषु सु सचा पिब
sanskrit_iast: yatʰā gauro apā kr̥taṃ tr̥ṣyannetyaveriṇam āpitve naḥ prapitve tūyamā gahi kaṇveṣu su sacā piba

text: To Indra sing the lofty hymn, Maruts! that slays the Vritras best, Whereby the holy ones created for the God the light divine that ever wakes.
meaning: शग्ध्यू३षु शचीपत इन्द्र विश्वाभिरूतिभिः भगं न हि त्वा यशसं वसुविदमनु शूर चरामसि
sanskrit_iast: śagdʰyū3ṣu śacīpata indra viśvābʰirūtibʰiḥ bʰagaṃ na hi tvā yaśasaṃ vasuvidamanu śūra carāmasi

text: O Indra, give us wisdom as a sire gives wisdom to his sons Guide us, O much-invoked, in this our way: may we still live and look upon the light!
meaning: या इन्द्र भुज आभरः स्वर्वाꣳ असुरेभ्यः स्तोतारमिन्मघवन्नस्य वर्धय ये च त्वे वृक्तबर्हिषः
sanskrit_iast: yā indra bʰuja ābʰaraḥ svarvām̐ asurebʰyaḥ stotāraminmagʰavannasya vardʰaya ye ca tve vr̥ktabarhiṣaḥ

text: O Indra, turn us not away: be present with us at our feast For thou art our protection, yea, thou art our kin: O Indra, turn us not away!
meaning: प्र मित्राय प्रार्यम्णे सचथ्यमृतावसो वरूथ्ये३ वरुणे छन्द्यं वचः स्तोत्रꣳ राजसु गायत
sanskrit_iast: pra mitrāya prāryamṇe sacatʰyamr̥tāvaso varūtʰye3 varuṇe cʰandyaṃ vacaḥ stotram̐ rājasu gāyata

text: We compass these like waters, we whose grass is trimmed and Soma pressed. Here where the filter pours its stream, thy worshippers round thee, O Vritra-slayer, sit.
meaning: अभि त्वा पूर्वपीतय इन्द्र स्तोमेभिरायवः समीचीनास ऋभवः समस्वरन्रुद्रा गृणन्त पूर्व्यम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tvā pūrvapītaya indra stomebʰirāyavaḥ samīcīnāsa r̥bʰavaḥ samasvaranrudrā gr̥ṇanta pūrvyam

text: All strength and valour that is found, Indra, in tribes of Nahushas, And all the splendid fame that the Five Tribes enjoy, bring, yea, all manly powers at once!
meaning: प्र व इन्द्राय बृहते मरुतो ब्रह्मार्चत वृत्रꣳ हनति वृत्रहा शतक्रतुर्वज्रेण शतपर्वणा
sanskrit_iast: pra va indrāya br̥hate maruto brahmārcata vr̥tram̐ hanati vr̥trahā śatakraturvajreṇa śataparvaṇā

text: Yea, verily thou art a Bull, our guardian, rushing like a bull: Thou, mighty one, art celebrated as a Bull, famed as a Bull both near and far.
meaning: बृहदिन्द्राय गायत मरुतो वृत्रहन्तमम् येन ज्योतिरजनयन्नृतावृधो देवं देवाय जागृवि
sanskrit_iast: br̥hadindrāya gāyata maruto vr̥trahantamam yena jyotirajanayannr̥tāvr̥dʰo devaṃ devāya jāgr̥vi

text: Whether, O Sakra, thou be far, or, Vritra-slayer, near at hand, Thence by heaven-reaching songs he who bath pressed the juice invites thee with thy long-maned steeds.
meaning: इन्द्र क्रतुं न आ भर पिता पुत्रेभ्यो यथा शिक्षा णो अस्मिन्पुरुहूत यामनि जीवा ज्योतिरशीमहि
sanskrit_iast: indra kratuṃ na ā bʰara pitā putrebʰyo yatʰā śikṣā ṇo asminpuruhūta yāmani jīvā jyotiraśīmahi

text: In the wild raptures of the juice sing to your hero with high laud, to him the wise, To Indra glorious in his name, the mighty one, even as the hymn alloweth it!
meaning: मा न इन्द्र परा वृणग्भवा नः सधमाद्ये त्वं न ऊती त्वमिन्न आप्यम् मा न इन्द्र परा वृणक्
sanskrit_iast: mā na indra parā vr̥ṇagbʰavā naḥ sadʰamādye tvaṃ na ūtī tvaminna āpyam mā na indra parā vr̥ṇak

text: O Indra, give us for our weal a triple refuge, triply strong! Bestow a dwelling-place on our rich lords and me, and keep thy dart afar from these!
meaning: वयं घ त्वा सुतावन्त आपो न वृक्तबर्हिषः पवित्रस्य प्रस्रवणेषु वृत्रहन्परि स्तोतार आसते
sanskrit_iast: vayaṃ gʰa tvā sutāvanta āpo na vr̥ktabarhiṣaḥ pavitrasya prasravaṇeṣu vr̥trahanpari stotāra āsate

text: Turning, as 'twere, to meet the Sun enjoy from Indra all good things! When he who will be born is born with power we look to treasures as our heritage.
meaning: यदिन्द्र नाहुषीष्वा ओजो नृम्णं च कृष्टिषु यद्वा पञ्च क्षितीनां द्युम्नमा भर सत्रा विश्वानि पौꣳस्या
sanskrit_iast: yadindra nāhuṣīṣvā ojo nr̥mṇaṃ ca kr̥ṣṭiṣu yadvā pañca kṣitīnāṃ dyumnamā bʰara satrā viśvāni paum̐syā

text: The godless mortal gaineth not this food, O thou whose life is long! But one who yokes the bright-hued horses, Etasas; then Indra yokes his tawny steeds.
meaning: सत्यमित्था वृषेदसि वृषजूतिर्नो ऽविता वृषा ह्युग्र शृण्विषे परावति वृषो अर्वावति श्रुतः
sanskrit_iast: satyamittʰā vr̥ṣedasi vr̥ṣajūtirno 'vitā vr̥ṣā hyugra śr̥ṇviṣe parāvati vr̥ṣo arvāvati śrutaḥ

text: Draw near unto our Indra who must be invoked in every fight! Come, thou most mighty Vritra-slayer, meet for praise, come to, libations and to hymns!
meaning: यच्छक्रासि परावति यदर्वावति वृत्रहन् अतस्त्वा गीर्भिर्द्युगदिन्द्र केशिभिः सुतावाꣳ आ विवासति
sanskrit_iast: yaccʰakrāsi parāvati yadarvāvati vr̥trahan atastvā gīrbʰirdyugadindra keśibʰiḥ sutāvām̐ ā vivāsati

text: Thine, Indra, is the lowest wealth, thou cherishest the midmost wealth, Thou ever rulest all the highest: in the fray for cattle none resisteth thee.
meaning: अभि वो वीरमन्धसो मदेषु गाय गिरा महा विचेतसम् इन्द्रं नाम श्रुत्यꣳ शाकिनं वचो यथा
sanskrit_iast: abʰi vo vīramandʰaso madeṣu gāya girā mahā vicetasam indraṃ nāma śrutyam̐ śākinaṃ vaco yatʰā
