text: Where art thou? Whither art thou gone? For many a place attracts thy mind. Haste, warrior, fort-destroyer, Lord of battle's din! haste, holy songs have sounded forth!
meaning: इन्द्र त्रिधातु शरणं त्रिवरूथꣳ स्वस्तये छर्दिर्यच्छ मघवद्भ्यश्च मह्यं च यावया दिद्युमेभ्यः
sanskrit_iast: indra tridʰātu śaraṇaṃ trivarūtʰam̐ svastaye cʰardiryaccʰa magʰavadbʰyaśca mahyaṃ ca yāvayā didyumebʰyaḥ

text: Here, verily, yesterday we let the thunder-wielder drink his fill. Bring him the juice poured forth in sacrifice to-day. Now range you by the glorious one!
meaning: श्रायन्त इव सूर्यं विश्वेदिन्द्रस्य भक्षत वसूनि जातो जनिमान्योजसा प्रति भागं न दीधिमः
sanskrit_iast: śrāyanta iva sūryaṃ viśvedindrasya bʰakṣata vasūni jāto janimānyojasā prati bʰāgaṃ na dīdʰimaḥ

text: He who as sovran Lord of men moves with his chariots unrestrained, The Vritra-slayer, vanquisher of fighting hosts, pre-eminent, is praised in song.
meaning: न सीमदेव आप तदिषं दीर्घायो मर्त्यः एतग्वा चिद्या एतशो युयोजत इन्द्रो हरी युयोजते
sanskrit_iast: na sīmadeva āpa tadiṣaṃ dīrgʰāyo martyaḥ etagvā cidyā etaśo yuyojata indro harī yuyojate

text: Indra, give us security from that whereof we are afraid Help us, O Maghavan, let thy favour aid us thus; drive away foes and enemies!
meaning: आ नो विश्वासु हव्यमिन्द्रꣳ समत्सु भूषत उप ब्रह्माणि सवनानि वृत्रहन्परमज्या ऋचीषम
sanskrit_iast: ā no viśvāsu havyamindram̐ samatsu bʰūṣata upa brahmāṇi savanāni vr̥trahanparamajyā r̥cīṣama

text: Strong pillar thou, Lord of the home! armour of Soma-offerers! The drop of Soma breaketh all the strongholds down, and Indra is the Rishis' friend.
meaning: तवेदिन्द्रावमं वसु त्वं पुष्यसि मध्यमम् सत्रा विश्वस्य परमस्य राजसि न किष्ट्वा गोषु वृण्वते
sanskrit_iast: tavedindrāvamaṃ vasu tvaṃ puṣyasi madʰyamam satrā viśvasya paramasya rājasi na kiṣṭvā goṣu vr̥ṇvate

text: Verily, Surya, thou art great; truly, Aditya, thou art great! O most admired for greatness of thy majesty, God, by thy greatness thou art great!
meaning: क्वेयथ क्वेदसि पुरुत्रा चिद्धि ते मनः अलर्षि युध्म खजकृत्पुरन्दर प्र गायत्रा अगासिषुः
sanskrit_iast: kveyatʰa kvedasi purutrā ciddʰi te manaḥ alarṣi yudʰma kʰajakr̥tpurandara pra gāyatrā agāsiṣuḥ

text: Indra! thy friend, when fair of form and rich in chariots, steeds, and kine, Hath ever vital power that gives him strength, and joins the company with radiant men.
meaning: वयमेनमिदा ह्योपीपेमेह वज्रिणम् तस्मा उ अद्य सवने सुतं भरा नूनं भूषत श्रुते
sanskrit_iast: vayamenamidā hyopīpemeha vajriṇam tasmā u adya savane sutaṃ bʰarā nūnaṃ bʰūṣata śrute

text: O Indra, if a hundred heavens and if a hundred earths were thine,-- No, not a hundred suns could match thee at thy birth, not both the worlds, O Thunderer!
meaning: यो राजा चर्षणीनां याता रथेभिरध्रिगुः विश्वासां तरुता पृतनानां ज्येष्ठं यो वृत्रहा गृणे
sanskrit_iast: yo rājā carṣaṇīnāṃ yātā ratʰebʰiradʰriguḥ viśvāsāṃ tarutā pr̥tanānāṃ jyeṣṭʰaṃ yo vr̥trahā gr̥ṇe

text: Though, Indra, thou art called by men eastward and west ward, north and south, Thou chiefly art with Anava and Turvasa, brave champion urged by men to come.
meaning: यत इन्द्र भयामहे ततो नो अभयं कृधि मघवञ्छग्धि तव तन्न ऊतये वि द्विषो वि मृधो जहि
sanskrit_iast: yata indra bʰayāmahe tato no abʰayaṃ kr̥dʰi magʰavañcʰagdʰi tava tanna ūtaye vi dviṣo vi mr̥dʰo jahi

text: Indra whose wealth is in thyself, what mortal will attack this man? The strong will win the spoil on the decisive day through faith in thee, O Maghavan!
meaning: वास्तोष्पते ध्रुवा स्थूणाꣳ सत्रꣳ सोम्यानाम् द्रप्सः पुरां भेत्ता शश्वतीनामिन्द्रो मुनीनाꣳ सखा
sanskrit_iast: vāstoṣpate dʰruvā stʰūṇām̐ satram̐ somyānām drapsaḥ purāṃ bʰettā śaśvatīnāmindro munīnām̐ sakʰā

text: First, Indra! Agni! hath this Maid come footless unto those with feet. Stretching her head and speaking loudly with her tongue, she hath gone downward thirty steps.
meaning: बण्महाꣳ असि सूर्य बडादित्य महाꣳ असि महस्ते सतो महिमा पनिष्टम मह्ना देव महाꣳ असि
sanskrit_iast: baṇmahām̐ asi sūrya baḍāditya mahām̐ asi mahaste sato mahimā paniṣṭama mahnā deva mahām̐ asi

text: Come, Indra, very near to us with aids of firmly-based resolve Come, most auspicious, with thy most auspicious help; good kinsman, with good kinsmen come!
meaning: अश्वी रथी सुरूप इद्गोमाꣳ यदिन्द्र ते सखा श्वात्रभाजा वयसा सचते सदा चन्द्रैर्याति सभामुप
sanskrit_iast: aśvī ratʰī surūpa idgomām̐ yadindra te sakʰā śvātrabʰājā vayasā sacate sadā candrairyāti sabʰāmupa

text: Call to your aid the eternal one who shoots and none may shoot at him, Inciter, swift, victorious, best of charioteers, unconquered, Tugriya's strengthener!
meaning: यद्द्याव इन्द्र ते शतꣳ शतं भूमीरुत स्युः न त्वा वज्रिन्त्सहस्रꣳ सूर्या अनु न जातमष्ट रोदसी
sanskrit_iast: yaddyāva indra te śatam̐ śataṃ bʰūmīruta syuḥ na tvā vajrintsahasram̐ sūryā anu na jātamaṣṭa rodasī

text: Let none, no, not thy worshippers, delay thee far away from us Even from faraway come thou unto our feast, or listen if' already here!
meaning: यदिन्द्र प्रागपागुदग्न्यग्वा हूयसे नृभिः सिमा पुरू नृषूतो अस्यानवे ऽसि प्रशर्ध तुर्वशे
sanskrit_iast: yadindra prāgapāgudagnyagvā hūyase nr̥bʰiḥ simā purū nr̥ṣūto asyānave 'si praśardʰa turvaśe

text: For Indra Soma-drinker, armed with thunder, press the Soma juice; Make ready your dressed meats: cause him to favour us! The giver blesses him who gives.
meaning: कस्तमिन्द्र त्वा वसवा मर्त्यो दधर्षति श्रद्धा हि ते मघवन्पार्ये दिवि वाजी वाजꣳ सिषासति
sanskrit_iast: kastamindra tvā vasavā martyo dadʰarṣati śraddʰā hi te magʰavanpārye divi vājī vājam̐ siṣāsati

text: We call upon that Indra who, most active, ever slays the foe With boundless spirit, Lord of heroes, manliest one, help thou and prosper us in fight!
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी अपादियं पूर्वागात्पद्वतीभ्यः हित्वा शिरो जिह्वया रारपच्चरत्त्रिꣳशत्पदा न्यक्रमीत्
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī apādiyaṃ pūrvāgātpadvatībʰyaḥ hitvā śiro jihvayā rārapaccarattrim̐śatpadā nyakramīt

text: Ye rich in strength, through your great power vouchsafe us blessings day and night! The offerings which we bring to you shall never fail gifts brought by us shall never fail.
meaning: इन्द्र नेदीय एदिहि मितमेधाभिरूतिभिः आ शं तम शं तमाभिरभिष्टिभिरा स्वापे स्वापिभिः
sanskrit_iast: indra nedīya edihi mitamedʰābʰirūtibʰiḥ ā śaṃ tama śaṃ tamābʰirabʰiṣṭibʰirā svāpe svāpibʰiḥ

text: Whenever mortal worshipper will sing a bounteous giver's praise, Let him with song inspired laud Varuna who supports the folk who follow varied rites.
meaning: इत ऊती वो अजरं प्रहेतारमप्रहितम् आशुं जेतारꣳ हेतारꣳ रथीतममतूर्तं तुग्रियावृधम्
sanskrit_iast: ita ūtī vo ajaraṃ prahetāramaprahitam āśuṃ jetāram̐ hetāram̐ ratʰītamamatūrtaṃ tugriyāvr̥dʰam

text: Drink milk to Indra in the joy of Soma juice, Medhyatithi! To golden Indra ever close to his bay steeds, the thunder-armed, the golden one!
meaning: मो षु त्वा वाघतश्च नारे अस्मन्नि रीरमन् आरात्ताद्वा सधमादं न आ गहीह वा सन्नुप श्रुधि
sanskrit_iast: mo ṣu tvā vāgʰataśca nāre asmanni rīraman ārāttādvā sadʰamādaṃ na ā gahīha vā sannupa śrudʰi

text: Both boons,-may Indra, hitherward turned listen to this prayer of ours, And mightiest Maghavar, with thought inclined to us come near to drink the Soma juice!
meaning: सुनोत सोमपाव्ने सोममिन्द्राय वज्रिणे पचता पक्तीरवसे कृणुध्वमित्पृणन्नित्पृणते मयः
sanskrit_iast: sunota somapāvne somamindrāya vajriṇe pacatā paktīravase kr̥ṇudʰvamitpr̥ṇannitpr̥ṇate mayaḥ

text: Not for an ample price dost thou, Stone-caster! give thyself away, Not for a thousand, Thunderer! nor ten thousand, nor a hundred, Lord of countless wealth!
meaning: यः सत्राहा विचर्षणिरिन्द्रं तꣳ हूमहे वयम् सहस्रमन्यो तुविनृम्ण सत्पते भवा समत्सु नो वृधे
sanskrit_iast: yaḥ satrāhā vicarṣaṇirindraṃ tam̐ hūmahe vayam sahasramanyo tuvinr̥mṇa satpate bʰavā samatsu no vr̥dʰe

text: O Indra, thou art more to me than sire or niggard brother is. Thou and my mother, O good Lord, appear alike, to give me wealth abundantly.
meaning: शचीभिर्नः शचीवसू दिवानक्तं दिशस्यतम् मा वाꣳ रातिरुप दसत्कदा च नास्मद्रातिः कदा च न
sanskrit_iast: śacībʰirnaḥ śacīvasū divānaktaṃ diśasyatam mā vām̐ rātirupa dasatkadā ca nāsmadrātiḥ kadā ca na

text: These Soma juice mixt with curd have been expressed for Indra here: Come with thy bay steeds, Thunder-wielder, to our home, to drink them till they make thee glad!
meaning: यदा कदा च मीढुषे स्तोता जरेत मर्त्यः आदिद्वन्देत वरुणं विपा गिरा धर्त्तारं विव्रतानाम्
sanskrit_iast: yadā kadā ca mīḍʰuṣe stotā jareta martyaḥ ādidvandeta varuṇaṃ vipā girā dʰarttāraṃ vivratānām

text: Indra, these Somas with their lauds have been prepared for thy delight. Drink of the pleasant juice and listen to our songs; lover of song, reward the hymn!
meaning: पाहि गा अन्धसो मद इन्द्राय मेध्यातिथे यः सम्मिश्लो हर्योर्यो हिरण्यय इन्द्रो वज्री हिरण्ययः
sanskrit_iast: pāhi gā andʰaso mada indrāya medʰyātitʰe yaḥ sammiślo haryoryo hiraṇyaya indro vajrī hiraṇyayaḥ

text: I call on thee, Sabardugha, this day, inspirer of the psalm. Indra, the richly-yielding milch-cow who provides unfailing food in ample stream.
meaning: उभयꣳ शृणवच्च न इन्द्रो अर्वागिदं वचः सत्राच्या मघवान्त्सोमपीतये धिया शविष्ठ आ गमत्
sanskrit_iast: ubʰayam̐ śr̥ṇavacca na indro arvāgidaṃ vacaḥ satrācyā magʰavāntsomapītaye dʰiyā śaviṣṭʰa ā gamat

text: Indra, the strong and lofty hills are powerless to bar thy way None stays that act of thine when thou wouldst fain give wealth to one like me who sings thy praise.
meaning: महे च न त्वाद्रिवः परा शुल्काय दीयसे न सहस्राय नायुताये वज्रिवो न शताय शतामघ
sanskrit_iast: mahe ca na tvādrivaḥ parā śulkāya dīyase na sahasrāya nāyutāye vajrivo na śatāya śatāmagʰa

text: Who knows what vital power he wins, drinking beside the flowing juice? This is the fair-cheeked. God who, joying in the draught, breaks down the castles in his strength.
meaning: वस्याꣳ इन्द्रासि मे पितुरुत भ्रातुरभुञ्जतः माता च मे छदयथः समा वसो वसुत्वनाय राधसे
sanskrit_iast: vasyām̐ indrāsi me pituruta bʰrāturabʰuñjataḥ mātā ca me cʰadayatʰaḥ samā vaso vasutvanāya rādʰase

text: What time thou castest from his seat and punishest the riteless man, Strengthen for opulence, O Indra Maghavan, our plant desired by many a one!
meaning: इम इन्द्राय सुन्विरे सोमासो दध्याशिरः ताꣳ आ मदाय वज्रहस्त पीतये हरिभ्यां याह्योक आ
sanskrit_iast: ima indrāya sunvire somāso dadʰyāśiraḥ tām̐ ā madāya vajrahasta pītaye haribʰyāṃ yāhyoka ā

text: Let Tvashtar, Brahmanaspati, Parjanya guard our heavenly word, Aditi with her sons, the brothers, guard for us the invincible, the saving word!
meaning: इम इन्द्र मदाय ते सोमाश्चिकित्र उकिथनः मधोः पपान उप नो गिरः शृणु रास्व स्तोत्राय गिर्वणः
sanskrit_iast: ima indra madāya te somāścikitra ukitʰanaḥ madʰoḥ papāna upa no giraḥ śr̥ṇu rāsva stotrāya girvaṇaḥ

text: Ne'er art thou fruitless, Indra, ne'er dost thou desert the worshipper: But now, O Maghavan, thy bounty as a God is poured forth ever more and more.
meaning: आ त्वा३द्य सबर्दुघाꣳ हुवे गायत्रवेपसम् इन्द्रं धेनुꣳ सुदुघामन्यामिषमुरुधारामरङ्कृतम्
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā3dya sabardugʰām̐ huve gāyatravepasam indraṃ dʰenum̐ sudugʰāmanyāmiṣamurudʰārāmaraṅkr̥tam

text: Best slayer of the Vritras, yoke thy bay steeds, Indra, far away Come with the high ones hither, Maghavan, to us, mighty, to, drink the Soma juice!
meaning: न त्वा बृहन्तो अद्रयो वरन्त इन्द्र वीडवः यच्छिक्षसि स्तुवते मावते वसु न किष्टदा मिनाति ते
sanskrit_iast: na tvā br̥hanto adrayo varanta indra vīḍavaḥ yaccʰikṣasi stuvate māvate vasu na kiṣṭadā mināti te

text: O Thunderer, zealous worshippers gave thee drink this time yesterday: So, Indra, listen here to him who offers lauds: come near unto, our dwelling-place!
meaning: क ईं वेद सुते सचा पिबन्तं कद्वयो दधे अयं यः पुरो विभिनत्योजसा मन्दानः शिप्र्यन्धसः
sanskrit_iast: ka īṃ veda sute sacā pibantaṃ kadvayo dadʰe ayaṃ yaḥ puro vibʰinatyojasā mandānaḥ śipryandʰasaḥ

text: Advancing, sending forth her rays, the daughter of the Sky is seen. The mighty one lays bare the darkness with her eye, the friendly Lady makes the light.
meaning: यदिन्द्र शासो अव्रतं च्यावया सदसस्परि अस्माकमꣳशुं मघवन्पुरुस्पृहं वसव्ये अधि बर्हय
sanskrit_iast: yadindra śāso avrataṃ cyāvayā sadasaspari asmākamam̐śuṃ magʰavanpuruspr̥haṃ vasavye adʰi barhaya

text: These morning sacrifices call you, Asvins, at the break of day. For help have I invoked you rich in power and might: for, house by house, ye visit all.
meaning: त्वष्टा नो दैव्यं वचः पर्जन्यो ब्रह्मणस्पतिः पुत्रैर्भ्रातृभिरदितिर्नु पातु नो दुष्टरं त्रामणं वचः
sanskrit_iast: tvaṣṭā no daivyaṃ vacaḥ parjanyo brahmaṇaspatiḥ putrairbʰrātr̥bʰiraditirnu pātu no duṣṭaraṃ trāmaṇaṃ vacaḥ

text: Where are ye, Gods? What mortal man, O Asvins, glows with zeal for you, Urging you with the crushing stone and with the stalk of Soma thus or otherwise?
meaning: कदा च न स्तरीरसि नेन्द्र सश्चसि दाशुषे उपोपेन्नु मघवन्भूय इन्नु ते दानं देवस्य पृच्यते
sanskrit_iast: kadā ca na starīrasi nendra saścasi dāśuṣe upopennu magʰavanbʰūya innu te dānaṃ devasya pr̥cyate

text: This sweetest Soma juice hath been expressed for you at morning rites. Asvins, drink this prepared ere yesterday and give treasures to him who offers it!
meaning: युङ्क्ष्वा हि वृत्रहन्तम हरी इन्द्र परावतः अर्वाचीनो मघवन्त्सोमपीतय उग्र ऋष्वेभिरा गहि
sanskrit_iast: yuṅkṣvā hi vr̥trahantama harī indra parāvataḥ arvācīno magʰavantsomapītaya ugra r̥ṣvebʰirā gahi

text: Let me not, still beseeching thee with might and sound of Soma drops, Anger at sacrifice a fierce wild creature! Who would not beseech the almighty one!
meaning: त्वामिदा ह्यो नरो ऽपीप्यन्वज्रिन्भूर्णयः स इन्द्र स्तोमवाहस इह श्रुध्युप स्वसरमा गहि
sanskrit_iast: tvāmidā hyo naro 'pīpyanvajrinbʰūrṇayaḥ sa indra stomavāhasa iha śrudʰyupa svasaramā gahi

text: Adhvaryu, let the Soma flow, for Indra longs to drink thereof. He even now hath yoked his vigorous bay steeds: the Vritraslayer hath come nigh.
meaning: प्रत्यु अदर्श्यायत्यू३च्छन्ती दुहिता दिवः अपो मही वृणुते चक्षुषा तमो ज्योतिष्कृणोति सूनरि
sanskrit_iast: pratyu adarśyāyatyū3ccʰantī duhitā divaḥ apo mahī vr̥ṇute cakṣuṣā tamo jyotiṣkr̥ṇoti sūnari

text: Bring thou all this unto the good, O Indra, to the old and young! For, Maghavan, thou art rich in treasures from of old, to be invoked in every fight.
meaning: इमा उ वां दिविष्टय उस्रा हवन्ते अश्विना अयं वामह्वे ऽवसे शचीवसू विशंविशꣳ हि गच्छथः
sanskrit_iast: imā u vāṃ diviṣṭaya usrā havante aśvinā ayaṃ vāmahve 'vase śacīvasū viśaṃviśam̐ hi gaccʰatʰaḥ

text: If I, O Indra, were the lord of riches ample as thine own, I would support the singer, God who scatterest wealth! and not abandon him to woe.
meaning: कु ष्ठः को वामश्विना तपानो देवा मर्त्यः घ्नता वामश्मया क्षपमाणोꣳशुनेत्थमु आदुन्यथा
sanskrit_iast: ku ṣṭʰaḥ ko vāmaśvinā tapāno devā martyaḥ gʰnatā vāmaśmayā kṣapamāṇom̐śunettʰamu ādunyatʰā

text: Thou in thy battles, Indra, art subduer of all hostile bands. Father art thou, all-conquering, cancelling the curse, thou victor of the vanquisher!
meaning: अयं वां मधुमत्तमः सुतः सोमो दिविष्टिषु तमश्विना पिबतं तिरो अह्न्यं धत्तꣳ रत्नानि दाशुषे
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ vāṃ madʰumattamaḥ sutaḥ somo diviṣṭiṣu tamaśvinā pibataṃ tiro ahnyaṃ dʰattam̐ ratnāni dāśuṣe

text: For in thy might thou stretchest out beyond the mansions of the sky. The earthly region, Indra, comprehends thee not. Thou hast waxed mighty over all.
meaning: आ त्वा सोमस्य गल् _दया सदा याचन्नहं ज्या भूर्णिं मृगं न सवनेषु चुक्रुधं क ईशानं न याचिषत्
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā somasya gal _dayā sadā yācannahaṃ jyā bʰūrṇiṃ mr̥gaṃ na savaneṣu cukrudʰaṃ ka īśānaṃ na yāciṣat

text: Pressed is the juice divine with milk commingled: thereto hath Indra ever been accustomed. We wake thee, Lord of bays, with sacrifices: mark this our laud in the wild joys of Soma!
meaning: अध्वर्यो द्रावया त्वꣳ सोममिन्द्रः पिपासति उपो नूनं युयुजे वृष्णा हरी आ च जगाम वृत्रहा
sanskrit_iast: adʰvaryo drāvayā tvam̐ somamindraḥ pipāsati upo nūnaṃ yuyuje vr̥ṣṇā harī ā ca jagāma vr̥trahā

text: A home is made for thee to dwell in, Indra: O much-invoked one, with the men go thither! Thou, that thou mayest guard us and increase us, givest us wealth and joyest in the Somas.
meaning: अभी षतस्तदा भरेन्द्र ज्यायः कनीयसः पुरूवसुर्हि मघवन्बभूविथ भरेभरे च हव्यः
sanskrit_iast: abʰī ṣatastadā bʰarendra jyāyaḥ kanīyasaḥ purūvasurhi magʰavanbabʰūvitʰa bʰarebʰare ca havyaḥ

text: The well thou clavest, settest free the fountains, and gavest rest to floods that were obstructed. Thou, Indra, laying the great mountain open, slaying the Ddnava, didst loose the torrents.
meaning: यदिन्द्र यावतस्त्वमेतावदहमीशीय स्तोतारमिद्दधिषे रदावसो न पापत्वाय रꣳसिषम्
sanskrit_iast: yadindra yāvatastvametāvadahamīśīya stotāramiddadʰiṣe radāvaso na pāpatvāya ram̐siṣam

text: When we have pressed the juice we laud thee, Indra, most valorous! even about to win the booty. Bring us prosperity, and by thy great wisdom, under thine own protection, may we conquer!
meaning: त्वमिन्द्र प्रतूर्तिष्वभि विश्वा असि स्पृधः अशस्तिहा जनिता वृत्रतूरसि त्वं तूर्य तरुष्यतः
sanskrit_iast: tvamindra pratūrtiṣvabʰi viśvā asi spr̥dʰaḥ aśastihā janitā vr̥tratūrasi tvaṃ tūrya taruṣyataḥ

text: Thy right hand have we grasped in ours, O Indra, longing, thou very Lord of wealth, for treasures. Because we know thee, hero, Lord of cattle: vouchsafe us mighty and resplendent riches!
meaning: प्र यो रिरिक्ष ओजसा दिवः सदोभ्यस्परि न त्वा विव्याच रज इन्द्र पार्थिवमति विश्वं ववक्षिथ
sanskrit_iast: pra yo ririkṣa ojasā divaḥ sadobʰyaspari na tvā vivyāca raja indra pārtʰivamati viśvaṃ vavakṣitʰa

text: Men call on Indra in the armed encounter that he may make the hymns they sing decisive. Hero in combat and in love of glory, give us a portion of the stall of cattle!
meaning: असावि देवं गोऋजीकमन्धो न्यस्मिन्निन्द्रो जनुषेमुवोच बोधामसि त्वा हर्यश्व यज्ञैर्बोधा न स्तोममन्धसो मदेषु
sanskrit_iast: asāvi devaṃ gor̥jīkamandʰo nyasminnindro januṣemuvoca bodʰāmasi tvā haryaśva yajñairbodʰā na stomamandʰaso madeṣu

text: Like birds of beauteous wing the Priyamedhas, Rishis, imploring, have come nigh to Indra. Dispel the darkness and fill full our vision: deliver us as men whom snares entangle!
meaning: योनिष्ट इन्द्र सदने अकारि तमा नृभिः पुरूहूत प्र याहि असो यथा नो ऽविता वृधश्चिद्ददो वसूनि ममदश्च सोमैः
sanskrit_iast: yoniṣṭa indra sadane akāri tamā nr̥bʰiḥ purūhūta pra yāhi aso yatʰā no 'vitā vr̥dʰaściddado vasūni mamadaśca somaiḥ

text: They gaze on thee with longing in their spirit, as on a strongwinged bird that mounteth sky-ward; On thee with wings of gold, Varuna's envoy, the Bird that hasteneth to the home of Yama.
meaning: अदर्दरुत्समसृजो वि खानि त्वमर्णवान्बद्बधानाꣳ अरम्णाः महान्तमिन्द्र पर्वतं वि यद्वः सृजद्धारा अव यद्दानवान्हन्
sanskrit_iast: adardarutsamasr̥jo vi kʰāni tvamarṇavānbadbadʰānām̐ aramṇāḥ mahāntamindra parvataṃ vi yadvaḥ sr̥jaddʰārā ava yaddānavānhan

text: First in the ancient time was Prayer engendered: Vena disclosed the bright ones from the summit, Laid bare this world's lowest and highest regions, womb of the existent and the non-existent.
meaning: सुष्वाणास इन्द्र स्तुमसि त्वा सनिष्यन्तश्चित्तुविनृम्ण वाजम् आ नो भर सुवितं यस्य कोना तना त्मना सह्यामा त्वोताः
sanskrit_iast: suṣvāṇāsa indra stumasi tvā saniṣyantaścittuvinr̥mṇa vājam ā no bʰara suvitaṃ yasya konā tanā tmanā sahyāmā tvotāḥ

text: They have prepared and fashioned for this hero words never matched, most plentiful, most auspicious, For him the ancient, great, strong, energetic, the very mighty wielder of the thunder.
meaning: जगृह्मा ते दक्षिणमिन्द्र हस्तं वसूयवो वसुपते वसूनाम् विद्मा हि त्वा गोपतिꣳ शूर गोनामस्मभ्यं चित्रं वृषणꣳ रयिन्दाः
sanskrit_iast: jagr̥hmā te dakṣiṇamindra hastaṃ vasūyavo vasupate vasūnām vidmā hi tvā gopatim̐ śūra gonāmasmabʰyaṃ citraṃ vr̥ṣaṇam̐ rayindāḥ

text: The black drop sank in Ansumati's bosom, advancing with ten thousand round about it. Indra with might longed for it as it panted: the hero-hearted King laid down his weapons.
meaning: इन्द्रं नरो नेमधिता हवन्ते यत्पार्या युनजते धियस्ताः शूरो नृषाता श्रवसश्च काम आ गोमति व्रजे भजा त्वं नः
sanskrit_iast: indraṃ naro nemadʰitā havante yatpāryā yunajate dʰiyastāḥ śūro nr̥ṣātā śravasaśca kāma ā gomati vraje bʰajā tvaṃ naḥ

text: Flying in terror from the snort of Vritra all deities who were thy friends forsook thee. So, Indra, with the Maruts be thy friendship: in all these battles thou shalt be the victor.
meaning: वयः सुपर्णा उप सेदुरिन्द्रं प्रियमेधा ऋषयो नाधमानाः अप ध्वान्तमूर्णुहि पूर्धि चक्षुर्मुमुग्ध्या३स्मान्निधयेव बद्धान्
sanskrit_iast: vayaḥ suparṇā upa sedurindraṃ priyamedʰā r̥ṣayo nādʰamānāḥ apa dʰvāntamūrṇuhi pūrdʰi cakṣurmumugdʰyā3smānnidʰayeva baddʰān

text: The old hath waked the young Moon from his slumber who runs his circling course with many round him. Behold the God's high wisdom in its greatness: he who died yesterday to-day is living.
meaning: नाके सुपर्णमुप यत्पतन्तꣳ हृदा वेनन्तो अभ्यचक्षत त्वा हिरण्यपक्षं वरुणस्य दूतं यमस्य योनौ शकुनं भुरण्युम्
sanskrit_iast: nāke suparṇamupa yatpatantam̐ hr̥dā venanto abʰyacakṣata tvā hiraṇyapakṣaṃ varuṇasya dūtaṃ yamasya yonau śakunaṃ bʰuraṇyum

text: Then, at thy birth, thou wast the foeman, Indra, of those the seven who ne'er had met a rival. The hidden pair, heaven and the earth, thou foundest, and to the mighty worlds thou gavest pleasure.
meaning: ब्रह्म जज्ञानं प्रथमं पुरस्ताद्वि सीमतः सुरुचो वेन आवः स बुध्न्या उपमा अस्य विष्ठाः सतश्च योनिमसतश्च विवः
sanskrit_iast: brahma jajñānaṃ pratʰamaṃ purastādvi sīmataḥ suruco vena āvaḥ sa budʰnyā upamā asya viṣṭʰāḥ sataśca yonimasataśca vivaḥ

text: A friend we count thee, sharp-edged, thunder-wielder, Steer strong of body, overthrowing many. Thou, helping, causest pious tribes to conquer: Indra, I laud the, heavenly Vritra-slayer.
meaning: अपूर्व्या पुरुतमान्यस्मै महे वीराय तवसे तुराय विरप्शिने वज्रिणे शन्तमानि वचाꣳस्यास्मै स्थविराय तक्षुः
sanskrit_iast: apūrvyā purutamānyasmai mahe vīrāya tavase turāya virapśine vajriṇe śantamāni vacām̐syāsmai stʰavirāya takṣuḥ

text: Bring to the wise, the great, who waxeth mighty your offerings,. and make ready your devotion! Go forth to many tribes as man's controller!
meaning: अव द्रप्सो अꣳशुमतीमतिष्ठदीयानः कृष्णो दशभिः सहस्रैः आवत्तमिन्द्रः शच्या धमन्तमप स्नीहितिं नृमणा अधद्राः
sanskrit_iast: ava drapso am̐śumatīmatiṣṭʰadīyānaḥ kr̥ṣṇo daśabʰiḥ sahasraiḥ āvattamindraḥ śacyā dʰamantamapa snīhitiṃ nr̥maṇā adʰadrāḥ

text: Call we on Maghavan, auspicious Indra, best hero in this fight where spoil is gathered, Strong, listening to give us aid in battles, who slays the Vritras, wins and gathers riches!
meaning: वृत्रस्य त्वा श्वसथादीषमाणा विश्वे देवा अजहुर्ये सखायः मरुद्भिरिन्द्र सख्यं ते अस्त्वथेमा विश्वाः पृतना जयासि
sanskrit_iast: vr̥trasya tvā śvasatʰādīṣamāṇā viśve devā ajahurye sakʰāyaḥ marudbʰirindra sakʰyaṃ te astvatʰemā viśvāḥ pr̥tanā jayāsi

text: Prayers have been offered up-through love of glory: Vasishtha, honour Indra in the battle! He who with fame extends through all existence hears words which I, his faithful servant, utter.
meaning: विधुं दद्राणꣳ समने बहूनाꣳ युवानꣳ सन्तं पलितो जगार देवस्य पश्य काव्यं महित्वाद्या ममार स ह्यः समान
sanskrit_iast: vidʰuṃ dadrāṇam̐ samane bahūnām̐ yuvānam̐ santaṃ palito jagāra devasya paśya kāvyaṃ mahitvādyā mamāra sa hyaḥ samāna

text: May the sweet Soma juices make him happy to cast his quoit that lies in depth of waters! Thou from the udder which o'er earth is fastened hast poured the milk into the kine and herbage.
meaning: त्वꣳ ह त्यत्सप्तभ्यो जायमानो ऽशत्रुभ्यो अभवः शत्रुरिन्द्र गूढे द्यावापृथिवी अन्वविन्दो विभुमद्भ्यो भुवनेभ्यो रणं धाः
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ ha tyatsaptabʰyo jāyamāno 'śatrubʰyo abʰavaḥ śatrurindra gūḍʰe dyāvāpr̥tʰivī anvavindo vibʰumadbʰyo bʰuvanebʰyo raṇaṃ dʰāḥ

text: This vigorous one whom deities commission, the conqueror of cars, the strong and mighty, Swift, fleet to battle, with uninjured fellies, even Tarkshya for our weal will we call hither.
meaning: मेडिं न त्वा वज्रिणं भृष्टिमन्तं पुरुधस्मानं वृषभꣳ स्थिरप्स्नुम् करोष्यर्यस्तरुषीर्दुवस्युरिन्द्र द्युक्षं वृत्रहणं गृणीषे
sanskrit_iast: meḍiṃ na tvā vajriṇaṃ bʰr̥ṣṭimantaṃ purudʰasmānaṃ vr̥ṣabʰam̐ stʰirapsnum karoṣyaryastaruṣīrduvasyurindra dyukṣaṃ vr̥trahaṇaṃ gr̥ṇīṣe

text: Indra the rescuer, Indra the helper, hero who listens at each invocation, Sakra I call, Indra invoked of many. May Indra Maghavan accept our presents!
meaning: प्र वो महे महेवृधे भरध्वं प्रचेतसे प्र सुमतिं कृणुध्वम् विशः पूर्वीः प्र चर चर्षणिप्राः
sanskrit_iast: pra vo mahe mahevr̥dʰe bʰaradʰvaṃ pracetase pra sumatiṃ kr̥ṇudʰvam viśaḥ pūrvīḥ pra cara carṣaṇiprāḥ

text: Indra whose right hand wields the bolt we worship, driver of bay steeds seeking sundered courses. Shaking his beard with might he hath arisen, terrible with his weapons, with his bounty.
meaning: शुनꣳ हुवेम मघवानमिन्द्रमस्मिन्भरे नृतमं वाजसातौ शृण्वन्तमुग्रमूतये समत्सु ध्नन्तं वृत्राणि सञ्जितं धनानि
sanskrit_iast: śunam̐ huvema magʰavānamindramasminbʰare nr̥tamaṃ vājasātau śr̥ṇvantamugramūtaye samatsu dʰnantaṃ vr̥trāṇi sañjitaṃ dʰanāni

text: The ever-slaying, bold and furious Indra, the bright bolt's Lord, the strong, the great, the boundless, Who slayeth Vritra and acquireth booty, giver of blessings, Maghavan the bounteous.
meaning: उदु ब्रह्माण्यैरत श्रवस्येन्द्रꣳ समर्ये महया वसिष्ठ आ यो विश्वानि श्रवसा ततानोपश्रोता म ईवतो वचाꣳसि
sanskrit_iast: udu brahmāṇyairata śravasyendram̐ samarye mahayā vasiṣṭʰa ā yo viśvāni śravasā tatānopaśrotā ma īvato vacām̐si

text: The man who lies in wait and fights against us, deeming himself a giant or a hero,-- By battle or with strength destroy him, Indra! With thy help, manly-souled! may we be victors!
meaning: चक्रं यदस्याप्स्वा निषत्तमुतो तदस्मै मध्विच्चच्छद्यात् पृथिव्यामतिषितं यदूधः पयो गोष्वदधा ओषधीषु
sanskrit_iast: cakraṃ yadasyāpsvā niṣattamuto tadasmai madʰviccaccʰadyāt pr̥tʰivyāmatiṣitaṃ yadūdʰaḥ payo goṣvadadʰā oṣadʰīṣu

text: He whom men call when striving with their foemen, or speeding onward in array of battle, Whom bards incite where heroes win the booty, or in the way to waters, He is Indra.
meaning: त्यमू षु वाजिनं देवजूतꣳ सहोवानं तरुतारꣳ रथानाम् अरिष्टनेमिं पृतनाजमाशुꣳ स्वस्तये तार्क्ष्यमिहा हुवेम
sanskrit_iast: tyamū ṣu vājinaṃ devajūtam̐ sahovānaṃ tarutāram̐ ratʰānām ariṣṭanemiṃ pr̥tanājamāśum̐ svastaye tārkṣyamihā huvema

text: On a high car, O Parvata and Indra, bring pleasant viands, with brave heroes, hither! Enjoy our presents, Gods, at sacrifices: wax strong by hymns, rejoice in our oblation!
meaning: त्रातारमिन्द्रमवितारमिन्द्रꣳ हवेहवे सुहवꣳ शूरमिन्द्रम् हुवे नु शक्रं पुरुहूतमिन्द्रमिदꣳ हविर्मघवा वेत्विन्द्रः
sanskrit_iast: trātāramindramavitāramindram̐ havehave suhavam̐ śūramindram huve nu śakraṃ puruhūtamindramidam̐ havirmagʰavā vetvindraḥ

text: In ceaseless flow hath he poured forth his praises, as waters from the ocean's depth, to Indra, Who to his car on both its sides securely hath fixed the earth and heaven as with an axle.
meaning: यजामह इन्द्रं वज्रदक्षिणꣳ हरीणाꣳ रथ्य३ं विव्रतानाम् प्र श्मश्रुभिर्दोधुवदूर्ध्वधा भुवद्वि सेनाभिर्भयमानो वि राधसा
sanskrit_iast: yajāmaha indraṃ vajradakṣiṇam̐ harīṇām̐ ratʰya3ṃ vivratānām pra śmaśrubʰirdodʰuvadūrdʰvadʰā bʰuvadvi senābʰirbʰayamāno vi rādʰasā

text: May our friends turn thee hitherward to friendship! Mayst thou approach us even o'er many rivers! May the Disposer, radiant in this mansion with special lustre, bring the father's offspring!
meaning: सत्राहणं दाधृषिं तुम्रमिन्द्रं महामपारं वृशभꣳ सुवज्रम् हन्ता यो वृत्रꣳ सनितोत वाजं दाता मघानि मघवा सुराधाः
sanskrit_iast: satrāhaṇaṃ dādʰr̥ṣiṃ tumramindraṃ mahāmapāraṃ vr̥śabʰam̐ suvajram hantā yo vr̥tram̐ sanitota vājaṃ dātā magʰāni magʰavā surādʰāḥ

text: Who yokes to-day unto the pole of Order the strong and passionate steers of checkless spirit, Health-bringing, bearing in their mouths no fodder? Long shall he live who richly pays their service.
meaning: यो नो वनुष्यन्नभिदाति मर्त उगणा वा मन्यमानस्तुरो वा क्षिधी युधा शवसा वा तमिन्द्राभी ष्याम वृषमणस्त्वोताः
sanskrit_iast: yo no vanuṣyannabʰidāti marta ugaṇā vā manyamānasturo vā kṣidʰī yudʰā śavasā vā tamindrābʰī ṣyāma vr̥ṣamaṇastvotāḥ

text: The singers hymn thee, they who chant the psalm of praise are lauding thee. The Brahmans have exalted thee, O Satakratu, like a pole.
meaning: यं वृत्रेषु क्षितय स्पर्धमाना यं युक्तेषु तुरयन्तो हवन्ते यꣳ शूरसातौ यमपामुपज्मन्यं विप्रासो वाजयन्ते स इन्द्रः
sanskrit_iast: yaṃ vr̥treṣu kṣitaya spardʰamānā yaṃ yukteṣu turayanto havante yam̐ śūrasātau yamapāmupajmanyaṃ viprāso vājayante sa indraḥ

text: All sacred-songs have magnified Indra expansive as the sea, Best of all warriors borne on cars, the Lord of heroes, Lord of strength.
meaning: इन्द्रापर्वता बृहता रथेन वामीरिष आ वहतꣳ सुवीराः वीतꣳ हव्यान्यध्वरेषु देवा वर्धेथां गीर्भीरिडया मदन्ता
sanskrit_iast: indrāparvatā br̥hatā ratʰena vāmīriṣa ā vahatam̐ suvīrāḥ vītam̐ havyānyadʰvareṣu devā vardʰetʰāṃ gīrbʰīriḍayā madantā

text: This poured libation, Indra, drink, immortal, gladdening, excellent: Streams of the bright have flowed to thee here at the seat of holy Law.
meaning: इन्द्राय गिरो अनिशितसर्गा अपः प्रैरयत्सगरस्य बुध्नात् यो अक्षेणेव चक्रियौ शचीभिर्विष्वक्तस्तम्भ पृथिवीमुत द्याम्
sanskrit_iast: indrāya giro aniśitasargā apaḥ prairayatsagarasya budʰnāt yo akṣeṇeva cakriyau śacībʰirviṣvaktastambʰa pr̥tʰivīmuta dyām

text: Stone-darting Indra, wondrous God, what wealth thou hast not given me here, That bounty, treasure-finder! bring, filling full both thy hands, to us!
meaning: आ त्वा सखायः सख्या ववृत्युस्तिरः पुरू चिदर्णवां जगम्याः पितुर्नपातमा दधित वेधा अस्मिन्क्षये प्रतरां दीद्यानः
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā sakʰāyaḥ sakʰyā vavr̥tyustiraḥ purū cidarṇavāṃ jagamyāḥ piturnapātamā dadʰita vedʰā asminkṣaye pratarāṃ dīdyānaḥ

text: O Indra, hear Tiraschi's call, the call of him who serveth thee! Satisfy him with wealth of kine and valiant offspring! Great art thou.
meaning: को अद्य युङ्क्ते धुरि गा ऋतस्य शिमीवतो भामिनो दुर्हृणायून् आसन्नेषामप्सुवाहो मयोभून्य एषां भृत्यामृणधत्स जीवात्
sanskrit_iast: ko adya yuṅkte dʰuri gā r̥tasya śimīvato bʰāmino durhr̥ṇāyūn āsanneṣāmapsuvāho mayobʰūnya eṣāṃ bʰr̥tyāmr̥ṇadʰatsa jīvāt

text: This Soma hath been pressed for thee, O Indra: bold one, mightiest, come! May Indra-vigour fill thee full, as Surya fills mid-air with rays
meaning: गायन्ति त्वा गायत्रिणो ऽर्चन्त्यर्कमर्किणः ब्रह्माणस्त्वा शतक्रत उद्वꣳशमिव येमिरे
sanskrit_iast: gāyanti tvā gāyatriṇo 'rcantyarkamarkiṇaḥ brahmāṇastvā śatakrata udvam̐śamiva yemire

text: Come hither, Indra, with thy bays, come thou to Kanva's eulogy! Ye by command of yonder Dyaus, God bright by day! have gone to heaven.
meaning: इन्द्रं विश्वा अवीवृधन्त्समुद्रव्यचसं गिरः रथीतमꣳ रथीनां वाजानाꣳ सत्पतिं पतिम्
sanskrit_iast: indraṃ viśvā avīvr̥dʰantsamudravyacasaṃ giraḥ ratʰītamam̐ ratʰīnāṃ vājānām̐ satpatiṃ patim

text: Song-lover! like a charioteer come songs to thee when Soma flows. Together, they have called to thee as mother-kine unto their calves.
meaning: इममिन्द्र सुतं पिब ज्येष्ठममर्त्यं मदम् शुक्रस्य त्वाभ्यक्षरन्धारा ऋतस्य सादने
sanskrit_iast: imamindra sutaṃ piba jyeṣṭʰamamartyaṃ madam śukrasya tvābʰyakṣarandʰārā r̥tasya sādane

text: Come now and let us glorify pure Indra with pure Sama hymn! Let milk-blent juice delight him made stronger with pure, pure songs of praise!
meaning: यदिन्द्र चित्र म इह नास्ति त्वादातमद्रिवः राधस्तन्नो विदद्वस उभयाहस्त्या भर
sanskrit_iast: yadindra citra ma iha nāsti tvādātamadrivaḥ rādʰastanno vidadvasa ubʰayāhastyā bʰara

text: That which, most wealthy, makes you rich, in splendours most illustrious, Soma is pressed: thy gladdening drink, Indra libation's Lord! is this.
meaning: श्रुदी हवं तिरश्च्या इन्द्र यस्त्वा सपर्यति सुवीर्यस्य गोमतो रायस्पूर्धि महाꣳ असि
sanskrit_iast: śrudī havaṃ tiraścyā indra yastvā saparyati suvīryasya gomato rāyaspūrdʰi mahām̐ asi

text: Bring forth oblations to the God who knoweth all who fain would drink, The wanderer, lagging not behind the hero, coming nigh with speed!
meaning: असावि सोम इन्द्र ते शविष्ठ धृष्णवा गहि आ त्वा पृणक्त्विन्द्रियꣳ रजः सूर्यो न रश्मिभिः
sanskrit_iast: asāvi soma indra te śaviṣṭʰa dʰr̥ṣṇavā gahi ā tvā pr̥ṇaktvindriyam̐ rajaḥ sūryo na raśmibʰiḥ

text: To us the mighty, lying in all vital power, who resteth in the deep, who standeth in the east. Drive thou the awful word away.
meaning: एन्द्र याहि हरिभिरुप कण्वस्य सुष्टुतिम् दिवो अमुष्य शासतो दिवं यय दिवावसो
sanskrit_iast: endra yāhi haribʰirupa kaṇvasya suṣṭutim divo amuṣya śāsato divaṃ yaya divāvaso

text: Even as a car to give us aid, we draw thee nigh to favour us, Strong in thy deeds, quelling attack, Indra, Lord, mightiest! of the brave.
meaning: आ त्वा गिरो रथीरिवास्थुः सुतेषु गिर्वणः अभि त्वा समनूषत गावो वत्सं न धेनवः
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā giro ratʰīrivāstʰuḥ suteṣu girvaṇaḥ abʰi tvā samanūṣata gāvo vatsaṃ na dʰenavaḥ

text: With powers of mighty ones hath he, the friend, the ancient, been equipped, Through whom our father Manu made prayers efficacious with the Gods.
meaning: एतो न्विन्द्रꣳ स्तवाम शुद्धꣳ शुद्धेन साम्ना शुद्धैरुक्थैर्वावृध्वाꣳसꣳ शुद्धैराशीर्वान्ममत्तु
sanskrit_iast: eto nvindram̐ stavāma śuddʰam̐ śuddʰena sāmnā śuddʰairuktʰairvāvr̥dʰvām̐sam̐ śuddʰairāśīrvānmamattu

text: What time the swift and shining steeds, yoked to the chariots, draw them on, Drinking the sweet delightful juice, there men perform their glorious acts.
meaning: यो रयिं वो रयिन्तमो यो द्युम्नैर्द्युम्नवत्तमः सोमः सुतः स इन्द्र ते ऽस्ति स्वधापते मदः
sanskrit_iast: yo rayiṃ vo rayintamo yo dyumnairdyumnavattamaḥ somaḥ sutaḥ sa indra te 'sti svadʰāpate madaḥ

text: Him for your sake I glorify as Lord of Strength who wrongeth none, Indra the hero, mightiest, all-conquering and omniscient.
meaning: प्रत्यस्मै पिपीषते विश्वानि विदुषे भर अरङ्गमाय जग्मये ऽपश्चादध्वने नरः
sanskrit_iast: pratyasmai pipīṣate viśvāni viduṣe bʰara araṅgamāya jagmaye 'paścādadʰvane naraḥ

text: I with my praise have glorified strong Dadhikravan, conquering steed Sweet may he make our mouths: may he prolong the days we have to live!
meaning: आ नो वयोवयःशयं महान्तं गह्वरेष्ठां महान्तं पूर्विनेष्ठाम् उग्रं वचो अपावधीः
sanskrit_iast: ā no vayovayaḥśayaṃ mahāntaṃ gahvareṣṭʰāṃ mahāntaṃ pūrvineṣṭʰām ugraṃ vaco apāvadʰīḥ

text: Render of forts, the young, the wise, of strength unmeasured, was he born, Sustainer of each sacred rite, Indra, the Thunderer, much-extolled.
meaning: आ त्वा रथं यथोतये सुम्नाय वर्तयामसि तुविकूर्मिमृतीषहमिन्द्रꣳ शविष्ठ सत्पतिम्
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā ratʰaṃ yatʰotaye sumnāya vartayāmasi tuvikūrmimr̥tīṣahamindram̐ śaviṣṭʰa satpatim

text: Offer the triple sacred draught to Indu hero-worshipper! With hymn and plenty he invites you to complete the sacrifice.
meaning: स पूर्व्यो महोनां वेनः क्रतुभिरानजे यस्य द्वारा मनुः पिता देवेषु धिय आनजे
sanskrit_iast: sa pūrvyo mahonāṃ venaḥ kratubʰirānaje yasya dvārā manuḥ pitā deveṣu dʰiya ānaje

text: Those whom they call the attendant pair of Kasyapa who knows the light, Lords of each holy duty when the wise have honoured sacrifice.
meaning: यदी वहन्त्याशवो भ्राजमाना रथेष्वा पिबन्तो मदिरं मधु तत्र श्रवाꣳसि कृण्वते
sanskrit_iast: yadī vahantyāśavo bʰrājamānā ratʰeṣvā pibanto madiraṃ madʰu tatra śravām̐si kr̥ṇvate

text: Sing, sing ye forth your songs of praise, men, Priya-medhas, sing your songs: Yea, let young children sing their lauds: yea, glorify our firm stronghold!
meaning: त्यमु वो अप्रहणं गृणीषे शवसस्पतिम् इन्द्रं विश्वासाहं नरꣳ शचिष्ठं विश्ववेदसम्
sanskrit_iast: tyamu vo aprahaṇaṃ gr̥ṇīṣe śavasaspatim indraṃ viśvāsāhaṃ naram̐ śaciṣṭʰaṃ viśvavedasam

text: To Indra must a laud be said, a joy to him who freely gives, That Sakra may be joyful in our friendship and the juice we pour.
meaning: दधिक्राव्णो अकारिषं जिष्णोरश्वस्य वाजिनः सुरभि नो मुखा करत्प्र न आयूꣳषि तारिषत्
sanskrit_iast: dadʰikrāvṇo akāriṣaṃ jiṣṇoraśvasya vājinaḥ surabʰi no mukʰā karatpra na āyūm̐ṣi tāriṣat

text: Your Lord of might that ne'er hath bent, that ruleth over all mankind, I call, that he, as he is wont, may aid the chariots and the men.
meaning: पुरां भिन्दुर्युवा कविरमितौजा अजायत इन्द्रो विश्वस्य कर्मणो धर्त्ता वज्री पुरुष्टुतः
sanskrit_iast: purāṃ bʰinduryuvā kaviramitaujā ajāyata indro viśvasya karmaṇo dʰarttā vajrī puruṣṭutaḥ

text: Even he who is thine own, through thought of Heaven, of mortal man who toils, He with the help of lofty Dyaus comes safe through straits of enmity.
meaning: प्रप्र वस्त्रिष्टुभमिषं वन्दद्वीरायेन्दवे धिया वो मेधसातये पुरन्ध्या विवासति
sanskrit_iast: prapra vastriṣṭubʰamiṣaṃ vandadvīrāyendave dʰiyā vo medʰasātaye purandʰyā vivāsati

text: Wide, Indra Satakratu, spreads the bounty of thine ample grace: So, good and liberal giver, known to all men, send us splendid wealth!
meaning: कश्यपस्य स्वर्विदो यावाहुः सयुजाविति ययोर्विश्वमपि व्रतं यज्ञं धीरा निचाय्य
sanskrit_iast: kaśyapasya svarvido yāvāhuḥ sayujāviti yayorviśvamapi vrataṃ yajñaṃ dʰīrā nicāyya

text: Bright Ushas, when thy times return, all quadrupeds and bipeds stir, And round about flock winged birds from all the boundaries of heaven.
meaning: अर्चत प्रार्चता नरः प्रियमेधासो अर्चत अर्चन्तु पुत्रका उत पुरमिद्धृष्ण्वर्चत
sanskrit_iast: arcata prārcatā naraḥ priyamedʰāso arcata arcantu putrakā uta puramiddʰr̥ṣṇvarcata

text: Ye Gods who yonder have your home amid the luminous realm of heaven, What count ye right? what endless life? What is the ancient call on you?
meaning: उक्थमिन्द्राय शꣳस्यं वर्धनं पुरुनिःषिधे शक्रो यथा सुतेषु नो रारणत्सख्येषु च
sanskrit_iast: uktʰamindrāya śam̐syaṃ vardʰanaṃ puruniḥṣidʰe śakro yatʰā suteṣu no rāraṇatsakʰyeṣu ca

text: We offer laud and psalm wherewith men celebrate their holy rites. They govern at the sacred place and bear the sacrifice to Gods.
meaning: विश्वानरस्य वस्पतिमनानतस्य शवसः एवैश्च चर्षणीनामूती हुवे रथानाम्
sanskrit_iast: viśvānarasya vaspatimanānatasya śavasaḥ evaiśca carṣaṇīnāmūtī huve ratʰānām

text: Heroes of one accord brought forth and formed for kingship Indra who wins the victory in all encounters, For power, in firmness, in the field, the great destroyer, fierce and exceeding strong,rstalwart and full of vigour.
meaning: स घा यस्ते दिवो नरो धिया मर्तस्य शमतः ऊती स बृहतो दिवो द्विषो अꣳहो न तरति
sanskrit_iast: sa gʰā yaste divo naro dʰiyā martasya śamataḥ ūtī sa br̥hato divo dviṣo am̐ho na tarati

text: I trust in thy first wrathful deed, O Indra, when thou slewest Vritra and didst work to profit man; When the two world-halves fled for refuge unto thee, and earth even trembled at thy strength, O Thunder-armed!
meaning: विभोष्ट इन्द्र राधसो विभ्वी रातिः शतक्रतो अथा नो विश्वचर्षणे द्युम्नꣳ सुदत्र मꣳहय
sanskrit_iast: vibʰoṣṭa indra rādʰaso vibʰvī rātiḥ śatakrato atʰā no viśvacarṣaṇe dyumnam̐ sudatra mam̐haya

text: Come all with might together to the Lord of heaven, the only one who is indeed the guestof men. He is the first: to him who fain would come to us all pathways turn; he is in truth the only one.
meaning: वयश्चित्ते पतत्रिणो द्विपाच्चतुष्पादर्जुनि उषः प्रारन्नृतूꣳरनु दिवो अन्तेभ्यस्परि
sanskrit_iast: vayaścitte patatriṇo dvipāccatuṣpādarjuni uṣaḥ prārannr̥tūm̐ranu divo antebʰyaspari

text: Thine, Indra, praised of many, excellently rich, are we who trusting in thy help draw near to thee. For none but thou, song-lover, shall receive our lauds: as Earth loves all her creatures, welcome this our hymn!
meaning: अमी ये देवा स्थन मध्य आ रोचने दिवः कद्व ऋतं कदमृतं का प्रत्ना व आहुतिः
sanskrit_iast: amī ye devā stʰana madʰya ā rocane divaḥ kadva r̥taṃ kadamr̥taṃ kā pratnā va āhutiḥ

text: High hymns have sounded forth the praise of Maghavan, supporter of mankind, of Indra meet for lauds; Him who hath waxen mighty, much-invoked with prayers, immortal one whose praise each day is sung aloud.
meaning: ऋचꣳ साम यजामहे याभ्यां कर्माणि कृण्वते वि ते सदसि राजतो यज्ञं देवेषु वक्षतः
sanskrit_iast: r̥cam̐ sāma yajāmahe yābʰyāṃ karmāṇi kr̥ṇvate vi te sadasi rājato yajñaṃ deveṣu vakṣataḥ

text: In perfect unison have all your longing hymns that find the light of heaven sounded forth Indra's praise. As wives embrace their lord, the comely bridegroom, so they compass Maghavan about that he may help.
meaning: विश्वाः पृतना अभिभूतरं नरः सजूस्ततक्षुरिन्द्रं जजनुश्च राजसे क्रत्वे वरे स्थेमन्यामुरीमुतोग्रमोजिष्ठं तरसं तरस्विनम्
sanskrit_iast: viśvāḥ pr̥tanā abʰibʰūtaraṃ naraḥ sajūstatakṣurindraṃ jajanuśca rājase kratve vare stʰemanyāmurīmutogramojiṣṭʰaṃ tarasaṃ tarasvinam

text: Make glad with songs that Ram whom many men invoke, worthy hymns of praise, Indra the sea of wealth; Whose boons spread like the heavens, the - lover of mankind: sing praise to him the Sage, most liberal for our good!
meaning: श्रत्ते दधामि प्रथमाय मन्यवे ऽहन्यद्दस्युं नर्यं विवेरपः उभे यत्वा रोदसी धावतामनु भ्यसात्ते शुष्मात्पृथिवी चिदद्रिवः
sanskrit_iast: śratte dadʰāmi pratʰamāya manyave 'hanyaddasyuṃ naryaṃ viverapaḥ ubʰe yatvā rodasī dʰāvatāmanu bʰyasātte śuṣmātpr̥tʰivī cidadrivaḥ

text: I glorify that Ram who finds the light of heaven, whose hundred strong and mighty ones go forth with him. With prayers may I turn hither Indra to mine aid;-the car which like a swift steed hasteth to the call!
meaning: समेत विश्वा ओजसा पतिं दिवो य एक इद्भूरतिथिर्जनानाम् स पूर्व्यो नूतनमाजिगीषं तं वर्त्तनीरनु वावृत एक इत्
sanskrit_iast: sameta viśvā ojasā patiṃ divo ya eka idbʰūratitʰirjanānām sa pūrvyo nūtanamājigīṣaṃ taṃ varttanīranu vāvr̥ta eka it

text: Filled full of fatness, compassing all things that be, wide, spacious, dropping meath, beautiful in their form, The heaven and the earth by Varuna's decree, unwasting, rich in germs, stand parted each from each.
meaning: इमे त इन्द्र ते वयं पुरुष्टुत ये त्वारभ्य चरामसि प्रभूवसो न हि त्वदन्यो गिर्वणो गिरः सघत्क्षोणीरिव प्रति तद्धर्य नो वचः
sanskrit_iast: ime ta indra te vayaṃ puruṣṭuta ye tvārabʰya carāmasi prabʰūvaso na hi tvadanyo girvaṇo giraḥ sagʰatkṣoṇīriva prati taddʰarya no vacaḥ

text: As like the Morning, thou hast filled, O Indra, both the earth. and heaven, So as the mighty one, great King of all the mighty race of men, the Goddess mother brought thee forth, the blessed mother gave thee life.
meaning: चर्षणीधृतं मघवानमुक्थ्या३मिन्द्रं गिरो बृहतीरभ्यनूषत वावृधानं पुरुहूतꣳ सुवृक्तिभिरमर्त्यं जरमाणं दिवेदिवे
sanskrit_iast: carṣaṇīdʰr̥taṃ magʰavānamuktʰyā3mindraṃ giro br̥hatīrabʰyanūṣata vāvr̥dʰānaṃ puruhūtam̐ suvr̥ktibʰiramartyaṃ jaramāṇaṃ divedive

text: Sing, with oblation, praise to him who maketh glad, who with. Rijisvan drove the dusky brood away! Let us, desiring help, call him for friendship, him the strong, the Marut-girt, whose right hand wields the bolt! I. When Somas flow thou makest pure, Indra, thy mind that merits laud For gain of strength that ever grows: for great is he.
meaning: अच्छा व इन्द्रं मतयः स्वर्युवः सध्रीचीर्विश्वा उशतीरनूषत परि ष्वजन्त जनयो यथा पतिं मर्यं न शुन्ध्युं मघवानमूतये
sanskrit_iast: accʰā va indraṃ matayaḥ svaryuvaḥ sadʰrīcīrviśvā uśatīranūṣata pari ṣvajanta janayo yatʰā patiṃ maryaṃ na śundʰyuṃ magʰavānamūtaye

text: Sing forth to him whom many men invoke, to him whom many laud: Invite the potent Indra with your songs of praise
meaning: अभि त्यं मेषं पुरुहूतमृग्मियमिन्द्रं गीर्भिर्मदता वस्वो अर्णवम् यस्य द्यावो न विचरन्ति मानुषं भुजे मꣳहिष्ठमभि विप्रमर्चत
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tyaṃ meṣaṃ puruhūtamr̥gmiyamindraṃ gīrbʰirmadatā vasvo arṇavam yasya dyāvo na vicaranti mānuṣaṃ bʰuje mam̐hiṣṭʰamabʰi vipramarcata

text: We sing this strong and wild delight of thine which conquer; in the fray, Which, Caster of the Stone! gives room and shines like gold,
meaning: त्यꣳ सु मेषं महया स्वर्विदꣳ शतं यस्य सुभुवः साकमीरते अत्यं न वाजꣳ हवनस्यदꣳ रथमेन्द्रं ववृत्यामवसे सुवृक्तिभिः
sanskrit_iast: tyam̐ su meṣaṃ mahayā svarvidam̐ śataṃ yasya subʰuvaḥ sākamīrate atyaṃ na vājam̐ havanasyadam̐ ratʰamendraṃ vavr̥tyāmavase suvr̥ktibʰiḥ

text: Whether thou drink the Soma by Vishnu's or Trita Aptya's side, Or with the Maruts, Indra! quaff the following drops.
meaning: घृतवती भुवनानामभिश्रियोर्वी पृथ्वी मधुदुघे सुपेशसा द्यावापृथिवी वरुणस्य धर्मणा विष्कभिते अजरे भूरिरेतसा
sanskrit_iast: gʰr̥tavatī bʰuvanānāmabʰiśriyorvī pr̥tʰvī madʰudugʰe supeśasā dyāvāpr̥tʰivī varuṇasya dʰarmaṇā viṣkabʰite ajare bʰūriretasā

text: Come, priest, and of the savoury juice pour forth a yet more gladdening draught: So is the hero praised who ever prospers us.
meaning: उभे यदिन्द्र रोदसी आपप्राथोषा इव महान्तं त्वा महीनाꣳ सम्राजं चर्षणीनाम् देवी जनित्र्यजीजनद्भद्रा जनित्र्यजीजनत्
sanskrit_iast: ubʰe yadindra rodasī āpaprātʰoṣā iva mahāntaṃ tvā mahīnām̐ samrājaṃ carṣaṇīnām devī janitryajījanadbʰadrā janitryajījanat

text: Pour out the drops for Indra; let him drink the meath of Soma juice! He through his majesty sends forth his bounteous gifts.
meaning: प्र मन्दिने पितुमदर्चता वचो यः कृष्णगर्भा निरहन्नृजिश्वना अवस्यवो वृषणं वज्रदक्षिणं मरुत्वन्तꣳ सख्याय हुवेमहि
sanskrit_iast: pra mandine pitumadarcatā vaco yaḥ kr̥ṣṇagarbʰā nirahannr̥jiśvanā avasyavo vr̥ṣaṇaṃ vajradakṣiṇaṃ marutvantam̐ sakʰyāya huvemahi

text: Come, sing we praise to Indra, friends! the hero who deserves the laud, Him who with none to aid o'ercomes all tribes of men.
meaning: इन्द्र सुतेषु सोमेषु क्रतुं पुनीष उक्थ्यम् विदे वृधस्य दक्षस्य महाꣳ हि षः
sanskrit_iast: indra suteṣu someṣu kratuṃ punīṣa uktʰyam vide vr̥dʰasya dakṣasya mahām̐ hi ṣaḥ

text: Sing ye a psalm to Indra, sing a great song to the lofty Sage, To him who maketh prayer, inspired who loveth laud!
meaning: तमु अभि प्र गायत पुरुहूतं पुरुष्टुतम् इन्द्रं गीर्भिस्तविषमा विवासत
sanskrit_iast: tamu abʰi pra gāyata puruhūtaṃ puruṣṭutam indraṃ gīrbʰistaviṣamā vivāsata

text: He who alone bestoweth wealth on mortal man who offereth gifts Is Indra only, potent Lord whom none resist.
meaning: तं ते मदं गृणीमसि वृषणं पृक्षु सासहिम् उ लोककृत्नुमद्रिवो हरिश्रियम्
sanskrit_iast: taṃ te madaṃ gr̥ṇīmasi vr̥ṣaṇaṃ pr̥kṣu sāsahim u lokakr̥tnumadrivo hariśriyam

text: Companions, let us learn a prayer to Indra, to the Thunderer, To glorify your bold and most heroic friend!
meaning: यत्सोममिन्द्र विष्णवि यद्वा घ त्रित आप्त्ये यद्वा मरुत्सु मन्दसे समिन्दुभिः
sanskrit_iast: yatsomamindra viṣṇavi yadvā gʰa trita āptye yadvā marutsu mandase samindubʰiḥ

text: Indra, this might of thine I praise most highly for the sacrifice That thou, O Lord of Power, dost slay Vritra with might
meaning: एदु मधोर्मदिन्तरꣳ सिञ्चाध्वर्यो अन्धसः एवा हि वीरस्तवते सदावृधः
sanskrit_iast: edu madʰormadintaram̐ siñcādʰvaryo andʰasaḥ evā hi vīrastavate sadāvr̥dʰaḥ

text: For thee this Soma hath been pressed, in whose wild joy thou madest once Sambara Divodasa's prey: O Indra, drink!
meaning: एन्दुमिन्द्राय सिञ्चत पिबाति सोम्यं मधु प्र राधाꣳसि चोदयते महित्वना
sanskrit_iast: endumindrāya siñcata pibāti somyaṃ madʰu pra rādʰām̐si codayate mahitvanā

text: Come unto us, O Indra, dear, still conquering, unconcealable! Wide as a mountain spread on all sides, Lord of heaven!
meaning: एतो न्विन्द्रꣳ स्तवाम सखायः स्तोम्यं नरम् कृष्टीर्यो विश्वा अभ्यस्त्येक इत्
sanskrit_iast: eto nvindram̐ stavāma sakʰāyaḥ stomyaṃ naram kr̥ṣṭīryo viśvā abʰyastyeka it

text: Joy, mightiest Indra, that perceives, sprung from deep Soma draughts, whereby Thou smitest down the greedy fiend,-that joy we crave!
meaning: इन्द्राय साम गायत विप्राय बृहते बृहत् ब्रह्मकृते विपश्चिते पनस्यवे
sanskrit_iast: indrāya sāma gāyata viprāya br̥hate br̥hat brahmakr̥te vipaścite panasyave

text: Adityas, very mighty ones, grant to our children and our seed This lengthened term of life that they may live long days!
meaning: य एक इद्विदयते वसु मर्ताय दाशुषे ईशानो अप्रतिष्कुत इन्द्रो अङ्ग
sanskrit_iast: ya eka idvidayate vasu martāya dāśuṣe īśāno apratiṣkuta indro aṅga

text: Though knowest, Indra, Thunder-armed! how to avoid destructive powers, As one secure from pitfalls each returning day.
meaning: सखाय आ शिषामहे ब्रह्मेन्द्राय वज्रिणे स्तुष ऊ षु वो नृतमाय धृष्णवे
sanskrit_iast: sakʰāya ā śiṣāmahe brahmendrāya vajriṇe stuṣa ū ṣu vo nr̥tamāya dʰr̥ṣṇave

text: Drive ye disease and strife away, drive ye away malignity: Adityas, keep us far removed from sore distress!
meaning: गृणे तदिन्द्र ते शव उपमां देवतातये यद्धꣳसि वृत्रमोजसा शचीपते
sanskrit_iast: gr̥ṇe tadindra te śava upamāṃ devatātaye yaddʰam̐si vr̥tramojasā śacīpate

text: Drive Soma, Indra, Lord of bays! and let it cheer thee: the stone, like a well-guided courser,
meaning: यस्य त्यच्छम्बरं मदे दिवोदासाय रन्धयन् अयꣳ स सोम इन्द्र ते सुतः पिब
sanskrit_iast: yasya tyaccʰambaraṃ made divodāsāya randʰayan ayam̐ sa soma indra te sutaḥ piba

text: Still, Indra, from all ancient time rivalless ever and companionless art thou: Thou seekest friendship but in war.
meaning: एन्द्र नो गधि प्रिय सत्राजिदगोह्य गिरिर्न विश्वतः पृथुः पतिर्दिवः
sanskrit_iast: endra no gadʰi priya satrājidagohya girirna viśvataḥ pr̥tʰuḥ patirdivaḥ

text: Him who of old hath broucht to us this and that blessing, him I magnify for you, Even Indra, O my friends, for help.
meaning: य इन्द्र सोमपातमो मदः शविष्ठ चेतति येना हꣳसि न्या३त्रिणं तमीमहे
sanskrit_iast: ya indra somapātamo madaḥ śaviṣṭʰa cetati yenā ham̐si nyā3triṇaṃ tamīmahe

text: Fail not when marching onward: come hither, like-spirited, stay not far away Ye who can tame even what is firm!
meaning: तुचे तुनाय तत्सु नो द्राधीय आयुर्जीवसे आदित्यासः समहसः कृणोतन
sanskrit_iast: tuce tunāya tatsu no drādʰīya āyurjīvase ādityāsaḥ samahasaḥ kr̥ṇotana

text: Come hither to the dropping juice, O Lord of cornland. Lord of horses, Lord of kine: Drink thou the Soma, Soma's Lord!
meaning: वेत्था हि निरृतीनां वज्रहस्त परिवृजम् अहरहः शुन्ध्युः परिपदामिव
sanskrit_iast: vettʰā hi nirr̥tīnāṃ vajrahasta parivr̥jam aharahaḥ śundʰyuḥ paripadāmiva

text: Hero, may we, with thee for friend, withstand the man who pants against us in his wrath, In fight with people rich in kine!
meaning: अपामीवामप स्त्रिधमप सेधत दुर्मतिम् आदित्यासो युयोतना नो अꣳहसः
sanskrit_iast: apāmīvāmapa stridʰamapa sedʰata durmatim ādityāso yuyotanā no am̐hasaḥ

text: Yea, kin by common ancestry, the Maruts, even the oxen, close united friends! Are licking one another's back.
meaning: पिबा सोममिन्द्र मन्दतु त्वा यं ते सुषाव हर्यश्वाद्रिः सोतुर्बाहुभ्याꣳ सुयतो नार्वा
sanskrit_iast: pibā somamindra mandatu tvā yaṃ te suṣāva haryaśvādriḥ soturbāhubʰyām̐ suyato nārvā

text: O Indra, bring great strength to us, bring valour, Satakratu, thou most active, bring A hero conquering in war!
meaning: अभ्रातृव्यो अना त्वमनापिरिन्द्र जनुषा सनादसि युधेदापित्वमिच्छसे
sanskrit_iast: abʰrātr̥vyo anā tvamanāpirindra januṣā sanādasi yudʰedāpitvamiccʰase

text: So, Indra, friend of song, do we draw nigh to thee with longing; we have streamed to thee Coming like floods that follow floods
meaning: यो न इदमिदं पुरा प्र वस्य आनिनाय तमु व स्तुषे सखाय इन्द्रमूतये
sanskrit_iast: yo na idamidaṃ purā pra vasya ānināya tamu va stuṣe sakʰāya indramūtaye

text: Sitting like birds beside thy meath, mingled with milk, which gladdeneth and exalteth thee, Indra, to thee we sing aloud.
meaning: आ गन्ता मा रिषण्यत प्रस्थावानो माप स्थात समन्यवः दृढा चिद्यमयिष्णवः
sanskrit_iast: ā gantā mā riṣaṇyata prastʰāvāno māpa stʰāta samanyavaḥ dr̥ḍʰā cidyamayiṣṇavaḥ

text: We call on thee, O matchless one! We, seeking help, possessing nothing firm ourselves, Call on thee, wondrous, Thunder-armed.
meaning: आ याह्ययमिन्दवे ऽश्वपते गोपत उर्वरापते सोमꣳ सोमपते पिब
sanskrit_iast: ā yāhyayamindave 'śvapate gopata urvarāpate somam̐ somapate piba

text: The juice of Soma thus diffused, sweet to the taste the bright cows drink, Who travelling in splendour close to mighty Indra's side rejoice, good in their own supremacy.
meaning: त्वया ह स्विद्युजा वयं प्रति श्वसन्तं वृषभ ब्रुवीमहि सꣳस्थे जनस्य गोमतः
sanskrit_iast: tvayā ha svidyujā vayaṃ prati śvasantaṃ vr̥ṣabʰa bruvīmahi sam̐stʰe janasya gomataḥ

text: Thus hath the Soma, gladdening draught, produced the prayer that giveth joy: Thou, mightiest, Thunder-armed, hast driven by force the Dragon from the earth, lauding thine own supremacy.
meaning: गावश्चिद्धा समन्यवः सजात्येन मरुतः सबन्धवः रिहते ककुभो मिथः
sanskrit_iast: gāvaściddʰā samanyavaḥ sajātyena marutaḥ sabandʰavaḥ rihate kakubʰo mitʰaḥ

text: By men hath Indra been advanced, the Vritra-slayer, to joy and strength. Him only we invoke for help in battles whether great or small: be he our aid in deeds of might!
meaning: त्वं न इन्द्रा भर ओजो नृम्णꣳ शतक्रतो विचर्षणे आ वीरं पृतनासहम्
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ na indrā bʰara ojo nr̥mṇam̐ śatakrato vicarṣaṇe ā vīraṃ pr̥tanāsaham

text: Unconquered strength is only thine, Indra, Stonecaster, Thunder-armed! When thou with thy surpassing power smotest to death that guileful beast, lauding thine own supremacy.
meaning: अधा हीन्द्र गिर्वण उप त्वा काम ईमहे ससृग्महे उदेव ग्मन्त उदभिः
sanskrit_iast: adʰā hīndra girvaṇa upa tvā kāma īmahe sasr̥gmahe udeva gmanta udabʰiḥ

text: Go forward, meet the foe, be bold; thy bolt of thunder is not checked! Manliness, Indra, is thy strength. Slay Vritra, make the waters thine, lauding thine own supremacy!
meaning: सीदन्तस्ते वयो यथा गोश्रीते मधौ मदिरे विवक्षणे अभि त्वामिन्द्र नोनुमः
sanskrit_iast: sīdantaste vayo yatʰā gośrīte madʰau madire vivakṣaṇe abʰi tvāmindra nonumaḥ

text: When war and battles are on foot, booty is offered to the bold. Yoke thou thy wildly-rushing bays. Whom wilt thou slay, and whom enrich? Do thou, O Indra, make us rich!
meaning: वयमु त्वामपूर्व्य स्थूरं न कच्चिद्भरन्तो ऽवस्यवः वज्रिञ्चित्रꣳ हवामहे
sanskrit_iast: vayamu tvāmapūrvya stʰūraṃ na kaccidbʰaranto 'vasyavaḥ vajriñcitram̐ havāmahe

text: Wcll have they eaten and rejoiced; the friends have risen and passed away: The sages luminous in themselves have praised thee with their latest hymn. Now, Indra, yoke thy two bay steeds!
meaning: स्वादोरित्था विषूवतो मधोः पिबन्ति गौर्यः या इन्द्रेण सयावरीर्वृष्णा मदन्ति शोभथा वस्वीरनु स्वराज्यम्
sanskrit_iast: svādorittʰā viṣūvato madʰoḥ pibanti gauryaḥ yā indreṇa sayāvarīrvr̥ṣṇā madanti śobʰatʰā vasvīranu svarājyam

text: Graciously listen to our songs. Maghavan, be not negligent! When wilt thou make us glorious? Make this, only this thine end and aim. Now, Indra! yoke thy two bay steeds.
meaning: इत्था हि सोम इन्मदो ब्रह्म चकार वर्धनम् शविष्ठ वज्रिन्नोजसा पृथिव्या निः शशा अहिमर्चन्ननु स्वराज्यम्
sanskrit_iast: ittʰā hi soma inmado brahma cakāra vardʰanam śaviṣṭʰa vajrinnojasā pr̥tʰivyā niḥ śaśā ahimarcannanu svarājyam

text: Within the waters runs the Moon, he with the beauteous wings in heaven. Ye lightnings with your golden wheels, men find not your abiding-place. Mark this my woe, ye Earth and Sky!
meaning: इन्द्रो मदाय वावृधे शवसे वृत्रहा नृभिः तमिन्महत्स्वाजिषूतिमर्भे हवामहे स वाजेषु प्र नो ऽविषत्
sanskrit_iast: indro madāya vāvr̥dʰe śavase vr̥trahā nr̥bʰiḥ taminmahatsvājiṣūtimarbʰe havāmahe sa vājeṣu pra no 'viṣat

text: To meet your treasure-bringing car, the mighty car most dear to us. Asvins, the Rishi is prepared, your worshipper, with songs of praise. Lovers of sweetness, hear my call!
meaning: इन्द्र तुभ्यमिदद्रिवो ऽनुत्तं वज्रिन्वीर्यम् यद्ध त्यं मायिनं मृगं तव त्यन्माययावधीरर्चन्ननु स्वराज्यम्
sanskrit_iast: indra tubʰyamidadrivo 'nuttaṃ vajrinvīryam yaddʰa tyaṃ māyinaṃ mr̥gaṃ tava tyanmāyayāvadʰīrarcannanu svarājyam

text: O Agni, God, we kindle thee, refulgent, wasting not away, That this more glorious fuel may send forth for thee its shine to heaven. Bring food to those who sing thy praise!
meaning: प्रेह्यभीहि धृष्णुहि न ते वज्रो नि यꣳसते इन्द्र नृम्णꣳ हि ते शवो हनो वृत्रं जया अपो ऽर्चन्ननु स्वराज्यम्
sanskrit_iast: prehyabʰīhi dʰr̥ṣṇuhi na te vajro ni yam̐sate indra nr̥mṇam̐ hi te śavo hano vr̥traṃ jayā apo 'rcannanu svarājyam

text: With offerings of our own we choose thee, Agni, as our Hotar priest, Piercing and brightly shining-at your glad carouse-served with trimmed grass at sacrifice. Thou waxest great.
meaning: यदुदीरत आजयो धृष्णवे धीयते धनम् युङ्क्ष्वा मदच्युता हरी कꣳ हनः कं वसौ दधो ऽस्माꣳ इन्द्र वसौ दधः
sanskrit_iast: yadudīrata ājayo dʰr̥ṣṇave dʰīyate dʰanam yuṅkṣvā madacyutā harī kam̐ hanaḥ kaṃ vasau dadʰo 'smām̐ indra vasau dadʰaḥ

text: O heavenly Dawn, awaken us to ample opulence to-day, Even as thou didst waken us with Satyasravas, Vayya's son, high born! delightful with thy steeds!
meaning: अक्षन्नमीमदन्त ह्यव प्रिया अधूषत अस्तोषत स्वभानवो विप्रा नविष्ठया मती योजा न्विन्द्र ते हरी
sanskrit_iast: akṣannamīmadanta hyava priyā adʰūṣata astoṣata svabʰānavo viprā naviṣṭʰayā matī yojā nvindra te harī

text: Send us a mind that brings delight, send energy and mental power. Then-at your glad carouse-let men joy in thy love, sweet juice! as kine in pasturage. Thou waxest great,
meaning: उपो षु शृणुही गिरो मघवन्मातथा इव कदा नः सूनृतावतः कर इदर्थयास इद्योजा न्विन्द्र ते हरी
sanskrit_iast: upo ṣu śr̥ṇuhī giro magʰavanmātatʰā iva kadā naḥ sūnr̥tāvataḥ kara idartʰayāsa idyojā nvindra te harī

text: Great, as his nature is, through power, terrible, he hath waxed in strength, Lord of bay steeds, strong-jawed, sublime, he in joined hands for glory's sake hath grasped his iron thunderbolt.
meaning: चन्द्रमा अप्स्वा३न्तरा सुपर्णो धावते दिवि न वो हिरण्यनेमयः पदं विन्दन्ति विद्युतो वित्तं मे अस्य रोदसी
sanskrit_iast: candramā apsvā3ntarā suparṇo dʰāvate divi na vo hiraṇyanemayaḥ padaṃ vindanti vidyuto vittaṃ me asya rodasī

text: He, Indra, verily will mount the powerful car that finds the kine, Who thinks upon the well-filled bowl, the tawny coursers' harnesser. Now, Indra, yoke thy two bay steeds!
meaning: प्रति प्रियतमꣳ रथं वृषणं वसुवाहनम् स्तोता वामश्विनावृशि स्तोमेभिर्भूषति प्रति माध्वी मम श्रुतꣳ हवम्
sanskrit_iast: prati priyatamam̐ ratʰaṃ vr̥ṣaṇaṃ vasuvāhanam stotā vāmaśvināvr̥śi stomebʰirbʰūṣati prati mādʰvī mama śrutam̐ havam

text: I think of Agni who is kind, whom, as their home, the milch-kine seek: Whom fleet-foot coursers seek as home, and strong enduring steeds as home. Bring food to those who sing thy praise!
meaning: आ ते अग्न इधीमहि द्युमन्तं देवाजरम् युद्ध स्या ते पनीयसी समिद्दीदयति द्यवीषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: ā te agna idʰīmahi dyumantaṃ devājaram yuddʰa syā te panīyasī samiddīdayati dyavīṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: No peril, no severe distress, ye Gods, affects the mortal man Whom Aryaman and Mitra lead, and Varuna, of one accord, beyond his foes.
meaning: आग्निं न स्ववृक्तिभिर्होतारं त्वा वृणीमहे शीरं पावकशोचिषं वि वो मदे यज्ञेषु स्तीर्णबर्हिषं विवक्षसे
sanskrit_iast: āgniṃ na svavr̥ktibʰirhotāraṃ tvā vr̥ṇīmahe śīraṃ pāvakaśociṣaṃ vi vo made yajñeṣu stīrṇabarhiṣaṃ vivakṣase

text: Flow forth, O Soma, flow thou onward, sweet to Indra's Mitra's, Pushan's, Bhaga's taste.
meaning: महे नो अद्य बोधयोषो राये दिवित्मती यथा चिन्नो अबोधयः सत्यश्रवसि वाय्ये सुजाते अश्वसूनृते
sanskrit_iast: mahe no adya bodʰayoṣo rāye divitmatī yatʰā cinno abodʰayaḥ satyaśravasi vāyye sujāte aśvasūnr̥te

text: Run forth to battle, conquering the Vritras; thou speedest to quell the foes like one exacting debts.
meaning: भद्रं नो अपि वातय मनो दक्षमुत क्रतुम् अथा ते सख्ये अन्धसो वि वो मदे रणा गावो न यवसे विवक्षसे
sanskrit_iast: bʰadraṃ no api vātaya mano dakṣamuta kratum atʰā te sakʰye andʰaso vi vo made raṇā gāvo na yavase vivakṣase

text: Flow onward, Soma, as a mighty sea, as Father of the Gods, to every form.
meaning: क्रत्वा महाꣳ अनुष्वधं भीम आ वावृते शवः श्रिय ऋष्व उपाकयोर्नि शिप्री हरिवां दधे हस्तयोर्वज्रमायसम्
sanskrit_iast: kratvā mahām̐ anuṣvadʰaṃ bʰīma ā vāvr̥te śavaḥ śriya r̥ṣva upākayorni śiprī harivāṃ dadʰe hastayorvajramāyasam

text: Flow onward, Soma, flow for mighty strength, as a strong courser, bathed, to win the prize.
meaning: स घा तं वृषणꣳ रथमधि तिष्ठाति गोविदम् यः पात्रꣳ हारियोजनं पूर्णमिन्द्रा चिकेतति योजा न्विन्द्र ते हरी
sanskrit_iast: sa gʰā taṃ vr̥ṣaṇam̐ ratʰamadʰi tiṣṭʰāti govidam yaḥ pātram̐ hāriyojanaṃ pūrṇamindrā ciketati yojā nvindra te harī

text: Fair Indu hath flowed on for rapturous joy, sage, for good fortune, in the waters' lap.
meaning: अग्निं तं मन्ये यो वसुरस्तं यं यन्ति धेनवः अस्तमर्वन्त आशवो ऽस्तं नित्यासो वाजिन इषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ taṃ manye yo vasurastaṃ yaṃ yanti dʰenavaḥ astamarvanta āśavo 'staṃ nityāso vājina iṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: In thee, effused. O Soma, we rejoice ourselves for great supremacy in fight: Thou, Pavamana, enterest into mighty deeds.
meaning: न तमꣳहो न दुरितं देवासो अष्ट मर्त्यम् सजोषसो यमर्यमा मित्रो नयति वरुणो अति द्विषः
sanskrit_iast: na tamam̐ho na duritaṃ devāso aṣṭa martyam sajoṣaso yamaryamā mitro nayati varuṇo ati dviṣaḥ

text: Who are these radiant men in serried rank, Rudra's young heroes, too, with noble steeds?
meaning: परि प्र धन्वेन्द्राय सोम स्वादुर्मित्राय पूष्णे भगाय
sanskrit_iast: pari pra dʰanvendrāya soma svādurmitrāya pūṣṇe bʰagāya

text: Agni, with hymns may we now accomplish that which thou lovest, Strength, like a horse, auspicious strength with service.
meaning: पर्यू षु प्र धन्व वाजसातये परि वृत्राणि सक्षणिः द्विषस्तरध्या ऋणया न ईरसे
sanskrit_iast: paryū ṣu pra dʰanva vājasātaye pari vr̥trāṇi sakṣaṇiḥ dviṣastaradʰyā r̥ṇayā na īrase

text: The strong youths have come forth to view, to show their strength, God Savitar's quickening energy: Ye warrior horsemen, win the heavens.
meaning: पवस्व सोम महान्त्समुद्रः पिता देवानां विश्वाभि धाम
sanskrit_iast: pavasva soma mahāntsamudraḥ pitā devānāṃ viśvābʰi dʰāma

text: Soma, flow splendid with thy copious stream in due succession through the ample fleece.
meaning: पवस्व सोम महे दक्षायाश्वो न निक्तो वाजी धनाय
sanskrit_iast: pavasva soma mahe dakṣāyāśvo na nikto vājī dʰanāya

text: Giver from all sides, bring to us from every side, thou whom as strongest we entreat!
meaning: इन्दुः पविष्ट चारुर्मदायापामुपस्थे कविर्भगाय
sanskrit_iast: induḥ paviṣṭa cārurmadāyāpāmupastʰe kavirbʰagāya

text: This Brahman, comer at due time, named Indra, is renowned and praised.
meaning: अनु हि त्वा सुतꣳ सोम मदामसि महे समर्यराज्ये वाजाꣳ अभि पवमान प्र गाहसे
sanskrit_iast: anu hi tvā sutam̐ soma madāmasi mahe samaryarājye vājām̐ abʰi pavamāna pra gāhase

text: The Brahmans with their hymns exalting Indra increased his strength that he might slaughter Ahi.
meaning: क ईं व्यक्ता नरः सनीडा रुद्रस्य मर्या अथ स्वश्वाः
sanskrit_iast: ka īṃ vyaktā naraḥ sanīḍā rudrasya maryā atʰa svaśvāḥ

text: Anavas wrought a chariot for thy courser, and Tvashtar, much-invoked! the bolt that gitters:
meaning: अग्ने तमद्याश्वं न स्तोमैः क्रतुं न भद्रꣳ हृदिस्पृशम् ऋध्यामा त ओहैः
sanskrit_iast: agne tamadyāśvaṃ na stomaiḥ kratuṃ na bʰadram̐ hr̥dispr̥śam r̥dʰyāmā ta ohaiḥ

text: Rest, wealth to him who longs for wealth! the riteless stirs not his love nor wins his way to riches.
meaning: आविर्मर्या आ वाजं वाजिनो अग्मं देवस्य सवितुः सवम् स्वर्गाꣳ अर्वन्तो जयत
sanskrit_iast: āvirmaryā ā vājaṃ vājino agmaṃ devasya savituḥ savam svargām̐ arvanto jayata

text: The cows are ever pure and all-supporting, the Gods are ever free from stain and blemish.
meaning: पवस्व सोम द्युम्नी सुधारो महाꣳ अवीनामनुपूर्व्यः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva soma dyumnī sudʰāro mahām̐ avīnāmanupūrvyaḥ

text: With all thy beauty come! The kine approaching with full udders follow on thy path.
meaning: विश्वतोदावन्विश्वतो न आ भर यं त्वा शविष्ठमीमहे
sanskrit_iast: viśvatodāvanviśvato na ā bʰara yaṃ tvā śaviṣṭʰamīmahe

text: May we, inhabiting a meath-rich dwelling, increase our wealth, and think of thee, O Indra!
meaning: एष ब्रह्मा य ऋत्विय इन्द्रो नाम श्रुतो गृणे
sanskrit_iast: eṣa brahmā ya r̥tviya indro nāma śruto gr̥ṇe

text: The Maruts with fair hymns chant out their praise-song: this Indra, famed and youthful, shouts accordant.
meaning: ब्रह्माण इन्द्रं महयन्तो अर्कैरवर्धयन्नहये हन्तवा उ
sanskrit_iast: brahmāṇa indraṃ mahayanto arkairavardʰayannahaye hantavā u

text: Sing to your Indra, mightiest Vritra-slayer, sing to the Sage the song that he accepteth!
meaning: अनवस्ते रथमश्वाय तक्षुस्त्वष्टा वज्रं पुरुहूत द्युमन्तम्
sanskrit_iast: anavaste ratʰamaśvāya takṣustvaṣṭā vajraṃ puruhūta dyumantam

text: Observant Agni hath appeared, oblation-bearer with his car.
meaning: शं पदं मघꣳ रयीषिणो न काममव्रतो हिनोति न स्पृशद्रयिम्
sanskrit_iast: śaṃ padaṃ magʰam̐ rayīṣiṇo na kāmamavrato hinoti na spr̥śadrayim

text: O Agni, be our nearest friend, yea, our protector and our kind deliverer!
meaning: सदा गावः शुचयो विश्वधायसः सदा देवा अरेपसः
sanskrit_iast: sadā gāvaḥ śucayo viśvadʰāyasaḥ sadā devā arepasaḥ

text: Like wondrous Bhaga, Agni deals treasure among the mighty.
meaning: आ याहि वनसा सह गावः सचन्त वर्त्तनिं यदूधभिः
sanskrit_iast: ā yāhi vanasā saha gāvaḥ sacanta varttaniṃ yadūdʰabʰiḥ

text: Far off or present even now, send forth thy shouting first of all!
meaning: उप प्रक्षे मधुमति क्षियन्तः पुष्येम रयिं धीमहे त इन्द्र
sanskrit_iast: upa prakṣe madʰumati kṣiyantaḥ puṣyema rayiṃ dʰīmahe ta indra

text: Dawn drives away her sister's gloom, and through her excellence makes her retrace her path.
meaning: अर्चन्त्यर्कं मरुतः स्वर्क्का आ स्तोभति श्रुतो युवा स इन्द्रः
sanskrit_iast: arcantyarkaṃ marutaḥ svarkkā ā stobʰati śruto yuvā sa indraḥ

text: May we, with Indra and the Gods to aid us, bring these existing worlds to full completion!
meaning: प्र व इन्द्राय वृत्रहन्तमाय विप्राय गाथं गायत यं जुजोषते
sanskrit_iast: pra va indrāya vr̥trahantamāya viprāya gātʰaṃ gāyata yaṃ jujoṣate

text: Like streams of water on their way, let bounties, Indra, flow from thee!
meaning: अचेत्यग्निश्चिकितिर्हव्यवाड्न सुमद्रथः
sanskrit_iast: acetyagniścikitirhavyavāḍna sumadratʰaḥ

text: With this may we obtain strength god-appointed, happy with brave sons through a hundred winters!
meaning: अग्ने त्वं नो अन्तम उत त्राता शिवो भुवो वरूथ्यः
sanskrit_iast: agne tvaṃ no antama uta trātā śivo bʰuvo varūtʰyaḥ

text: With strength let Mitra, Varuna swell oblations; do thou prepare for us rich food, O Indra!
meaning: भगो न चित्रो अग्निर्महोनां दधाति रत्नम्
sanskrit_iast: bʰago na citro agnirmahonāṃ dadʰāti ratnam

text: Indra is King of all the world.
meaning: विश्वस्य प्र स्तोभ पुरो वा सन्यदि वेह नूनम्
sanskrit_iast: viśvasya pra stobʰa puro vā sanyadi veha nūnam

text: At the Trikadrukas the great and strong enjoyed the barley-brew. With Vishnu did he drink the pressed-out Soma juice, even as he would. That hath so heightened him the great, the wide to do his mighty work. So did the God attend the God, true Indu Indra who is true.
meaning: उषा अप स्वसुष्टमः सं वर्त्तयति वर्त्तनिꣳ सुजातता
sanskrit_iast: uṣā apa svasuṣṭamaḥ saṃ varttayati varttanim̐ sujātatā

text: This God who sees for thousands of mankind, the light, the thought of poets, and the Law, The brilliant one, hath sent forth hither all the Dawns: spotless, one-minded, zealous in their home they dwell, with thought upon the Steer.
meaning: इमा नु कं भुवना सीषधेमेन्द्रश्च विश्वे च देवाः
sanskrit_iast: imā nu kaṃ bʰuvanā sīṣadʰemendraśca viśve ca devāḥ

text: Come to us, Indra, from afar, conducting us, as, to the gatherings, a Lord of heroes, as an archer King, the heroes' Lord! We come with gifts of pleasant food, with flowing juice, invoking thee, as sons invite a sire, that we may win the spoil, thee, bounteousest, for gain of spoil.
meaning: वि स्रुतयो यथा पथ इन्द्र त्वद्यन्तु रातयः
sanskrit_iast: vi srutayo yatʰā patʰa indra tvadyantu rātayaḥ

text: Loudly I call that Indra Maghavan, the mighty, resistless, evermore possessing many glories. Holy, most liberal, may he lead us on to riches, through songs, and, thunder-armed make all our pathways pleasant!
meaning: अया वाजं देवहितꣳ सनेम मदेम शतहिमाः सुवीराः
sanskrit_iast: ayā vājaṃ devahitam̐ sanema madema śatahimāḥ suvīrāḥ

text: Heard be our prayer! In thought I honour Agni first: now straightway we elect this heavenly company, Indra and Vayu we elect. For when our latest thought is raised and on Vivasvan centred well, then do our holy songs go forward on their way, our songs as 'twere unto the Gods.
meaning: ऊर्जा मित्रो वरुणः पिन्वतेडाः पीवरीमिषं कृणुही न इन्द्र
sanskrit_iast: ūrjā mitro varuṇaḥ pinvateḍāḥ pīvarīmiṣaṃ kr̥ṇuhī na indra

text: To Vishnu, to the mighty whom the Maruts follow, let your hymns born in song go forth, Evayamarut! To the strong, very holy band adorned with bracelets, that rushes on in joy and ever roars for vigour!
meaning: इन्द्रो विश्वस्य राजति
sanskrit_iast: indro viśvasya rājati

text: With this his golden splendour purifying him, be with his own allies subdues all enemies, as Sura with his own allies. Cleansing himself with stream of juice he shines forth yellow-hued and red, when with the praisers he encompasses all, forms, with praisers having seven mouths.
meaning: त्रिकद्रुकेषु महिषो यवाशिरं तुविशुष्मस्तृम्पत्सोममपिबद्विष्णुना सुतं यथावशम् स ईं ममाद महि कर्म कर्त्तवे महामुरुꣳ सैनꣳ सश्चद्देवो देवꣳ सत्य इन्दुः सत्यमिन्द्रम्
sanskrit_iast: trikadrukeṣu mahiṣo yavāśiraṃ tuviśuṣmastr̥mpatsomamapibadviṣṇunā sutaṃ yatʰāvaśam sa īṃ mamāda mahi karma karttave mahāmurum̐ sainam̐ saścaddevo devam̐ satya induḥ satyamindram

text: I praise this God, parent of heaven and earth, exceeding wise, possessed of real energy, giver of treasure, thinker dear to all, Whose splendour is sublime, whose light shone brilliant in, creation, who, wise and golden-handed, in his beauty mader the sky.
meaning: अयꣳ सहस्रमानवो दृशः कवीनां मतिर्ज्योतिर्विधर्म ब्रध्नः समीचीरुषसः समैरयदरेपसः सोचेतसः स्वसरे मन्युमन्तश्चिता गोः
sanskrit_iast: ayam̐ sahasramānavo dr̥śaḥ kavīnāṃ matirjyotirvidʰarma bradʰnaḥ samīcīruṣasaḥ samairayadarepasaḥ socetasaḥ svasare manyumantaścitā goḥ

text: Agni I deem our Hotar-priest, munificent wealth-giver, Son of Strength, who, knoweth all that is, even as the Sage who, knoweth all. Lord of fair rites, a God with form erected turning to the Gods, he, when the flame hath sprung forth from the holy oil, the offered fatness, longs for it as it glows bright.
meaning: एन्द्र याह्युप नः परावतो नायमच्छा विदथानीव सत्पतिरस्ता राजेव सत्पतिः हवामहे त्वा प्रयस्वन्तः सुतेष्वा पुत्रासो न पितरं वाजसातये मꣳहिष्ठं वाजसातये
sanskrit_iast: endra yāhyupa naḥ parāvato nāyamaccʰā vidatʰānīva satpatirastā rājeva satpatiḥ havāmahe tvā prayasvantaḥ suteṣvā putrāso na pitaraṃ vājasātaye mam̐hiṣṭʰaṃ vājasātaye

text: This, Indra! dancer! was thy hero deed, thy first and ancient work, worthy to be told forth in heaven, Even thine who furtheredst life with a God's own power, freeing the floods. All that is godless may he conquer with his might, and, Lord of Hundred Powers, find for us strength and food!
meaning: तमिन्द्रं जोहवीमि मघवानमुग्रꣳ सत्रा दधानमप्रतिष्कुतꣳ श्रवाꣳसि भूरिः मꣳहिष्ठो गीर्भिरा च यज्ञियो ववर्त्त राये नो विश्वा सुपथा कृणोतु वज्री
sanskrit_iast: tamindraṃ johavīmi magʰavānamugram̐ satrā dadʰānamapratiṣkutam̐ śravām̐si bʰūriḥ mam̐hiṣṭʰo gīrbʰirā ca yajñiyo vavartta rāye no viśvā supatʰā kr̥ṇotu vajrī

text: High is thy juice's birth: though set it heaven, on earth it hath obtained dread sheltering power and great renown.
meaning: अस्तु श्रौष्ट्पुरो अग्निं धिया दध आ नु त्यच्छर्धो दिव्यं वृणीमह इन्द्रवायू वृणीमहे यद्ध क्राणा विवस्वते नाभा सन्दाय नव्यसे अध प्र नूनमुप यन्ति धीतयो देवाꣳअच्छा न धीतयः
sanskrit_iast: astu śrauṣṭpuro agniṃ dʰiyā dadʰa ā nu tyaccʰardʰo divyaṃ vr̥ṇīmaha indravāyū vr̥ṇīmahe yaddʰa krāṇā vivasvate nābʰā sandāya navyase adʰa pra nūnamupa yanti dʰītayo devām̐accʰā na dʰītayaḥ

text: In sweetest and most gladdening stream flow pure, O Soma, on thy way, pressed out for Indra, for his drink!
meaning: प्र वो महे मतयो यन्तु विष्णवे मरुत्वते गिरिजा एवयामरुत् प्र शर्धाय प्र यज्यवे सुखादये तवसे भन्ददिष्टये धुनिव्रताय शवसे
sanskrit_iast: pra vo mahe matayo yantu viṣṇave marutvate girijā evayāmarut pra śardʰāya pra yajyave sukʰādaye tavase bʰandadiṣṭaye dʰunivratāya śavase

text: Flow onward mighty with thy stream, inspiriting the Maruts' Lord, winning all riches with thy power!
meaning: अया रुचा हरिण्या पुनानो विश्वा द्वेषाꣳसि तरति सयुग्वभिः सूरो न सयुग्वभिः धारा पृष्ठस्य रोचते पुनानो अरुषो हरिः विश्वा यद्रूपा परियास्यृक्वभिः सप्तास्येभिरृक्वभिः
sanskrit_iast: ayā rucā hariṇyā punāno viśvā dveṣām̐si tarati sayugvabʰiḥ sūro na sayugvabʰiḥ dʰārā pr̥ṣṭʰasya rocate punāno aruṣo hariḥ viśvā yadrūpā pariyāsyr̥kvabʰiḥ saptāsyebʰirr̥kvabʰiḥ

text: Flow onward with that juice of thine most excellent, that brings delight, slaying the wicked, dear to Gods!
meaning: अभि त्यं देवꣳ सवितारमोण्योः कविक्रतुमर्चामि सत्यसवꣳ रत्नधामभि प्रियं मतिम् ऊर्ध्वा यस्यामतिर्भा अदिद्युतत्सवीमनि हिरण्यपाणिरमिमीत सुक्रतुः कृपा स्वः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tyaṃ devam̐ savitāramoṇyoḥ kavikratumarcāmi satyasavam̐ ratnadʰāmabʰi priyaṃ matim ūrdʰvā yasyāmatirbʰā adidyutatsavīmani hiraṇyapāṇiramimīta sukratuḥ kr̥pā svaḥ

text: Three several words are uttered: kine are lowing, cows who give the milk; the tawny-hued goes bellowing on.
meaning: अग्निꣳ होतारं मन्ये दास्वन्तं वसोः सूनुꣳ सहसो जातवेदसं विप्रं न जातवेदसम् य ऊर्ध्वया स्वध्वरो देवो देवाच्या कृपा घृतस्य विभ्राष्टिमनु शुक्रशोचिष आजुह्वानस्य सर्पिषः
sanskrit_iast: agnim̐ hotāraṃ manye dāsvantaṃ vasoḥ sūnum̐ sahaso jātavedasaṃ vipraṃ na jātavedasam ya ūrdʰvayā svadʰvaro devo devācyā kr̥pā gʰr̥tasya vibʰrāṣṭimanu śukraśociṣa ājuhvānasya sarpiṣaḥ

text: For Indra girt by Maruts, flow, thou Indu, very rich in meath, to seat thee in the place of song!
meaning: तव त्यन्नर्यं नृतो ऽप इन्द्र प्रथमं पूर्व्यं दिवि प्रवाच्यं कृतम् यो देवस्य शवसा प्रारिणा असु रिणन्नपः भुवो विश्वमभ्यदेवमोजसा विदेदूर्जꣳ शतक्रतुर्विदेदिषम्
sanskrit_iast: tava tyannaryaṃ nr̥to 'pa indra pratʰamaṃ pūrvyaṃ divi pravācyaṃ kr̥tam yo devasya śavasā prāriṇā asu riṇannapaḥ bʰuvo viśvamabʰyadevamojasā videdūrjam̐ śatakraturvidediṣam

text: Strong, mountain-born, the stalk hath been pressed in the streams for rapturous joy. Hawk-like he settles in his home.
meaning: उच्चा ते जातमन्धसो दिवि सद्भूम्या ददे उग्रꣳ शर्म महि श्रवः
sanskrit_iast: uccā te jātamandʰaso divi sadbʰūmyā dade ugram̐ śarma mahi śravaḥ

text: Gold-hued! as one who giveth strength flow on for Gods to drink, a draught for Vayu and the Marut host!
meaning: स्वादिष्ठया मदिष्ठया पवस्व सोम धारया इन्द्राय पातवे सुतः
sanskrit_iast: svādiṣṭʰayā madiṣṭʰayā pavasva soma dʰārayā indrāya pātave sutaḥ

text: Soma, the dweller on the hills, effused, hath flowed into the sieve. All-bounteous art thou in carouse.
meaning: वृषा पवस्व धारया मरुत्वते च मत्सरः विश्वा दधान ओजसा
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā pavasva dʰārayā marutvate ca matsaraḥ viśvā dadʰāna ojasā

text: The Sage of heaven whose heart is wise, when laid between both hands, with roars, gives us delightful powers of life.
meaning: यस्ते मदो वरेण्यस्तेना पवस्वान्धसा देवावीरघशꣳसहा
sanskrit_iast: yaste mado vareṇyastenā pavasvāndʰasā devāvīragʰaśam̐sahā

text: The rapture-shedding Somas have flowed forth in our assembly, pressed to glorify our liberal lords.
meaning: तिस्रो वाच उदीरते गावो मिमन्ति धेनवः हरिरेति कनिक्रदत्
sanskrit_iast: tisro vāca udīrate gāvo mimanti dʰenavaḥ harireti kanikradat

text: The Somas, skilled in song, the waves, have led the water forward, like buffaloes speeding to the woods.
meaning: इन्द्रायेन्दो मरुत्वते पवस्व मधुमत्तमः अर्कस्य योनिमासदम्
sanskrit_iast: indrāyendo marutvate pavasva madʰumattamaḥ arkasya yonimāsadam

text: Indu flow on, a mighty juice; glorify us among the folk: drive all our enemies away!
meaning: असाव्यꣳशुर्मदायाप्सु दक्षो गिरिष्ठाः श्येनो न योनिमासदत्
sanskrit_iast: asāvyam̐śurmadāyāpsu dakṣo giriṣṭʰāḥ śyeno na yonimāsadat

text: For thou art strong by splendour: we, O Pavamana, call on thee, the brilliant looker on the light.
meaning: पवस्व दक्षसाधनो देवेभ्यः पीतये हरे मरुद्भ्यो वायवे मदः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva dakṣasādʰano devebʰyaḥ pītaye hare marudbʰyo vāyave madaḥ

text: Indu, enlightener, dear, the thought of poets, hath flowed clearly, like a charioteer who starts the steed.
meaning: परि स्वानो गिरिष्ठाः पवित्रे सोमो अक्षरत् मदेषु सर्वधा असि
sanskrit_iast: pari svāno giriṣṭʰāḥ pavitre somo akṣarat madeṣu sarvadʰā asi

text: Through our desire of heroes, kine, and horses, potent Soma drops, brilliant and swift, have been effused. God, working with mankind, flow on; to Indra go thy gladdening juice: to Vayu mount as Law commands! From heaven hath Pavamana made, as 'twere, the marvellous thunder, and the lofty light of all mankind.
meaning: परि प्रिया दिवः कविर्वयाꣳसि नप्त्योर्हितः स्वानैर्याति कविक्रतुः
sanskrit_iast: pari priyā divaḥ kavirvayām̐si naptyorhitaḥ svānairyāti kavikratuḥ

text: Pressed for the gladdening draught the drops flow forth abundantly with song, flow onward with the stream of meath.
meaning: प्र सोमासो मदच्युतः श्रवसे नो मघोनः सुता विदथे अक्रमुः
sanskrit_iast: pra somāso madacyutaḥ śravase no magʰonaḥ sutā vidatʰe akramuḥ

text: Reposing on the river's wave, the Sage hath widely flowed around, bearing the bard whom many love.
meaning: प्र सोमासो विपश्चितो ऽपो नयन्त ऊर्मयः वनानि महिषा इव
sanskrit_iast: pra somāso vipaścito 'po nayanta ūrmayaḥ vanāni mahiṣā iva

text: The Gods have come to Indu well-descended, beautified with milk, the active crusher of the foe.
meaning: पवस्वेन्दो वृषा सुतः कृधी नो यशसो जने विश्वा अप द्विषो जहि
sanskrit_iast: pavasvendo vr̥ṣā sutaḥ kr̥dʰī no yaśaso jane viśvā apa dviṣo jahi

text: Active, while being purified, he hath assailed all enemies: they deck the Sage with holy hymns.
meaning: वृषा ह्यसि भानुना द्युमन्तं त्वा हवामहे पवमान स्वर्दृशम्
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā hyasi bʰānunā dyumantaṃ tvā havāmahe pavamāna svardr̥śam

text: Pouring all glories hither, he, effused, hath passed within the jar: Indu on Indra is bestowed.
meaning: इन्दुः पविष्ट चेतनः प्रियः कवीनां मतिः सृजदश्वꣳ रथीरिव
sanskrit_iast: induḥ paviṣṭa cetanaḥ priyaḥ kavīnāṃ matiḥ sr̥jadaśvam̐ ratʰīriva

text: From the two press-boards is the juice sent, like a car-horse, to the sieve: the steed steps forward to the goal.
meaning: असृक्षत प्र वाजिनो गव्या सोमासो अश्वया शुक्रासो वीरयाशवः
sanskrit_iast: asr̥kṣata pra vājino gavyā somāso aśvayā śukrāso vīrayāśavaḥ

text: Impetuous, bright, have they come forth, unwearied in their speed, like bulls, driving the black skin far away.
meaning: पवस्व देव आयुषगिन्द्रं गच्छतु ते मदः वायुमा रोह धर्मणा
sanskrit_iast: pavasva deva āyuṣagindraṃ gaccʰatu te madaḥ vāyumā roha dʰarmaṇā

text: Soma, thou flowest chasing foes, finder of wisdom and delight: drive thou the godless folk afar! Flow onward with that stream wherewith thou gavest splendour to the Sun, speeding the waters kind to man!
meaning: पवमानो अजीजनद्दिवश्चित्रं न तन्यतुम् ज्योतिर्वैश्वानरं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: pavamāno ajījanaddivaścitraṃ na tanyatum jyotirvaiśvānaraṃ br̥hat

text: Flow onward thou who strengthenedst Indra to slaughter Vritra who compassed and stayed the mighty floods!
meaning: परि स्वानास इन्दवो मदाय बर्हणा गिरा मधो अर्षन्ति धारया
sanskrit_iast: pari svānāsa indavo madāya barhaṇā girā madʰo arṣanti dʰārayā

text: Flow onward, Indu, with this food for him who in thy wild delights battered the nine-and-ninety down!
meaning: परि प्रासिष्यदत्कविः सिन्धोरूर्मावधि श्रितः कारुं बिभ्रत्पुरुस्पृहम्
sanskrit_iast: pari prāsiṣyadatkaviḥ sindʰorūrmāvadʰi śritaḥ kāruṃ bibʰratpuruspr̥ham

text: Flow, pressed, into the filter, speed the heavenly one who winneth wealth, who bringeth booty through our juice!
meaning: उपो षु जातमप्तुरं गोभिर्भङ्गं परिष्कृतम् इन्दुं देवा अयासिषुः
sanskrit_iast: upo ṣu jātamapturaṃ gobʰirbʰaṅgaṃ pariṣkr̥tam induṃ devā ayāsiṣuḥ

text: The tawny Bull hath bellowed, fair as mighty Mitra to behold: he gleams and flashes with the Sun.
meaning: पुनानो अक्रमीदभि विश्वा मृधो विचर्षणिः शुम्भन्ति विप्रं धीतिभिः
sanskrit_iast: punāno akramīdabʰi viśvā mr̥dʰo vicarṣaṇiḥ śumbʰanti vipraṃ dʰītibʰiḥ

text: We choose to-day that chariot-steed of thine, the strong, that brings us bliss, the guardian, the desire of all.
meaning: आविशन्कलशꣳ सुतो विश्वा अर्षन्नभि श्रियः इन्दुरिन्द्राय धीयते
sanskrit_iast: āviśankalaśam̐ suto viśvā arṣannabʰi śriyaḥ indurindrāya dʰīyate

text: Adhvaryu, to the filter lead the Soma juice expressed with stones: make thou it pure for Indra's drink.
meaning: असर्जि रथ्यो यथा पवित्रे चम्वोः सुतः कार्ष्मन्वाजी न्यक्रमीत्
sanskrit_iast: asarji ratʰyo yatʰā pavitre camvoḥ sutaḥ kārṣmanvājī nyakramīt

text: Swift runs this giver of delight, even the stream of flowingjuice: Swift runs this giver of delight.
meaning: प्र यद्गावो न भूर्णयस्त्वेषा अयासो अक्रमुः घ्नन्तः कृष्णामप त्वचम्
sanskrit_iast: pra yadgāvo na bʰūrṇayastveṣā ayāso akramuḥ gʰnantaḥ kr̥ṣṇāmapa tvacam

text: Pour hitherward, O Soma, wealth in thousands and heroic strength, and keep renown secure for us! -6. The ancient living ones have come unto a newer resting-place. They made the Sun that he might shine.
meaning: अपघ्नन्पवसे मृधः क्रतुवित्सोम मत्सरः नुदस्वादेवयुं जनम्
sanskrit_iast: apagʰnanpavase mr̥dʰaḥ kratuvitsoma matsaraḥ nudasvādevayuṃ janam

text: Soma, flow on exceeding bright with loud roar to the reservoirs, resting in wooden vats, thy home!
