meaning: अया पवस्व धारया यया सूर्यमरोचयः हिन्वानो मानुषीरपः
sanskrit_iast: ayā pavasva dʰārayā yayā sūryamarocayaḥ hinvāno mānuṣīrapaḥ

text: O Soma, thou, art strong and bright, potent, O God, with potent sway: thou, mighty one, ordainest laws.
meaning: स पवस्व य आविथेन्द्रं वृत्राय हन्तवे वव्रिवाꣳसं महीरपः
sanskrit_iast: sa pavasva ya āvitʰendraṃ vr̥trāya hantave vavrivām̐saṃ mahīrapaḥ

text: For food, flow onward with thy stream, cleansed and made bright by sapient men: Indu. with sheen approach the milk!
meaning: अया वीती परि स्रव यस्त इन्दो मदेष्वा अवाहन्नवतीर्नव
sanskrit_iast: ayā vītī pari srava yasta indo madeṣvā avāhannavatīrnava

text: Soma, flow on with pleasant stream, strong and devoted to the Gods, our friend, unto the woollen sieve.
meaning: परि द्युक्षꣳ सनद्रायिं भरद्वाजं नो अन्धसा स्वानो अर्ष पवित्र आ
sanskrit_iast: pari dyukṣam̐ sanadrāyiṃ bʰaradvājaṃ no andʰasā svāno arṣa pavitra ā

text: By this solemnity, Soma, thou, though great, hast been increased: in joy thou, verily actest like a bull!
meaning: अचिक्रदद्वृषा हरिर्महान्मित्रो न दर्शतः सꣳ सूर्येण दिद्युते
sanskrit_iast: acikradadvr̥ṣā harirmahānmitro na darśataḥ sam̐ sūryeṇa didyute

text: Most active and benevolent, this Pavamana sent to us for lofty friendship meditates.
meaning: आ ते दक्षं मयोभुवं वह्निमद्या वृणीमहे पान्तमा पुरुस्पृहम्
sanskrit_iast: ā te dakṣaṃ mayobʰuvaṃ vahnimadyā vr̥ṇīmahe pāntamā puruspr̥ham

text: Indu, to us for this great rite, bearing as 'twere thy wave to Gods, unwearied, thou art flowing on.
meaning: अध्वर्यो अद्रिभिः सुतꣳ सोमं पवित्र आ नय पुनीहीन्द्राय पातवे
sanskrit_iast: adʰvaryo adribʰiḥ sutam̐ somaṃ pavitra ā naya punīhīndrāya pātave

text: Chasing our foemen, driving off the godless, Soma floweth on, going to Indra's settled place.
meaning: तरत्स मन्दी धावति धारा सुतस्यान्धसः तरत्स मन्दी धावति
sanskrit_iast: taratsa mandī dʰāvati dʰārā sutasyāndʰasaḥ taratsa mandī dʰāvati

text: Cleansing thee, Soma, in thy stream, thou flowest in a watery robe: giver of wealth, thou sittest in the place of Law, O God, a fountain made of gold.
meaning: आ पवस्व सहस्रिणꣳ रयिꣳ सोम सुवीर्यम् अस्मे श्रवाꣳसि धारय
sanskrit_iast: ā pavasva sahasriṇam̐ rayim̐ soma suvīryam asme śravām̐si dʰāraya

text: Hence sprinkle forth the juice effused, Soma, the best of sacred gifts, who, friend of man, hath run amid the water-streams! He hath pressed Soma out with stones.
meaning: अनु प्रत्नास आयवः पदं नवीयो अक्रमुः रुचे जनन्त सूर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: anu pratnāsa āyavaḥ padaṃ navīyo akramuḥ ruce jananta sūryam

text: Expressed by stones, O Soma, and urged through the long wool of the sheep, thou, entering the press-boards even as men a fort, gold-hued hast settled in the vats.
meaning: अर्षा सोम द्युमत्तमो ऽभि द्रोणानि रोरुवत् सीदन्योनौ योनेष्वा
sanskrit_iast: arṣā soma dyumattamo 'bʰi droṇāni roruvat sīdanyonau yoneṣvā

text: O Soma,--for the feast of Gods, river-like he hath swelled with surge, sweet with the liquor of the stalk, as one who wakes, into the vat that drops with meath.
meaning: वृषा सोम द्युमाꣳ असि वृषा देव वृषव्रतः वृषा धर्माणि दध्रिषे
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā soma dyumām̐ asi vr̥ṣā deva vr̥ṣavrataḥ vr̥ṣā dʰarmāṇi dadʰriṣe

text: Pressed out by pressers, Soma goes over the fleecy backs of sheep, goes, even as with a mare, in tawny-coloured stream, goes in a sweetly-sounding stream.
meaning: इषे पवस्व धारया मृज्यमानो मनीषिभिः इन्दो रुचाभि गा इहि
sanskrit_iast: iṣe pavasva dʰārayā mr̥jyamāno manīṣibʰiḥ indo rucābʰi gā ihi

text: O Soma, Indu, every day thy friendship hath been my delight. Many fiends follow me help me, thou tawny-hued: pass on beyond these barriers!
meaning: मन्द्रया सोम धारया वृषा पवस्व देवयुः अव्यो वारेभिरस्मयुः
sanskrit_iast: mandrayā soma dʰārayā vr̥ṣā pavasva devayuḥ avyo vārebʰirasmayuḥ

text: Deft-handed! thou when purified liftest thy voice amid the sea. Thou, Pavamana, makest riches flow to us, yellow, abundant, much desired.
meaning: अया सोम सुकृत्यपा महान्त्सन्नभ्यवर्धथाः हिन्दान इद्वृषायसे
sanskrit_iast: ayā soma sukr̥tyapā mahāntsannabʰyavardʰatʰāḥ hindāna idvr̥ṣāyase

text: The living drops of Soma juice pour, as they flow, the gladdening drink, intelligent drops above the station of the sea, exhilarating, dropping meath.
meaning: अयं विचर्षणिर्हितः पवमानः स चेतति हिन्वान आप्यं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ vicarṣaṇirhitaḥ pavamānaḥ sa cetati hinvāna āpyaṃ br̥hat

text: Soma, while thou art cleansed, most dear and watchful in the sheep's long wool, most like to Angiras! thou hast become a sage. Sprinkle our sacrifice with mead!
meaning: प्र ण इन्दो महे तु न ऊर्मिं न बिभ्रदर्षसि अभि देवाꣳ अयास्यः
sanskrit_iast: pra ṇa indo mahe tu na ūrmiṃ na bibʰradarṣasi abʰi devām̐ ayāsyaḥ

text: Soma, the gladdening juice, flows pressed for Indra with his Marut host: he hastens o'er the fleece with all his thousand streams: him, him the men make pure and bright.
meaning: अपघ्नन्पवते मृधो ऽप सोमो अराव्णः गच्छन्निन्द्रस्य निष्कृतम्
sanskrit_iast: apagʰnanpavate mr̥dʰo 'pa somo arāvṇaḥ gaccʰannindrasya niṣkr̥tam

text: Flow on, best winner of the spoil, to precious gifts of every sort! Thou art a sea according to the highest law, joy-giver, Soma! to the Gods
meaning: पुनानः सोम धारयापो वसानो अर्षसि आ रत्नधा योनिमृतस्य सीदस्युत्सो देवो हिरण्ययः
sanskrit_iast: punānaḥ soma dʰārayāpo vasāno arṣasi ā ratnadʰā yonimr̥tasya sīdasyutso devo hiraṇyayaḥ

text: Over the cleansing sieve have flowed the Pavamanas in a stream, girt by the Maruts, gladdening, steeds with Indra's strength, for wisdom and for dainty food.
meaning: परीतो षिञ्चता सुतꣳ सोमो य उत्तमꣳ हविः दधन्वाꣳ यो नर्यो अप्स्वा३न्तरा सुषाव सोममद्रिभिः
sanskrit_iast: parīto ṣiñcatā sutam̐ somo ya uttamam̐ haviḥ dadʰanvām̐ yo naryo apsvā3ntarā suṣāva somamadribʰiḥ

text: Run onward to the reservoir and seat thee: cleansed by the men speed forward to the battle! Making thee glossy like an able courser, forth to the sacred grass with reins they lead thee.
meaning: आ सोम स्वानो अद्रिभिस्तिरो वाराण्यव्यया जनो न पुरि चम्वोर्विशद्धरिः सदो वनेषु दध्रिषे
sanskrit_iast: ā soma svāno adribʰistiro vārāṇyavyayā jano na puri camvorviśaddʰariḥ sado vaneṣu dadʰriṣe

text: The God declares the deities' generations, like Uaana, proclaiming lofty wisdom. With brilliant kin, far-ruling, sanctifying, the wild boar, singing with his foot, advances.
meaning: प्र सोम देववीतये सिन्धुर्न पिप्ये अर्णसा अꣳशोः पयसा मदिरो न जागृविरच्छा कोशं मधुश्चुतम्
sanskrit_iast: pra soma devavītaye sindʰurna pipye arṇasā am̐śoḥ payasā madiro na jāgr̥viraccʰā kośaṃ madʰuścutam

text: Three are the voices that the car-steed utters: he speaks the lore of prayer, the thought of Order. To the cows' master come the cows inquiring: the hymns with eager longing come to Soma.
meaning: सोम उ ष्वाणः सोतृभिरधि ष्णुभिरवीनाम् अश्वयेव हरिता याति धारया मन्द्रया याति धारया
sanskrit_iast: soma u ṣvāṇaḥ sotr̥bʰiradʰi ṣṇubʰiravīnām aśvayeva haritā yāti dʰārayā mandrayā yāti dʰārayā

text: Made pure by this man's urgent zeal and impulse, the God hath with his juice the Gods pervaded. Pressed, singing, to the sieve he goes, as passes the Hotar to enclosures holding cattle.
meaning: तवाहꣳ सोम रारण सख्य इन्दो दिवेदिवे पुरूणि बभ्रो नि चरन्ति मामव परिधीꣳरति ताꣳ इहि
sanskrit_iast: tavāham̐ soma rāraṇa sakʰya indo divedive purūṇi babʰro ni caranti māmava paridʰīm̐rati tām̐ ihi

text: Father of holy hymns Soma flows onward, the father of the earth, father of heaven; Father of Agni, Surya's generator, the father who begat Indra and Vishnu
meaning: मृज्यमानः सुहस्त्या समुद्रे वाचमिन्वसि रयिं पिशङ्गं बहुलं पुरुस्पृहं पवमानाभ्यर्षसि
sanskrit_iast: mr̥jyamānaḥ suhastyā samudre vācaminvasi rayiṃ piśaṅgaṃ bahulaṃ puruspr̥haṃ pavamānābʰyarṣasi

text: To him, praiseworthy, sacred tones have sounded, Steer of the triple height, the life-bestower. Dwelling in wood, like Varuna, a river, lavishing treasure, he distributes blessings.
meaning: अभि सोमास आयवः पवन्ते मद्यं मदम् समुद्रस्याधि विष्टपे मनीषिणो मत्सरासो मदच्युतः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi somāsa āyavaḥ pavante madyaṃ madam samudrasyādʰi viṣṭape manīṣiṇo matsarāso madacyutaḥ

text: Guard of all being, generating creatures, loud roared the sea as highest law commanded. Strong, in the filter, on the fleecy summit, pressed from the stone, Soma hath waxen mighty.
meaning: पुनानः सोम जागृविरव्या वारैः परि प्रियः त्वं विप्रो अभवो ऽङ्गिरस्तम मध्वा यज्ञं मिमिक्ष णः
sanskrit_iast: punānaḥ soma jāgr̥viravyā vāraiḥ pari priyaḥ tvaṃ vipro abʰavo 'ṅgirastama madʰvā yajñaṃ mimikṣa ṇaḥ

text: Loud neighs the tawny steed when started, settling deep in the wooden vessel while they cleanse him. Led by the men he makes the milk his raiment; then shall he, of himself, engender worship.
meaning: इन्द्राय पवते मदः सोमो मरुत्वते सुतः सहस्रधारो अत्यव्यमर्षति तमी मृजन्त्यायवः
sanskrit_iast: indrāya pavate madaḥ somo marutvate sutaḥ sahasradʰāro atyavyamarṣati tamī mr̥jantyāyavaḥ

text: This thine own Soma, rich in meath, O Indra, the Strong, hath flowed into the Strong One's filter. The swift steed, bounteous, giving hundreds, thousands, hath reached the sacred grass which never fails him.
meaning: पवस्व वाजसातमो ऽभि विश्वानि वार्या त्वꣳ समुद्रः प्रथमे विधर्मं देवेभ्यं सोम मत्सरः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva vājasātamo 'bʰi viśvāni vāryā tvam̐ samudraḥ pratʰame vidʰarmaṃ devebʰyaṃ soma matsaraḥ

text: Flow onward, Soma, rich in meath, and holy, enrobed in waters, on the fleecy summit! Settle in vessels that are full of fatness, as cheering and most gladdening drink for Indra!
meaning: पवमाना असृक्षत पवित्रमति धारया मरुत्वन्तो मत्सरा इन्द्रिया हया मेधामभि प्रयाꣳसि च
sanskrit_iast: pavamānā asr̥kṣata pavitramati dʰārayā marutvanto matsarā indriyā hayā medʰāmabʰi prayām̐si ca

text: In forefront of the cars forth goes the hero, the leader, seeking spoil: his host rejoices. Soma endues his robe of lasting colours, and blesses, for his friends, their calls on Indra.
meaning: प्र तु द्रव परि कोशं नि षीद नृभिः पुनानो अभि वाजमर्ष अश्वं न त्वा वाजिनं मर्जयन्तो ऽच्छा बर्ही रशनाभिर्नयन्ति
sanskrit_iast: pra tu drava pari kośaṃ ni ṣīda nr̥bʰiḥ punāno abʰi vājamarṣa aśvaṃ na tvā vājinaṃ marjayanto 'ccʰā barhī raśanābʰirnayanti

text: Thy streams have been poured forth with all their sweetness, when, cleansed thou passest through the woollen filter. The race of kine thou cleansest, Pavamana! Thou didst beget: and speed the Sun with splendours.
meaning: प्र काव्यमुशनेव ब्रुवाणो देवो देवानां जनिमा विवक्ति महिव्रतः शुचिबन्धुः पावकः पदा वराहो अभ्येति रेभन्
sanskrit_iast: pra kāvyamuśaneva bruvāṇo devo devānāṃ janimā vivakti mahivrataḥ śucibandʰuḥ pāvakaḥ padā varāho abʰyeti rebʰan

text: Let us sing praises to the Gods: sing loudly, send ye the Soma forth for mighty riches! Let him flow, sweetly-flavoured, through the filter: let the God Indu settle in the beaker!
meaning: तिस्रो वाच ईरयति प्र वह्निरृतस्य धीतिं ब्रह्मणो मनीषाम् गावो यन्ति गोपतिं पृच्छमानाः सोमं यन्ति मतयो वावशानाः
sanskrit_iast: tisro vāca īrayati pra vahnirr̥tasya dʰītiṃ brahmaṇo manīṣām gāvo yanti gopatiṃ pr̥ccʰamānāḥ somaṃ yanti matayo vāvaśānāḥ

text: Urged on, the father of the earth and heaven hath gone forth like a car to gather booty. Going to Indra, sharpening his weapons, and in his hands containing every treasure.
meaning: अस्य प्रेषा हेमना पूयमानो देवो देवेभिः समपृक्त रसम् सुतः पवित्रं पर्येति रेभन्मितेव सद्म पशुमन्ति होता
sanskrit_iast: asya preṣā hemanā pūyamāno devo devebʰiḥ samapr̥kta rasam sutaḥ pavitraṃ paryeti rebʰanmiteva sadma paśumanti hotā

text: When, by the law of the Most High, in presence of heaven and earth, the fond mind's utterance formed him. Then, loudly lowing, came the cows to Indu, the chosen, wellloved master in the beaker.
meaning: सोमः पवते जनिता मतीनां जनिता दिवो जनिता पृथिव्याः जनिताग्नेर्जनिता सूर्यस्य जनितेन्द्रस्य जनितोत विष्णोः
sanskrit_iast: somaḥ pavate janitā matīnāṃ janitā divo janitā pr̥tʰivyāḥ janitāgnerjanitā sūryasya janitendrasya janitota viṣṇoḥ

text: Ten sisters, pouring out the rain together, the sage's quickly-moving thoughts, adorn him. Hither hath run the gold-hued child of Surya, and reached the vat like a fleet vigorous courser.
meaning: अभि त्रिपृष्ठं वृषणं वयोधामाङ्गोषिणमवावशन्त वाणीः वना वसानो वरुणो न सिन्धूर्वि रत्नधा दयते वार्याणि
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tripr̥ṣṭʰaṃ vr̥ṣaṇaṃ vayodʰāmāṅgoṣiṇamavāvaśanta vāṇīḥ vanā vasāno varuṇo na sindʰūrvi ratnadʰā dayate vāryāṇi

text: When beauties strive for him as for a charger, then strive the songs as people for the sunlight. A mighty Sage, he flows enrobed in waters and hymns as 'twree a stall that kine may prosper.
meaning: अक्रान्त्समुद्रः प्रथमे विधर्मं जनयन्प्रजा भुवनस्य गोपाः वृषा पवित्रे अधि सानो अव्ये बृहत्सोमो वावृधे स्वानो अद्रिः
sanskrit_iast: akrāntsamudraḥ pratʰame vidʰarmaṃ janayanprajā bʰuvanasya gopāḥ vr̥ṣā pavitre adʰi sāno avye br̥hatsomo vāvr̥dʰe svāno adriḥ

text: Strong Indu, bathed in milk, flows on for Indra, Soma exciting, strength, for his carousal. He quells malignity and slays the demons, King of the homestead, he who gives us comfort.
meaning: कनिक्रन्ति हरिरा सृज्यमानः सीदन्वनस्य जठरे पुनानः नृभिर्यतः कृणुते निर्णिजं गामतो मतिं जनयत स्वधाभिः
sanskrit_iast: kanikranti harirā sr̥jyamānaḥ sīdanvanasya jaṭʰare punānaḥ nr̥bʰiryataḥ kr̥ṇute nirṇijaṃ gāmato matiṃ janayata svadʰābʰiḥ

text: Pour forth this wealth with this purification: flow onward to the yellow lake, O Indu! Here, too, the bright one, wind-swift, full of wisdom, shall give a son to him who cometh quickly.
meaning: एष स्य ते मधुमाꣳ इन्द्र सोमो वृषा वृष्णः परि पवित्रे अक्षाः सहस्रदाः शतदा भूरिदावा शश्वत्तमं बर्हिरा वाज्यस्थात्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa sya te madʰumām̐ indra somo vr̥ṣā vr̥ṣṇaḥ pari pavitre akṣāḥ sahasradāḥ śatadā bʰūridāvā śaśvattamaṃ barhirā vājyastʰāt

text: Soma, the mighty, when, the waters' offspring, he chose the Gods, performed that great achievement. He, Pavamana, granted strength to Indra: he, Indu, generated light in Surya.
meaning: पवस्व सोम मधुमाꣳ ऋतावापो वसानो अधि सानो अव्ये अव द्रोणानि घृतवन्ति रोह मदिन्तमो मत्सर इन्द्रपानः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva soma madʰumām̐ r̥tāvāpo vasāno adʰi sāno avye ava droṇāni gʰr̥tavanti roha madintamo matsara indrapānaḥ

text: As for a chariot-race, the skilful speaker, first hymn, inventor, hath with song been started. The sisters ten upon the fleecy summit adorn the car-horse in the resting-places.
meaning: प्र सेनानीः शूरो अग्रे रथानां गव्यन्नेति हर्षते अस्य सेना भद्रान्कृण्वन्निन्द्रहवान्त्सखिभ्य आ सोमो वस्त्रा रभसानि दत्ते
sanskrit_iast: pra senānīḥ śūro agre ratʰānāṃ gavyanneti harṣate asya senā bʰadrānkr̥ṇvannindrahavāntsakʰibʰya ā somo vastrā rabʰasāni datte

text: Hastening onward like the waves of waters our holy hymns are coming forth to Soma. To him they go with lowly adoration, and, longing, enter him who longs to meet them.
meaning: प्र ते धारा मधुमतीरसृग्रन्वारं यत्पूतो अत्येष्यव्यम् पवमान पवसे धाम गोनां जनयन्त्सूर्यमपिन्वो अर्कैः
sanskrit_iast: pra te dʰārā madʰumatīrasr̥granvāraṃ yatpūto atyeṣyavyam pavamāna pavase dʰāma gonāṃ janayantsūryamapinvo arkaiḥ

text: For first possession of your juice. for the exhilarating drink, Drive ye away the dog, my friends, drive ye the long-tongued dog away!
meaning: प्र गायताभ्यर्चाम देवान्त्सोमꣳ हिनोत महते धनाय स्वादुः पवतामति वारमव्यमा सीदतु कलशं देव इन्दुः
sanskrit_iast: pra gāyatābʰyarcāma devāntsomam̐ hinota mahate dʰanāya svāduḥ pavatāmati vāramavyamā sīdatu kalaśaṃ deva induḥ

text: As Pushan. Fortune, Bhaga, comes this Soma while they make him pure. He, Lord of all the multitude, hath looked upon the earth and heaven.
meaning: प्र हिन्वानो जनिता रोदस्यो रथो न वाजꣳ सनिषन्नयासीत् इन्द्रं गच्छन्नायुधा सꣳशिशानो विश्वा वसु हस्तयोरादधानः
sanskrit_iast: pra hinvāno janitā rodasyo ratʰo na vājam̐ saniṣannayāsīt indraṃ gaccʰannāyudʰā sam̐śiśāno viśvā vasu hastayorādadʰānaḥ

text: The Somas, very rich in sweets, for which the sieve is destined,. flow Effused, the source of Indra's joy: may your strong juices reach the Gods!
meaning: तक्षद्यदी मनसो वेनतो वाग्ज्येष्ठस्य धर्मं द्युक्षोरनीके आदीमायन्वरमा वावशाना जुष्टं पतिं कलशे गाव इन्दुम्
sanskrit_iast: takṣadyadī manaso venato vāgjyeṣṭʰasya dʰarmaṃ dyukṣoranīke ādīmāyanvaramā vāvaśānā juṣṭaṃ patiṃ kalaśe gāva indum

text: For us the Soma juices flow, the drops best furtherers of weal, Effused as friends, without a spot, benevolent, finders of the. light.
meaning: साकमुक्षो मर्जयन्त स्वसारो दश धीरस्य धीतयो धनुत्रीः हरिः पर्यद्रवज्जाः सूर्यस्य द्रोणं ननक्षे अत्यो न वाजी
sanskrit_iast: sākamukṣo marjayanta svasāro daśa dʰīrasya dʰītayo dʰanutrīḥ hariḥ paryadravajjāḥ sūryasya droṇaṃ nanakṣe atyo na vājī

text: Stream on us riches that are craved by hundreds, best at winning spoil, Riches, O Indu, thousandfold, most splendid, that surpass the light!
meaning: अधि यदस्मिन्वाजिनीव शुभः स्पर्धन्ते धियः सूरे न विशः अपो वृणानः पवते कवीयन्व्रजं न पशुवर्धनाय मन्म
sanskrit_iast: adʰi yadasminvājinīva śubʰaḥ spardʰante dʰiyaḥ sūre na viśaḥ apo vr̥ṇānaḥ pavate kavīyanvrajaṃ na paśuvardʰanāya manma

text: The guileless ones are singing praise to Indra's well-beloved friend, As, in the morning of its life, the mothers lick the new-born calf.
meaning: इन्दुर्वाजी पवते गोन्योघा इन्द्रे सोमः सह इन्वन्मदाय हन्ति रक्षो बाधते पर्यरातिं वरिवस्कृण्वन्वृजनस्य राजा
sanskrit_iast: indurvājī pavate gonyogʰā indre somaḥ saha invanmadāya hanti rakṣo bādʰate paryarātiṃ varivaskr̥ṇvanvr̥janasya rājā

text: They for the bold and lovely one ply manly vigour like a bow; Bright, glad, in front of songs they spread to form a vesture for the Lord.
meaning: अया पवा पवस्वैना वसूनि माꣳश्चत्व इन्द्रो सरसि प्र धन्व ब्रघ्नश्चिद्यस्य वातो न जूतिं पुरुमेधाश्चित्तकवे नरं धात्
sanskrit_iast: ayā pavā pavasvainā vasūni mām̐ścatva indro sarasi pra dʰanva bragʰnaścidyasya vāto na jūtiṃ purumedʰāścittakave naraṃ dʰāt

text: Him with ths fleece they purify, brown, golden-hued, beloved of all, Who with exhilarating juice goes forth to all the deities.
meaning: महत्तत्सोमो महिषश्चकारापां यद्गर्भो ऽवृणीत देवान् अदधादिन्द्रे पवमान ओजो ऽजनयत्सूर्ये ज्योतिरिन्दुः
sanskrit_iast: mahattatsomo mahiṣaścakārāpāṃ yadgarbʰo 'vr̥ṇīta devān adadʰādindre pavamāna ojo 'janayatsūrye jyotirinduḥ

text: Let him, as mortal, crave this speech, for him who presses, of the juice, As Bhrigu's sons chased Makha, so drive ye the niggard hound away!
meaning: असर्जि वक्वा रथ्ये यथाजौ धिया मनोता प्रथमा मनीष दश स्वसारो अधि सानो अव्ये मृजन्ति वह्निꣳ सदनेष्वच्छ
sanskrit_iast: asarji vakvā ratʰye yatʰājau dʰiyā manotā pratʰamā manīṣa daśa svasāro adʰi sāno avye mr̥janti vahnim̐ sadaneṣvaccʰa

text: Graciously-minded he is flowing on his way to win dear names o'er which the youthful one grows great. The mighty and far-seeing one hath mounted now the mighty Surya's car which moves to every side.
meaning: अपामिवेदूर्मयस्तर्त्तुराणाः प्र मनीषा ईरते सोममच्छ नमस्यन्तीरुप च यन्ति सं चाच विशन्त्युशतीरुशन्तम्
sanskrit_iast: apāmivedūrmayastartturāṇāḥ pra manīṣā īrate somamaccʰa namasyantīrupa ca yanti saṃ cāca viśantyuśatīruśantam

text: Spontaneous let our drops of Soma juice flow on, pressed out and tawny-coloured, mightily, to the Gods! Still let our enemies, the godless, be in want, though filled with food; and let our prayers obtain success!
meaning: पुरोजिती वो अन्धसः सुताय मादयित्नवे अप श्वानꣳ श्नथिष्टन सखायो दीर्घजिह्व्यम्
sanskrit_iast: purojitī vo andʰasaḥ sutāya mādayitnave apa śvānam̐ śnatʰiṣṭana sakʰāyo dīrgʰajihvyam

text: Most beauteous of the beauteous, Indra's thunderbolt, this Soma, rich in sweets, hath clamoured in the vat. Dropping with oil, abundant, streams of sacrifice flow unto him, and milch-kine, lowing, with their milk.
meaning: अयं पूषा रयिर्भगः सोमः पुनानो अर्षति पतिर्विश्वस्य भूमनो व्यख्यद्रोदसी उभे
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ pūṣā rayirbʰagaḥ somaḥ punāno arṣati patirviśvasya bʰūmano vyakʰyadrodasī ubʰe

text: Indu hath started forth for Indra's settled place, and slights not, as a friend, the promise of his friend. Soma comes onward like a youth with youthful maids, and gains the beaker by a course of hundred paths.
meaning: सुतासो मधुमत्तमाः सोमा इन्द्राय मन्दिनः पवित्रवन्तो अक्षरन्देवान्गच्छन्तु वो मदाः
sanskrit_iast: sutāso madʰumattamāḥ somā indrāya mandinaḥ pavitravanto akṣarandevāngaccʰantu vo madāḥ

text: On flows the potent juice, sustainer of the heavens; the strength of Gods, whom men must hail with shouts of joy. Thou, gold-hued, started like a courser by brave men, art lightly showing forth thy splendour in the streams.
meaning: सोमाः पवन्त इन्दवो ऽस्मभ्यं गातुवित्तमाः मित्राः स्वाना अरेपसः स्वाध्यः स्वर्विदः
sanskrit_iast: somāḥ pavanta indavo 'smabʰyaṃ gātuvittamāḥ mitrāḥ svānā arepasaḥ svādʰyaḥ svarvidaḥ

text: Far-seeing Soma flows, the Steer, the Lord of hymns, the furtherer of days, of mornings, and of heaven. Breath of the rivers, he hath roared into the jars, and with the help of sages entered Indra's heart.
meaning: अभी नो वाजसातमꣳ रयिमर्ष शतस्पृहम् इन्दो सहस्रभर्णसं तुविद्युम्नं विभासहम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰī no vājasātamam̐ rayimarṣa śataspr̥ham indo sahasrabʰarṇasaṃ tuvidyumnaṃ vibʰāsaham

text: The three-times seven milch-kine in the loftiest heaven have for this Soma poured the genuine milky draught. Four other beauteous creatures hath he made for his adornment when he waxed in strength through holy rites.
meaning: अभी नवन्ते अद्रुहः प्रियमिन्द्रस्य काम्यम् वत्सं न पूर्व आयुनि जातꣳ रिहन्ति मातरः
sanskrit_iast: abʰī navante adruhaḥ priyamindrasya kāmyam vatsaṃ na pūrva āyuni jātam̐ rihanti mātaraḥ

text: Flow on to indra, Soma, carefully effused: let sickness stay afar together with the fiend! Let not the double-tongued delight them with thy juice: here be thy flowing drops laden with opulence!
meaning: आ हर्यताय धृष्णवे धनुष्टन्वन्ति पौꣳस्यम् शुक्रा वि यन्त्यसुराय निर्णिजे विपामग्रे महीयुवः
sanskrit_iast: ā haryatāya dʰr̥ṣṇave dʰanuṣṭanvanti paum̐syam śukrā vi yantyasurāya nirṇije vipāmagre mahīyuvaḥ

text: Even as a King hath Soma, red and tawny Bull, been pressed: the wondrous one hath bellowed to the kine. While purified thou passest through the filtering fleece to seat thee hawk-like on the place that drops with oil.
meaning: परि त्यꣳ हर्यतꣳ हरिं बभ्रुं पुनन्ति वारेण यो देवान्विश्वाꣳ इत्परि मदेन सह गच्छति
sanskrit_iast: pari tyam̐ haryatam̐ hariṃ babʰruṃ punanti vāreṇa yo devānviśvām̐ itpari madena saha gaccʰati

text: The drops of Soma juice, like cows who yield their milk, have flowed forth, rich in meath, unto the diety, And, seated on the grass, raising their voice, assumed the milk, the covering robe wherewith the address stream.
meaning: प्र सुन्वानास्यान्धसो मर्तो न वष्ट तद्वचः अप श्वानमराधसꣳ हता मखं न भृगवः
sanskrit_iast: pra sunvānāsyāndʰaso marto na vaṣṭa tadvacaḥ apa śvānamarādʰasam̐ hatā makʰaṃ na bʰr̥gavaḥ

text: They balm him, balm him over, balm him thoroughly, caress the mighty strength and balm it with the meath. They seize the flying Steer at the stream's breathing-place: cleansing with gold they grasp the animal herein.
meaning: अभि प्रियाणि पवते चनोहितो नामानि यह्वो अधि येषु वर्धते आ सूर्यस्य बृहतो बृहन्नधि रथं विष्वञ्चमरुहद्विचक्षणः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi priyāṇi pavate canohito nāmāni yahvo adʰi yeṣu vardʰate ā sūryasya br̥hato br̥hannadʰi ratʰaṃ viṣvañcamaruhadvicakṣaṇaḥ

text: Spread is thy cleansing filter, Brahmanaspati: as prince thou enterest its limbs from every side. The raw, whose mass hath not been heated, gains not this: they only which are dressed, which bear, attain to it.
meaning: अचोदसो नो धन्वन्त्विन्दवः प्र स्वानासो बृहद्देवेषु हरयः वि चिदश्नाना इषयो अरातयो ऽर्यो नः सन्तु सनिषन्तु नो धियः
sanskrit_iast: acodaso no dʰanvantvindavaḥ pra svānāso br̥haddeveṣu harayaḥ vi cidaśnānā iṣayo arātayo 'ryo naḥ santu saniṣantu no dʰiyaḥ

text: To Indra, to the mighty one, let these gold-coloured juices go, Drops born as Law prescribes, that find the light of heavenj
meaning: एष प्र कोशे मधुमाꣳ अचिक्रददिन्द्रस्य वज्रो वपुषो वपुष्टमः अभ्यॄ३तस्य सुदुघा घृतश्चुतो वाश्रा अर्षन्ति पयसा च घेनवः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa pra kośe madʰumām̐ acikradadindrasya vajro vapuṣo vapuṣṭamaḥ abʰyr̥̄3tasya sudugʰā gʰr̥taścuto vāśrā arṣanti payasā ca gʰenavaḥ

text: Flow vigilant for Indra, thou Soma, yea, Indu, run thou forth; Bring hither splendid strength that finds the light of heaven!
meaning: प्रो अयासीदिन्दुरिन्द्रस्य निष्कृतꣳ सखा सख्युर्न प्र मिनाति सङ्गिरम् मर्य इव युवतिभिः समर्षति सोमः कलशे शतयामना पथा
sanskrit_iast: pro ayāsīdindurindrasya niṣkr̥tam̐ sakʰā sakʰyurna pra mināti saṅgiram marya iva yuvatibʰiḥ samarṣati somaḥ kalaśe śatayāmanā patʰā

text: Sit down, O friends, and sing aloud to him who purifies himself. Deck him for glory, like a child, with holy rites!
meaning: धर्ता दिवः पवते कृत्व्यो रसो दक्षो देवानामनुमाद्यो नृभिः हरिः सृजानो अत्यो न सत्वभिर्वृथा पाजाꣳसि कृणुषे नदीष्वा
sanskrit_iast: dʰartā divaḥ pavate kr̥tvyo raso dakṣo devānāmanumādyo nr̥bʰiḥ hariḥ sr̥jāno atyo na satvabʰirvr̥tʰā pājām̐si kr̥ṇuṣe nadīṣvā

text: Friends, hymn your Lord who makes him pure for rapturous carouse: let them Sweeten him, as a child, with lauds and sacred gifts!
meaning: वृषा मतीनां पवते विचक्षणः सोमो अह्नां प्रतरीतोषसां दिवः प्राणा सिन्धूनां कलशाꣳ अचिक्रददिन्द्रस्य हार्द्याविशन्मनीषिभिः
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā matīnāṃ pavate vicakṣaṇaḥ somo ahnāṃ pratarītoṣasāṃ divaḥ prāṇā sindʰūnāṃ kalaśām̐ acikradadindrasya hārdyāviśanmanīṣibʰiḥ

text: Breath of the mighty Dames, the Child, speeding the plan of' sacrifice, Surpasses all things that are dear, yea, from of old!
meaning: त्रिरस्मै सप्त धेनवो दुदुह्रिरे सत्यामाशिरं परमे व्योमनि चत्वार्यन्या भुवनानि निर्णिजे चारूणि चक्रे यदृतैरवर्धत
sanskrit_iast: trirasmai sapta dʰenavo duduhrire satyāmāśiraṃ parame vyomani catvāryanyā bʰuvanāni nirṇije cārūṇi cakre yadr̥tairavardʰata

text: In might, O Indu, with thy streams flow for the banquet of the Gods: Rich in meath, Soma, in our beaker take thy seat!
meaning: इन्द्राय सोम सुषुतः परि स्रवापामीवा भवतु रक्षसा सह मा ते रसस्य मत्सत द्वयाविनो द्रविणस्वन्त इह सन्त्विन्दवः
sanskrit_iast: indrāya soma suṣutaḥ pari sravāpāmīvā bʰavatu rakṣasā saha mā te rasasya matsata dvayāvino draviṇasvanta iha santvindavaḥ

text: Soma, while filtered, with his wave flows through the long wool of the sheep, Roaring, while purified, before the voice of song.
meaning: असावि सोमो अरुषो वृषा हरी राजेव दस्मो अभि गा अचिक्रदत् पुनानो वारमत्येष्यव्ययꣳ श्येनो न योनिं घृतवन्तमासदत्
sanskrit_iast: asāvi somo aruṣo vr̥ṣā harī rājeva dasmo abʰi gā acikradat punāno vāramatyeṣyavyayam̐ śyeno na yoniṃ gʰr̥tavantamāsadat

text: The speech is uttered for the Sage, for Soma being purified: Bring meed as 'twere to one who makes thee glad with hymns!
meaning: प्र देवमच्छा मधुमन्त इन्दवो ऽसिष्यदन्त गाव आ न धेनवः बर्हिषदो वचनावन्त ऊधभिः परिस्रुतमुस्रिया निर्णिजं धिरे
sanskrit_iast: pra devamaccʰā madʰumanta indavo 'siṣyadanta gāva ā na dʰenavaḥ barhiṣado vacanāvanta ūdʰabʰiḥ parisrutamusriyā nirṇijaṃ dʰire

text: Flow to us, Indu, very strong, effused, with wealth of kine and, steeds, And do thou lay above the milk thy radiant hue!
meaning: अञ्जते व्यञ्जते समञ्जते क्रतुꣳ रिहन्ति मध्वाभ्यञ्जते सिन्धोरु ऽच्छ्वासे पतयन्तमुक्षणꣳ हिरण्यपावाः पशुमप्सु गृभ्णते
sanskrit_iast: añjate vyañjate samañjate kratum̐ rihanti madʰvābʰyañjate sindʰoru 'ccʰvāse patayantamukṣaṇam̐ hiraṇyapāvāḥ paśumapsu gr̥bʰṇate

text: Voices have sung aloud to thee as finder-out of wealth for us: We clothe the hue thou wearest with a robe of milk.
meaning: पवित्रं ते विततं ब्रह्मणस्पते प्रभुर्गात्राणि पर्येषि विश्वतः अतप्ततनूर्न तदामो अश्नुते शृतास इद्वहन्तः सं तदाशत
sanskrit_iast: pavitraṃ te vitataṃ brahmaṇaspate prabʰurgātrāṇi paryeṣi viśvataḥ ataptatanūrna tadāmo aśnute śr̥tāsa idvahantaḥ saṃ tadāśata

text: Gold-hued and lovely in his course through tangles of the wooli he flows: Stream forth heroic fame upon the worshippers!
meaning: इन्द्रमच्छ सुता इमे वृषणं यन्तु हरयः श्रुष्टे जातास इन्दवः स्वर्विदः
sanskrit_iast: indramaccʰa sutā ime vr̥ṣaṇaṃ yantu harayaḥ śruṣṭe jātāsa indavaḥ svarvidaḥ

text: On through the long wool of the sheep to the meath-dropping vat he flows: The Rishis' sevenfold quire hath sung aloud to him. I. For Indra flow, thou Soma, on, as most inspiring drink, exceeding rich in sweets. Great, most celestial, gladdening drink!
meaning: प्र धन्वा सोम जागृविरिन्द्रायेन्दो परि स्रव द्युमन्तꣳ शुष्ममा भर स्वर्विदम्
sanskrit_iast: pra dʰanvā soma jāgr̥virindrāyendo pari srava dyumantam̐ śuṣmamā bʰara svarvidam

text: Make high and splendid glory shine hitherward, Lord of food, God, on the friend of Gods: Unclose the cask of middle air!
meaning: सखाय आ नि षीदत पुनानाय प्र गायत शिशुं न यज्ञैः परि भूषत श्रिये
sanskrit_iast: sakʰāya ā ni ṣīdata punānāya pra gāyata śiśuṃ na yajñaiḥ pari bʰūṣata śriye

text: Press ye and pour him, like a steed, laud-worthy, speeding through the region and the flood, Who swims in water, dwells in wood!
meaning: तं वः सखायो मदाय पुनानमभि गायत शिशुं न हव्यैः स्वदयन्त गूर्तिभिः
sanskrit_iast: taṃ vaḥ sakʰāyo madāya punānamabʰi gāyata śiśuṃ na havyaiḥ svadayanta gūrtibʰiḥ

text: Him, even this Steer who milks the heavens, him with a thousand streams, distilling rapturous joy, Him who brings all things excellent.
meaning: प्राणा शिशुर्महीनाꣳ हिन्वन्नृतस्य दीधितिम् विश्वा परि प्रिया भुवदध द्विता
sanskrit_iast: prāṇā śiśurmahīnām̐ hinvannr̥tasya dīdʰitim viśvā pari priyā bʰuvadadʰa dvitā

text: Effused is he who brings good things, who brings us store of' wealth and sweet refreshing food, Soma who brings us quiet homes.
meaning: पवस्व देववीतय इन्दो धाराभिरोजसा आ कलशं मधुमान्त्सोम नः सदः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva devavītaya indo dʰārābʰirojasā ā kalaśaṃ madʰumāntsoma naḥ sadaḥ

text: For, verily, Pavamana, thou, divine! endued with brightest splendour calling all Creatures to immortality.
meaning: सोमः पुनान ऊर्मिणाव्यं वारं वि धावति अग्रे वाचः पवमानः कनिक्रदत्
sanskrit_iast: somaḥ punāna ūrmiṇāvyaṃ vāraṃ vi dʰāvati agre vācaḥ pavamānaḥ kanikradat

text: Effused, he floweth in a stream, best rapture-giver, in the longwool of the sheep, Sporting, as 'twere the waters' wave.
meaning: प्र पुनानाय वेधसे सोमाय वच उच्यते भृतिं न भरा मतिभिर्जुजोषते
sanskrit_iast: pra punānāya vedʰase somāya vaca ucyate bʰr̥tiṃ na bʰarā matibʰirjujoṣate

text: He who from out the rocky cavern with his might took forth the red-refulgent cows-- Thou drewest to thyself the stall of kine and steeds: burst it, brave Lord, like one in mail; yea, burst it, O brave Lord, like one in mail! Om. Glory to the Samaveda! to Lord Ganesa glory! Om. I Soma Pavamana
meaning: गोमन्न इन्दो अश्ववत्सुतः सुदक्ष धनिव शुचिं च वर्णमधि गोषु धार्य
sanskrit_iast: gomanna indo aśvavatsutaḥ sudakṣa dʰaniva śuciṃ ca varṇamadʰi goṣu dʰārya

text: Sing forth to Indu, O ye men, to him who now is purified, Fain to pay worship to the Gods! 2, Together with thy pleasant juice the Atharvans have commingled. milk. Divine, God-loving, for the God.
meaning: अस्मभ्यं त्वा वसुविदमभि वाणीरनूषत गोभिष्टे वर्णमभि वासयामसि
sanskrit_iast: asmabʰyaṃ tvā vasuvidamabʰi vāṇīranūṣata gobʰiṣṭe varṇamabʰi vāsayāmasi

text: Bring health to cattle with thy flow, health to the people, health, to steeds, Health, O thou King, to growing plants! II Soma Pavamana
meaning: पवते हर्यतो हरिरति ह्वराꣳसि रꣳह्या अभ्यर्ष स्तोतृभ्यो वीरवद्यशः
sanskrit_iast: pavate haryato harirati hvarām̐si ram̐hyā abʰyarṣa stotr̥bʰyo vīravadyaśaḥ

text: Bright are these Somas blent with milk, with light that flashes brilliantly, And form that shouteth all around.
meaning: परि कोशं मधुश्चुतꣳ सोमः पुनानो अर्षति अभि वाणीरृषीणाꣳ सप्ता नूषत
sanskrit_iast: pari kośaṃ madʰuścutam̐ somaḥ punāno arṣati abʰi vāṇīrr̥ṣīṇām̐ saptā nūṣata

text: Roused by his drivers and sent forth, the strong Steed hath come: nigh for spoil, As warriors when they stand arrayed.
meaning: पवस्व मधुमत्तम इन्द्राय सोम क्रतुवित्तमो मदः महि द्युक्षतमो मदः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva madʰumattama indrāya soma kratuvittamo madaḥ mahi dyukṣatamo madaḥ

text: Specially, Soma, Sage, by day, coming together for our weal, Like Surya, flow for us to see! III Soma Pavamana
meaning: अभि द्युम्नं बृहद्यश इषस्पते दिदीहि देव देवयुम् वि कोशं मध्यमं युव
sanskrit_iast: abʰi dyumnaṃ br̥hadyaśa iṣaspate didīhi deva devayum vi kośaṃ madʰyamaṃ yuva

text: The streams of Pavamana, thine, Sage, mighty one, have poured them forth, Like coursers eager for renown.
meaning: आ सोता परि षिञ्चताश्वं न स्तोममप्तुरꣳ रजस्तुरम् वनप्रक्षमुदप्रुतम्
sanskrit_iast: ā sotā pari ṣiñcatāśvaṃ na stomamapturam̐ rajasturam vanaprakṣamudaprutam

text: They have been poured upon the Reece towards the meath-distilling vat: The holy songs have rung aloud.
meaning: एतमु त्यं मदच्युतꣳ सहस्रधारं वृषभं दिवोदुहम् विश्वा वसूनि बिभ्रतम्
sanskrit_iast: etamu tyaṃ madacyutam̐ sahasradʰāraṃ vr̥ṣabʰaṃ divoduham viśvā vasūni bibʰratam

text: Like milch-kine coming home, the drops of Soma juice have reached the lake, Have reached the shrine of sacrifice IV Agni
meaning: स सुन्वे यो वसूनां यो रायामानेता य इडानाम् सोमो यः सुक्षितीनाम्
sanskrit_iast: sa sunve yo vasūnāṃ yo rāyāmānetā ya iḍānām somo yaḥ sukṣitīnām

text: Come, Agni, praised with song to feast and sacrificial offerings: sit As Hotar on the holy grass!
meaning: त्वꣳ ह्या३ङ्ग दैव्या पवमान जनिमानि द्युमत्तमः अमृतत्वाय घोषयन्
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hyā3ṅga daivyā pavamāna janimāni dyumattamaḥ amr̥tatvāya gʰoṣayan

text: So, Angiras, we make thee strong with fuel and with holy oil. Blaze high, thou youngest of the Gods!
meaning: एष स्य धारया सुतो ऽव्यो वारेभिः पवते मदिन्तमः क्रीडन्नूर्मिरपामिव
sanskrit_iast: eṣa sya dʰārayā suto 'vyo vārebʰiḥ pavate madintamaḥ krīḍannūrmirapāmiva

text: For us thou winnest, Agni, God, heroic strength exceeding great, Far-spreading and of high renown. V Mitra Varuna
meaning: य उस्रिया अपि या अन्तरश्मनि निर्गा अकृन्तदोजसा अभि व्रजं तत्निषे गव्यमश्व्यं वर्मीव धृष्णवा रुज औम् वर्मीव धृष्णवा रुज
sanskrit_iast: ya usriyā api yā antaraśmani nirgā akr̥ntadojasā abʰi vrajaṃ tatniṣe gavyamaśvyaṃ varmīva dʰr̥ṣṇavā ruja AUM varmīva dʰr̥ṣṇavā ruja

text: Varuna, Mitra, sapient pair, pour fatness on our pastures, pour Meath on the regions of the air! 2, Gladdened by homage, ruling far, ye reign by majesty of might, Pure in your ways, for evermore.
meaning: इन्द्र ज्येष्ठं न आ भर ओजिष्ठं पुपुरि श्रवः यद्दिधृक्षेम वज्रहस्त रोदसी ओभे सुशिप्र पप्राः
sanskrit_iast: indra jyeṣṭʰaṃ na ā bʰara ojiṣṭʰaṃ pupuri śravaḥ yaddidʰr̥kṣema vajrahasta rodasī obʰe suśipra paprāḥ

text: Lauded by Jamadagni's song, sit in the shrine of sacrifice: Drink Soma, ye who strengthen Law! VI Indra
meaning: इन्द्रो राजा जगतश्चर्षणीनामधिक्षमा विश्वरूपं यदस्य ततो ददाति दाशुषे वसूनि चोदद्राध उपस्तुतं चिदर्वाक्
sanskrit_iast: indro rājā jagataścarṣaṇīnāmadʰikṣamā viśvarūpaṃ yadasya tato dadāti dāśuṣe vasūni codadrādʰa upastutaṃ cidarvāk

text: Come, we have pressed theJuice for thee; O Indra, drink this Soma here: Sit thou on this my sacred grass!
meaning: यस्येदमा रजोयुजस्तुजे जने वनꣳ स्वः इन्द्रस्य रन्त्यं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: yasyedamā rajoyujastuje jane vanam̐ svaḥ indrasya rantyaṃ br̥hat

text: O Indra, let thy long-maned bays, yoked by prayer, bring thee hitherward! Give ear and listen to our prayers!
meaning: उदुत्तमं वरुण पाशमस्मदवाधमं वि मध्यमꣳ श्रथाय अथादित्य व्रते वयं तवानागसो अदितये स्याम
sanskrit_iast: uduttamaṃ varuṇa pāśamasmadavādʰamaṃ vi madʰyamam̐ śratʰāya atʰāditya vrate vayaṃ tavānāgaso aditaye syāma

text: We Soma-bearing Brahmans call thee Soma-drinker with thy friend, We, Indra, bringing Soma juice. VII Indra Agni
meaning: त्वया वयं पवमानेन सोम भरे कृतं वि चिनुयाम शश्वत् तन्नो मित्रो वरुणो मामहन्तामदितिः सिन्धुः पृथिवी उत द्यौः
sanskrit_iast: tvayā vayaṃ pavamānena soma bʰare kr̥taṃ vi cinuyāma śaśvat tanno mitro varuṇo māmahantāmaditiḥ sindʰuḥ pr̥tʰivī uta dyauḥ

text: Indra and Agni, moved by songs, come to the juice, the precious dew: Drink ye thereof, impelled by prayer!
meaning: इमं वृषणं कृणुतैकमिन्माम्
sanskrit_iast: imaṃ vr̥ṣaṇaṃ kr̥ṇutaikaminmām

text: Indra and Agni, with the man who lauds comes visible sacrifice: So drink ye both this flowing juice!
meaning: स न इन्द्राय यज्यवे वरुणाय मरुद्भ्यः वरिवोवित्परिस्रव
sanskrit_iast: sa na indrāya yajyave varuṇāya marudbʰyaḥ varivovitparisrava

text: With force of sacrifice I seek Indra, Agni who love the wise: With Soma let them sate them here! VIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: एना विश्वान्यर्य आ द्युम्नानि मानुषाणाम् सिषासन्तो वनामहे
sanskrit_iast: enā viśvānyarya ā dyumnāni mānuṣāṇām siṣāsanto vanāmahe

text: High is thy juice's birth: though set in heaven, on earth it hath obtained Dread sheltering power and great renown.
meaning: अहमस्मि प्रथमजा ऋतस्य पूर्वं देवेभ्यो अमृतस्य नाम यो मा ददाति स इदेवमावदहमन्नमन्नमदन्तमद्मि
sanskrit_iast: ahamasmi pratʰamajā r̥tasya pūrvaṃ devebʰyo amr̥tasya nāma yo mā dadāti sa idevamāvadahamannamannamadantamadmi

text: Finder of room and freedom, flow for Indra whom we must adore, For Varuna and the Marut host!
meaning: त्वमेतदधारयः कृष्णासु रोहिणीषु च परुष्णीषु रुशत्पयः
sanskrit_iast: tvametadadʰārayaḥ kr̥ṣṇāsu rohiṇīṣu ca paruṣṇīṣu ruśatpayaḥ

text: Striving to win, with him we gain all riches from the enemy, Yea, all the glories of mankind, IX Soma Pavamana
meaning: अरूरुचदुषसः पृश्निरग्रिय उक्षा मिमेति भुवनेषु वाजयुः मायाविनो ममिरे अस्य मायया नृचक्षसः पितरो गर्भमादधुः
sanskrit_iast: arūrucaduṣasaḥ pr̥śniragriya ukṣā mimeti bʰuvaneṣu vājayuḥ māyāvino mamire asya māyayā nr̥cakṣasaḥ pitaro garbʰamādadʰuḥ

text: Cleansing thee, Soma, in thy stream, thou flowest in watery robe. Giver of wealth, thou sittest in the place of Law, O God, a fountain made of gold.
meaning: इन्द्र इद्धर्योः सचा सम्मिश्ल आ वचोयुजा इन्द्रो वज्री हिरण्ययः
sanskrit_iast: indra iddʰaryoḥ sacā sammiśla ā vacoyujā indro vajrī hiraṇyayaḥ

text: He, milking for dear meath the heavenly udder, hath sat in the ancient gathering-place. Washed by the men, far-sighted, strong, thou streamest to ther honourable reservoir. X Soma Pavamana
meaning: इन्द्र वाजेषु नो ऽव सहस्रप्रधनेषु च उग्र उग्राभिरूतिभिः
sanskrit_iast: indra vājeṣu no 'va sahasrapradʰaneṣu ca ugra ugrābʰirūtibʰiḥ

text: Run onward to the reservoir and seat thee: cleansed by the men speed forward to the battle. Making thee glossy like an able courser, forth to the sacred grass with reins they lead thee.
meaning: प्रथश्च यस्य सप्रथश्च नामानुष्टुभस्य हविषो हविर्यत् धातुर्द्युतानात्सवितुश्च विष्णो रथन्तरमा जभारा वसिष्ठः
sanskrit_iast: pratʰaśca yasya sapratʰaśca nāmānuṣṭubʰasya haviṣo haviryat dʰāturdyutānātsavituśca viṣṇo ratʰantaramā jabʰārā vasiṣṭʰaḥ

text: Indu, the well-armed God is flowing onward, he who averts the curse and guards the homesteads. Father, begetter of the Gods, most skilful, the buttress of the heavens and earth's supporter. XI Indra
meaning: नियुत्वान्वायवा गह्ययꣳ शुक्रो अयामि ते गन्तासि सुन्वतो गृहम्
sanskrit_iast: niyutvānvāyavā gahyayam̐ śukro ayāmi te gantāsi sunvato gr̥ham

text: Like kine unmilked we call aloud, hero, to thee, and sing thy praise, Looker on heavenly light, Lord of this moving world, Lord, Indra! of what moveth not.
meaning: यज्जायथा अपूर्व्य मघवन्वृत्रहत्याय तत्पृथिवीमप्रथयस्तदस्तभ्ना उतो दिवम्
sanskrit_iast: yajjāyatʰā apūrvya magʰavanvr̥trahatyāya tatpr̥tʰivīmapratʰayastadastabʰnā uto divam

text: None other like to thee, of earth or of the heavens, hath been or ever will be born. Desiring horses, Indra Maghavan! and kine, as men of might we call on thee. XII Indra
meaning: मयि वर्चो अथो यशो ऽथो यज्ञस्य यत्पयः परमेष्ठी प्रजापतिर्दिवि द्यामिव दृꣳहतु
sanskrit_iast: mayi varco atʰo yaśo 'tʰo yajñasya yatpayaḥ parameṣṭʰī prajāpatirdivi dyāmiva dr̥m̐hatu

text: With what help will he come to us, wonderful, everwaxing friend? With what most mighty company?
meaning: सं ते पयाꣳसि समु यन्तु वाजाः सं वृष्ण्यान्यभिमातिषाहः आप्यायमानो अमृताय सोम दिवि श्रवाꣳस्युत्तमानि धिष्व
sanskrit_iast: saṃ te payām̐si samu yantu vājāḥ saṃ vr̥ṣṇyānyabʰimātiṣāhaḥ āpyāyamāno amr̥tāya soma divi śravām̐syuttamāni dʰiṣva

text: What genuine and most liberal draught will spirit thee with juice to burst Open e'en strongly-guarded wealth?
meaning: त्वमिमा ओषधीः सोम विश्वास्त्वमपो अजनयस्त्वं गाः त्वमातनोरुर्वा३न्तरिक्षं त्वं ज्योतिषा वि तमो ववर्थ
sanskrit_iast: tvamimā oṣadʰīḥ soma viśvāstvamapo ajanayastvaṃ gāḥ tvamātanorurvā3ntarikṣaṃ tvaṃ jyotiṣā vi tamo vavartʰa

text: Do thou who art protector of us thy friends who praise thee With hundred aids approach us! XIII Indra
meaning: अग्निमीडे पुरोहितं यज्ञस्य देवमृत्विजम् होतारं रत्नधातमम्
sanskrit_iast: agnimīḍe purohitaṃ yajñasya devamr̥tvijam hotāraṃ ratnadʰātamam

text: As cows low to their calves in stalls, so with our songs we glorify This Indra, even your wondrous God who checks attack, who takes delight in precious juice.
meaning: ते मन्वत प्रथमं नाम गोनां त्रिः सप्त परमं नाम जनान् ता जानतीरभ्यनूषत क्षा आविर्भुवन्नरुणीर्यशसा गावः
sanskrit_iast: te manvata pratʰamaṃ nāma gonāṃ triḥ sapta paramaṃ nāma janān tā jānatīrabʰyanūṣata kṣā āvirbʰuvannaruṇīryaśasā gāvaḥ

text: Celestial, bounteous giver, girt about with might, rich, mountain-like, in pleasant things,-- Him swift we seek for foodful booty rich in kine, brought hundredfold and thousandfold. XIV Indra
meaning: समन्या यन्त्युपयन्त्यन्याः समानमूर्वं नद्यस्पृणन्ति तमू शुचिꣳ शुचयो दीदिवाꣳसमपान्नपातमुप यन्त्यापः
sanskrit_iast: samanyā yantyupayantyanyāḥ samānamūrvaṃ nadyaspr̥ṇanti tamū śucim̐ śucayo dīdivām̐samapānnapātamupa yantyāpaḥ

text: Loud-singing at tbe sacred rite where Soma flows, we priests invoke. With haste, that he may help, as the bard's cherisher. Indra who findeth wealth for you.
meaning: आ प्रागाद्भद्रा युवतिरह्नः केतून्त्समीर्त्सति अभूद्भद्रा निवेशनी विश्वस्य जगतो रात्री
sanskrit_iast: ā prāgādbʰadrā yuvatirahnaḥ ketūntsamīrtsati abʰūdbʰadrā niveśanī viśvasya jagato rātrī

text: Whom, fair of cheek, in rapture of the juice, the firm resistless slayers hinder not: Giver of glorious wealth to him who sings his praise, honouring him who toils and pours. XV Soma Pavamana
meaning: प्रक्षस्य वृष्णो अरुषस्य नू महः प्र नो वचो विदथा जातवेदसे वैश्वानराय मतिर्नव्यसे शुचिः सोम इव पवते चारुरग्नये
sanskrit_iast: prakṣasya vr̥ṣṇo aruṣasya nū mahaḥ pra no vaco vidatʰā jātavedase vaiśvānarāya matirnavyase śuciḥ soma iva pavate cāruragnaye

text: In sweetest and most gladdening stream flow pure, O Soma, on thy way, Pressed out for Indra, for his drink!
meaning: विश्वे देवा मम शृण्वन्तु यज्ञमुभे रोदसी अपां नपाच्च मन्म मा वो वचाꣳसि परिचक्ष्याणि वोचꣳ सुम्नेष्विद्वो अन्तमा मदेम
sanskrit_iast: viśve devā mama śr̥ṇvantu yajñamubʰe rodasī apāṃ napācca manma mā vo vacām̐si paricakṣyāṇi vocam̐ sumneṣvidvo antamā madema

text: Fiend-queller, friend of all men, he hath reached his shrine, his dwelling-place. Within the iron-hammered vat.
meaning: यशो मा द्यावापृथिवी यशो मेन्द्रबृहस्पती यशो भगस्य विन्दतु यशो मा प्रतिमुच्यताम् यशस्व्या३स्याः सꣳ सदो ऽहं प्रवदिता स्याम्
sanskrit_iast: yaśo mā dyāvāpr̥tʰivī yaśo mendrabr̥haspatī yaśo bʰagasya vindatu yaśo mā pratimucyatām yaśasvyā3syāḥ sam̐ sado 'haṃ pravaditā syām

text: Be thou best Vritra-slaver, best granter of room, most liberal: Promote our wealthy princes' gifts! XVI Soma Pavamana
meaning: इन्द्रस्य नु वीर्याणि प्रवोचं यानि चकार प्रथमानि वज्री अहन्नहिमन्वपस्ततर्द प्र वक्षणा अभिनत्पर्वतानाम्
sanskrit_iast: indrasya nu vīryāṇi pravocaṃ yāni cakāra pratʰamāni vajrī ahannahimanvapastatarda pra vakṣaṇā abʰinatparvatānām

text: For Indra flow, thou Soma, on, as most inspiring drink, most rich in sweets, Great, most Celestial, gladdening drink!
meaning: अग्निरस्मि जन्मना जातवेदा घृतं मे चक्षुरमृतं म आसन् त्रिधातुरर्को रजसो विमानो ऽजस्रं ज्योतिर्हविरस्मि सर्वम्
sanskrit_iast: agnirasmi janmanā jātavedā gʰr̥taṃ me cakṣuramr̥taṃ ma āsan tridʰāturarko rajaso vimāno 'jasraṃ jyotirhavirasmi sarvam

text: Thou of whom having drunk the Steer acts like a steer: having drunk this that finds the light, He, excellently wise, hath come anear to food and booty, even as Etasa. XVII Indra
meaning: पात्यग्निर्विपो अग्रं पदं वेः पाति यह्वश्चरणꣳ सूर्यस्य पाति नाभा सप्तशीर्षाणमग्निः
sanskrit_iast: pātyagnirvipo agraṃ padaṃ veḥ pāti yahvaścaraṇam̐ sūryasya pāti nābʰā saptaśīrṣāṇamagniḥ

text: To Indra, to the mighty let these golden-coloured juices go, Drops born as Law prescribes, that find the light of heaven!
meaning: भ्राजन्त्यग्ने समिधान दीदिवो जिह्वा चरत्यन्तरासनि स त्वं नो अग्ने पयसा वसुविद्रयिं वर्चो दृशे ऽदाः
sanskrit_iast: bʰrājantyagne samidʰāna dīdivo jihvā caratyantarāsani sa tvaṃ no agne payasā vasuvidrayiṃ varco dr̥śe 'dāḥ

text: This juice that gathers spoil flows, pressed, for Indra, for his maintenance. Soma bethinks him of the conqueror, as he knows.
meaning: वसन्त इन्नु रन्त्यो ग्रीष्म इन्नु रन्त्यः वर्षाण्यनु शरदो हेमन्तः शिशिर इन्नु रन्त्यः
sanskrit_iast: vasanta innu rantyo grīṣma innu rantyaḥ varṣāṇyanu śarado hemantaḥ śiśira innu rantyaḥ

text: Yea, Indra in the joys of this obtains the grasp that gathers spoil, And, winning waters, wields the mighty thunderbolt. XVIII Soma Pavamana.
meaning: सहस्रशीर्षा पुरुषः सहस्राक्षः सहस्रपात् स भूमिꣳ सर्वतो वृत्वात्यतिष्ठद्दशाङ्गुलम्
sanskrit_iast: sahasraśīrṣā puruṣaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt sa bʰūmim̐ sarvato vr̥tvātyatiṣṭʰaddaśāṅgulam

text: For first possession of your juice, for the exhilarating drink, Drive ye away the dog, my friends, drive ye the long-tongued dog away!
meaning: त्रिपादूर्ध्व उदैत्पुरुषः पदो ऽस्येहाभवत्पुनः तथा विष्वङ् व्यक्रामदशनानशने अभि
sanskrit_iast: tripādūrdʰva udaitpuruṣaḥ pado 'syehābʰavatpunaḥ tatʰā viṣvaṅ vyakrāmadaśanānaśane abʰi

text: He who with purifying stream, effused, comes flowing hitherward, Indu, is like an able steed.
meaning: पुरुष एवेदꣳ सर्वं यद्भूतं यच्च भाव्यम् पादो ऽस्य सर्वा भूतानि त्रिपादस्यामृतं दिवि
sanskrit_iast: puruṣa evedam̐ sarvaṃ yadbʰūtaṃ yacca bʰāvyam pādo 'sya sarvā bʰūtāni tripādasyāmr̥taṃ divi

text: With prayer all-reaching let the men tend unassailable Soma: be- The stones prepared for sacrifice! XIX Soma Pavamana
meaning: तावानस्य महिमा ततो ज्यायाꣳश्च पूरुषः उतामृतत्वस्येशानो यदन्नेनातिरोहति
sanskrit_iast: tāvānasya mahimā tato jyāyām̐śca pūruṣaḥ utāmr̥tatvasyeśāno yadannenātirohati

text: Graciously- minded he is flowing on his way to win dear names o'er which the youthful one grows great. The mighty and far-seeing one hath mounted now the mighty Surya's car which moves to every side.
meaning: ततो विराडजायत विराजो अधि पूरुषः स जातो अत्यरिच्यत पश्चाद्भूमिमथो पुरः
sanskrit_iast: tato virāḍajāyata virājo adʰi pūruṣaḥ sa jāto atyaricyata paścādbʰūmimatʰo puraḥ

text: The speaker, unassailable master of this prayer, the tongue of sacrifice, pours forth the pleasant meath. As son be sets the name of mother and of sire in the far distance, in the third bright realm of heaven.
meaning: मन्ये वाꣳ द्यावापृथिवी सुभोजसौ ये अप्रथेथाममितमभि योजनम् द्यावापृथिवी भवतꣳ स्योने ते नो मुञ्चतमꣳहसः
sanskrit_iast: manye vām̐ dyāvāpr̥tʰivī subʰojasau ye apratʰetʰāmamitamabʰi yojanam dyāvāpr̥tʰivī bʰavatam̐ syone te no muñcatamam̐hasaḥ

text: Sending forth flashes he hath bellowed to the jars, led by the men into the golden reservoir. The milkers of the sacrifice have sung to him: Lord of three heights, thou shinest brightly o'er the Dawns. XX Agni
meaning: हरी त इन्द्र श्मश्रूण्युतो ते हरितौ हरि तं त्वा स्तुवन्ति कवयः पुरुषासो वनर्गवः
sanskrit_iast: harī ta indra śmaśrūṇyuto te haritau hari taṃ tvā stuvanti kavayaḥ puruṣāso vanargavaḥ

text: Sing to your Agni with each song, at every sacrifice for strength! Come, let us praise the wise and everlasting God, even as a well-beloved friend:
meaning: यद्वर्चो हिरण्यस्य यद्वा वर्चो गवामुत सत्यस्य ब्रह्मणो वर्चस्तेन मा सꣳ सृजामसि
sanskrit_iast: yadvarco hiraṇyasya yadvā varco gavāmuta satyasya brahmaṇo varcastena mā sam̐ sr̥jāmasi

text: The Son of Strength; for is be not our gracious Lord? Let us serve him who bears our gifts! In battles may he be our help and strengthener, yea, be the saviour of our lives! XXI Agni
meaning: सहस्तन्न इन्द्र दद्ध्योज ईशे ह्यस्य महतो विरप्शिन् क्रतुं न नृम्णꣳ स्थविरं च वाजं वृत्रेषु शत्रून्त्सुहना कृधी नः
sanskrit_iast: sahastanna indra daddʰyoja īśe hyasya mahato virapśin kratuṃ na nr̥mṇam̐ stʰaviraṃ ca vājaṃ vr̥treṣu śatrūntsuhanā kr̥dʰī naḥ

text: O Agni, come; far other songs of praise will I sing forth to thee. Wax mighty with these Soma drops!
meaning: सहर्षभाः सहवत्सा उदेत विश्वा रूपाणी बिभ्रतीर्द्व्यूद्नीः उरुः पृथुरयं वो अस्तु लोक इमा आपः सुप्रपाणा इह स्त
sanskrit_iast: saharṣabʰāḥ sahavatsā udeta viśvā rūpāṇī bibʰratīrdvyūdnīḥ uruḥ pr̥tʰurayaṃ vo astu loka imā āpaḥ suprapāṇā iha sta

text: Where'er thy mind applies itself, vigour preeminent hast thou: There wilt thou gain a dwelling-place.
meaning: अग्न आयूꣳषि पवस आसुवोर्जमिषं च नः आरे बाधस्व दुच्छुनाम्
sanskrit_iast: agna āyūm̐ṣi pavasa āsuvorjamiṣaṃ ca naḥ āre bādʰasva duccʰunām

text: Not for a moment only lasts thy bounty, Lord of many men: Our service therefore shalt thou gain. XXII Indra
meaning: विभ्राङ्बृहत्पिबतु सोम्यं मध्वायुर्दधद्यज्ञपतावविह्रुतम् वातजूतो यो अभिरक्षति त्मना प्रजाः पिपर्ति बहुधा वि राजति
sanskrit_iast: vibʰrāṅbr̥hatpibatu somyaṃ madʰvāyurdadʰadyajñapatāvavihrutam vātajūto yo abʰirakṣati tmanā prajāḥ piparti bahudʰā vi rājati

text: We call on thee, O matchless one. We, seeking help, possessing nothing firm ourselves. Call on thee, wondrous, thunder-armed:
meaning: चित्रं देवानामुदगादनीकं चक्षुर्मित्रस्य वरुणस्याग्नेः आप्रा द्यावापृथिवी अन्तरिक्षꣳ सूर्य आत्मा जगतस्तस्थुषश्च
sanskrit_iast: citraṃ devānāmudagādanīkaṃ cakṣurmitrasya varuṇasyāgneḥ āprā dyāvāpr̥tʰivī antarikṣam̐ sūrya ātmā jagatastastʰuṣaśca

text: On thee for aid in sacrifice, This youth of ours, the bold, the terrible, bath gone forth. We therefore, we thy friends, Indra, have chosen thee, spoil winner, as our succourer. XXIII Indra
meaning: आयं गौः पृश्निरक्रमीदसदन्मातरं पुरः पितरं च प्रयन्त्स्वः
sanskrit_iast: āyaṃ gauḥ pr̥śnirakramīdasadanmātaraṃ puraḥ pitaraṃ ca prayantsvaḥ

text: So, Indra, friend of song, do we draw near to thee with longing; we have streamed to thee Coming like floods that follow floods.
meaning: अन्तश्चरति रोचनास्य प्राणादपानती व्यख्यन्महिषो दिवम्
sanskrit_iast: antaścarati rocanāsya prāṇādapānatī vyakʰyanmahiṣo divam

text: As rivers swell the ocean, so, hero, our prayers increase thy might, Though of thyself, O Thunderer, waxing day by day.
meaning: त्रिꣳषद्धाम वि राजति वाक्पतङ्गाय धीयते प्रति वस्तोरह द्युभिः
sanskrit_iast: trim̐ṣaddʰāma vi rājati vākpataṅgāya dʰīyate prati vastoraha dyubʰiḥ

text: With holy song they bind to the broad wide-yoked car the bay steeds of the quickening God, Bearers of Indra, yoked by word. I Indra I. Invite ye Indra with a song to drink your draught of Soma juicel All-conquering Satakratu, most munificent of all who live!
meaning: अप त्ये तायवो यथा नक्षत्रा यन्त्यक्तुभिः सूराय विश्वचक्षसे
sanskrit_iast: apa tye tāyavo yatʰā nakṣatrā yantyaktubʰiḥ sūrāya viśvacakṣase

text: Lauded by many, much-invoked, leader of song renowned of old: His name is Indra, tell it forth!
meaning: अदृश्रन्नस्य केतवो वि रश्मयो जनाꣳ अनु भ्राजन्तो अग्नयो यथा
sanskrit_iast: adr̥śrannasya ketavo vi raśmayo janām̐ anu bʰrājanto agnayo yatʰā

text: Indra, the dancer, be to us the giver of abundant wealth: The mighty bring it us knee-deep! II Indra
meaning: तरणिर्विश्वदर्शतो ज्योतिष्कृदसि सूर्य विश्वमाभासि रोचनम्
sanskrit_iast: taraṇirviśvadarśato jyotiṣkr̥dasi sūrya viśvamābʰāsi rocanam

text: Sing ye a song, to make him glad, to Indra, Lord of tawny steeds, The Soma-drinker, O my friends!
meaning: प्रत्यङ् देवानां विशः प्रत्यङ्ङुदेषि मानुषान् प्रत्यङ् विश्वꣳ स्वर्दृशे
sanskrit_iast: pratyaṅ devānāṃ viśaḥ pratyaṅṅudeṣi mānuṣān pratyaṅ viśvam̐ svardr̥śe

text: To him, the bounteous, say the laud, and let us glorify, as men May do, the giver of true gifts!
meaning: येना पावक चक्षसा भुरण्यन्तं जनाꣳ अनु त्वं वरुण पश्यसि
sanskrit_iast: yenā pāvaka cakṣasā bʰuraṇyantaṃ janām̐ anu tvaṃ varuṇa paśyasi

text: O Indra, Lord of boundless might, for us thou seekest spoil and kine, Thou seekest gold for us, good Lord! III Indra
meaning: उद्द्यामेषि रजः पृथ्वहा मिमानो अक्तुभिः पश्यञ्जन्मानि सूर्य
sanskrit_iast: uddyāmeṣi rajaḥ pr̥tʰvahā mimāno aktubʰiḥ paśyañjanmāni sūrya

text: This, even this, O Indra, we implore: as thy devoted friends, The Kanvas praise thee with their hymns.
meaning: अयुक्त सप्त शुन्ध्युवः सूरो रथस्य नप्त्र्यः ताभिर्याति स्वयुक्तिभिः
sanskrit_iast: ayukta sapta śundʰyuvaḥ sūro ratʰasya naptryaḥ tābʰiryāti svayuktibʰiḥ

text: Naught else, O Thunderer, have I praised in the skilled singer's eulogy; On thy laud only have I thought.
meaning: सप्त त्वा हरितो रथे वहन्ति देव सूर्य शोचिष्केशं विचक्षण
sanskrit_iast: sapta tvā harito ratʰe vahanti deva sūrya śociṣkeśaṃ vicakṣaṇa

text: The Gods seek him who presses out the Soma; they desire not sleep: They punish sloth unweariedly IV Indra
meaning: विदा मघवन् विदा गातुमनुशꣳसिषो दिशः शिक्षा शचीनां पते पूर्वीणां पुरूवसो
sanskrit_iast: vidā magʰavan vidā gātumanuśam̐siṣo diśaḥ śikṣā śacīnāṃ pate pūrvīṇāṃ purūvaso

text: For Indra, lover of carouse, loud be our songs about the juice: Let poets sing the song of praise
meaning: आभिष्ट्वमभिष्टिभिः स्वा ऽ३र्न्नाꣳशुः प्रचेतन प्रचेतयेन्द्र द्युम्नाय न इषे
sanskrit_iast: ābʰiṣṭvamabʰiṣṭibʰiḥ svā '3rnnām̐śuḥ pracetana pracetayendra dyumnāya na iṣe

text: We summon Indra to the draught, in whom all glories rest, in whom The seven communities rejoice.
meaning: एवा हि शक्रो राये वाजाय वज्रिवः शविष्ठ वज्रिन्नृञ्जसे मꣳहिष्ठ वज्रिन्नृञ्जस आ याहि पिब मत्स्व
sanskrit_iast: evā hi śakro rāye vājāya vajrivaḥ śaviṣṭʰa vajrinnr̥ñjase mam̐hiṣṭʰa vajrinnr̥ñjasa ā yāhi piba matsva

text: At the Trikadrukas the Gods span sacrifice that stirs the mind: Let our songs aid and prosper it! V Indra
meaning: विदा राये सुवीर्यं भवो वाजानां पतिर्वशाꣳ अनु मꣳहिष्ठ वज्रिन्नृञ्जसे यः शविष्ठः शूराणाम्
sanskrit_iast: vidā rāye suvīryaṃ bʰavo vājānāṃ patirvaśām̐ anu mam̐hiṣṭʰa vajrinnr̥ñjase yaḥ śaviṣṭʰaḥ śūrāṇām

text: Here, Indra, is thy Soma draught, made pure upon the sacred grass: Run hither, come and drink thereof!
meaning: यो मꣳहिष्ठो मघोनाम्ꣳशुर्न्न शोचिः चिकित्वो अभि नो नये\न्द्रो विदे तमु स्तुहि
sanskrit_iast: yo mam̐hiṣṭʰo magʰonāmm̐śurnna śociḥ cikitvo abʰi no naye\ndro vide tamu stuhi

text: Strong-rayed! adored with earnest hymns! this juice is shed for thy delight: Thou art invoked, Akhandala!
meaning: ईशे हि शक्रस्तमूतये हवामहे जेतारमपराजितम् स नः स्वर्षदति द्विषः क्रतुश्छन्द ऋतं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: īśe hi śakrastamūtaye havāmahe jetāramaparājitam sa naḥ svarṣadati dviṣaḥ kratuścʰanda r̥taṃ br̥hat

text: To Kundapayya, grandson's son, grandson of Sringavrish! to thee, To him have I addressed my thought. VI Indra
meaning: इन्द्रं धनस्य सातये हवामहे जेतारमपराजितम् स नः स्वर्षदति द्विषः स नः स्वर्षदति द्विषः
sanskrit_iast: indraṃ dʰanasya sātaye havāmahe jetāramaparājitam sa naḥ svarṣadati dviṣaḥ sa naḥ svarṣadati dviṣaḥ

text: Indra, as one with mighty arm, gather for us with thy right hand, Manifold and nutritious spoil!
meaning: पूर्वस्य यत्ते अद्रिवोꣳ ऽशुर्मदाय सुम्न आ धेहि नो वसो पूर्तिः शविष्ठ शस्यते वशी हि शक्रो नूनं तन्नव्यꣳ संन्यसे
sanskrit_iast: pūrvasya yatte adrivom̐ 'śurmadāya sumna ā dʰehi no vaso pūrtiḥ śaviṣṭʰa śasyate vaśī hi śakro nūnaṃ tannavyam̐ saṃnyase

text: We know thee mighty in thy deeds, of mighty bounty, mighty wealth. Mighty in measure, prompt to aid.
meaning: प्रभो जनस्य वृत्रहन्त्समर्येषु ब्रवावहै शूरो यो गोषु गच्छति सखा सुशेवो अद्वयुः
sanskrit_iast: prabʰo janasya vr̥trahantsamaryeṣu bravāvahai śūro yo goṣu gaccʰati sakʰā suśevo advayuḥ

text: Hero when thou wouldst give thy gifts, neither the Gods nor mortal men Restrain thee like a fearful bull. VII Indra
meaning: एवाह्यो ऽ३ ऽ३ ऽ३वा एवा ह्यग्ने एवाहीन्द्र एवा हि पूषन् एवा हि देवाः औम् एवाहि देवाः
sanskrit_iast: evāhyo '3 '3 '3vā evā hyagne evāhīndra evā hi pūṣan evā hi devāḥ AUM evāhi devāḥ

text: Hero, the Soma being shed, I pour the juice for thee to drink: Sate thee and finish thy carouse!
meaning: उपास्मै गायता नरः पवमानायेन्दवे अभि देवाꣳ इयक्षते
sanskrit_iast: upāsmai gāyatā naraḥ pavamānāyendave abʰi devām̐ iyakṣate

text: Let not the fools, or those who mock, beguile thee when they seek thine aid: Love not the enemy of prayer!
meaning: अभि ते मधुना पयो ऽथर्वाणो अशिश्रयुः देवं देवाय देवयु
sanskrit_iast: abʰi te madʰunā payo 'tʰarvāṇo aśiśrayuḥ devaṃ devāya devayu

text: Here let them cheer thee well supplied with milk to great munificence: Drink as the wild bull drinks the lake! VIII lndra I. Here is the Soma juice expressed: O Vasu, drink till thou art full! Undaunted God, we give it thee!
meaning: स नः पवस्व शं गवे शं जनाय शमर्वते शꣳ राजन्नोषधीभ्यः
sanskrit_iast: sa naḥ pavasva śaṃ gave śaṃ janāya śamarvate śam̐ rājannoṣadʰībʰyaḥ

text: Washed by the men, pressed out with stones, strained through the filter made of wool, 'Tis like a courser bathed in streams.
meaning: दविद्युतत्या रुचा परिष्टोभन्त्या कृपा सोमाः शुक्रा गवाशिरः
sanskrit_iast: davidyutatyā rucā pariṣṭobʰantyā kr̥pā somāḥ śukrā gavāśiraḥ

text: This juice have we made sweet for thee like barley, blending it with milk. Indra, I call thee to our feast. IX Indra
meaning: हिन्वानो हेतृभिर्हित आ वाजं वाज्यक्रमीत् सीदन्तो वनुषो यथा
sanskrit_iast: hinvāno hetr̥bʰirhita ā vājaṃ vājyakramīt sīdanto vanuṣo yatʰā

text: So, Lord of affluent gifts, this juice hath been expressed for thee with strength: Drink of it, thou who lovest song!
meaning: ऋधक्सोम स्वस्तये संजग्मानो दिवा कवे पवस्व सूर्यो दृशे
sanskrit_iast: r̥dʰaksoma svastaye saṃjagmāno divā kave pavasva sūryo dr̥śe

text: Incline thy body to the juice which suits thy godlike nature well: Thee, Soma-lover! let it cheer!
meaning: पवमानस्य ते कवे वाजिन्त्सर्गा असृक्षत अर्वन्तो न श्रवस्यवः
sanskrit_iast: pavamānasya te kave vājintsargā asr̥kṣata arvanto na śravasyavaḥ

text: O Indra, let it enter both thy flanks, enter thy head with prayer, With bounty, hero! both thine arms! X Indra
meaning: अच्छा कोशं मधुश्चुतमसृग्रं वारे अव्यये अवावशन्त धीतयः
sanskrit_iast: accʰā kośaṃ madʰuścutamasr̥graṃ vāre avyaye avāvaśanta dʰītayaḥ

text: O Come ye hither, sit ye down; to Indra sing ye forth your song, Companions, bringing hymns of praise,
meaning: अच्छा समुद्रमिन्दवो ऽस्तं गावो न धेनवः अग्मन्नृतस्य योनिमा
sanskrit_iast: accʰā samudramindavo 'staṃ gāvo na dʰenavaḥ agmannr̥tasya yonimā

text: Laud Indra, richest of the rich, who ruleth over noblest wealth, Beside the flowing Soma juice!
meaning: अग्न आ याहि वीतये गृणानो हव्यदातये नि होता सत्सि बर्हिषि
sanskrit_iast: agna ā yāhi vītaye gr̥ṇāno havyadātaye ni hotā satsi barhiṣi

text: May he stand near us in our need with all abundance, for our wealth: With strength may he come nigh to us! XI Indra
meaning: तं त्वा समिद्भिरङ्गिरो घृतेन वर्धयामसि बृहच्छोचा यविष्ठ्य
sanskrit_iast: taṃ tvā samidbʰiraṅgiro gʰr̥tena vardʰayāmasi br̥haccʰocā yaviṣṭʰya

text: In every need, in every fray we call, as friends to succour us, Indra, the mightiest of all.
meaning: स नः पृथु श्रवाय्यमच्छा देव विवाससि बृहदग्ने सुवीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: sa naḥ pr̥tʰu śravāyyamaccʰā deva vivāsasi br̥hadagne suvīryam

text: I call him, mighty to resist, the hero of our ancient home, Thee whom my sire invoked of old.
meaning: आ नो मित्रावरुणा घृतैर्गव्यूतिमुक्षतम् मध्वा रजाꣳसि सुक्रतू
sanskrit_iast: ā no mitrāvaruṇā gʰr̥tairgavyūtimukṣatam madʰvā rajām̐si sukratū

text: If he will hear us, let him come with succour of a thousand kinds, With strength and riches, to our call! XI Indra
meaning: उरुशꣳसा नमोवृधा मह्ना दक्षस्य राजथः द्राघिष्ठाभिः शुचिव्रता
sanskrit_iast: uruśam̐sā namovr̥dʰā mahnā dakṣasya rājatʰaḥ drāgʰiṣṭʰābʰiḥ śucivratā

text: When Somas flow thou makest pure, Indra, thy mind that merits laud, For gain of strength that ever grows: for great is he.
meaning: गृणाना जमदग्निना योनावृतस्य सीदतम् पातꣳ सोममृतावृधा
sanskrit_iast: gr̥ṇānā jamadagninā yonāvr̥tasya sīdatam pātam̐ somamr̥tāvr̥dʰā

text: In heaven's first region, in the seat of Gods, is he who brings success, Most glorious, prompt to save, who wins the waterfloods.
meaning: आ याहि सुषुमा हि त इन्द्र सोमं पिबा इमम् एदं बर्हिः सदो मम
sanskrit_iast: ā yāhi suṣumā hi ta indra somaṃ pibā imam edaṃ barhiḥ sado mama

text: Him I invoke, to win the spoil, even mighty Indra for the fray. Be thou most near to us for bliss, a friend to aid! XIII Agni
meaning: आ त्वा ब्रह्मयुजा हरी वहतामिन्द्र केशिना उप ब्रह्माणि नः शृणु
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā brahmayujā harī vahatāmindra keśinā upa brahmāṇi naḥ śr̥ṇu

text: With this mine homage I invoke Agni for you, the Son of Strength. Dear, wisest envoy, skilled in noble sacrifice, immortal, messanger of all.
meaning: ब्रह्माणस्त्वा युजा वयꣳ सोमपामिन्द्र सोमिनः सुतावन्तो हवामहे
sanskrit_iast: brahmāṇastvā yujā vayam̐ somapāmindra sominaḥ sutāvanto havāmahe

text: His two red horses, all-supporting, let him yoke: let him, well-worshipped, urge them fast! Then hath the sacrifice good prayers and happy end, the heavenly gift of wealth to men. XIV Dawn
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी आ गतꣳ सुतं गीर्भिर्नभो वरेण्यम् अस्य पातं धियेषिता
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī ā gatam̐ sutaṃ gīrbʰirnabʰo vareṇyam asya pātaṃ dʰiyeṣitā

text: Advancing, sending forth her rays, the daughter of the Sky is seen. The mighty one lays bare the darkness with her eye, the friendly Lady makes the light.
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी जरितुः सचा यज्ञो जिगाति चेतनः अया पातमिमꣳ सुतम्
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī jarituḥ sacā yajño jigāti cetanaḥ ayā pātamimam̐ sutam

text: The Sun ascending, the refulgent star, pours down his beams. together with the Dawn. O Dawn, at thine arising, and, the Sun's, may we attain the share allotted us! XV Asvins
meaning: इन्द्रमग्निं कविच्छदा यज्ञस्य जूत्या वृणे ता सोमस्येह तृम्पताम्
sanskrit_iast: indramagniṃ kaviccʰadā yajñasya jūtyā vr̥ṇe tā somasyeha tr̥mpatām

text: These morning sacrifices call you, Asvins, at the break of day. For help have I invoked you rich in power and might: for, house by house, ye visit all.
meaning: उच्चा ते जातमन्धसो दिवि सद्भूम्या ददे उग्रꣳ शर्म महि श्रवः
sanskrit_iast: uccā te jātamandʰaso divi sadbʰūmyā dade ugram̐ śarma mahi śravaḥ

text: Ye, heroes, have bestowed wonderful nourishment: send it to him whose songs are sweet. One-minded, both of you, drive your car down to us: drink yethe savoury Soma juice! XVI Soma Pavamana.
meaning: स न इन्द्राय यज्यवे वरुणाय मरुद्भ्यः वरिवोवित्परि स्रव
sanskrit_iast: sa na indrāya yajyave varuṇāya marudbʰyaḥ varivovitpari srava

text: After his ancient splendour, they, the bold, have drawn the bright milk from The Sage who wins a thousand spoils.
meaning: एना विश्वान्यर्य आ द्युम्नानि मानुषाणाम् सिषासन्तो वनामहे
sanskrit_iast: enā viśvānyarya ā dyumnāni mānuṣāṇām siṣāsanto vanāmahe

text: In aspect he is like the Sun: he runneth forward to the lakes: Seven currents flowing to the sky.
meaning: पुनानः सोम धारयापो वसानो अर्षसि आ रत्नधा योनिमृतस्य सीदस्युत्सो देवो हिरण्ययः
sanskrit_iast: punānaḥ soma dʰārayāpo vasāno arṣasi ā ratnadʰā yonimr̥tasya sīdasyutso devo hiraṇyayaḥ

text: He, while they purify him, stands high over all things that exist Soma, a God as Surya is. XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: दुहान ऊधर्दिव्यं मधु प्रियं प्रत्नꣳ सधस्थमासदत् आपृच्छ्यं धरुणं वाज्यर्षसि नृभिर्धौतो विचक्षणः
sanskrit_iast: duhāna ūdʰardivyaṃ madʰu priyaṃ pratnam̐ sadʰastʰamāsadat āpr̥ccʰyaṃ dʰaruṇaṃ vājyarṣasi nr̥bʰirdʰauto vicakṣaṇaḥ

text: By generation long ago this God, engendered for the Gods, Flows tawny to the straining cloth.
meaning: प्र तु द्रव परि कोशं नि षीद नृभिः पुनानो अभि वाजमर्ष अश्वं न त्वा वाजिनं मर्जयन्तो ऽच्छा बर्ही रशनाभिर्नयन्ति
sanskrit_iast: pra tu drava pari kośaṃ ni ṣīda nr̥bʰiḥ punāno abʰi vājamarṣa aśvaṃ na tvā vājinaṃ marjayanto 'ccʰā barhī raśanābʰirnayanti

text: According to primeval plan this poet hath been strengthened by, The sage as God for all the Gods.
meaning: स्वायुधः पवते देव इन्दुरशस्तिहा वृजना रक्षमाणः पिता देवानां जनिता सुदक्षो विष्टम्भो दिवो धरुणः पृथिव्याः
sanskrit_iast: svāyudʰaḥ pavate deva induraśastihā vr̥janā rakṣamāṇaḥ pitā devānāṃ janitā sudakṣo viṣṭambʰo divo dʰaruṇaḥ pr̥tʰivyāḥ

text: Shedding the ancient fiuid thou art poured into the cleansing sieve: Roaring, thou hast produced the Gods. XVIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: ऋषिर्विप्रः पुरएता जनानामृभुर्धीर उशना काव्येन स चिद्विवेद निहितं यदासामपीच्या३ं गुह्यं नाम गोनाम्
sanskrit_iast: r̥ṣirvipraḥ puraetā janānāmr̥bʰurdʰīra uśanā kāvyena sa cidviveda nihitaṃ yadāsāmapīcyā3ṃ guhyaṃ nāma gonām

text: Bring near us those who stand aloof: strike fear into our enemy: O Pavamana, find us wealth!
meaning: अभि त्वा शूर नोनुमो ऽदुग्धा इव धेनवः ईशानमस्य जगतः स्वर्दृशमीशानमिन्द्र तस्थुषः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tvā śūra nonumo 'dugdʰā iva dʰenavaḥ īśānamasya jagataḥ svardr̥śamīśānamindra tastʰuṣaḥ

text: To him the active, nobly born.
meaning: न त्वावाꣳ अन्यो दिव्यो न पार्थिवो न जातो न जनिष्यते अश्वायन्तो मघवन्निन्द्र वाजिनो गव्यन्तस्त्वा हवामहे
sanskrit_iast: na tvāvām̐ anyo divyo na pārtʰivo na jāto na janiṣyate aśvāyanto magʰavannindra vājino gavyantastvā havāmahe

text: Sing ye your songs to him, O men! XIX Soma Pavamana
meaning: कया नश्चित्र आ भुवदूती सदावृधः सखा कया शचिष्ठया वृता
sanskrit_iast: kayā naścitra ā bʰuvadūtī sadāvr̥dʰaḥ sakʰā kayā śaciṣṭʰayā vr̥tā

text: The Somas skilled in song, the waves have led the water forward, like Buffaloes speeding to the woods.
meaning: कस्त्वा सत्यो मदानां मꣳहिष्ठो मत्सदन्धसः दृढा चिदारुजे वसु
sanskrit_iast: kastvā satyo madānāṃ mam̐hiṣṭʰo matsadandʰasaḥ dr̥ḍʰā cidāruje vasu

text: With stream of sacrifice the brown bright drops have flowed with strength in store Of kine into the wooden vats.
meaning: अभी षु णः सखीनामविता जरितॄणाम् शतं भवास्यूतये
sanskrit_iast: abʰī ṣu ṇaḥ sakʰīnāmavitā jaritr̥̄ṇām śataṃ bʰavāsyūtaye

text: To Indra, Vayu. Varuna to Vishnu and the Maruts let The Soma juices flow expressed. XX Soma Pavamana
meaning: तं वो दस्ममृतीषहं वसोर्मन्दानमन्धसः अभि वत्सं न स्वसरेषु धेनव इन्द्रं गीर्भिर्नवामहे
sanskrit_iast: taṃ vo dasmamr̥tīṣahaṃ vasormandānamandʰasaḥ abʰi vatsaṃ na svasareṣu dʰenava indraṃ gīrbʰirnavāmahe

text: O Soma, for the feast of Gods, river-like he hath swelled with surge, Sweet with the liquor of the stalk, as one who wakes, into the vat that drops with meath.
meaning: द्युक्षꣳ सुदानुं तविषीभिरावृतं गिरिं न पुरुभोजसम् क्षुमन्तं वाजꣳ शतिनꣳ सहस्रिणं मक्षू गोमन्तमीमहे
sanskrit_iast: dyukṣam̐ sudānuṃ taviṣībʰirāvr̥taṃ giriṃ na purubʰojasam kṣumantaṃ vājam̐ śatinam̐ sahasriṇaṃ makṣū gomantamīmahe

text: Like a dear son how must be decked, the bright and shining one hath clad him in his robe. Men skilful at their work drive him forth, like a car, into the rivers from their hands. XXI Soma Pavamana
meaning: तरोभिर्वो विदद्वसुमिन्द्रꣳ सबाध ऊतये बृहद्गायन्तः सुतसोमे अध्वरे हुवे भरं न कारिणम्
sanskrit_iast: tarobʰirvo vidadvasumindram̐ sabādʰa ūtaye br̥hadgāyantaḥ sutasome adʰvare huve bʰaraṃ na kāriṇam

text: The rapture-shedding Somas have flowed forth in our assembly, pressed. To glorify our liberal lords.
meaning: न यं दुध्रा वरन्ते न स्थिरा मुरो मदेषु शिप्रमन्धसः य आदृत्या शशमानाय सुन्वते दाता जरित्र उक्थ्यम्
sanskrit_iast: na yaṃ dudʰrā varante na stʰirā muro madeṣu śipramandʰasaḥ ya ādr̥tyā śaśamānāya sunvate dātā jaritra uktʰyam

text: Now like a swan hemaketh all the company sing each his hymm He like steed is bathed in milk.
meaning: स्वादिष्ठया मदिष्ठया पवस्व सोम धारया इन्द्राय पातवे सुतः
sanskrit_iast: svādiṣṭʰayā madiṣṭʰayā pavasva soma dʰārayā indrāya pātave sutaḥ

text: And Trita's maidens onward urge the tawny-coloured with the stones, Indu for Indra, for his drink. XXII Soma Pavamana.
meaning: रक्षोहा विश्वचर्षणिरभि योनिमयोहते द्रोणे सधस्थमासदत्
sanskrit_iast: rakṣohā viśvacarṣaṇirabʰi yonimayohate droṇe sadʰastʰamāsadat

text: Herewith flow on, thou friend of Gods! Singing, thou runnest round the sieve oni every side. The streams of meath have been effused.
meaning: वरिवोधातमो भुवो मꣳहिष्ठो वृत्रहन्तमः पर्षि राधो मघोनाम्
sanskrit_iast: varivodʰātamo bʰuvo mam̐hiṣṭʰo vr̥trahantamaḥ parṣi rādʰo magʰonām

text: Lovely, gold-coloured, on he flows.
meaning: पवस्व मधुमत्तम इन्द्राय सोम क्रतुवित्तमो मदः महि द्युक्षतमो मदः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva madʰumattama indrāya soma kratuvittamo madaḥ mahi dyukṣatamo madaḥ

text: For him who presses, of the juice. I Soma Pavamana
meaning: यस्य ते पीत्वा वृषभो वृषायते ऽस्य पीत्वा स्वर्विदः स सुप्रकेतो अभ्यक्रमीदिषो ऽच्छा वाजं नैतशः
sanskrit_iast: yasya te pītvā vr̥ṣabʰo vr̥ṣāyate 'sya pītvā svarvidaḥ sa supraketo abʰyakramīdiṣo 'ccʰā vājaṃ naitaśaḥ

text: Soma, as leader of the song, flow onward with thy wondrous aid. For holy lore of every sort!
meaning: इन्द्रमच्छ सुता इमे वृषणं यन्तु हरयः श्रुष्टे जातास इन्दवः स्वर्विदः
sanskrit_iast: indramaccʰa sutā ime vr̥ṣaṇaṃ yantu harayaḥ śruṣṭe jātāsa indavaḥ svarvidaḥ

text: Do thou as leader of the song, stirring the waters of the sea, Flow onward, known to all mankind! 1 O Soma, O thou Sage, these worlds stand ready to enhance thy might: The milch-kine run for thy behoof. II Soma Pavamana
meaning: अयं भराय सानसिरिन्द्राय पवते सुतः सोमो जैत्रस्य चेतति यथा विदे
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ bʰarāya sānasirindrāya pavate sutaḥ somo jaitrasya cetati yatʰā vide

text: Indu, flow on, a mighty juice; glorify us among the folk: Drive all our enernies away!
meaning: अस्येदिन्द्रो मदेष्वा ग्राभं गृभ्णाति सानसिम् वज्रं च वृषणं भरत्समप्सुजित्
sanskrit_iast: asyedindro madeṣvā grābʰaṃ gr̥bʰṇāti sānasim vajraṃ ca vr̥ṣaṇaṃ bʰaratsamapsujit

text: And in thy friendship, Indu, most sublime and glorious, may we Subdue all those who war with us!
meaning: पुरोजिती वो अन्धसः सुताय मादयित्नवे अप श्वानꣳ श्नथिष्टन सखायो दीर्घजिह्व्यम्
sanskrit_iast: purojitī vo andʰasaḥ sutāya mādayitnave apa śvānam̐ śnatʰiṣṭana sakʰāyo dīrgʰajihvyam

text: Those awful weapons which thou hast, sharpened at point to strike men down-- Guard us therewith from every foe! III Soma Pavamana
meaning: यो धारया पावकया परिप्रस्यन्दते सुतः इन्दुरश्वो न कृत्व्यः
sanskrit_iast: yo dʰārayā pāvakayā pariprasyandate sutaḥ induraśvo na kr̥tvyaḥ

text: O Soma, thou art strong and bright, potent, O God, with potent sway,
meaning: तं दुरोषमभी नरः सोमं विश्वाच्या धिया यज्ञाय सन्त्वद्रयः
sanskrit_iast: taṃ duroṣamabʰī naraḥ somaṃ viśvācyā dʰiyā yajñāya santvadrayaḥ

text: Steer-strong thy might is like a steer's, steer-strong the wood, steer-strong the juice: A steer indeed, O Steer, art thou.
Thou, Indu, as a vigorous horse, hast neighed together steeds and kine: Unbar for us the doors to wealth! IV Soma Pavamana
meaning: अभि प्रियाणि पवते चनोहितो नामानि यह्वो अधि येषु वर्धते आ सूर्यस्य बृहतो बृहन्नधि रथं विष्वञ्चमरुहद्विचक्षणः ऋतस्य जिह्वा पवते मधु प्रियं वक्ता पतिर्धियो अस्या अदाभ्यः दधाति पुत्रः पित्रोरपीच्या३ं नाम तृतीयमधि रोचनं दिवः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi priyāṇi pavate canohito nāmāni yahvo adʰi yeṣu vardʰate ā sūryasya br̥hato br̥hannadʰi ratʰaṃ viṣvañcamaruhadvicakṣaṇaḥ r̥tasya jihvā pavate madʰu priyaṃ vaktā patirdʰiyo asyā adābʰyaḥ dadʰāti putraḥ pitrorapīcyā3ṃ nāma tr̥tīyamadʰi rocanaṃ divaḥ

text: For thou art strong by splendour: we, O Pavamana call on thee, The brilliant looker on the light.
meaning: अव द्युतानः कलशाꣳ अचिक्रदन्नृभिर्येमाणः कोश आ हिरण्यये अभी ऋतस्य दोहना अनूषताधि त्रिपृष्ठ उषसो वि राजसि
sanskrit_iast: ava dyutānaḥ kalaśām̐ acikradannr̥bʰiryemāṇaḥ kośa ā hiraṇyaye abʰī r̥tasya dohanā anūṣatādʰi tripr̥ṣṭʰa uṣaso vi rājasi

text: When thou art sprinkled with the streams, thou reachest, purified by men, Thy dwelling in the wooden vat.
meaning: यज्ञायज्ञा वो अग्नये गिरागिरा च दक्षसे प्रप्र वयममृतं जातवेदसं प्रियं मित्रं न शꣳसिषम्
sanskrit_iast: yajñāyajñā vo agnaye girāgirā ca dakṣase prapra vayamamr̥taṃ jātavedasaṃ priyaṃ mitraṃ na śam̐siṣam

text: Do thou, rejoicing, nobly-armed! pour upon us heroic strength. O Indu, come thou hitherward! V Soma Pavamana
meaning: ऊर्जो नपातꣳ स हिनायमस्मयुर्दाशेम हव्यदातये भुवद्वाजेष्वविता भुवद्वृध उत त्राता तनूनाम्
sanskrit_iast: ūrjo napātam̐ sa hināyamasmayurdāśema havyadātaye bʰuvadvājeṣvavitā bʰuvadvr̥dʰa uta trātā tanūnām

text: We seek to win thy friendly love, even Pavamana's flowing o'er The limit of the cleansing sieve.
meaning: एह्यू षु ब्रवाणि ते ऽग्न इत्थेतरा गिरः एभिर्वर्धास इन्दुभिः
sanskrit_iast: ehyū ṣu bravāṇi te 'gna ittʰetarā giraḥ ebʰirvardʰāsa indubʰiḥ

text: With those same waves which in their stream o'erflow the purifying sieve, Soma, be gracious unto us!
meaning: यत्र क्व च ते मनो दक्षं दधस उत्तरम् तत्रा योनिं कृणवसे
sanskrit_iast: yatra kva ca te mano dakṣaṃ dadʰasa uttaram tatrā yoniṃ kr̥ṇavase

text: O Soma, being purified, bring us from all sides-for thou canst- Riches and food with hero sons! VI Agni
meaning: न हि ते पूर्तमक्षिपद्भुवन्नेमानां पते अथा दुवो वनवसे
sanskrit_iast: na hi te pūrtamakṣipadbʰuvannemānāṃ pate atʰā duvo vanavase

text: Agni we choose as envoy, skilled performer of this holy rite, Hotar, possessor of all wealth.
meaning: वयमु त्वामपूर्व्य स्थूरं न कच्चिद्भरन्तो ऽवस्यवः वज्रिञ्चित्रꣳ हवामहे
sanskrit_iast: vayamu tvāmapūrvya stʰūraṃ na kaccidbʰaranto 'vasyavaḥ vajriñcitram̐ havāmahe

text: With constant calls they invocate Agni, Agni, Lord of the house, Oblation-bearer, much-beloved
meaning: उप त्वा कर्मन्नूतये स नो युवोग्रश्चक्राम यो धृषत् त्वामिध्यवितारं ववृमहे सखाय इन्द्र सानसिम्
sanskrit_iast: upa tvā karmannūtaye sa no yuvograścakrāma yo dʰr̥ṣat tvāmidʰyavitāraṃ vavr̥mahe sakʰāya indra sānasim

text: Bring the Gods hither, Agni, born for him who trims the Sacred grass: Thou art our Hotar, meet for praise! VII Mitra Varuna
meaning: अधा हीन्द्र गिर्वण उप त्वा काम ईमहे ससृग्महे उदेव ग्मन्त उदभिः
sanskrit_iast: adʰā hīndra girvaṇa upa tvā kāma īmahe sasr̥gmahe udeva gmanta udabʰiḥ

text: Mitra and Varuna we call to drink the draught of Soma juice, Those born endowed with holy strength.
meaning: वार्ण त्वा यव्याभिर्वर्धन्ति शूर ब्रह्माणि ववृध्वाꣳसं चिदद्रिवो दिवेदिवे
sanskrit_iast: vārṇa tvā yavyābʰirvardʰanti śūra brahmāṇi vavr̥dʰvām̐saṃ cidadrivo divedive

text: Those who by Law uphold the Law, Lords of the shining light of Law, Mitra I call, and Varuna.
meaning: पुञ्जन्ति हरी इषिरस्य गाथयोरौ रथ उरुयुगे वचोयुजा इन्द्रवाहा स्वर्विदा
sanskrit_iast: puñjanti harī iṣirasya gātʰayorau ratʰa uruyuge vacoyujā indravāhā svarvidā

text: Let Varuna be our chief defence, let Mitra guard us with all aids, Both make us rich exceedingly! VIII Indra
meaning: पान्तमा वो अन्धस इन्द्रमभि प्र गायत विश्वासाहꣳ शत्क्रतुं मꣳहिष्ठं चर्षणीनाम्
sanskrit_iast: pāntamā vo andʰasa indramabʰi pra gāyata viśvāsāham̐ śatkratuṃ mam̐hiṣṭʰaṃ carṣaṇīnām

text: Indra the singers with high praise, Indra reciters with their lauds, Indra the choirs have glorified.
meaning: पुरुहूतं पुरुष्टुतं गाथान्या३ꣳ सनश्रुतम् इन्द्र इति ब्रवीतन
sanskrit_iast: puruhūtaṃ puruṣṭutaṃ gātʰānyā3m̐ sanaśrutam indra iti bravītana

text: Indra is close to his two bays, with chariot ready at his word, Indra the golden, thunder-armed.
meaning: इन्द्र इन्नो महोनां दाता वाजानां नृतुः महाꣳ अभिज्ञ्वा यमत्
sanskrit_iast: indra inno mahonāṃ dātā vājānāṃ nr̥tuḥ mahām̐ abʰijñvā yamat

text: Help us in battles Indra, in battles where thousand spoils are gained, With awful aids, O awful one!
meaning: प्र व इन्द्राय मादनꣳ हर्यश्वाय गायत सखायः सोमपाव्ने
sanskrit_iast: pra va indrāya mādanam̐ haryaśvāya gāyata sakʰāyaḥ somapāvne

text: Indra raised up the son aloft in heaven, that he may see afar: He burst the mountain for the kine. IX Indra-Agni
meaning: शꣳसेदुक्थꣳ सुदानव उत द्युक्षं यथ नरः चकृमा सत्यराधसे
sanskrit_iast: śam̐seduktʰam̐ sudānava uta dyukṣaṃ yatʰa naraḥ cakr̥mā satyarādʰase

text: To Indra and to Agni we bring reverence high and holy hymn, And, craving help, soft words with prayer.
meaning: त्वं न इन्द्र वाजयुस्त्वं गव्युः शतक्रतो त्वꣳ हिरण्ययुर्वसो
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ na indra vājayustvaṃ gavyuḥ śatakrato tvam̐ hiraṇyayurvaso

text: For all these holy singers thus implore these twain to succour them, And priests that they may win them strength.
meaning: वयमु त्वा तदिदर्था इन्द्र त्वायन्तः सखायः कण्वा उक्थेभिर्जरन्ते
sanskrit_iast: vayamu tvā tadidartʰā indra tvāyantaḥ sakʰāyaḥ kaṇvā uktʰebʰirjarante

text: Eager to laud you, we with songs invoke you, bearing sacred food, Fain for success in sacrifice. X Soma Pavamana
meaning: न घेमन्यदा पपन वज्रिन्नपसो नविष्टौ तवेदु स्तोमैश्चिकेत
sanskrit_iast: na gʰemanyadā papana vajrinnapaso naviṣṭau tavedu stomaiściketa

text: Flow onward, mighty with thy stream, inspiriting the Marut's Lord, Winning all riches with thy power!
meaning: इच्छन्ति देवाः सुन्वन्तं न स्वप्नाय स्पृहयन्ति यन्ति प्रमादमतन्द्राः
sanskrit_iast: iccʰanti devāḥ sunvantaṃ na svapnāya spr̥hayanti yanti pramādamatandrāḥ

text: I send thee forth to battle from the press, O Pavamana, strong, Sustainer, looker on the light!
meaning: इन्द्राय मद्व्ने सुतं परि ष्टोभन्तु नो गिरः अर्कमर्च्चन्तु कारवः
sanskrit_iast: indrāya madvne sutaṃ pari ṣṭobʰantu no giraḥ arkamarccantu kāravaḥ

text: Acknowledged by this song of mine, flow, tawnycoloured, with thy stream: Incite to battle thine ally! XI Soma Pavamana
meaning: यस्मिन्विश्वा अधि श्रियो रणन्ति सप्त सꣳसदः इन्द्रꣳ सुते हवामहे
sanskrit_iast: yasminviśvā adʰi śriyo raṇanti sapta sam̐sadaḥ indram̐ sute havāmahe

text: A Red Bull bellowing to the kine, thou goest, causing the heavens and earth to roar and thunder. A shout is heard like Indra's in the battle: thou flowest on, sending this voice before thee.
meaning: त्रिकद्रुकेषु चेतनं देवासो यज्ञमत्नत तमिद्वर्धन्तु नो गिरः
sanskrit_iast: trikadrukeṣu cetanaṃ devāso yajñamatnata tamidvardʰantu no giraḥ

text: Swelling with milk, abounding in sweet juices, urging the meathrich plant thou goest onward. Making loud clamour, Soma Pavamana, thou flowest when thou art effused for Indra.
meaning: अयं त इन्द्र सोमो निपूतो अधि बर्हिषि एहीमस्य द्रवा पिब
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ ta indra somo nipūto adʰi barhiṣi ehīmasya dravā piba

text: So flow thou on inspiriting, for rapture, turning the weapon of the water's holder! Flow to us wearing thy resplendent colour, effused and eager for the kine. O Soma! XII Indra
meaning: शाचिगो शाचिपूजनायꣳ रणाय ते सुतः आखण्डल प्र हूयसे
sanskrit_iast: śācigo śācipūjanāyam̐ raṇāya te sutaḥ ākʰaṇḍala pra hūyase

text: That we may win us wealth and power we poets verily, call on thee: In war men call on thee, Indra, the hero's Lord, in the steed's race-course call on thee
meaning: यस्ते शृङ्गवृषो णपात्प्रणपात्कुण्डपाय्यः न्यस्मिं दध्र आ मनः
sanskrit_iast: yaste śr̥ṅgavr̥ṣo ṇapātpraṇapātkuṇḍapāyyaḥ nyasmiṃ dadʰra ā manaḥ

text: As such, O wonderful, whose hand holds thunder, praised as mighty, Caster of the Stone! Pour on us boldly, Indra, kine and chariot-steeds, ever to be the conqueror's strength! XIII Indra
meaning: आ तू न इन्द्र क्षुमन्तं चित्रं ग्राभꣳ सं गृभाय महाहस्ति दक्षिणेन
sanskrit_iast: ā tū na indra kṣumantaṃ citraṃ grābʰam̐ saṃ gr̥bʰāya mahāhasti dakṣiṇena

text: To you will I sing Indra's praise who gives good gifts, as we I we know; The praise of Maghavan who, rich in treasure, aids his singers with wealth thousandfold.
meaning: विद्मा हि त्वा तुविकूर्मिं तुविदेष्णं तुवीमघम् तुविमात्रमवोभिः
sanskrit_iast: vidmā hi tvā tuvikūrmiṃ tuvideṣṇaṃ tuvīmagʰam tuvimātramavobʰiḥ

text: As with a hundred hosts, he rushes boldly on, and for the offerer slays his foes. As from a mountain fiow the water-brooks, thus flow his gifts who feedeth many a one. XIV Indra
meaning: न हि त्वा शूर देवा न मर्तासो दित्सन्तम् भीमं न गां वारयन्ते
sanskrit_iast: na hi tvā śūra devā na martāso ditsantam bʰīmaṃ na gāṃ vārayante

text: O Thunderer, zealous worshippers gave thee drink this time yesterday: So, Indra, listen here to him who offers lauds: come near unto our dwelling-place!
meaning: अभि त्वा वृषभा सुते सुतꣳ सृजामि पीतये तृम्पा व्यश्नुही मदम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tvā vr̥ṣabʰā sute sutam̐ sr̥jāmi pītaye tr̥mpā vyaśnuhī madam

text: Lord of bay steeds, fair-helmed, rejoice thee: thee we seek. Here the disposers wait on thee. Thy glories, meet for praise! are highest by the juice, O Indra, lover of the song. XV Soma Pavamana
meaning: मा त्वा मूरा अविष्यवो मोपहस्वान आ दभन् मा कीं ब्रह्मद्विषं वनः
sanskrit_iast: mā tvā mūrā aviṣyavo mopahasvāna ā dabʰan mā kīṃ brahmadviṣaṃ vanaḥ

text: Flow onward with that juice of thine most excellent, that brings delight, Slaying the wicked, dear to Gods!
meaning: इह त्वा गोपरीणसं महे मन्दन्तु राधसे सरो गौरो यथा पिब
sanskrit_iast: iha tvā goparīṇasaṃ mahe mandantu rādʰase saro gauro yatʰā piba

text: Killing the foeman and his hate, and daily winning spoil and strength, Gainer art thou of steeds and kine.
meaning: इदम् वसो सुतमन्धः पिबा सुपूर्णमुदरम् अनाभयिन्ररिमा ते
