sanskrit_iast: idam vaso sutamandʰaḥ pibā supūrṇamudaram anābʰayinrarimā te

text: Red-hued, be blended with the milk that seems to yield its lovely breast, Falcon-like resting in thine home! XVI Soma Pavamana
meaning: नृभिर्धौतः सुतो अश्नैरव्या वारैः परिपूतः अश्वो न निक्तो नदीषु
sanskrit_iast: nr̥bʰirdʰautaḥ suto aśnairavyā vāraiḥ paripūtaḥ aśvo na nikto nadīṣu

text: As Pashan, Fortune, Bhaga, comes this Soma while they make him pure. He, Lord of all the multitude, hath looked upon the earth and heaven.
meaning: तं ते यवं यथा गोभिः स्वादुमकर्म श्रीणन्तः इन्द्र त्वास्मिंत्सधमादे
sanskrit_iast: taṃ te yavaṃ yatʰā gobʰiḥ svādumakarma śrīṇantaḥ indra tvāsmiṃtsadʰamāde

text: The dear cows sang in joyful mood together to the gladdening drink. The drops as they are purified, the Soma juices, make the paths.
meaning: इदꣳ ह्यन्वोजसा सुतꣳ राधानां पते पिबा त्वा३स्य गिर्वणः
sanskrit_iast: idam̐ hyanvojasā sutam̐ rādʰānāṃ pate pibā tvā3sya girvaṇaḥ

text: O Pavamana, bring the juice, the mightiest, worthy to be famed, Which the Five Tribes have over them, whereby we may win opulence! XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: यस्ते अनु स्वधामसत्सुते नि यच्छ तन्वम् स त्वा ममत्तु सोम्यम्
sanskrit_iast: yaste anu svadʰāmasatsute ni yaccʰa tanvam sa tvā mamattu somyam

text: Far-seeing Soma flows, the Steer, the Lord of hymns, the furtherer of days, of mornings, and of heaven. Breath of the rivers, he hath roared into the jars, and with the help of sages entered Indra's heart.
meaning: प्र ते अश्नोतु कुक्ष्योः प्रेन्द्र ब्रह्मणा शिरः प्र बाहू शूर राधसा
sanskrit_iast: pra te aśnotu kukṣyoḥ prendra brahmaṇā śiraḥ pra bāhū śūra rādʰasā

text: On, with the sages, flows the poet on his way, and guided by the men, hath streamed into the vats. He, showing Trita's name, hath caused the meath to flow, increasing Vayu's strength to make him Indra's friend.
meaning: आ त्वेता नि षीदतेन्द्रमभि प्र गायत सखाय स्तोमवाहसः
sanskrit_iast: ā tvetā ni ṣīdatendramabʰi pra gāyata sakʰāya stomavāhasaḥ

text: He, being purified, hath made the mornings shine, and it is he who gave the rivers room to flow. Making the three-times seven pour out the milky stream, Soma, the cheerer, yields whate'er the heart finds sweet. XVIII Indra
meaning: पुरूतमं पुरूणामीशानं वार्याणाम् इन्द्रꣳ सोमे सचा सुते
sanskrit_iast: purūtamaṃ purūṇāmīśānaṃ vāryāṇām indram̐ some sacā sute

text: For so thou art the brave man's friend; a hero, too, art thou, and strong: So may thy heart be won us!
meaning: स घा नो योग आ भुवत्स राये स पुरन्ध्या गमद्वाजेभिरा स नः
sanskrit_iast: sa gʰā no yoga ā bʰuvatsa rāye sa purandʰyā gamadvājebʰirā sa naḥ

text: So hath the offering. wealthiest Lord, been paid by all the worshippers. So dwell thou, Indra, even with us!
meaning: योगेयोगे तवस्तरं वाजेवाजे हवामहे सखाय इन्द्रमूतये
sanskrit_iast: yogeyoge tavastaraṃ vājevāje havāmahe sakʰāya indramūtaye

text: Be not thou like a slothful priest, O Lord of spoil and strength: rejoice In the pressed Soma blent with milk! XIX Indra
meaning: अनु प्रत्नस्यौकसो हुवे तुविप्रतिं नरम् यं ते पूर्वं पिता हुवे
sanskrit_iast: anu pratnasyaukaso huve tuvipratiṃ naram yaṃ te pūrvaṃ pitā huve

text: All sacred songs have magnified Indra expansive as the sea. Best of all warriors borne on cars, the Lord of heroes, Lord of strength.
meaning: आ घा गमद्यदि श्रवत्सहस्रिणीभिरूतिभिः वाजेभिरुप नो हवम्
sanskrit_iast: ā gʰā gamadyadi śravatsahasriṇībʰirūtibʰiḥ vājebʰirupa no havam

text: Lord of might, Indra, may we ne'er, strong in thy friendship, be afraid! We glorify with praises thee, the never conquered conqueror.
meaning: इन्द्र सुतेषु सोमेषु क्रतुं पुनीष उक्थ्यम् विदे वृधस्य दक्षस्य महाꣳ हि षः
sanskrit_iast: indra suteṣu someṣu kratuṃ punīṣa uktʰyam vide vr̥dʰasya dakṣasya mahām̐ hi ṣaḥ

text: The gifts of Indra from of old, his saving succours never fail, When to his worshippers he gives the boon of booty rich in kine. I Soma Pavamana
meaning: स प्रथमे व्योमनि देवानाꣳ सदने वृधः सुपारः सुश्रवस्तमः समप्सुजित्
sanskrit_iast: sa pratʰame vyomani devānām̐ sadane vr̥dʰaḥ supāraḥ suśravastamaḥ samapsujit

text: These rapid Soma-drops have been poured through the purifying sieve. To bring us all felicities.
meaning: तमु हुवे वाजसातय इन्द्रं भराय शुष्मिणम् भवा नः सुम्ने अन्तमः सखा वृधे
sanskrit_iast: tamu huve vājasātaya indraṃ bʰarāya śuṣmiṇam bʰavā naḥ sumne antamaḥ sakʰā vr̥dʰe

text: Dispelling manifold mishap, giving the courser's progeny, Yea, and the warrior steed's, success.
meaning: एना वो अग्निं नमसोर्जो नपातमा हुवे प्रियं चेतिष्ठमरतिꣳ स्वध्वरं विश्वस्य दूतममृतम्
sanskrit_iast: enā vo agniṃ namasorjo napātamā huve priyaṃ cetiṣṭʰamaratim̐ svadʰvaraṃ viśvasya dūtamamr̥tam

text: Bringing prosperity to kine, they pour perpetual strengthening food On us for noble eulogy. II Soma Pavamana.
meaning: स योजते अरुषा विश्वभोजसा स दुद्रवत्स्वाहुतः सुब्रह्मा यज्ञः सुशमी वसूनां देवꣳ राधो जनानाम्
sanskrit_iast: sa yojate aruṣā viśvabʰojasā sa dudravatsvāhutaḥ subrahmā yajñaḥ suśamī vasūnāṃ devam̐ rādʰo janānām

text: King Pavamana is implored with holy songs, on man's behalf, To travel through, the realm of air.
meaning: प्रत्यु अदर्श्यायत्यू३च्छन्ती दुहिता दिवः अपो मही वृणुते चक्षुषा तमो ज्योतिष्कृणोति सूनरी
sanskrit_iast: pratyu adarśyāyatyū3ccʰantī duhitā divaḥ apo mahī vr̥ṇute cakṣuṣā tamo jyotiṣkr̥ṇoti sūnarī

text: Pressed for the banquet of the Gods, O Soma, bring us might,and speed, Like beauty for a'brilliant show!
meaning: उदुस्रियाः सृजते सूर्यः सचा उद्यन्नक्षत्रमर्चिवत् तवेदुषो व्युषि सूर्यस्य च सं भक्तेन गमेमहि
sanskrit_iast: udusriyāḥ sr̥jate sūryaḥ sacā udyannakṣatramarcivat taveduṣo vyuṣi sūryasya ca saṃ bʰaktena gamemahi

text: Bring us, O Indu, hundredfold increase of kine, and noble steeds. The gift of fortune for our help! III Soma Pavamana
meaning: इमा उ वां दिविष्टय उस्रा हवन्ते अश्विना अयं वामह्वे ऽवसे शचीवसू विशंविशꣳ हि गच्छथः
sanskrit_iast: imā u vāṃ diviṣṭaya usrā havante aśvinā ayaṃ vāmahve 'vase śacīvasū viśaṃviśam̐ hi gaccʰatʰaḥ

text: With sacrifice we seek to thee fair cherisher of manly might In mansons of the lofty heavens.
meaning: युवं चित्रं ददथुर्भोजनं नरा चोदेथाꣳ सूनृतावते अर्वाग्रथꣳ समनसा नि यच्छतं पिबतꣳ सोम्यं मधु
sanskrit_iast: yuvaṃ citraṃ dadatʰurbʰojanaṃ narā codetʰām̐ sūnr̥tāvate arvāgratʰam̐ samanasā ni yaccʰataṃ pibatam̐ somyaṃ madʰu

text: Drink gladdening, crusher of the bold, praiseworthy, with most mighty sway, Destroyer of a hundred forts.
meaning: अस्य प्रत्नामनु द्युतꣳ शुक्रं दुदुह्रे अह्रयः पयः सहस्रसामृषिम्
sanskrit_iast: asya pratnāmanu dyutam̐ śukraṃ duduhre ahrayaḥ payaḥ sahasrasāmr̥ṣim

text: Hence riches came to thee, the King, O sapient one: the strong-winged bird, Unwearied, brought thee from the sky.
meaning: अयꣳ सूर्य इवोपदृगयꣳ सराꣳसि धावति सप्त प्रवत आ दिवम्
sanskrit_iast: ayam̐ sūrya ivopadr̥gayam̐ sarām̐si dʰāvati sapta pravata ā divam

text: And now, sent forth, he hath attained to mighty power and majesty, Active and ready to assist.
meaning: अयं विश्वानि तिष्ठति पुनानो भुवनोपरि सोमो देवो न सूर्यः
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ viśvāni tiṣṭʰati punāno bʰuvanopari somo devo na sūryaḥ

text: That each may see the light, the bird brought us the guard of Law, the friend O fall, the speeder through the air. IV Soma Pavamana
meaning: एष प्रत्नेन जन्मना देवो देवेभ्यः सुतः हरिः पवित्रे अर्षति
sanskrit_iast: eṣa pratnena janmanā devo devebʰyaḥ sutaḥ hariḥ pavitre arṣati

text: For food, flow onward with thy stream, cleansed and made bright by sapient men: Indu, with sheen approach the milk!
meaning: एष प्रत्नेन मन्मना देवो देवेभ्यस्परि कविर्विप्रेण वावृधे
sanskrit_iast: eṣa pratnena manmanā devo devebʰyaspari kavirvipreṇa vāvr̥dʰe

text: While thou art cleansed, song-lover. bring comfort and vigourto the folk, Poured, tawny one! on milk and curds!
meaning: दुहानः प्रत्नमित्पयः पवित्रे परि षिच्यसे क्रन्दं देवाꣳ अजीजनः
sanskrit_iast: duhānaḥ pratnamitpayaḥ pavitre pari ṣicyase krandaṃ devām̐ ajījanaḥ

text: Purified for feast of Gods, go thou to Indra's resting-place, Resplendent, furthered by the strong! V Agni.
meaning: उप शिक्षापतस्थुषो भियसमा धेहि शत्रवे पवमान विदा रयिम्
sanskrit_iast: upa śikṣāpatastʰuṣo bʰiyasamā dʰehi śatrave pavamāna vidā rayim

text: By Agni Agni is inflamed, Lord of the house, wise, young,. who bears Our gifts: the ladle is his mouth.
meaning: उषो षु जातमप्तुरं गोभिर्भङ्गं परिष्कृतम् इन्दुं देवा अयासिषुः
sanskrit_iast: uṣo ṣu jātamapturaṃ gobʰirbʰaṅgaṃ pariṣkr̥tam induṃ devā ayāsiṣuḥ

text: God, Agni, be his sure defence who, lord of sacrificial gifts. Worshippeth thee the messenger.
meaning: उपास्मै गायता नरः पवमानायेन्दवे अभि देवाꣳ इयक्षते
sanskrit_iast: upāsmai gāyatā naraḥ pavamānāyendave abʰi devām̐ iyakṣate

text: Be gracious, brilliant Godl to him who, rich in sacred gifts,would fain Call Agni to the feast of Gods! VI Mitra Varuna
meaning: प्र सोमासो विपश्चितो ऽपो नयन्त ऊर्मयः वनानि महिषा इव
sanskrit_iast: pra somāso vipaścito 'po nayanta ūrmayaḥ vanāni mahiṣā iva

text: Mitra of holy strength I call, and foe-destroying Varuna, Who perfect prayer with offered oil.
meaning: अभि द्रोणानि बभ्रवः शुक्रा ऋतस्य धारया वाजं गोमन्तमक्षरन्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi droṇāni babʰravaḥ śukrā r̥tasya dʰārayā vājaṃ gomantamakṣaran

text: By Law, O Mitra, Varuna, Law-strengtheners who cleave to Law, Have ye obtained your lofty power.
meaning: सुता इन्द्राय वायवे वरुणाय मरुद्भ्यः सोमा अर्षन्तु विष्णवे
sanskrit_iast: sutā indrāya vāyave varuṇāya marudbʰyaḥ somā arṣantu viṣṇave

text: The Sages, Mitra, Varuna, of wide dominion, mighty ones, Bestow on us effectual strength. VII Maruts
meaning: प्र सोम देववीतये सिन्धुर्न पिप्ये अर्णसा अꣳशोः पयसा मदिरो न जागृविरच्छा कोशं मधुश्चुतम्
sanskrit_iast: pra soma devavītaye sindʰurna pipye arṇasā am̐śoḥ payasā madiro na jāgr̥viraccʰā kośaṃ madʰuścutam

text: So mayst thou verily be seen coming with fearless Indra: both Of equal splendour, bringing bliss!
meaning: आ हर्यतो अर्जुनो अत्के अव्यत प्रियः सूनुर्न मर्ज्यः तमीꣳ हिन्वन्त्यपसो यथा रथं नदीष्वा गभस्त्योः
sanskrit_iast: ā haryato arjuno atke avyata priyaḥ sūnurna marjyaḥ tamīm̐ hinvantyapaso yatʰā ratʰaṃ nadīṣvā gabʰastyoḥ

text: Thereafter they, as is their wont, resumed the state of new-born babes, Taking their sacrificial name.
meaning: प्र सोमासो मदच्युतः श्रवसे नो मघोनाम् सुता विदथे अक्रमुः
sanskrit_iast: pra somāso madacyutaḥ śravase no magʰonām sutā vidatʰe akramuḥ

text: Thou, Indra, with the rapid Gods who shatter even what is firm, Even in the cave didst find the cows. VIII Indra-Agni
meaning: आदीꣳ हꣳसो यथा गणं विश्वस्यावीवशन्मतिम् अत्यो न गोभिरज्यते
sanskrit_iast: ādīm̐ ham̐so yatʰā gaṇaṃ viśvasyāvīvaśanmatim atyo na gobʰirajyate

text: I call the twain whose deed wrought here hath all been famed in ancient time: Indra and Agni harm us not!
meaning: आदीं त्रितस्य योषणो हरिꣳ हिन्वन्त्यद्रिभिः इन्दुमिन्द्राय पीतये
sanskrit_iast: ādīṃ tritasya yoṣaṇo harim̐ hinvantyadribʰiḥ indumindrāya pītaye

text: The strong, the scatterers of the foe, Indra and Agni we invoke: May they be kind to one like me:
meaning: अया पवस्व देवयु रेभन्पवित्रं पर्येषि विश्वतः मधोर्धारा असृक्षत
sanskrit_iast: ayā pavasva devayu rebʰanpavitraṃ paryeṣi viśvataḥ madʰordʰārā asr̥kṣata

text: Ye slay our Arya foes, O Lords of heroes, slay our Dasa foes: Ye drive all enemies away. IX Soma Pavamana.
meaning: पवते हर्यतो हरिरति ह्वराꣳसि रꣳह्या अभ्यर्ष स्तोतृभ्यो वीरवद्यशः
sanskrit_iast: pavate haryato harirati hvarām̐si ram̐hyā abʰyarṣa stotr̥bʰyo vīravadyaśaḥ

text: The living drops of Soma juice pour, as they flow the gladdening drink, Intelligent drops above the station of the sea, exhilarating, dropping meath.
meaning: प्र सुन्वानास्यान्धसो मर्तो न वष्ट तद्वचः अप श्वानमराधसꣳ हता मखं न भृगवः
sanskrit_iast: pra sunvānāsyāndʰaso marto na vaṣṭa tadvacaḥ apa śvānamarādʰasam̐ hatā makʰaṃ na bʰr̥gavaḥ

text: May Pavamana, King and God, speed with his wave over the sea the lofty rite! Do thou by Mitra's and by Varuna's decree flow furthering the lofty rite:
meaning: पवस्व वाचो अग्रियः सोम चित्राभिरूतिभिः अभि विश्वानि काव्या
sanskrit_iast: pavasva vāco agriyaḥ soma citrābʰirūtibʰiḥ abʰi viśvāni kāvyā

text: Far-seeing, lovely, guided by the men, the God whose habitation is the sea! X Soma Pavamana
meaning: त्वꣳ समुद्रिया अपो ऽग्रियो वाच ईरयन् पवस्व विश्वचर्षणे
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ samudriyā apo 'griyo vāca īrayan pavasva viśvacarṣaṇe

text: Three are the voices that the car-steed utters: he speaks the lore of prayer, the thought of Order. To the cows' master come the cows inquiring: the hymns with eager longing come to Soma.
meaning: तुभ्येमा भुवना कवे महिम्ने सोम तस्थिरे तुभ्यं धावन्ति धेनवः
sanskrit_iast: tubʰyemā bʰuvanā kave mahimne soma tastʰire tubʰyaṃ dʰāvanti dʰenavaḥ

text: To Soma come the cows, the milch-kine longing, to Soma sages with their hymns inquiring. Soma, effused, is purified and lauded: our hymns and Trishtup songs unite in Soma.
meaning: पवस्वेन्दो वृषा सुतः कृधी नो यशसो जने विश्वा अप द्विषो जहि
sanskrit_iast: pavasvendo vr̥ṣā sutaḥ kr̥dʰī no yaśaso jane viśvā apa dviṣo jahi

text: Thus, Soma, as we pour thee into vessels, while thou art purified, flow for our welfare! Pass into Indra. with great joy and rapture: make the voice swell, and generate abundance! XI Indra
meaning: यस्य ते सख्ये वयꣳ सासह्याम पृतन्यतः तवेन्दो द्युम्न उत्तमे
sanskrit_iast: yasya te sakʰye vayam̐ sāsahyāma pr̥tanyataḥ tavendo dyumna uttame

text: O Indra, if a hundred heavens and if a hundred earths were thine,-- No, not a hundred suns could match thee at thy birth, not both the worlds, O Thunderer.
meaning: या ते भीमान्यायुधा तिग्मानि सन्ति धूर्वणे रक्षा समस्य नो निदः
sanskrit_iast: yā te bʰīmānyāyudʰā tigmāni santi dʰūrvaṇe rakṣā samasya no nidaḥ

text: Thou, hero, hast performed thy hero deeds with might, yea, all with strength, O strongest one. Maghavan, help us to a stable full of kine, O Thunderer, with wondrous aids! XII Indra
meaning: वृषा सोम द्युमाꣳ असि वृषा देव वृषव्रतः वृषा धर्माणि दध्रिषे
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā soma dyumām̐ asi vr̥ṣā deva vr̥ṣavrataḥ vr̥ṣā dʰarmāṇi dadʰriṣe

text: We compass thee like water, we whose grass is trimmed and Soma pressed. Here where the filter pours its stream, thy worshippers round thee, O Vritra-slayer, sit.
meaning: वृष्णस्ते वृष्ण्यꣳ शवो वृषा वनं वृषा सुतः स त्वं वृषन्वृषेदसि
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣṇaste vr̥ṣṇyam̐ śavo vr̥ṣā vanaṃ vr̥ṣā sutaḥ sa tvaṃ vr̥ṣanvr̥ṣedasi

text: Men, Vasu! by the Soma with lauds call thee to the foremost place. When cometh he athirst unto the juice as home, O Indra, like a bellowing bull?
meaning: अश्वो न चक्रदो वृषा सं गा इन्दो समर्वतः वि नो राये दुरो वृधि
sanskrit_iast: aśvo na cakrado vr̥ṣā saṃ gā indo samarvataḥ vi no rāye duro vr̥dʰi

text: O valiant hero, boldly win thousandfold spoil with Kanva's sons! O active Maghavan, with eager prayer we crave the yellowhued with store of kine. XIII Indra
meaning: वृषा ह्यसि भानुना द्युमन्तं त्वा हवामहे पवमान स्वर्दृशम्
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā hyasi bʰānunā dyumantaṃ tvā havāmahe pavamāna svardr̥śam

text: With Plenty for his true ally the active man will gain the spoil. Your Indra, much-invoked, I bend with song, as bends a wright his wheel of solid wood.
meaning: यदद्भिः परिशिच्यसे मर्मृज्यमान आयुभिः द्रोणे सधस्थमश्नुषे
sanskrit_iast: yadadbʰiḥ pariśicyase marmr̥jyamāna āyubʰiḥ droṇe sadʰastʰamaśnuṣe

text: They who bestow great riches love not paltry praise: wealth comes not to the niggard churl. Light is the task to give, O Maghavan, to one like me on the decisive day. XIV Soma Pavamana
meaning: आ पवस्व सुवीर्यं मन्दमानः स्वायुध इहो ष्विन्दवा गहि
sanskrit_iast: ā pavasva suvīryaṃ mandamānaḥ svāyudʰa iho ṣvindavā gahi

text: Three several words are uttered: kine are lowing cows. who give the milk: The tawny-hued goes bellowing on.
meaning: पवमानस्य ते वयं पवित्रमभ्युन्दतः सखित्वमा वृणीमहे
sanskrit_iast: pavamānasya te vayaṃ pavitramabʰyundataḥ sakʰitvamā vr̥ṇīmahe

text: The young and sacred mothers of the holy rite have uttered praise, Embellishing the Child of Heaven.
meaning: ये ते पवित्रमूर्मयो ऽभिक्षरन्ति धारया तेभिर्नः सोम मृडय
sanskrit_iast: ye te pavitramūrmayo 'bʰikṣaranti dʰārayā tebʰirnaḥ soma mr̥ḍaya

text: From every side, O Soma, for our profit, pour thou forth four seas. Filled full of riches thousandfold! XV Soma Pavamana
meaning: स नः पुनान आ भर रयिं वीरवतीमिषम् ईशानः सोम विश्वतः
sanskrit_iast: sa naḥ punāna ā bʰara rayiṃ vīravatīmiṣam īśānaḥ soma viśvataḥ

text: The Somas, very rich in sweets, for which the sieve is distined, flow Effused, the source of Indra's joy: may you strong juices reach the Gods!
meaning: अग्निं दूतं वृणीमहे होतारं विश्ववेदसम् अस्य यज्ञस्य सुक्रतुम्
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ dūtaṃ vr̥ṇīmahe hotāraṃ viśvavedasam asya yajñasya sukratum

text: Indu flows on for Indra's sake,-thus have the deities declared. The Lord of Speech exerts himself, controller of all power and might.
meaning: अग्निमग्निꣳ हवीमभिः सदा हवन्त विश्पतिम् हव्यवाहं पुरुप्रियम्
sanskrit_iast: agnimagnim̐ havīmabʰiḥ sadā havanta viśpatim havyavāhaṃ purupriyam

text: Inciter of the voice of song, with thousand streams the ocean flows. Even Soma, Lord of opulence, the friend of Indra, day by day. XVI Soma Pavamana
meaning: अग्ने देवाꣳ इहा वह जज्ञानो वृक्तबर्हिषे असि होता न ईड्यः
sanskrit_iast: agne devām̐ ihā vaha jajñāno vr̥ktabarhiṣe asi hotā na īḍyaḥ

text: SPREAD is thy cleansing filter, Brahmanaspati: as prince thou enterest its limbs from every side. The raw; whose mass bath not been heated. gains not this: they only which are dressed, which bear, attain to it.
meaning: मित्रं वयꣳ हवामहे वरुणꣳ सोमपीतये या जाता पूतदक्षसा
sanskrit_iast: mitraṃ vayam̐ havāmahe varuṇam̐ somapītaye yā jātā pūtadakṣasā

text: High in the seat of heaven is placed the scorcher's sieve: its, threads are standing separate, glittering with light. The swift ones favour him who purifieth this: with brilliancy they mount up to the height of heaven.
meaning: ऋतेन यावृतावृधावृतस्य ज्योतिषस्पती ता मित्रावरुणा हुवे
sanskrit_iast: r̥tena yāvr̥tāvr̥dʰāvr̥tasya jyotiṣaspatī tā mitrāvaruṇā huve

text: The foremost spotted Steer bath made the Mornings shine: he bellows, fain for war, among created things. By his high wisdom have the mighty Sages wrought: the Fathers who behold mankind laid down the germ. XVII Agni
meaning: वरुणः प्राविता भुवन्मित्रो विश्वाभिरूतिभिः करतां नः सुराधसः
sanskrit_iast: varuṇaḥ prāvitā bʰuvanmitro viśvābʰirūtibʰiḥ karatāṃ naḥ surādʰasaḥ

text: Sing forth to him, the holy, most munificent, sublime with his refulgent glow, To Agni, ye Upastutas
meaning: इन्द्रमिद्गाथिनो बृहदिन्द्रमर्केभिरर्किणः इन्द्रं वाणीरनूषत
sanskrit_iast: indramidgātʰino br̥hadindramarkebʰirarkiṇaḥ indraṃ vāṇīranūṣata

text: Worshipped with gifts, enkindled, splendid, Maghavan shall win himself heroic fame: And will not his more plentiful benevolence come to us with abundant strength? XVIII Indra
meaning: इन्द्र इद्धर्योः सचा सम्मिश्ल आ वचोयुजा इन्द्रो वज्री हिरण्ययः
sanskrit_iast: indra iddʰaryoḥ sacā sammiśla ā vacoyujā indro vajrī hiraṇyayaḥ

text: We sing this strong and wild delight of thine which conquers in the fray, Which, Caster of the Stone! gives room and shines like gold.
meaning: इन्द्र वाजेषु नो ऽव सहस्रप्रधनेषु च उग्र उग्राभिरूतिभिः
sanskrit_iast: indra vājeṣu no 'va sahasrapradʰaneṣu ca ugra ugrābʰirūtibʰiḥ

text: Wherewith thou foundest shining lights for Ayu and for Manu's sake: Now joying in this sacred grass thou bearnest forth.
meaning: इन्द्रो दीर्धाय चक्षस आ सूर्यꣳ रोहयद्दिवि वि गोभिरद्रिमैरयत्
sanskrit_iast: indro dīrdʰāya cakṣasa ā sūryam̐ rohayaddivi vi gobʰiradrimairayat

text: This day too singers of the hymn praise, as of old, this might of thine: Win thou the waters every day, thralls of the strong! XIX Indra
meaning: इन्द्रे अग्ना नमो बृहत्सुवृक्तिमेरयामहे धिया धेना अवस्यवः
sanskrit_iast: indre agnā namo br̥hatsuvr̥ktimerayāmahe dʰiyā dʰenā avasyavaḥ

text: O Indra, hear Tirschi's call, the call of him who serveth thee. Satisfy him with wealth of kine and valient offspring! Great art thou.
meaning: ता हि शश्वन्त ईडत इत्था विप्रास ऊतये सबाधो वाजसातये
sanskrit_iast: tā hi śaśvanta īḍata ittʰā viprāsa ūtaye sabādʰo vājasātaye

text: For he, O Indra, hath produced for thee the newest gladdening song, A hymn that springs from careful drop thought, ancient and full of sacred truth.
meaning: ता वां गीर्भिर्विपन्युवः प्रयस्वन्तो हवामहे मेधसाता सनिष्यवः
sanskrit_iast: tā vāṃ gīrbʰirvipanyuvaḥ prayasvanto havāmahe medʰasātā saniṣyavaḥ

text: That Indra will we laud whom songs and hymns of praise have magnified. Striving to win, we celebrate his many deeds of hero might. I Soma Pavamana

Fleet as swift steeds thy cows celestial have been poured, O Pavamana, with the milk into the vat. Sages who make thee bright, O friend whom Rishis love, have shed continuous streams from out the realm of air.
meaning: वृषा पवस्व धारया मरुत्वते च मत्सरः विश्वा दधान ओजसा ՙ चोम्परे दिश्वा तं त्वा धर्त्तारमोण्यो३ः पवमान स्वर्दृशम् हिन्वे वाजेषु वाजिनम्
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā pavasva dʰārayā marutvate ca matsaraḥ viśvā dadʰāna ojasā ՙ compare diśvā taṃ tvā dʰarttāramoṇyo3ḥ pavamāna svardr̥śam hinve vājeṣu vājinam

text: The beams of Pavamana, sent from earth and heaven his ensigns who is ever stedfast, travel round. When on the sieve the golden-hued is cleansed he rests within the jars as one who seats him in his place.
meaning: अया चित्तो विपानया हरिः पवस्व धारया युजं वाजेषु चोदय
sanskrit_iast: ayā citto vipānayā hariḥ pavasva dʰārayā yujaṃ vājeṣu codaya

text: O thou who seest all things, sovran as thou art and passing strong, thy rays encompass every form. Pervading with thy natural powers thou flowest on, and as the whole world's Lord, O Soma, thou art King. II Soma Pavamana
meaning: वृषा शोणो अभिकनिक्रदद्गा नदयन्नेषि पृथिवीमुत द्याम् इन्द्रस्येव वग्नुरा शृण्व आजौ प्रचोदयन्नर्षसि वाचमेमाम्
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā śoṇo abʰikanikradadgā nadayanneṣi pr̥tʰivīmuta dyām indrasyeva vagnurā śr̥ṇva ājau pracodayannarṣasi vācamemām

text: From heaven hath Pavamana, made, as 'twere, the marvellous thunder, and The lofty light of all mankind.
meaning: रसाय्यः पयसा पिन्वमान ईरयन्नेषि मधुमन्तमꣳशुम् पवमान सन्तनिमेषि कृण्वन्निन्द्राय सोम परिषिच्यमानः
sanskrit_iast: rasāyyaḥ payasā pinvamāna īrayanneṣi madʰumantamam̐śum pavamāna santanimeṣi kr̥ṇvannindrāya soma pariṣicyamānaḥ

text: The gladdening and auspicious juice of thee, O Pavamana, King! Flows o'cr the woollen straining-cloth.
meaning: एवा पवस्व मदिरो मदायोदग्राभस्य नमयन्वधस्नुम् परि वर्णं भरमाणो रुशन्तं गव्युर्नो अर्ष परि सोम सिक्तः
sanskrit_iast: evā pavasva madiro madāyodagrābʰasya namayanvadʰasnum pari varṇaṃ bʰaramāṇo ruśantaṃ gavyurno arṣa pari soma siktaḥ

text: Thy juice, O Pavamana, sends its rays abroad fixe splendid skill, Like lustre, all heaven's light, to see. III Soma Pavamana
meaning: त्वामिद्धि हवामहे सातौ वाजस्य कारवः त्वां वृत्रेष्विन्द्र सत्पतिं नरस्त्वां काष्ठास्वर्वतः
sanskrit_iast: tvāmiddʰi havāmahe sātau vājasya kāravaḥ tvāṃ vr̥treṣvindra satpatiṃ narastvāṃ kāṣṭʰāsvarvataḥ

text: Impetuous, bright, have they come forth, unwearied in their speed, like bulls, Driving the black skin far away.
meaning: स त्वं नश्चित्र वज्रहस्त धृष्णुया मह स्तवानो अद्रिवः गामश्वꣳ रथ्यमिन्द्र सं किर सत्रा वाजं न जिग्युषे
sanskrit_iast: sa tvaṃ naścitra vajrahasta dʰr̥ṣṇuyā maha stavāno adrivaḥ gāmaśvam̐ ratʰyamindra saṃ kira satrā vājaṃ na jigyuṣe

text: May we attain the bridge of bliss, leaving the bridge of woe behind: The riteless Dasa may we quell!
meaning: अभि प्र वः सुराधसमिन्द्रमर्च यथा विदे यो जरितृभ्यो मघवा पुरूवसुः सहस्रेणेव शिक्षति
sanskrit_iast: abʰi pra vaḥ surādʰasamindramarca yatʰā vide yo jaritr̥bʰyo magʰavā purūvasuḥ sahasreṇeva śikṣati

text: The mighty Pavamana's roar is heard as 'twere the rush of rain The lightning-Rashes move in heaven.
meaning: शतानीकेव प्र जिगाति धृष्णुया हन्ति वृत्राणि दाशुषे गिरेरिव प्र रसा अस्य पिन्विरे दत्राणि पुरुभोजसः
sanskrit_iast: śatānīkeva pra jigāti dʰr̥ṣṇuyā hanti vr̥trāṇi dāśuṣe gireriva pra rasā asya pinvire datrāṇi purubʰojasaḥ

text: Indu, pour out abundant food with store of cattle and of gold, Of heroes, Soma! and of steeds!
meaning: त्वामिदा ह्यो नरो ऽपीप्यन्वज्रिन्भूर्णयः स इन्द्र स्तोमवाहस इह श्रुध्युप स्वसरमा गहि
sanskrit_iast: tvāmidā hyo naro 'pīpyanvajrinbʰūrṇayaḥ sa indra stomavāhasa iha śrudʰyupa svasaramā gahi

text: Flow onward, dear to all mankind fi full the mighty heaven and earth, As Dawn, as Surya with his beams
meaning: मत्स्वा सुशिप्रिन्हरिवस्तमीमहे त्वया भूषन्ति वेधसः तव श्रवाꣳस्युपमान्युक्थ्य सुतेष्विन्द्र गिर्वणः
sanskrit_iast: matsvā suśiprinharivastamīmahe tvayā bʰūṣanti vedʰasaḥ tava śravām̐syupamānyuktʰya suteṣvindra girvaṇaḥ

text: On every side, O Soma, flow round us with thy protecting stream, As Rasa flows around the world! IV Soma Pavamana
meaning: यस्ते मदो वरेण्यस्तेना पवस्वान्धसा देवावीरघशꣳसहा
sanskrit_iast: yaste mado vareṇyastenā pavasvāndʰasā devāvīragʰaśam̐sahā

text: Flow on, O thou of lofty thought, flow swift in thy beloved form, Saying, I go where dwell the Gods.
meaning: जघ्निर्वृत्रममित्रियꣳ सस्निर्वाजं दिवेदिवे गोषातिरश्वसा असि
sanskrit_iast: jagʰnirvr̥tramamitriyam̐ sasnirvājaṃ divedive goṣātiraśvasā asi

text: Preparing what is unprepared, and bringing store of food to man, Make thou the rain descend from heaven
meaning: संमिश्लो अरुषो भुवः सूपस्थाभिर्न धेनुभि सीदं च्छ्येनो न योनिमा
sanskrit_iast: saṃmiślo aruṣo bʰuvaḥ sūpastʰābʰirna dʰenubʰi sīdaṃ ccʰyeno na yonimā

text: Even here is he who, swift of course, hath with the river's wave Rowed down. From heaven upon the straining cloth.
meaning: अयं पूषा रयिर्भगः सोमः पुनानो अर्षति पतिर्विश्वस्य भूमनो व्यख्यद्रोदसी उभे
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ pūṣā rayirbʰagaḥ somaḥ punāno arṣati patirviśvasya bʰūmano vyakʰyadrodasī ubʰe

text: With might. producing glare, the juice enters the purifying sieve, Far-seeing, sending forth its light.
meaning: समु प्रिया अनूषत गावो मदाय घृष्वयः सोमासः कृण्वते पथः पवमानास इन्दवः
sanskrit_iast: samu priyā anūṣata gāvo madāya gʰr̥ṣvayaḥ somāsaḥ kr̥ṇvate patʰaḥ pavamānāsa indavaḥ

text: Inviting him from far away, and even from near at hand, the juice For Indra is poured forth as meath.
meaning: य ओजिष्ठस्तमा भर पवमान श्रवाय्यम् यः पञ्च चर्षणीरभि रयिं येन वनामहे
sanskrit_iast: ya ojiṣṭʰastamā bʰara pavamāna śravāyyam yaḥ pañca carṣaṇīrabʰi rayiṃ yena vanāmahe

text: In union they have sung the hymn: with stones they urge the golden-hued, Indu for Indra, for his drink. V Soma Pavamana
meaning: वृषा मतीनां पवते विचक्षणः सोमो अह्नां प्रतरीतोषसां दिवः प्राणा सिन्धूनां कलशाꣳ अचिक्रददिन्द्रस्य हार्द्याविशन्मनीषिभिः
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā matīnāṃ pavate vicakṣaṇaḥ somo ahnāṃ pratarītoṣasāṃ divaḥ prāṇā sindʰūnāṃ kalaśām̐ acikradadindrasya hārdyāviśanmanīṣibʰiḥ

text: The glittering maids send Sdra forth, the glorious sisters, closeallied, Send Indu forth, their mighty Lord.
meaning: मनीषिभिः पवते पूर्व्यः कविर्नृभिर्यतः परि कोशाꣳ असिष्यदत् त्रितस्य नाम जनयन्मधु क्षरन्निन्द्रस्य वायूꣳ सख्याय वर्धयन्
sanskrit_iast: manīṣibʰiḥ pavate pūrvyaḥ kavirnr̥bʰiryataḥ pari kośām̐ asiṣyadat tritasya nāma janayanmadʰu kṣarannindrasya vāyūm̐ sakʰyāya vardʰayan

text: Pervade, O Pavamana, all our treasures with repeated light, Pressed out, O God thyself, for Gods!
meaning: अयं पुनान उषसो अरोचयदयꣳ सिन्धुभ्यो अभवदु लोककृत् अयं त्रिः सप्त दुदुहान आशिरꣳ सोमो हृदे पवते चारु मत्सरः
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ punāna uṣaso arocayadayam̐ sindʰubʰyo abʰavadu lokakr̥t ayaṃ triḥ sapta duduhāna āśiram̐ somo hr̥de pavate cāru matsaraḥ

text: Pour on us, Pavamana! rain, as service and fair praise for Gods: Pour forth unceasingly for food! VI Agni
meaning: एवा ह्यसि वीरयुरेवा शूर उत स्थिरह् एवा ते राध्यं मनः
sanskrit_iast: evā hyasi vīrayurevā śūra uta stʰirah evā te rādʰyaṃ manaḥ

text: The watchful guardian of the people hath been born, Agni, the very strong, for fresh prosperity. With oil upon his face. with high heaven-touching flame, he shineth splendidly, pure, for the Bharatas.
meaning: एवा रातिस्तुवीमघ विश्वेभिर्धायि धातृभिः अधा चिदिन्द्र नः सचा
sanskrit_iast: evā rātistuvīmagʰa viśvebʰirdʰāyi dʰātr̥bʰiḥ adʰā cidindra naḥ sacā

text: O Agni, the Angirasas discovered thee what time thou layest hidden, fleeing back from wood to wood. Thou by attrition art produced as conquering might, and men, O Angiras, call thee the Son of Strength.
meaning: मो षु ब्रह्मेव तदिन्द्रयुर्भुवो वाजानां पते मत्स्वा सुतस्य गोमतः
sanskrit_iast: mo ṣu brahmeva tadindrayurbʰuvo vājānāṃ pate matsvā sutasya gomataḥ

text: The men enkindle Agni in his threefold seat, ensign of sacrifice, the earliest bousehold-priest. With Indra and the Gods together on the grass let the wise priest sit to complete the sacrifice! VII Mitra-Varuna
meaning: इन्द्रं विश्वा अवीवृधन्त्समुद्रव्यचसं गिरः रथीतमꣳ रथीनां वाजानाꣳ सत्पतिं पतिम्
sanskrit_iast: indraṃ viśvā avīvr̥dʰantsamudravyacasaṃ giraḥ ratʰītamam̐ ratʰīnāṃ vājānām̐ satpatiṃ patim

text: This Soma hath been pressed for you, Low-strengtheners, Mitra, Varuna! List, list ye here to this may call!
meaning: सख्ये त इन्द्र वाजिनो मा भेम शवसस्पते त्वामभि प्र नोनुमो जेतारमपराजितम्
sanskrit_iast: sakʰye ta indra vājino mā bʰema śavasaspate tvāmabʰi pra nonumo jetāramaparājitam

text: Both Kings who never injure aught have come to their sublimest home, The thousand-pillared, firmly based.
meaning: पूर्वीरिन्द्रस्य रातयो न वि दस्यन्त्यूतयः यदा वाजस्य गोमत स्तोतृभ्यो मꣳहते मघम्
sanskrit_iast: pūrvīrindrasya rātayo na vi dasyantyūtayaḥ yadā vājasya gomata stotr̥bʰyo mam̐hate magʰam

text: Worshipped with fat libation. Lords of gifts, Adityas, sovran Kings, They wait on him whose life is true. VIII Indra
meaning: एत असृग्रमिन्दवस्तिरः पवित्रमाशवः विश्वान्यभि सौभगा
sanskrit_iast: eta asr̥gramindavastiraḥ pavitramāśavaḥ viśvānyabʰi saubʰagā

text: Armed with the bones of dead Dadhyach, Indra with unresisted. might The nine-and-ninety Vritras slew.
meaning: विघ्नन्तो दुरिता पुरु सुगा तोकाय वाजिनः त्मना कृण्वन्तो अर्वतः
sanskrit_iast: vigʰnanto duritā puru sugā tokāya vājinaḥ tmanā kr̥ṇvanto arvataḥ

text: He, searching for the horse's head that in the mountains lay concealed, Found it in Saryandvdn lake.
meaning: कृण्वन्तो वरिवो गवे ऽभ्यर्षन्ति सुष्टुतिम् इडामस्मभ्यꣳ संयतम्
sanskrit_iast: kr̥ṇvanto varivo gave 'bʰyarṣanti suṣṭutim iḍāmasmabʰyam̐ saṃyatam

text: Then straight they recognized the mystic name of the creative Steer. There in the mansion of the Moon. IX Indra Agni I. As rain from out the cloud, for you, Indra and Agni, from my thought This noblest praise hath been produced.
meaning: राजा मेधाभिरीयते पवमानो मनावधि अन्तरिक्षेण यातवे
sanskrit_iast: rājā medʰābʰirīyate pavamāno manāvadʰi antarikṣeṇa yātave

text: Indra and Agni, listen to the singer's call: accept his songs. Fulfil, ye mighty Lords, his prayers!
meaning: आ नः सोम सहो जुवो रूपं न वर्चसे भर सुष्वाणो देववीतये
sanskrit_iast: ā naḥ soma saho juvo rūpaṃ na varcase bʰara suṣvāṇo devavītaye

text: Give us not up to indigence, ye heroes, Indra, Agni, nor To Slander and reproach of men! X Soma Pavamana
meaning: आ न इन्दो शतग्विनं गवां पोषꣳ स्वश्व्यम् वहा भगत्तिमूतये
sanskrit_iast: ā na indo śatagvinaṃ gavāṃ poṣam̐ svaśvyam vahā bʰagattimūtaye

text: Gold-Hued! as one who giveth strength flow on for Gods to drink, a draught For Vayu and the Marut host!
meaning: तं त्वा नृम्णानि बिभ्रतꣳ सधस्थेषु महो दिवः चारुꣳ सुकृत्ययेमहे
sanskrit_iast: taṃ tvā nr̥mṇāni bibʰratam̐ sadʰastʰeṣu maho divaḥ cārum̐ sukr̥tyayemahe

text: The Steer shines brightly with the Gods, dear Sage in his appointed home. Even Pavamana unbeguiled.
meaning: संवृक्तधृष्णुमुक्थ्यं महामहिव्रतं मदम् शतं पुरो रुरुक्षणिम्
sanskrit_iast: saṃvr̥ktadʰr̥ṣṇumuktʰyaṃ mahāmahivrataṃ madam śataṃ puro rurukṣaṇim

text: O Pavamana, sent by prayer, roaring about thy dwelling-place, Ascend to Vayu as Law bids! XI Soma Pavamana
meaning: अतस्त्वा रयिरभ्ययद्राजानꣳ सुक्रतो दिवः सुपर्णो अव्यथी भरत्
sanskrit_iast: atastvā rayirabʰyayadrājānam̐ sukrato divaḥ suparṇo avyatʰī bʰarat

text: O Soma, Indu, every day thy friendship hath been my delight. Many fiends follow me; help me, thou tawny-hued: pass on beyond these barriers!
meaning: अधा हिन्वान इन्द्रियं ज्यायो महित्वमानशे अभिष्टिकृद्विचर्षणिः
sanskrit_iast: adʰā hinvāna indriyaṃ jyāyo mahitvamānaśe abʰiṣṭikr̥dvicarṣaṇiḥ

text: Close to thy bosom am I. Soma, day and night draining the milk, O golden hued. Surya himself refulgent with his glow have we, as birds, o'ertaken in his course. XII Soma Pavamana
meaning: विश्वस्मा इत्स्वर्दृशे साधारणꣳ रजस्तुरम् गोपामृतस्य विर्भरत्
sanskrit_iast: viśvasmā itsvardr̥śe sādʰāraṇam̐ rajasturam gopāmr̥tasya virbʰarat

text: Active, while being purified, he hath assailed all enemies: They deck the Sage with holy hymns.
meaning: इषे पवस्व धारया मृज्यमानो मनीषिभिः इन्दो रुचाभि गा इहि
sanskrit_iast: iṣe pavasva dʰārayā mr̥jyamāno manīṣibʰiḥ indo rucābʰi gā ihi

text: The Red hath mounted to his shrine; strong Indra hath approached the juice: In his firm dwelling let him rest!
meaning: पुनानो वरिवस्कृध्यूर्जं जनाय गिर्वणः हरे सृजान आशिरम्
sanskrit_iast: punāno varivaskr̥dʰyūrjaṃ janāya girvaṇaḥ hare sr̥jāna āśiram

text: O Indu, Soma, send us now great opulence from every side: Pour on us treasures thousandfold! XIII Indra
meaning: पुनानो देववीतय इन्द्रस्य याहि निष्कृतम् द्युतानो वाजिभिर्हितः
sanskrit_iast: punāno devavītaya indrasya yāhi niṣkr̥tam dyutāno vājibʰirhitaḥ

text: Drink Soma, Indra Lord of bays! and let it cheer thee: the stone, like a well-guided courser, Directed by the presser's arms bath pressed it.
meaning: अग्निनाग्निः समिध्यते कविर्गृहपतिर्युवा हव्यवाड्जुह्वास्यः
sanskrit_iast: agnināgniḥ samidʰyate kavirgr̥hapatiryuvā havyavāḍjuhvāsyaḥ

text: So let the draught of joy, thy dear companion, by which, O Lord of bays, thou slayest Vritras, Delight thee, Indra, Lord of princely treasuresl
meaning: यस्त्वामग्ने हविष्पतिर्दूतं देव सपर्यति तस्य स्म प्राविता भव
sanskrit_iast: yastvāmagne haviṣpatirdūtaṃ deva saparyati tasya sma prāvitā bʰava

text: Mark closely, Maghavan, the word I utter, this eulogy recited by Vasislitha: Accept the prayers I offer at thy banquet! XIV Indra
meaning: यो अग्निं देववीतये हविष्माꣳ आविवासति तस्मै पावक मृडय
sanskrit_iast: yo agniṃ devavītaye haviṣmām̐ āvivāsati tasmai pāvaka mr̥ḍaya

text: Heroes of one accord brought forth and formed for kingship Indra who wins the victory in all encounters, For power, in firmness, in the field, the great destroyer, fierce and exceeding strong, stalwart and full of vigour.
meaning: मित्रꣳ हुवे पूतदक्षं वरुणं च रिशादसम् धियं घृताचीꣳ साधन्ता
sanskrit_iast: mitram̐ huve pūtadakṣaṃ varuṇaṃ ca riśādasam dʰiyaṃ gʰr̥tācīm̐ sādʰantā

text: The holy sages form a ring, to view and sing unto the Ram. Inciters, very brilliant, from all deceit, are with your chariters nigh to hear.
meaning: ऋतेन मित्रावरुणावृतावृधावृतस्पृशा क्रतुं बृहन्तमाशाथे
sanskrit_iast: r̥tena mitrāvaruṇāvr̥tāvr̥dʰāvr̥taspr̥śā kratuṃ br̥hantamāśātʰe

text: Bards joined in song to Indra so that he might drink the Soma juice. The Lord of light, that he whose laws stand fast might aid with power and with the help he gives. XV Indra
meaning: कवी नो मित्रावरुणा तुविजाता उरुक्षया दक्षं दधाते अपसम्
sanskrit_iast: kavī no mitrāvaruṇā tuvijātā urukṣayā dakṣaṃ dadʰāte apasam

text: He who as sovran Lord of men moves with his chariots unrestrained, The Vritra-slayer, conqueror of all fighting hosts, preeminents, is praised in song.
meaning: इन्द्रेण सꣳ हि दृक्षसे संजग्मानो अबिभ्युषा मन्दू समानवर्च्चसा
sanskrit_iast: indreṇa sam̐ hi dr̥kṣase saṃjagmāno abibʰyuṣā mandū samānavarccasā

text: Honour that Indra, Puruhanman! for his aid, him in whose hand of old the fair Sustaining bolt of thunder, mighty like the God, like Surya, was deposited! XVI Soma Pavamana
meaning: आदह स्वधामनु पुनर्गर्भत्वमेरिरे दधाना नाम यज्ञियम्
sanskrit_iast: ādaha svadʰāmanu punargarbʰatvamerire dadʰānā nāma yajñiyam

text: The Sage of heaven whose heart is wise, when laid between both hands, with roars, Gives us delightful powers of life.
meaning: वीडु चिदारुजत्नुभिर्गुहा चिदिन्द्र वह्निभिः अविन्द उस्रिया अनु
sanskrit_iast: vīḍu cidārujatnubʰirguhā cidindra vahnibʰiḥ avinda usriyā anu

text: He, the bright son, when born, illumed his parents who had sprung to life, Great Son, great strengtheners of Law.
meaning: ता हुवे ययोरिदं पप्ने विश्वं पुरा कृतम् इन्द्राग्नी न मर्धतः
sanskrit_iast: tā huve yayoridaṃ papne viśvaṃ purā kr̥tam indrāgnī na mardʰataḥ

text: On, onward to a glorious home, free from all guile and dear to. men, Flow with enjoyment to our praise! XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: उग्रा विघनिना मृध इन्द्राग्नी हवामहे ता नो मृडात ईदृशे
sanskrit_iast: ugrā vigʰaninā mr̥dʰa indrāgnī havāmahe tā no mr̥ḍāta īdr̥śe

text: For, verily, Pavamana, thou, divine! endued with brightest splendour, calling all Creatures to immortality.
meaning: हथो वृत्राण्यार्या हथो दासानि सत्पती हथो विश्वा अप द्विषः
sanskrit_iast: hatʰo vr̥trāṇyāryā hatʰo dāsāni satpatī hatʰo viśvā apa dviṣaḥ

text: With whom Dadhyach Navagva opened fastened doors, by whom the sages gained their wish, By whom they won the fame of lovely Amrita in the felicity of Gods. XVIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: अभि सोमास आयवः पवन्ते मद्यं मदम् समुद्रस्याधि विष्टपे मनीषिणो मत्सरासो मदच्युतः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi somāsa āyavaḥ pavante madyaṃ madam samudrasyādʰi viṣṭape manīṣiṇo matsarāso madacyutaḥ

text: Soma, while filtered, with his wave flows through the long wool of the sheep, Roaring, while purified, before the voice of song.
meaning: तरत्समुद्रं पवमान ऊर्मिणा राजा देव ऋतं बृहत् अर्षा मित्रस्य वरुणस्य धर्मणा प्र हिन्वान ऋतं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: taratsamudraṃ pavamāna ūrmiṇā rājā deva r̥taṃ br̥hat arṣā mitrasya varuṇasya dʰarmaṇā pra hinvāna r̥taṃ br̥hat

text: With prayers they cleanse the mighty steed, sporting in wood, above the fleece: Our hymns, intoned, have praised him of the triple height.
meaning: नृभिर्येमाणो हर्यतो विचक्षणो राजा देवः समुद्र्यः
sanskrit_iast: nr̥bʰiryemāṇo haryato vicakṣaṇo rājā devaḥ samudryaḥ

text: He hath been hastened to the jars, bountiful, like an eager horse, And, lifting up his voice, while filtered, glided on. XIX Soma Pavamana
meaning: तिस्रो वाच ईरयति प्र वह्निरृतस्य धीतिं ब्रह्मणो मनीषाम् गावो यन्ति गोपतिं पृच्छमानाः सोमं यन्ति मतयो वावशानाः
sanskrit_iast: tisro vāca īrayati pra vahnirr̥tasya dʰītiṃ brahmaṇo manīṣām gāvo yanti gopatiṃ pr̥ccʰamānāḥ somaṃ yanti matayo vāvaśānāḥ

text: Father of holy hymns, Soma flows onward, the father of the earth, father of heaven. Father of Agni, Surya's generator, the father who begat Indra and Vishnu.
meaning: सोमं गावो धेनवो वावशानाः सोमं विप्रा मतिभिः पृच्छमानाः सोमः सुत ऋच्यते पूयमानः सोमे अर्कास्त्रिष्टुभः सं नवन्ते
sanskrit_iast: somaṃ gāvo dʰenavo vāvaśānāḥ somaṃ viprā matibʰiḥ pr̥ccʰamānāḥ somaḥ suta r̥cyate pūyamānaḥ some arkāstriṣṭubʰaḥ saṃ navante

text: Brahman of Gods, the leader of the poets, Rishi of sages, chief of savage creatures, Falcon amid the vultures, axe of forests, over the cleansing sieve goes Soma singing.
meaning: एवा नः सोम परिषिच्यमान आ पवस्व पूयमानः स्वस्ति इन्द्रमा विश बृहता मदेन वर्धया वाचं जनया पुरन्धिम्
sanskrit_iast: evā naḥ soma pariṣicyamāna ā pavasva pūyamānaḥ svasti indramā viśa br̥hatā madena vardʰayā vācaṃ janayā purandʰim

text: He, Soma Pavamana, like a river, hath stirred the wave of voice, our songs and praises Beholding these inferior powers, the hero, well knowing, takes his stand among the cattle. XX Agni I. Hither, for powerful kinship, I call Agni, him who prospers you, Most frequent at our solemn rites.
meaning: यद्द्याव इन्द्र ते शतꣳशतं भूमीरुत स्युः न त्वा वज्रिन्त्सहस्रꣳ सुर्या अनु न जातमष्ट रोदसी
sanskrit_iast: yaddyāva indra te śatam̐śataṃ bʰūmīruta syuḥ na tvā vajrintsahasram̐ suryā anu na jātamaṣṭa rodasī

text: That through this famed one's power he may stand by us, even as Tvasbtar comes Unto the forms that must be shaped.
meaning: आ पप्राथ महिना वृष्ण्या वृषन्विश्वा शविष्ठ शवसा अस्माꣳ अव मघवन्गोमति व्रजे वज्रिञ्चित्राभिरूतिभिः
sanskrit_iast: ā paprātʰa mahinā vr̥ṣṇyā vr̥ṣanviśvā śaviṣṭʰa śavasā asmām̐ ava magʰavangomati vraje vajriñcitrābʰirūtibʰiḥ

text: This Agni is the Lord supreme above all glories' mid the Gods: May he come nigh to us with strength. XXI Indra
meaning: वयं घ त्वा सुतावन्त आपो न वृक्तबर्हिषः पवित्रस्य प्रस्रवणेषु वृत्रहन्परि स्तोतार आसते
sanskrit_iast: vayaṃ gʰa tvā sutāvanta āpo na vr̥ktabarhiṣaḥ pavitrasya prasravaṇeṣu vr̥trahanpari stotāra āsate

text: This poured libation, Indra drink, immortal, gladdening, excellent! Streams of the bright have flowed to thee here at the seat of holy Law.
meaning: स्वरन्ति त्वा सुते नरो वसो निरेक उक्थिनः कदा सुतं तृषाण ओक आ गम इन्द्र स्वब्दीव वꣳसगः
sanskrit_iast: svaranti tvā sute naro vaso nireka uktʰinaḥ kadā sutaṃ tr̥ṣāṇa oka ā gama indra svabdīva vam̐sagaḥ

text: When, Indra, thou dost guide thy bays, there is no better charioteer: None hath surpassed thee in thy might, none with good steeds o'ertaken thee.
meaning: कण्वेभिर्धृष्णवा धृषद्वाजं दर्षि सहस्रिणम् पिशङ्गरूपं मघवन्विचर्षणे मक्षू गोमन्तमीमहे
sanskrit_iast: kaṇvebʰirdʰr̥ṣṇavā dʰr̥ṣadvājaṃ darṣi sahasriṇam piśaṅgarūpaṃ magʰavanvicarṣaṇe makṣū gomantamīmahe

text: Sing glory now to Indra, say to him your solemn eulogies! The drops poured forth have made him glad: pay reverence to his noblest might! XII Indra
meaning: तरणिरित्सिषासति वाजं पुरन्ध्या युजा आ व इन्द्रं पुरुहूतं नमे गिरा नेमिं तष्टेव सुद्रुवम्
sanskrit_iast: taraṇiritsiṣāsati vājaṃ purandʰyā yujā ā va indraṃ puruhūtaṃ name girā nemiṃ taṣṭeva sudruvam

text: Indra, be pleased: drive forward, hero, striker of thy bays! Fair, like a sage, delighting in the meath, drink of the juice for rapturous joy.
meaning: न दुष्टुतिर्द्रविणोदेषु शस्यते न स्रेधन्तꣳ रयिर्नशत् सुशक्तिरिन्मघवं तुभ्यं मावते देष्णं यत्पार्ये दिवि
sanskrit_iast: na duṣṭutirdraviṇodeṣu śasyate na sredʰantam̐ rayirnaśat suśaktirinmagʰavaṃ tubʰyaṃ māvate deṣṇaṃ yatpārye divi

text: O Indra, fill thy belly anew with meath that seems to flow from heaven. The sweet-voiced raptures of this juice have come, as 'twere to heaven. to thee.
meaning: तिस्रो वाच उदीरते गावो मिमन्ति धेनवः हरिरेति कनिक्रदत्
sanskrit_iast: tisro vāca udīrate gāvo mimanti dʰenavaḥ harireti kanikradat

text: Indra, victorious, Mitra-like, smote, like a Yati, Vritra dead. As Bhrigu quelled his foes, he cleft Vala in Soma's rapturous joy. I Soma Pavamana
meaning: अभि ब्रह्मीरनूषत यह्वीरृतस्य मातरः मर्जयन्तीर्दिवः शिशुम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi brahmīranūṣata yahvīrr̥tasya mātaraḥ marjayantīrdivaḥ śiśum

text: Winner of gold and gear and cattle flow thou on, set as impregner, Indu! 'mid the worlds of life! Rich in brave men art thou, Soma, who winnest all: these holy singers wait upon thee with song.
meaning: रायः समुद्राꣳश्चतुरो ऽस्मभ्यꣳ सोम विश्वतः आ पवस्व सहस्रिणः
sanskrit_iast: rāyaḥ samudrām̐ścaturo 'smabʰyam̐ soma viśvataḥ ā pavasva sahasriṇaḥ

text: O Soma, thou beholdest men from every side: O Pavamana, Steer, thou wanderest through these. Pour out upon us wealth in treasure and in gold: may we have strength to live among the things that be!
meaning: सुतासो मधुमत्तमाः सोमा इन्द्राय मन्दिनः पवित्रवन्तो अक्षरं देवान्गच्छन्तु वो मदाः
sanskrit_iast: sutāso madʰumattamāḥ somā indrāya mandinaḥ pavitravanto akṣaraṃ devāngaccʰantu vo madāḥ

text: Thou passest to these worlds as sovran Lord thereof, O Indu, harnessing thy tawny well-winged mares. May they pour forth for thee milk and oil rich in sweets: O Soma, let the folk abide in thy decree! II Soma Pavamana
meaning: इन्दुरिन्द्राय पवत इति देवासो अब्रुवन् वाचस्पतिर्मखस्यते विश्वस्येशान ओजसाः
sanskrit_iast: indurindrāya pavata iti devāso abruvan vācaspatirmakʰasyate viśvasyeśāna ojasāḥ

text: The streams of Pavamana, thine, finder of all I have been ettused, Even as Surya's rays of light.
meaning: सहस्रधारः पवते समुद्रो वाचमीङ्खयः सोमस्पती रयीणाꣳ सखेन्द्रस्य दिवेदिवे
sanskrit_iast: sahasradʰāraḥ pavate samudro vācamīṅkʰayaḥ somaspatī rayīṇām̐ sakʰendrasya divedive

text: Making the light that shines from heaven thou flowest on to every form, Soma, thou swellest like a sea.
meaning: पवित्रं ते विततं ब्रह्मणस्पते प्रभुर्गात्राणि पर्येषि विश्वतः अतप्ततनूर्न तदामो अश्नुते शृतास इद्वहन्तः सं तदाशत
sanskrit_iast: pavitraṃ te vitataṃ brahmaṇaspate prabʰurgātrāṇi paryeṣi viśvataḥ ataptatanūrna tadāmo aśnute śr̥tāsa idvahantaḥ saṃ tadāśata

text: Shown forth thou sendest out thy voice, O Pavamana, with a roar. Like Surya, God, as Law commands. III Soma Pavamana
meaning: तपोष्पवित्रं विततं दिवस्पदे ऽर्चन्तो अस्य तन्तवो व्यस्थिरन् अवन्त्यस्य पवीतारमाशवो दिवः पृष्ठमधि रोहन्ति तेजसा
sanskrit_iast: tapoṣpavitraṃ vitataṃ divaspade 'rcanto asya tantavo vyastʰiran avantyasya pavītāramāśavo divaḥ pr̥ṣṭʰamadʰi rohanti tejasā

text: Hitherward have the Somas streamed, the drops while they are purified: When blent, in waters they are raised.
meaning: अरूरुचदुषसः पृश्निरग्रिय उक्षा मिमेति भुवनेषु वाजयुः मायाविनो ममिरे अस्य मायया नृचक्षसः पितरो गर्भमा दधुः
sanskrit_iast: arūrucaduṣasaḥ pr̥śniragriya ukṣā mimeti bʰuvaneṣu vājayuḥ māyāvino mamire asya māyayā nr̥cakṣasaḥ pitaro garbʰamā dadʰuḥ

text: The milk hath run to meet them like floods rushing down a precipice: They come to Indra, being cleansed.
meaning: प्र मꣳहिष्ठाय गायत ऋताव्ने बृहते शुक्रशोचिषे उपस्तुतासो अग्नये
sanskrit_iast: pra mam̐hiṣṭʰāya gāyata r̥tāvne br̥hate śukraśociṣe upastutāso agnaye

text: O Soma Pavamana, thou flowest as Indra's gladdener: The men have seized and lead thee forth.
meaning: आ वꣳसते मघवा वीरवद्यशः समिद्धो द्युम्न्याहुतः कुविन्नो अस्य सुमतिर्भवीयस्यच्छा वाजेभिरागमत्
sanskrit_iast: ā vam̐sate magʰavā vīravadyaśaḥ samiddʰo dyumnyāhutaḥ kuvinno asya sumatirbʰavīyasyaccʰā vājebʰirāgamat

text: Thou, Indu, when, expressed by stones, thou runnest to the filter, art Ready for Indra's high decree.
meaning: तं ते मदं गृणीमसि वृषणं पृक्षु सासहिम् उ लोककृत्नुमद्रिवो हरिश्रियम्
sanskrit_iast: taṃ te madaṃ gr̥ṇīmasi vr̥ṣaṇaṃ pr̥kṣu sāsahim u lokakr̥tnumadrivo hariśriyam

text: Victorious, to be hailed with joy, O Soma, flow delighting men, As the supporter of mankind!
meaning: येन ज्योतीꣳष्यायवे मनवे च विवेदिथ मन्दानो अस्य बर्हिषो वि राजसि
sanskrit_iast: yena jyotīm̐ṣyāyave manave ca viveditʰa mandāno asya barhiṣo vi rājasi

text: Flow on, best Vritra-slayer; flow meet to be hailed with joyful lauds, pure, purifying, wonderful
meaning: तदद्या चित्त उक्थिनो ऽनु ष्टुवन्ति पूर्वथा वृषपत्नीरपो जया दिवेदिवे
sanskrit_iast: tadadyā citta uktʰino 'nu ṣṭuvanti pūrvatʰā vr̥ṣapatnīrapo jayā divedive

text: Pure, purifying, is he called, Soma effused and full of sweets, Slayer of sinners, dear to Gods. IV Soma Pavamana
meaning: श्रुधी हवं तिरश्च्या इन्द्र यस्त्वा सपर्यति सुवीर्यस्य गोमतो रायस्पूर्धि महाꣳ असि
sanskrit_iast: śrudʰī havaṃ tiraścyā indra yastvā saparyati suvīryasya gomato rāyaspūrdʰi mahām̐ asi

text: The Sage hath robed him in the sheep's wool for the banquet of the Gods, Subduing all our enemies.
meaning: यस्त इन्द्र नवीयसीं गिरं मन्द्रामजीजनत् चिकित्विन्मनसं धियं प्रत्नामृतस्य पिप्युषीम्
sanskrit_iast: yasta indra navīyasīṃ giraṃ mandrāmajījanat cikitvinmanasaṃ dʰiyaṃ pratnāmr̥tasya pipyuṣīm

text: For he, as Pavamana, sends thousandfold riches in the shape Of cattle to the worshippers.
meaning: तमु ष्टवाम यं गिर इन्द्रमुक्थानि वावृधुः पुरूण्यस्य नौꣳस्या सिषासन्तो वनामहे
sanskrit_iast: tamu ṣṭavāma yaṃ gira indramuktʰāni vāvr̥dʰuḥ purūṇyasya naum̐syā siṣāsanto vanāmahe

text: Thou graspest all things with thy mind, and purifiest thee with thoughts: As such, O Soma, find us fame!
meaning: प्र त आश्विनीः पवमान धेनवो दिव्या असृग्रन्पयसा धरीमणि प्रान्तरिक्षात्स्थाविरीस्ते असृक्षत ये त्वा मृजन्त्यृषिषाण वेधसः
sanskrit_iast: pra ta āśvinīḥ pavamāna dʰenavo divyā asr̥granpayasā dʰarīmaṇi prāntarikṣātstʰāvirīste asr̥kṣata ye tvā mr̥jantyr̥ṣiṣāṇa vedʰasaḥ

text: Pour on us lofty glory, send sure riches to our liberal lords: Bring food to those who sing thy praise!
meaning: उभयतः पवमानस्य रश्मयो ध्रुवस्य सतः परि यन्ति केतवः यदी पवित्रे अधि मृज्यते हरिः सत्ता नि योनौ कलशेषु सीदति
sanskrit_iast: ubʰayataḥ pavamānasya raśmayo dʰruvasya sataḥ pari yanti ketavaḥ yadī pavitre adʰi mr̥jyate hariḥ sattā ni yonau kalaśeṣu sīdati

text: As thou art cleansed, O wondrous steed, O Soma, thou hast entered, like A pious king, into the songs,
meaning: विश्वा धामानि विश्वचक्ष ऋभ्वसः प्रभोष्टे सतः परि यन्ति केतवः व्यानशी पवसे सोम धर्मणा पतिर्विश्वस्य भुवनस्य राजसि
sanskrit_iast: viśvā dʰāmāni viśvacakṣa r̥bʰvasaḥ prabʰoṣṭe sataḥ pari yanti ketavaḥ vyānaśī pavase soma dʰarmaṇā patirviśvasya bʰuvanasya rājasi

text: He, Soma, like a courser in the floods invincible, made bright With hands, is resting in the press.
meaning: पवमानो अजीजनद्दिवश्चित्रं न तन्यतुम् ज्योतिर्वैश्वानरं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: pavamāno ajījanaddivaścitraṃ na tanyatum jyotirvaiśvānaraṃ br̥hat

text: Disporting, like a liberal chief, thou goest. Soma to the sieve, Lending the laud heroic strength. V Soma Pavamana
meaning: पवमान रसस्तव मदो राजन्नदुच्छुनः वि वारमव्यमर्षति
sanskrit_iast: pavamāna rasastava mado rājannaduccʰunaḥ vi vāramavyamarṣati

text: Pour on us with thy juice all kinds of corn, each sort of nourishment! And, Soma, all felicities!
meaning: पवमानस्य ते रसो दक्षो वि राजति द्युमान् ज्योतिर्विश्वꣳ स्वर्दृशे
sanskrit_iast: pavamānasya te raso dakṣo vi rājati dyumān jyotirviśvam̐ svardr̥śe

text: As thine, O Indu, is the praise, and thine what springeth from, the juice, Seat thee on the dear sacred grass!
meaning: प्र यद्गावो न भूर्णयस्त्वेषा अयासो अक्रमुः घ्नन्तः कृष्णामप त्वचम्
sanskrit_iast: pra yadgāvo na bʰūrṇayastveṣā ayāso akramuḥ gʰnantaḥ kr̥ṣṇāmapa tvacam

text: And, finding for us steeds and kine, O Soma, with thy juice flow on Through days that fly most rapidly!
meaning: सुवितस्य मनामहे ऽति सेतुं दुराय्यम् साह्याम दस्युमव्रतम्
sanskrit_iast: suvitasya manāmahe 'ti setuṃ durāyyam sāhyāma dasyumavratam

text: As one who conquers, ne'er subdued, attacks and slays the enemy, Thus, vanquisher of thousands! flow! VI Soma Pavamana
meaning: शृण्वे वृष्टेरिव स्वनः पवमानस्य शुष्मिणः चरन्ति विद्युतो दिवि
sanskrit_iast: śr̥ṇve vr̥ṣṭeriva svanaḥ pavamānasya śuṣmiṇaḥ caranti vidyuto divi

text: Thou, Indu, with thy streams that drop sweet juices, which were poured for help, Hast settled in the cleansing sieve.
meaning: आ पवस्व महीमिषं गोमदिन्दो हिरण्यवत् अश्ववत्सोम वीरवत्
sanskrit_iast: ā pavasva mahīmiṣaṃ gomadindo hiraṇyavat aśvavatsoma vīravat

text: So flow thou onward through the fleece, for Indra flow to be his drink, Seating thee in the shrine of Law!
meaning: पवस्व विश्वचर्षण आ मही रोदसी पृण उषाः सूर्यो न रश्मिभिः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva viśvacarṣaṇa ā mahī rodasī pr̥ṇa uṣāḥ sūryo na raśmibʰiḥ

text: As giving room and freedom, as most sweet, pour butter forth and milk, O Soma, for the Angirasas! VII Agni
meaning: परि नः शर्मयन्त्या धारया सोम विश्वतः सरा रसेव विष्टपम्
sanskrit_iast: pari naḥ śarmayantyā dʰārayā soma viśvataḥ sarā raseva viṣṭapam

text: Thy glories are, like lightnings from the rainy cloud, visible, Agni, like the comings of the Dawns, When, loosed to wander over plants and forest trees, thou crammest by thyself thy food into thy mouth.
meaning: आशुरर्ष बृहन्मते परि प्रियेण धाम्ना यत्र देवा इति ब्रुवन्
sanskrit_iast: āśurarṣa br̥hanmate pari priyeṇa dʰāmnā yatra devā iti bruvan

text: When, sped and urged by wind, thou spreadest thee abroad, soon piercing through thy food according to thy will, The hosts, who ne'er decayest, eager to consume, like men on chariots, Agni! strive on every side.
meaning: परिष्कृण्वन्ननिष्कृतं जनाय यातयन्निषः वृष्टिं दिवः परि स्रव
sanskrit_iast: pariṣkr̥ṇvannaniṣkr̥taṃ janāya yātayanniṣaḥ vr̥ṣṭiṃ divaḥ pari srava

text: Agni, the Hotar-priest who fills the assembly full, waker of wisdom, chief controller of the thought- Thee, yea, none other than thyself, doth man elect priest of the holy offering, great and small, alike. VIII Mitra-Varuna
meaning: अयꣳ स यो दिवस्परि रघुयामा पवित्र आ सिन्धोरूर्मा व्यक्षरत्
sanskrit_iast: ayam̐ sa yo divaspari ragʰuyāmā pavitra ā sindʰorūrmā vyakṣarat

text: Even far and wide, O Varuna and Mitra, doth your help extend: May I obtain your kind good-will!
meaning: सुत एति पवित्र आ त्विषिं दधान ओजसा विचक्षाणो विरोचयन्
sanskrit_iast: suta eti pavitra ā tviṣiṃ dadʰāna ojasā vicakṣāṇo virocayan

text: True Gods, may we completely gain food and a dwelling place from you: Ye Mitras, may we be your own!
meaning: आविवासन्परावतो अथो अर्वावतः सुतः इन्द्राय सिच्यते मधु
sanskrit_iast: āvivāsanparāvato atʰo arvāvataḥ sutaḥ indrāya sicyate madʰu

text: Guard us, ye Mitras, with your guards, save us, ye skilled to save: may we Subdue the Dasyus by ourselves! IX Indra I. Arising in thy might, thy jaws thou shookest Indra, having drunk The Soma which the press had shed.
meaning: समीचीना अनूषत हरिꣳ हिन्वन्त्यद्रिभिः इन्दुमिन्द्राय पीतये
sanskrit_iast: samīcīnā anūṣata harim̐ hinvantyadribʰiḥ indumindrāya pītaye

text: Indra, both world gave place to thee as thou wast fighting, when thou wast The slayer of the Dasyu hosts.
meaning: हिन्वन्ति सूरमुस्रयः स्वसारो जामयस्पतिम् महामिन्दुं महीयुवः
sanskrit_iast: hinvanti sūramusrayaḥ svasāro jāmayaspatim mahāminduṃ mahīyuvaḥ

text: From Indra, have I measured out a song eight-footed with nine parts, Delicate, strengthening the Law. X Indra-Agni
meaning: पवमान रुचारुचा देवो देवेभ्यः सुतः विश्वा वसून्या विश
sanskrit_iast: pavamāna rucārucā devo devebʰyaḥ sutaḥ viśvā vasūnyā viśa

text: Indra and Agni, these our songs of praise have sounded forth to you: Ye who bring blessings! drink the juice
meaning: आ पवमान सुष्टुतिं वृष्टिं देवेभ्यो दुवः इषे पवस्व संयतम्
sanskrit_iast: ā pavamāna suṣṭutiṃ vr̥ṣṭiṃ devebʰyo duvaḥ iṣe pavasva saṃyatam

text: Come, Indra, Agni, with those teams, desired of many, which ye have, O heroes, for the worshipper
meaning: जनस्य गोपा अजनिष्ट जागृविरग्निः सुदक्षः सुविताय नव्यसे घृतप्रतीको बृहता दिविस्पृषा द्युमद्वि भाति भरतेभ्यः शुचिः
sanskrit_iast: janasya gopā ajaniṣṭa jāgr̥viragniḥ sudakṣaḥ suvitāya navyase gʰr̥tapratīko br̥hatā divispr̥ṣā dyumadvi bʰāti bʰaratebʰyaḥ śuciḥ

text: With those to his libation poured, ye heroes, Indra, Agni, come: Come ye to drink the Soma-juice! XI Soma Pavamana
meaning: त्वामग्ने अङ्गिरसो गुहा हितमन्वविन्दञ्छिश्रियाणं वनेवने स जायसे मथ्यमानः सहो महत्वामाहुः सहसस्पुत्रमङ्गिरः
sanskrit_iast: tvāmagne aṅgiraso guhā hitamanvavindañcʰiśriyāṇaṃ vanevane sa jāyase matʰyamānaḥ saho mahatvāmāhuḥ sahasasputramaṅgiraḥ

text: Soma, flow on exceeding bright with loud roar to the reservoirs, Resting in wooden vats thy home!
meaning: यज्ञस्य केतुं प्रथमं पुरोहितमग्निं नरस्त्रिषधस्थे समिन्धते इन्द्रेण देवैः सरथꣳ स बर्हिषि सीदन्नि होता यजथाय सुक्रतुः
sanskrit_iast: yajñasya ketuṃ pratʰamaṃ purohitamagniṃ narastriṣadʰastʰe samindʰate indreṇa devaiḥ saratʰam̐ sa barhiṣi sīdanni hotā yajatʰāya sukratuḥ

text: Let water winning Somas flow to Indra, Vayu, Varuna, To Vishnu and Marut host!
meaning: अयं वां मित्रावरुणा सुतः सोम ऋतावृधा ममेदिह श्रुतꣳ हवम्
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ vāṃ mitrāvaruṇā sutaḥ soma r̥tāvr̥dʰā mamediha śrutam̐ havam

text: Soma, bestowing food upon our progeny, from every side Pour on us riches thousandfold. XII Soma Pavamana
meaning: राजानावनभिद्रुहा ध्रुवे सदस्युत्तमे सहस्रस्थूण आशाते
sanskrit_iast: rājānāvanabʰidruhā dʰruve sadasyuttame sahasrastʰūṇa āśāte

text: Pressed out by pressers Soma goes over the fleecy backs of sheep, Goes even as with a mare in tawny-coloured stream, goes in a sweetly-sounding stream.
meaning: ता सम्राजा घृतासुती आदित्या दानुनस्पती सचेते अनवह्वरम्
sanskrit_iast: tā samrājā gʰr̥tāsutī ādityā dānunaspatī sacete anavahvaram

text: Down to the water Soma, rich in kine, bath flowed with cows, with cows that have been milked. They have approached the mixing-vessels as a sea: the cheerer streams for the carouse. XIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: इन्द्रो दधीचो अस्थभिर्वृत्राण्यप्रतिष्कुतः जघान नवतीर्नव
sanskrit_iast: indro dadʰīco astʰabʰirvr̥trāṇyapratiṣkutaḥ jagʰāna navatīrnava

text: O Purifying Soma, bring to us the wondrous treasure, meet. For lauds, that is in earth and heaven!
meaning: इच्छन्नश्वस्य यच्छिरः पर्वतेष्वपश्रितम् तद्विदच्छर्यणावति
sanskrit_iast: iccʰannaśvasya yaccʰiraḥ parvateṣvapaśritam tadvidaccʰaryaṇāvati

text: Cleansing the lives of men, thou, Steer, bellowing on the sacred grass, Gold-hued, hast settled in thy home.
meaning: अत्राह गोरमन्वत नाम त्वष्टुरपीच्यम् इत्था चन्द्रमसो गृहे
sanskrit_iast: atrāha goramanvata nāma tvaṣṭurapīcyam ittʰā candramaso gr̥he

text: For ye twain, Indra, Soma, are Lords of heaven's light, Lords of the kine: Prosper, as mighty ones, our prayers XIV Indra
meaning: इयं वामस्य मन्मन इन्द्राग्नी पूर्व्यस्तुतिः अभ्राद्वृष्टिरिवाजनि
sanskrit_iast: iyaṃ vāmasya manmana indrāgnī pūrvyastutiḥ abʰrādvr̥ṣṭirivājani

text: By men hath Indra been advanced, the Vritra-sIayer, to joy and strength. Him only we invoke for help in battles whether great or small be he our aid in deeds or might!
meaning: शृणुतं जरितुर्हवमिन्द्राग्नी वनतं गिरः ईशाना पिप्यतं धियः
sanskrit_iast: śr̥ṇutaṃ jariturhavamindrāgnī vanataṃ giraḥ īśānā pipyataṃ dʰiyaḥ

text: For, hero, thou art like a host, art giver of abundant spoil. Strengthening e'en the feeble, thou aidest the sacrificer, thou givest great wealth to him who pours.
meaning: मा पापत्वाय नो नरेन्द्राग्नी माभिशस्तये मा नो रीरधतं निदे
sanskrit_iast: mā pāpatvāya no narendrāgnī mābʰiśastaye mā no rīradʰataṃ nide

text: When war and battles are on foot, booty is offered to the bold. Yoke thou thy wildly-rushing bays! Whom wilt thou slay, and whom enrich? Do thou, O Indra, make us rich! XV Indra I. The juice of Soma thus diffused, sweet to the taste, the bright cows drink, Who travelling in splendour close to mighty Indra's side rejoice, good in their own supremacy.
meaning: पवस्व दक्षसाधनो देवेभ्यः पीतये हरे मरुद्भ्यो वायवे मदः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva dakṣasādʰano devebʰyaḥ pītaye hare marudbʰyo vāyave madaḥ

text: Craving his touch the dappled kine mingle the Soma with their milk. The milch-kine dear to Indra send forth his death dealing thunder-bolt, good in their own supremacy.
meaning: सं देवैः शोभते वृषा कविर्योनावधि प्रियः पवमानो अदाभ्यः
sanskrit_iast: saṃ devaiḥ śobʰate vr̥ṣā kaviryonāvadʰi priyaḥ pavamāno adābʰyaḥ

text: With veneration, passing wise, they honour his victorious might. They follow close his many laws to win them due preeminence, good in their own supremacy. XVI Soma Pavamana
meaning: पवमान धिया हितो३ ऽभि योनिं कनिक्रदत् धर्मणा वायुमारुहः
sanskrit_iast: pavamāna dʰiyā hito3 'bʰi yoniṃ kanikradat dʰarmaṇā vāyumāruhaḥ

text: Strong, mountain-born, the stalk hath been pressed in the streams for rapturous joy. Hawk-like he settles in his home.
meaning: तवाहꣳ सोम रारण सख्य इन्दो दिवेदिवे पुरूणि बभ्रो नि चरन्ति मामव परिधीꣳ रति ताꣳइहि
sanskrit_iast: tavāham̐ soma rāraṇa sakʰya indo divedive purūṇi babʰro ni caranti māmava paridʰīm̐ rati tām̐ihi

text: Fair is the juice beloved of Gods, washed in the waters, pressed by men: The milch kine sweeten it with milk
meaning: तवाहं नक्तमुत सोम ते दिवा दुहानो बभ्र ऊधनि घृणा तपन्तमति सूर्यं परः शकुना इव पप्तिम
sanskrit_iast: tavāhaṃ naktamuta soma te divā duhāno babʰra ūdʰani gʰr̥ṇā tapantamati sūryaṃ paraḥ śakunā iva paptima

text: Then, like a steed, have they adorned the inciter for eternal life, The meath's juice at the festival. XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: पुनानो अक्रमीदभि विश्वा मृधो विचर्षणिः शुम्भन्ति विप्रं धीतिभिः
sanskrit_iast: punāno akramīdabʰi viśvā mr̥dʰo vicarṣaṇiḥ śumbʰanti vipraṃ dʰītibʰiḥ

text: Make high and splendid glory shine hitherward, Lord of food, God, on the friend of Gods Unclose the cask of middle air
meaning: आ योनिमरुणो रुहद्गमदिन्द्रं वृषा सुतम् ध्रुवे सदसि सीदतु
sanskrit_iast: ā yonimaruṇo ruhadgamadindraṃ vr̥ṣā sutam dʰruve sadasi sīdatu

text: Roll onward from the press, O mighty one, effused, as kings, supporter of the tribes Pour on us rain from heaven, send us the water's flow, urging our thoughts to win the spoil! XVIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: नू नो रयिं महामिन्दो ऽस्मभ्यꣳ सोम विश्वतः आ पवस्व सहस्रिणम्
sanskrit_iast: nū no rayiṃ mahāmindo 'smabʰyam̐ soma viśvataḥ ā pavasva sahasriṇam

text: Breath of the mighty Dames, the Child, speeding the plan of sacrifice, Surpasses all things that are dear, yea, from of old.
meaning: पिबा सोममिन्द्र मदन्तु त्वा यं ते सुषाव हर्यश्वाद्रिः सोतुर्बाहुभ्याꣳ सुयतो नार्वा
sanskrit_iast: pibā somamindra madantu tvā yaṃ te suṣāva haryaśvādriḥ soturbāhubʰyām̐ suyato nārvā

text: The place that is concealed hath gained a share of Trita's pressing-stones, By the seven laws of sacrifice, even that dear place.
meaning: यस्ते मदो युज्यश्चारुरस्ति येन वृत्राणि हर्यश्व हꣳसि स त्वामिन्द्र प्रभूवसो ममत्तु
sanskrit_iast: yaste mado yujyaścārurasti yena vr̥trāṇi haryaśva ham̐si sa tvāmindra prabʰūvaso mamattu

text: He hath sent forth unto the heights the three, in stream, as Trita's wealth: He who is passing wise measures his pathways out. XIX Soma Pavamana
meaning: बोधा सु मे मघवन्वाचमेमां यां ते वसिष्ठो अर्चति प्रशस्तिम् इमा ब्रह्म सधमादे जुषस्व
sanskrit_iast: bodʰā su me magʰavanvācamemāṃ yāṃ te vasiṣṭʰo arcati praśastim imā brahma sadʰamāde juṣasva

text: Flow to the filter with thy stream, effused, to win us spoil and wealth, Soma exceeding rich in meath for Indra, Vishnu, and the Gods
meaning: विश्वाः पृतना अभिभूतरं नरः सजूस्ततक्षुरिन्द्रं जजनुश्च राजसे क्रत्वे वरे स्थेमन्यामुरीमुतोग्रमोजिष्ठं तरसं तरस्विनम्
sanskrit_iast: viśvāḥ pr̥tanā abʰibʰūtaraṃ naraḥ sajūstatakṣurindraṃ jajanuśca rājase kratve vare stʰemanyāmurīmutogramojiṣṭʰaṃ tarasaṃ tarasvinam

text: The hymns that know not guile, caress thee, golden-coloured, in the sieve. As mothers, Pavamana, lick the new-born calf, as Law commands.
meaning: नेमिं नमन्ति चक्षसा मेषं विप्रा अभिस्वरे सुदीतयो वो अद्रुहो ऽपि कर्णे तरस्विनः समृक्वभिः
sanskrit_iast: nemiṃ namanti cakṣasā meṣaṃ viprā abʰisvare sudītayo vo adruho 'pi karṇe tarasvinaḥ samr̥kvabʰiḥ

text: Lord of great sway, thou liftest thee above the heavens, above the earth. Thou, of Pavamana, hast assumed thy coat of mail with majesty. XX Soma Pavamana
meaning: समु रेभसो अस्वरन्निन्द्रꣳ सोमस्य पीतये स्वःपतिर्यदी वृधे धृतव्रतो ह्योजसा समूतिभिः
sanskrit_iast: samu rebʰaso asvarannindram̐ somasya pītaye svaḥpatiryadī vr̥dʰe dʰr̥tavrato hyojasā samūtibʰiḥ

text: Strong Indu, bathed in milk, flows on for Indra, Soma exciting strength, for his carousal. He quells malignity and slays the demons, King of the homestead, he who gives us comfort.
meaning: यो राजा चर्षणीनां याता रथेभिरध्रिगुः विश्वासां तरुता पृतनानां ज्येष्ठं यो वृत्रहा गृणे
sanskrit_iast: yo rājā carṣaṇīnāṃ yātā ratʰebʰiradʰriguḥ viśvāsāṃ tarutā pr̥tanānāṃ jyeṣṭʰaṃ yo vr̥trahā gr̥ṇe

text: Then in a stream he flows, milked out with press-stones, mingled with sweetness, through the fleecy filter-- Indu rejoicing in the love of Indra, the God who gladdens for the God's enjoyment.
meaning: इन्द्रं तꣳ शुम्भ्य पुरुहन्मन्नवसे यस्य द्विता विधर्त्तरि हस्तेन वज्रः प्रति धायि दर्शतो महां देवो न सूर्यः
sanskrit_iast: indraṃ tam̐ śumbʰya puruhanmannavase yasya dvitā vidʰarttari hastena vajraḥ prati dʰāyi darśato mahāṃ devo na sūryaḥ

text: He flows, as he is cleansed, to sacred duties, a God bedewing Gods with his own juices. Indu hath, clothed in powers that suit the season, on the raised fleece engaged the ten swift fingers. XXI Agni
meaning: परि प्रिया दिवः कविर्वयाꣳसि नप्त्योर्हितः स्वानैर्याति कविक्रतुः
sanskrit_iast: pari priyā divaḥ kavirvayām̐si naptyorhitaḥ svānairyāti kavikratuḥ

text: O Agni, God, we kindle thee, refulgent, wasting not away, That this more glorious fuel may send forth for thee its shine to heaven. Bring food to those who sing thy praise!
meaning: स सूनुर्मातरा शुचिर्जातो जाते अरोचयत् महान्मही ऋतावृधा
sanskrit_iast: sa sūnurmātarā śucirjāto jāte arocayat mahānmahī r̥tāvr̥dʰā

text: To thee the splendid, Lord of light! bright! wondrous! prince of men! is brought. Oblation with the holy verse, O Agni, bearer of our gifts! Bring food to those who sing thy praise!
meaning: प्रप्र क्षयाय पन्यसे जनाय जुष्टो अद्रुहः वीत्यर्ष पनिष्टये
sanskrit_iast: prapra kṣayāya panyase janāya juṣṭo adruhaḥ vītyarṣa paniṣṭaye

text: Thou heatest both the ladles in thy mouth, O brilliant prince of men! So fill us also in our hymns abundantly, thou Lord of Strength. Bring food to those who sing thy praise! XXII Indra
meaning: त्वꣳ ह्या३ꣳङ्ग दैव्या पवमान जनिमानि द्युमत्तमः अमृतत्वाय घोषयन्
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hyā3m̐ṅga daivyā pavamāna janimāni dyumattamaḥ amr̥tatvāya gʰoṣayan

text: Sing ye a psalm to Indra; sing a great song to the lofty Sage, To him who maketh prayer, inspired, who loveth laud.
meaning: येना नवग्वो दध्यङ्ङपोर्णुते येन विप्रास आपिरे देवानाꣳ सुम्ने अमृतस्य चारुणो येन श्रवाꣳस्याशत
sanskrit_iast: yenā navagvo dadʰyaṅṅaporṇute yena viprāsa āpire devānām̐ sumne amr̥tasya cāruṇo yena śravām̐syāśata

text: Thou, Indra, art the conqueror: thou gavest splendour to the Sun. Maker of all things, thou art mighty and All-God.
meaning: सोमः पुनान ऊर्मिणाव्यं वारं वि धावति अग्रे वाचः पवमानः कनिक्रदत्
sanskrit_iast: somaḥ punāna ūrmiṇāvyaṃ vāraṃ vi dʰāvati agre vācaḥ pavamānaḥ kanikradat

text: Radiant with light thou wentest to the sky, the luminous realm of -heaven. The Gods, O Indra, strove to win thy friendly love. XXIII Indra
meaning: धीभिर्मृजन्ति वाजिनं वने क्रीडन्तमत्यविम् अभि त्रिपृष्ठं मतयः समस्वरन्
sanskrit_iast: dʰībʰirmr̥janti vājinaṃ vane krīḍantamatyavim abʰi tripr̥ṣṭʰaṃ matayaḥ samasvaran

text: This Soma hath been pressed for thee, O Indra, bold one, mightiest, come! May Indra vigour fill thee full, as Surya fills mid-air with rays
meaning: असर्जि कलशाꣳ अभि मीढ्वान्त्सप्तिर्न वाजयुः पुनानो वाचं जनयन्नसिष्यदत्
sanskrit_iast: asarji kalaśām̐ abʰi mīḍʰvāntsaptirna vājayuḥ punāno vācaṃ janayannasiṣyadat

text: Slayer of Vritra, mount thy car! The bay steeds have been yoked by prayer. May, with its voice, the pressing-stone draw thine attention hitherward!
meaning: सोमः पवते जनिता मतीनां जनिता दिवो जनिता पृथिव्याः जनिताग्नेर्जनिता सूर्यस्य जनितेन्द्रस्य जनितोत विष्णोः
sanskrit_iast: somaḥ pavate janitā matīnāṃ janitā divo janitā pr̥tʰivyāḥ janitāgnerjanitā sūryasya janitendrasya janitota viṣṇoḥ

text: His pair of tawny coursers bring Indra, resistless in his might. Hither to Rishis' songs of praise and sacrifice performed by men. I Soma Pavamana
meaning: ब्रह्मा देवानां पदवीः कवीनां ऋषिर्विप्राणां महिषोमृगाणाम् श्येनो गृध्राणाꣳ स्वधितिर्वनानाꣳ सोमः पवित्रमत्येति रेभन्
sanskrit_iast: brahmā devānāṃ padavīḥ kavīnāṃ r̥ṣirviprāṇāṃ mahiṣomr̥gāṇām śyeno gr̥dʰrāṇām̐ svadʰitirvanānām̐ somaḥ pavitramatyeti rebʰan

text: Light of the sacrifice, be pours delicious meathp most wealthy, father and begetter of the Gods. He, gladdening, best of cheerers, juice that Indra loves, enriches with mysterious treasure earth and heaven.
meaning: प्रावीविपद्वाच ऊर्मिं न सिन्धुर्गिर स्तोमान्पवमानो मनीषाः अन्तः पश्यन्वृजनेमावराण्या तिष्ठति वृषभो गोषु जानन्
sanskrit_iast: prāvīvipadvāca ūrmiṃ na sindʰurgira stomānpavamāno manīṣāḥ antaḥ paśyanvr̥janemāvarāṇyā tiṣṭʰati vr̥ṣabʰo goṣu jānan

text: The Lord of heaven, the vigorous and far-seeing one, flowsshouting to the beaker with his thousand streams. Coloured like gold he rests in seats where Mitra dwells, the Steer made beautiful by rivers and by sheep.
meaning: अग्निं वो वृधन्तमध्वराणां पुरूतमम् अच्छा नप्त्रे सहस्वते
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ vo vr̥dʰantamadʰvarāṇāṃ purūtamam accʰā naptre sahasvate

text: As Pavamana thou flowest before the streams: thou goest on, before the hymn, before the kine. Thou sharest mighty booty in the van of war Soma, well-armed, thou art pressed out by men who press. II Soma Pavamana
meaning: अयं यथा न आभुवत्त्वष्टा रूपेव तक्ष्या अस्य क्रत्वा यशस्वतः
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ yatʰā na ābʰuvattvaṣṭā rūpeva takṣyā asya kratvā yaśasvataḥ

text: Through our desire of heroes, kine, and horses, vigorous Somadrops, Brilliant and swift, have been effused.
meaning: अयं विश्वा अभि श्रियो ऽग्निर्देवेषु पत्यते आ वाजैरुप नो गमत्
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ viśvā abʰi śriyo 'gnirdeveṣu patyate ā vājairupa no gamat

text: They, beautified by holy men and purified in both the hands, Are flowing through the fleecy cloth.
meaning: इममिन्द्र सुतं पिब ज्येष्ठममर्त्यं मदम् शुक्रस्य त्वाभ्यक्षरन्धारा ऋतस्य सादने
sanskrit_iast: imamindra sutaṃ piba jyeṣṭʰamamartyaṃ madam śukrasya tvābʰyakṣarandʰārā r̥tasya sādane

text: These Soma juices shall pour forth all treasures for the worshipper, From heaven and earth and firmament. III Soma Pavamana
meaning: न किष्ट्वद्रथीतरो हरी यदिन्द्र यच्छसे न किष्ट्वानु मज्मना न किः स्वश्व आनशे
sanskrit_iast: na kiṣṭvadratʰītaro harī yadindra yaccʰase na kiṣṭvānu majmanā na kiḥ svaśva ānaśe

text: Flow, Soma, Indu, dear to Gods, swift through the purifying sieve, And enter fndra in thy strength
meaning: इन्द्राय नूनमर्चतोक्थानि च ब्रवीतन सुता अमत्सुरिन्दवो ज्येष्ठं नमस्यता सहः
sanskrit_iast: indrāya nūnamarcatoktʰāni ca bravītana sutā amatsurindavo jyeṣṭʰaṃ namasyatā sahaḥ

text: As mighty food speed hitherward, Indu, as a most splendid steer: Sit in thy place as one with power
meaning: इन्द्र जुषस्व प्र वहा याहि शूर हरिह पिबा सुतस्य मतिर्न मधोश्चकानश्चारुर्मदाय
sanskrit_iast: indra juṣasva pra vahā yāhi śūra hariha pibā sutasya matirna madʰoścakānaścārurmadāya

text: The well-loved meath was made to flow, the stream of the creative juice: The Sage drew waters to himself.
meaning: इन्द्र जठरं नव्यं न पृणस्व मधोर्दिवो न अस्य सुतस्य स्वा३र्नोप त्वा मदाः सुवाचो अस्थुः
sanskrit_iast: indra jaṭʰaraṃ navyaṃ na pr̥ṇasva madʰordivo na asya sutasya svā3rnopa tvā madāḥ suvāco astʰuḥ

text: The mighty waters, yea, the floods accompany thee mighty one, When thou wilt clothe thee with the milk.
meaning: इन्द्रस्तुराषाण्मित्रो न जघान वृत्रं यतिर्न बिभेद वलं भृगुर्न ससाहे शत्रून्मदे सोमस्य
sanskrit_iast: indrasturāṣāṇmitro na jagʰāna vr̥traṃ yatirna bibʰeda valaṃ bʰr̥gurna sasāhe śatrūnmade somasya

text: The lake is brightened in the floods. Soma, our friend, heaven's prop and stay, Falls on the purifying cloth.
meaning: गोवित्पवस्व वसुविद्धिरण्यविद्रेतोधा इन्दो भुवनेष्वर्पितः त्वꣳ सुवीरो असि सोम विश्ववित्तं त्वा नर उप गिरेम आसते
sanskrit_iast: govitpavasva vasuviddʰiraṇyavidretodʰā indo bʰuvaneṣvarpitaḥ tvam̐ suvīro asi soma viśvavittaṃ tvā nara upa girema āsate

text: The tawny Bull hath bellowed. fair as mighty Mitra to behold He gleams and flashes with the Sun.
meaning: त्वं नृचक्षा असि सोम विश्वतः पवमान वृषभ ता वि धावसि स नः पवस्व वसुमद्धिरण्यवद्वयꣳ स्याम भुवनेषु जीवसे
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ nr̥cakṣā asi soma viśvataḥ pavamāna vr̥ṣabʰa tā vi dʰāvasi sa naḥ pavasva vasumaddʰiraṇyavadvayam̐ syāma bʰuvaneṣu jīvase

text: Songs, Indra, active in their might, are beautified for thee, wherewith Thou deckest thee for rapturous joy.
meaning: ईशान इमा भुवनानि ईयसे युजान इन्दो हरितः सुपर्ण्यः तास्ते क्षरन्तु मधुमद्घृतं पयस्तव व्रते सोम तिष्ठन्तु कृष्टयः
sanskrit_iast: īśāna imā bʰuvanāni īyase yujāna indo haritaḥ suparṇyaḥ tāste kṣarantu madʰumadgʰr̥taṃ payastava vrate soma tiṣṭʰantu kr̥ṣṭayaḥ

text: To thee who givest ample room we pray, to win the wild delight, That Thou mayst have exalted praise,
meaning: पवमानस्य विश्ववित्प्र ते सर्गा असृक्षत सूर्यस्येव न रश्मयः
sanskrit_iast: pavamānasya viśvavitpra te sargā asr̥kṣata sūryasyeva na raśmayaḥ

text: Winner of kine Indu, art thou, winner of heroes, steeds, and spoil: Primeval soul of sacrifice.
meaning: केतुं कृण्वं दिवस्परि विश्वा रूपाभ्यर्षसि समुद्रः सोम पिन्वसे
sanskrit_iast: ketuṃ kr̥ṇvaṃ divaspari viśvā rūpābʰyarṣasi samudraḥ soma pinvase

text: Pour on us, Indu! Indra-strength with a full stream of sweetness, like Parianya, sender of the rain! IV Soma Pavamana
meaning: जज्ञानो वाचमिष्यसि पवमान विधर्मणि क्रन्दं देवो न सूर्यः
sanskrit_iast: jajñāno vācamiṣyasi pavamāna vidʰarmaṇi krandaṃ devo na sūryaḥ

text: O Soma Pavamana, be victorious, win us high renown; And make us better than we are!
meaning: प्र सोमासो अधन्विषुः पवमानास इन्दवः श्रीणाना अप्सु वृञ्जते
sanskrit_iast: pra somāso adʰanviṣuḥ pavamānāsa indavaḥ śrīṇānā apsu vr̥ñjate

text: Win thou the light, win heavenly light, and, Soma, all felicities; And make us better than we are!
meaning: अभि गावो अधन्विषुरापो न प्रवता यतीः पुनाना इन्द्रमाशत
sanskrit_iast: abʰi gāvo adʰanviṣurāpo na pravatā yatīḥ punānā indramāśata

text: Win skilful strength and mental power! O Soma, drive away our foes; And make us better than we are!
meaning: प्र पवमान धन्वसि सोमेन्द्राय मादनः नृभिर्यतो वि नीयसे
sanskrit_iast: pra pavamāna dʰanvasi somendrāya mādanaḥ nr̥bʰiryato vi nīyase

text: Ye purifiers, purify Soma for Indra, for his drink; Make thou us better than we are!
meaning: इन्दो यदद्रिभिः सुतः पवित्रं परिदीयसे अरमिन्द्रस्य धाम्ने
sanskrit_iast: indo yadadribʰiḥ sutaḥ pavitraṃ paridīyase aramindrasya dʰāmne

text: Give us our portion in the Sun through thine own mental power and aids; And make us better than we are!
meaning: त्वꣳ सोम नृमादनः पवस्व चर्षणीधृतिः सस्निर्यो अनुमाद्यः
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ soma nr̥mādanaḥ pavasva carṣaṇīdʰr̥tiḥ sasniryo anumādyaḥ

text: Through thine own mental power and aids long may we look upon the Sun: Make thou us better than we are!
meaning: पवस्व वृत्रहन्तम उक्थेभिरनुमाद्यः शुचिः पावको अद्भुतः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva vr̥trahantama uktʰebʰiranumādyaḥ śuciḥ pāvako adbʰutaḥ

text: Well-weaponed Soma, pour to us a stream of riches doubly great; And make us better than we are!
meaning: शुचिः पावक उच्यते सोमः सुतः स मधुमान् देवावीरघशꣳसहा
sanskrit_iast: śuciḥ pāvaka ucyate somaḥ sutaḥ sa madʰumān devāvīragʰaśam̐sahā

text: As one victorious unsubdued in battle, pour forth wealth to us: And make us better than we are!
meaning: प्र कविर्देववीतये ऽव्या वारेभिरव्यत साह्वान्विश्वा अभि स्पृधः
sanskrit_iast: pra kavirdevavītaye 'vyā vārebʰiravyata sāhvānviśvā abʰi spr̥dʰaḥ

text: With offerings, Pavamana! men have strengthened thee as Law commands: Make thou us better than we are!
meaning: स हि ष्मा जरितृभ्य आ वाजं गोमन्तमिन्वति पवमानः सहस्रिणम्
sanskrit_iast: sa hi ṣmā jaritr̥bʰya ā vājaṃ gomantaminvati pavamānaḥ sahasriṇam

text: O Indu, bring us wealth in steeds brilliant and quickening all life; And make us better than we are! V Soma Pavamana
meaning: परि विश्वानि चेतसा मृज्यसे पवसे मती स नः सोम श्रवो विदः
sanskrit_iast: pari viśvāni cetasā mr̥jyase pavase matī sa naḥ soma śravo vidaḥ

text: Swift runs this giver of delight, even the stream of flowing juice: Swift runs this giver of delight.
meaning: अभ्यर्ष बृहद्यशो मघवद्भ्यो ध्रुवꣳ रयिम् इषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: abʰyarṣa br̥hadyaśo magʰavadbʰyo dʰruvam̐ rayim iṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: The Morning knows all precious things, the Goddess knows her grace to man: Swift runs this giver of delight.
meaning: त्वꣳ राजेव सुव्रतो गिरः सोमाविवेशिथ पुनानो वह्ने अद्भुत
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ rājeva suvrato giraḥ somāviveśitʰa punāno vahne adbʰuta

text: We have accepted thousands from Dhvasra's and Purusbanti's hands: Swift runs this giver of delight.
meaning: स वह्निरप्सु दुष्टरो मृज्यमानो गभस्त्योः सोमश्चमूषु सीदति
sanskrit_iast: sa vahnirapsu duṣṭaro mr̥jyamāno gabʰastyoḥ somaścamūṣu sīdati

text: From whom we have accepted thus thousands and three-times ten besides: Swift runs this giver of delight. VI Soma Pavamana
meaning: क्रीडुर्मखो न मꣳहयुः पवित्रꣳ सोम गच्छसि दधत्स्तोत्रे सुवीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: krīḍurmakʰo na mam̐hayuḥ pavitram̐ soma gaccʰasi dadʰatstotre suvīryam

text: Forth with his stream who gladdens best these Soma juices have been poured, Lauded with songs for mighty strength.
meaning: यवंयवं नो अन्धसा पुष्टंपुष्टं परि स्रव विश्वा च सोम सौभगा
sanskrit_iast: yavaṃyavaṃ no andʰasā puṣṭaṃpuṣṭaṃ pari srava viśvā ca soma saubʰagā

text: Thou flowest to enjoy the milk, and bringest valour, being, cleansed: Winning the spoil flow hitherward
meaning: इन्दो यथा तव स्तवो यथा ते जातमन्धसः नि बर्हिषि प्रिये सदः
sanskrit_iast: indo yatʰā tava stavo yatʰā te jātamandʰasaḥ ni barhiṣi priye sadaḥ

text: And, hymned by Jamadagni, let all nourishment that kine supply, And general praises, flow to us! VII Agni
meaning: उत नो गोविदश्ववित्पवस्व सोमान्धसा मक्षूतमेभिरहभिः
sanskrit_iast: uta no govidaśvavitpavasva somāndʰasā makṣūtamebʰirahabʰiḥ

text: For Jatavedas, worthy of our praise, will we frame with our mind this eulogy as 'twere a car. For good, in his assembly, is this care of ours. Let us not, in thy friendship, Agni, suffer harm!
meaning: यो जिनाति न जीयते हन्ति शत्रुमभीत्य स पवस्व सहस्रजित्
sanskrit_iast: yo jināti na jīyate hanti śatrumabʰītya sa pavasva sahasrajit

text: We will bring fuel and prepare our sacred gifts, reminding thee at each successive holy time. Fulfil our thoughts that we may lengthen out our lives Let us not, in thy friendship, Agni, suffer harm!
meaning: यास्ते धारा मधुश्चुतो ऽसृग्रमिन्द ऊतये ताभिः पवित्रमासदः
sanskrit_iast: yāste dʰārā madʰuścuto 'sr̥graminda ūtaye tābʰiḥ pavitramāsadaḥ

text: May we have power to kindle thee! Fulfil our prayers in thee the Gods eat the presented sacrifice. Bring hither the Adityas, for we long for them! Let us not, in thy friendship, Agni, suffer harm! VIII Mitra, Varuna, Aryaman
meaning: सो अर्षेन्द्राय पीतये तिरो वाराण्यव्यया सीदन्नृतस्य योनिमा
sanskrit_iast: so arṣendrāya pītaye tiro vārāṇyavyayā sīdannr̥tasya yonimā

text: Soon as the Sun hath risen I sing to you, to Mitra, Varuna, And Aryaman who slays the foe.
meaning: त्वꣳ सोम परि स्रव स्वादिष्ठो अङ्गिरोभ्यः वरिवोविद्धृतं पयः
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ soma pari srava svādiṣṭʰo aṅgirobʰyaḥ varivoviddʰr̥taṃ payaḥ

text: With wealth of gold may this my song bring unmolested might; may this, Sages! obtain the sacrifice!
meaning: तव श्रियो वर्ष्यस्येव विद्युतोग्नेश्चिकित्र उषसामिवेतयः यदोषधीरभिसृष्टो वनानि च परि स्वयं चिनुषे अन्नमासनि
sanskrit_iast: tava śriyo varṣyasyeva vidyutogneścikitra uṣasāmivetayaḥ yadoṣadʰīrabʰisr̥ṣṭo vanāni ca pari svayaṃ cinuṣe annamāsani

text: May we be thine, God Varuna, and with our princes, Mitra, thine: May we gain food and heavenly light! IX Indra
meaning: वातोपजूत इषितो वशाꣳ अनु तृषु यदन्ना वेविषद्वितिष्ठसे आ ते यतन्ते रथ्यो३ यथा पृथक्शर्धाꣳस्यग्ने अजरस्य धक्षतः
sanskrit_iast: vātopajūta iṣito vaśām̐ anu tr̥ṣu yadannā veviṣadvitiṣṭʰase ā te yatante ratʰyo3 yatʰā pr̥tʰakśardʰām̐syagne ajarasya dʰakṣataḥ

text: Drive all our enemies away, smite down the foes who press around, And bring the wealth for which we long:
meaning: मेधाकारं विदथस्य प्रसाधनमग्निꣳ होतारं परिभूतरं मतिम् त्वामर्भस्य हविषः समानमित्तवां महो वृणते नान्यं त्वत्
sanskrit_iast: medʰākāraṃ vidatʰasya prasādʰanamagnim̐ hotāraṃ paribʰūtaraṃ matim tvāmarbʰasya haviṣaḥ samānamittavāṃ maho vr̥ṇate nānyaṃ tvat

text: Of which the world shall know forthwith as given by thee abundantly: Bring us the wealth for which we long:
meaning: पुरूरुणा चिद्ध्यस्त्यवो नूनं वां वरुण मित्र वꣳसि वाꣳ सुमतिम्
sanskrit_iast: purūruṇā ciddʰyastyavo nūnaṃ vāṃ varuṇa mitra vam̐si vām̐ sumatim

text: O Indra, that which is concealed in strong firm place precipito us: Bring us the wealth for which we long! X Indra-Agni
meaning: ता वाꣳ सम्यगद्रुह्वाणेषमश्याम धाम च वयं वां मित्रा स्याम
sanskrit_iast: tā vām̐ samyagadruhvāṇeṣamaśyāma dʰāma ca vayaṃ vāṃ mitrā syāma

text: Yea, ye are priests of sacrifice, winners in war and holy works Indra and Agni, mark this well!
meaning: पातं नो मित्रा पायुभिरुत त्रायेथाꣳ सुत्रात्रा साह्याम दस्यूं तनूभिः
sanskrit_iast: pātaṃ no mitrā pāyubʰiruta trāyetʰām̐ sutrātrā sāhyāma dasyūṃ tanūbʰiḥ

text: Bountiful, riders on the car, slayers of Vritra unsubdued, Indra and Agni, mark this well!
meaning: उत्तिष्ठन्नोजसा सह पीत्वा शिप्रे अवेपयः सोममिन्द्र चमूसुतम्
sanskrit_iast: uttiṣṭʰannojasā saha pītvā śipre avepayaḥ somamindra camūsutam

text: The men with pressing-stones have pressed this meath of yours which gives delight: Indra and Agni, mark this well! XI Soma Pavamana
meaning: अनु त्वा रोदसी उभे स्पर्धमानमददेताम् इन्द्र यद्दस्युहाभवः
sanskrit_iast: anu tvā rodasī ubʰe spardʰamānamadadetām indra yaddasyuhābʰavaḥ

text: For Indra girt by Maruts, flow, thou Indu, very rich in meath, To seat thee in the place of song!
meaning: वाचमष्टापदीमहं नवस्रक्तिमृतावृधम् इन्द्रात्परितन्वं ममे
sanskrit_iast: vācamaṣṭāpadīmahaṃ navasraktimr̥tāvr̥dʰam indrātparitanvaṃ mame

text: Sage: who know the lore of speech deck thee, the strong sustainer, well: Men make thee bright and beautiful.
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी युवामिमे३ ऽभि स्तोमा अनूषत पिबतꣳ शम्भुवा सुतम्
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī yuvāmime3 'bʰi stomā anūṣata pibatam̐ śambʰuvā sutam
