text: Let Mitra, Varuna, Aryaman drink Pavamana's juice, yea, thine. Sage! let the Maruts drink thereof. XII Soma Pavamana
meaning: या वाꣳ सन्ति पुरुस्पृहो नियुतो दाशुषे नरा इन्द्राग्नी ताभिरा गतम्
sanskrit_iast: yā vām̐ santi puruspr̥ho niyuto dāśuṣe narā indrāgnī tābʰirā gatam

text: Deft-handed! thou when purified liftest thy voice amid the sea. Thou, Pavamana makest riches flow to us, yellow, abundant, much-desired.
meaning: ताभिरा गच्छतं नरोपेदꣳ सवनꣳ सुतम् इन्द्राग्नी सोमपीतये
sanskrit_iast: tābʰirā gaccʰataṃ naropedam̐ savanam̐ sutam indrāgnī somapītaye

text: Made pure, as Pavamana, in the sheep's long wool, the Steer bath bellowed in the vat. Thou flowest, Soma Pavamana! balmed with 'milk unto the meeting-place of Gods. XIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: अर्षा सोम द्युमत्तमो ऽभि द्रोणानि रोरुवत् सीदन्योनौ योनेष्वा
sanskrit_iast: arṣā soma dyumattamo 'bʰi droṇāni roruvat sīdanyonau yoneṣvā

text: Him here, the offspring of the sea, the ten swift fingers beautify: With the Adityas is he seen.
meaning: अप्सा इन्द्राय वायवे वरुणाय मरुद्भ्यः सोमा अर्षन्तु विष्णवे
sanskrit_iast: apsā indrāya vāyave varuṇāya marudbʰyaḥ somā arṣantu viṣṇave

text: With Indra and with Vayu he, effused, flows onward with the beams Of Surya to the cleansing sieve.
meaning: इषं तोकाय नो दधदस्मभ्यꣳ सोम विश्वतः आ पवस्व सहस्रिणम्
sanskrit_iast: iṣaṃ tokāya no dadʰadasmabʰyam̐ soma viśvataḥ ā pavasva sahasriṇam

text: Flow rich in sweets and lovely for our Bhaga, Vayu, Pushan, fair For Mitra and for Varuna! XIV Indra
meaning: सोम उ ष्वाणः सोतृभिरधि ष्णुभिरवीनाम् अश्वयेव हरिता याति धारया मन्द्रया याति धारया
sanskrit_iast: soma u ṣvāṇaḥ sotr̥bʰiradʰi ṣṇubʰiravīnām aśvayeva haritā yāti dʰārayā mandrayā yāti dʰārayā

text: With Indra splendid feasts be ours, rich in all strengthening things, wherewith, Wealthy in food, we may rejoice!
meaning: अनूपे गोमान्गोभिरक्षाः सोमो दुग्धाभिरक्षाः समुद्रं न संवरणान्यग्मन्मन्दी मदाय तोशते
sanskrit_iast: anūpe gomāngobʰirakṣāḥ somo dugdʰābʰirakṣāḥ samudraṃ na saṃvaraṇānyagmanmandī madāya tośate

text: Like thee, thyself, for singers yoked, thou movest, as it were besought, Bold one, the axle of the car,
meaning: यत्सोम चित्रमुक्थ्यं दिव्यं पार्थिवं वसु तन्नः पुनान आ भर
sanskrit_iast: yatsoma citramuktʰyaṃ divyaṃ pārtʰivaṃ vasu tannaḥ punāna ā bʰara

text: That, Satakratu, thou, to serve and please thy praisers, as it were, Stirrest the axle with thy strength. XV Indra
meaning: वृषा पुनान आयुꣳषि स्तनयन्नधि बर्हिषि हरिः सन्योनिमासदः
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣā punāna āyum̐ṣi stanayannadʰi barhiṣi hariḥ sanyonimāsadaḥ

text: As a good cow to him who milks, we call the doer of good deeds, To our assistance day by day.
meaning: युवꣳ हि स्थः स्वःपती इन्द्रश्च सोम गोपती ईशाना पिप्यतं धियः
sanskrit_iast: yuvam̐ hi stʰaḥ svaḥpatī indraśca soma gopatī īśānā pipyataṃ dʰiyaḥ

text: Come thou to our libations, drink of Soma, Soma-drinker! yea, The rich one's rapture giveth kine.
meaning: इन्द्रो मदाय वावृधे शवसे वृत्रहा नृभिः तमिन्महत्स्वाजिषूतिमर्भे हवामहे स वाजेषु प्र नो ऽविषत्
sanskrit_iast: indro madāya vāvr̥dʰe śavase vr̥trahā nr̥bʰiḥ taminmahatsvājiṣūtimarbʰe havāmahe sa vājeṣu pra no 'viṣat

text: So may we be acquainted with thine innermost benevolence: Neglect us not; come hitherward! XVI Indra
meaning: असि हि वीर सेन्यो ऽसि भूरि पराददिः असि दभ्रस्य चिद्वृधो यजमानाय शिक्षसि सुन्वते भूरि ते वसु
sanskrit_iast: asi hi vīra senyo 'si bʰūri parādadiḥ asi dabʰrasya cidvr̥dʰo yajamānāya śikṣasi sunvate bʰūri te vasu

text: As, like the Morning, thou has filled, O Indra, both the earth and heaven, So as the mighty one, great King of all the mighty race of men, the Goddess mother brought thee forth, the blessed mother gave thee life.
meaning: यदुदीरत आजयो धृष्णवे धीयते धनाम् युङ्क्ष्वा मदच्युता हरी कं हनः कं वसौ दधो ऽस्मां इन्द्र वसौ दधः
sanskrit_iast: yadudīrata ājayo dʰr̥ṣṇave dʰīyate dʰanām yuṅkṣvā madacyutā harī kaṃ hanaḥ kaṃ vasau dadʰo 'smāṃ indra vasau dadʰaḥ

text: Thou bearest in thine hand a lance like a long hook, great counsellor. As with his foremost foot a goat, draw down the branch O Maghavan. The Goddess mother brought thee forth, the blessed mother gave thee life.
meaning: स्वादोरित्था विषूवतो मध्वः पिबन्ति गौर्यः या इन्द्रेण सयावरीर्वृष्णा मदन्ति शोभसे वस्वीरनु स्वराज्यम्
sanskrit_iast: svādorittʰā viṣūvato madʰvaḥ pibanti gauryaḥ yā indreṇa sayāvarīrvr̥ṣṇā madanti śobʰase vasvīranu svarājyam

text: Relax that mortal's stubborn strength whose heart is bent on wickedness. Trample him down beneath thy feet who watches for and aims at us. The Goddess mother brought thee forth, the blessed mother gave thee life. XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: ता अस्य पृशनायुवः सोमꣳ श्रीणन्ति पृश्नयः प्रिया इन्द्रस्य धेनवो वज्रꣳ हिन्वन्ति सायकं वस्वीरनु स्वराज्यम्
sanskrit_iast: tā asya pr̥śanāyuvaḥ somam̐ śrīṇanti pr̥śnayaḥ priyā indrasya dʰenavo vajram̐ hinvanti sāyakaṃ vasvīranu svarājyam

text: Soma, the dweller on the hills, effused, hath flowed into the sieve. All-bounteous art thou in carouse.
meaning: ता अस्य नमसा सहः सपर्यन्ति प्रचेतसः व्रतान्यस्य सश्चिरे पुरूणि पूर्वचित्तये वस्वीरनु स्वराज्यम्
sanskrit_iast: tā asya namasā sahaḥ saparyanti pracetasaḥ vratānyasya saścire purūṇi pūrvacittaye vasvīranu svarājyam

text: Thou art a holy bard, a Sage; the meath offspring of thy sap: All bounteous art thou in carouse.
meaning: असाव्यꣳशुर्मदायाप्सु दक्षो गिरिष्ठाः श्येनो न योनिमासदत्
sanskrit_iast: asāvyam̐śurmadāyāpsu dakṣo giriṣṭʰāḥ śyeno na yonimāsadat

text: All-d6ties of one accorcl have come that they may drink of thee: All-bounteous art thou in carouse. XVIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: शुभ्रमन्धो देववातमप्सु धौतं नृभिः सुतम् स्वदन्ति गावः पयोभिः
sanskrit_iast: śubʰramandʰo devavātamapsu dʰautaṃ nr̥bʰiḥ sutam svadanti gāvaḥ payobʰiḥ

text: Effused is he who brings good things, who brings us store of wealth, and sweet refreshing food, Soma who brings us quiet homes:
meaning: आदीमश्वं न हेतारमशूशुभन्नमृताय मधो रसꣳ सधमादे
sanskrit_iast: ādīmaśvaṃ na hetāramaśūśubʰannamr̥tāya madʰo rasam̐ sadʰamāde

text: He whom our Indra and the Marut host shall drink, Bhaga shall drink with Aryaman, By whom we bring to us Mitra and Varuna, and Indra for our great defence. XIX Soma Pavamana
meaning: अभि द्युभ्नं बृहद्यश इषस्पते दीदिहि देव देवयुम् वि कोशं मध्यमं युव
sanskrit_iast: abʰi dyubʰnaṃ br̥hadyaśa iṣaspate dīdihi deva devayum vi kośaṃ madʰyamaṃ yuva

text: Friends, hymn your Lord who makes him pure for rapturous carouse: let them Sweeten him, as a child, with lauds and sacred gifts
meaning: आ वच्यस्व सुदक्ष चम्वोः सुतो विशां वह्निर्न विश्पतिः वृष्टिं दिवः पवस्व रीतिमपो जिन्वन्गविष्टये धियः
sanskrit_iast: ā vacyasva sudakṣa camvoḥ suto viśāṃ vahnirna viśpatiḥ vr̥ṣṭiṃ divaḥ pavasva rītimapo jinvangaviṣṭaye dʰiyaḥ

text: Like as a calf with mother cows, so Indu is urged forth and sent, Glorified by our hymns;, the god-delighting juice.
meaning: प्राणा शिशुर्महीनाꣳ हिन्वन्नृतस्य दीधितिम् विश्वा परि प्रिया भुवदध द्विता
sanskrit_iast: prāṇā śiśurmahīnām̐ hinvannr̥tasya dīdʰitim viśvā pari priyā bʰuvadadʰa dvitā

text: Effectual help to power is he. he is a banquet for the troop, He who hath been effused, more rich in meath, for Gods. XX Soma Pavamana
meaning: उप त्रितस्य पाष्यो३रभक्त यद्गुहा पदम् यज्ञस्य सप्त धामभिरध प्रियम्
sanskrit_iast: upa tritasya pāṣyo3rabʰakta yadguhā padam yajñasya sapta dʰāmabʰiradʰa priyam

text: For us the Soma juices flow, the drops best furtherers of weal, Effused as friends, without a spot, benevolent, finders of the light.
meaning: त्रीणि त्रितस्य धारया पृष्टेष्वैरयद्रयिम् मिमीते अस्य योजना वि सुक्रतुः
sanskrit_iast: trīṇi tritasya dʰārayā pr̥ṣṭeṣvairayadrayim mimīte asya yojanā vi sukratuḥ

text: These Soma juices, skill.ed in song, purified, blent with milk and curd, Hastening on and firmly set in oil resemble beauteous suns.
meaning: पवस्व वाजसातये पवित्रे धारया सुतः इन्द्राय सोम विष्णवे देवेभ्यो मधुमत्तरः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva vājasātaye pavitre dʰārayā sutaḥ indrāya soma viṣṇave devebʰyo madʰumattaraḥ

text: Effused by means of pressing- stones, upon the oxhide visible, They, treasure-finders, have announced food unto us from every side. XXI Soma Pavamana
meaning: त्वाꣳ रिहन्ति धीतयो हरिं पवित्रे अद्रुहः वत्सं जातं न मातरः पवमान विधर्मणि
sanskrit_iast: tvām̐ rihanti dʰītayo hariṃ pavitre adruhaḥ vatsaṃ jātaṃ na mātaraḥ pavamāna vidʰarmaṇi

text: Pour forth this wealth with this purification: flow onward to the yellow lake, O Indu! Here, too, the bright one, wind-swift, full of wisdom, shall give a son to him who cometh quickly.
meaning: त्वं द्यां च महिव्रत पृथिवीं चाति जभ्रिषे प्रति द्रापिममुञ्चथाः पवमान महित्वना
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ dyāṃ ca mahivrata pr̥tʰivīṃ cāti jabʰriṣe prati drāpimamuñcatʰāḥ pavamāna mahitvanā

text: Flow on for us with this purification to the famed ford of thee whose due is glory! May the foe-queller shake us down, for triumph, like a tree's ripe fruit, sixty thousand treasures!
meaning: इन्दुर्वाजी पवते गोन्योघा इन्द्रे सोमः सह इन्वन्मदाय हन्ति रक्षो बाधते पर्यरातिं वरिवस्कृण्वन्वृजनस्य राजा
sanskrit_iast: indurvājī pavate gonyogʰā indre somaḥ saha invanmadāya hanti rakṣo bādʰate paryarātiṃ varivaskr̥ṇvanvr̥janasya rājā

text: Eagerly do we pray for those two exploits, at the blue lake and Prisana, wrought in battle. He sent our enemies to sleep and slew them, and turned away the foolish and unfriendly. XXII Agni
meaning: अध धारया मध्वा पृचानस्तिरो रोम पवते अद्रिदुग्धः इन्दुरिन्द्रस्य सख्यं जुषाणो देवो देवस्य मत्सरो मदाय
sanskrit_iast: adʰa dʰārayā madʰvā pr̥cānastiro roma pavate adridugdʰaḥ indurindrasya sakʰyaṃ juṣāṇo devo devasya matsaro madāya

text: O Agni, be our nearest friend, yea, our protector and our kind deliverer!
meaning: अभि व्रतानि पवते पुनानो देवो देवान्त्स्वेन रसेन पृञ्चन् इन्दुर्धर्माण्यृतुथा वसानो दश क्षिपो अव्यत सानो अव्ये
sanskrit_iast: abʰi vratāni pavate punāno devo devāntsvena rasena pr̥ñcan indurdʰarmāṇyr̥tutʰā vasāno daśa kṣipo avyata sāno avye

text: As gracious Agni, famed for treasures, come, and, most resplendent, give us store of wealth!
meaning: आ ते अग्न इधीमहि द्युमन्तं देवाजरम् युद्ध स्या ते पनीयसी समिद्दीदयति द्यवीषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: ā te agna idʰīmahi dyumantaṃ devājaram yuddʰa syā te panīyasī samiddīdayati dyavīṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: To thee then, O most bright, O radiant God, we come with prayer for happiness for our friends. XXIII Indra
meaning: आ ते अग्न ऋचा हविः शुक्रस्य ज्योतिषस्पते सुश्चन्द्र दस्म विश्पते हव्यवाट्तुभ्यꣳ हूयत इषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: ā te agna r̥cā haviḥ śukrasya jyotiṣaspate suścandra dasma viśpate havyavāṭtubʰyam̐ hūyata iṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: May we, with Indra and the Gods to aid us, bring these existing worlds to full completion!
meaning: ओभे सुश्चन्द्र विश्पते दर्वी श्रीणीष आसनि उतो न उत्पुपूर्या उक्थेषु शवसस्पत इषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: obʰe suścandra viśpate darvī śrīṇīṣa āsani uto na utpupūryā uktʰeṣu śavasaspata iṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: Our sacrifice, our bodies, and our offspring, let Indra with the Adityas-form and finish!
meaning: इन्द्राय साम गायत विप्राय बृहते बृहत् ब्रह्माकृते विपश्चिते पनस्यवे
sanskrit_iast: indrāya sāma gāyata viprāya br̥hate br̥hat brahmākr̥te vipaścite panasyave

text: With the Adityas, with the band of Maruts, let Indra send us medicines to heal us! XXIV Indra
meaning: त्वमिन्द्राभिभूरसि त्वꣳ सूर्यमरोचयः विश्वकर्मा विश्वदेवो महाꣳ असि
sanskrit_iast: tvamindrābʰibʰūrasi tvam̐ sūryamarocayaḥ viśvakarmā viśvadevo mahām̐ asi

text: Sing to your Indra, mightiest Vritra-slayer, sing to the Sage the song that he accepteth! I Soma Pavamana
meaning: विभ्राजं ज्योतिषा त्व३रगच्छो रोचनं दिवः देवास्त इन्द्र सख्याय येमिरे
sanskrit_iast: vibʰrājaṃ jyotiṣā tva3ragaccʰo rocanaṃ divaḥ devāsta indra sakʰyāya yemire

text: The God declares the deities' generations, like Usana, proclaiming lofty wisdom. With brilliant kin far-ruling, sanctifying, the wild boar, singing with his foot, advances.
meaning: असावि सोम इन्द्र ते शविष्ठ धृष्णवा गहि आ त्वा पृणक्त्विन्द्रियꣳ रजः सूर्यो न रश्मिभिः
sanskrit_iast: asāvi soma indra te śaviṣṭʰa dʰr̥ṣṇavā gahi ā tvā pr̥ṇaktvindriyam̐ rajaḥ sūryo na raśmibʰiḥ

text: The swans, the Vrishagnas from anear us, restless, have brought their clamour to our dwelling-- Friends come to Pavamana, meet for praises-and sound in concert their resistless music.
meaning: आ तिष्ठ वृत्रहन्रथं युक्ता ते ब्रह्मणा हरी अर्वाचीनꣳ सु ते मनो ग्रावा कृणोतु वग्नुना
sanskrit_iast: ā tiṣṭʰa vr̥trahanratʰaṃ yuktā te brahmaṇā harī arvācīnam̐ su te mano grāvā kr̥ṇotu vagnunā

text: He takes the swiftness of the great Far strider: cows low as, 'twere to him who sports at pleasure. He with the sharpened horns brings forth abundance: the silvery shines by night, by day the golden.
meaning: इन्द्रमिद्धरी वहतो ऽप्रतिधृष्टशवसम् ऋषीणाꣳ सुष्टुतीरुप यज्ञं च मानुषाणाम्
sanskrit_iast: indramiddʰarī vahato 'pratidʰr̥ṣṭaśavasam r̥ṣīṇām̐ suṣṭutīrupa yajñaṃ ca mānuṣāṇām

text: Like cars that thunder on their way, like coursers eager for renown, Have Soma drops flowed forth for wealth.
meaning: ज्योतिर्यज्ञस्य पवते मधु प्रियं पिता देवानां जनिता विभूवसुः दधाति रत्नꣳ स्वधयोरपीच्यं मदिन्तमो मत्सर इन्द्रियो रसः
sanskrit_iast: jyotiryajñasya pavate madʰu priyaṃ pitā devānāṃ janitā vibʰūvasuḥ dadʰāti ratnam̐ svadʰayorapīcyaṃ madintamo matsara indriyo rasaḥ

text: Forth have they rushed from holding hands, like chariots that are urged to speed, Like joyful songs of singing-men.
meaning: अभिक्रन्दन्कलशं वाज्यर्षति पतिर्दिवः शतधारो विचक्षणः हरिर्मित्रस्य सदनेषु सीदति मर्मृजानो ऽविभिः सिन्धुभिर्वृषा
sanskrit_iast: abʰikrandankalaśaṃ vājyarṣati patirdivaḥ śatadʰāro vicakṣaṇaḥ harirmitrasya sadaneṣu sīdati marmr̥jāno 'vibʰiḥ sindʰubʰirvr̥ṣā

text: The Somas deck themselves with milk as kings are graced with eulogies, And, with seven priests, the sacrifice.
meaning: अग्रे सिन्धूनां पवमानो अर्षत्यग्रे वाचो अग्रियो गोषु गच्छसि अग्रे वाजस्य भजसे महद्धनꣳ स्वायुधः सोतृभिः सोम सूयसे
sanskrit_iast: agre sindʰūnāṃ pavamāno arṣatyagre vāco agriyo goṣu gaccʰasi agre vājasya bʰajase mahaddʰanam̐ svāyudʰaḥ sotr̥bʰiḥ soma sūyase

text: Pressed for the gladdening draught the drops flow forth abundantly with song, Flow with the stream of savoury juice.
meaning: असृक्षत प्र वाजिनो गव्या सोमासो अश्वया शुक्रासो वीरयाशवः
sanskrit_iast: asr̥kṣata pra vājino gavyā somāso aśvayā śukrāso vīrayāśavaḥ

text: Winning Vivasvan's glory and speeding the light of Dawn, the suns, Pass through the openings of the cloth.
meaning: शुम्भमानो ऋतायुभिर्मृज्यमाना गभस्त्योः पवन्ते वारे अव्यये
sanskrit_iast: śumbʰamāno r̥tāyubʰirmr̥jyamānā gabʰastyoḥ pavante vāre avyaye

text: The singing-men of ancient time open the doors of sacred songs-- The men who bring the mighty One.
meaning: ते विश्वा दाशुषे वसु सोमा दिव्यानि पार्थिवा पवन्तामान्तरिक्ष्या
sanskrit_iast: te viśvā dāśuṣe vasu somā divyāni pārtʰivā pavantāmāntarikṣyā

text: In close society have come the priests, the sevenfold brotherhood, Filling the station of the One.
meaning: पवस्व देववीरति पवित्रꣳ सोम रꣳह्या इन्द्रमिन्दो वृषा विश
sanskrit_iast: pavasva devavīrati pavitram̐ soma ram̐hyā indramindo vr̥ṣā viśa

text: He makes us kin with Gods, he joins the Sun, for seeing, with mine eye; I milk the Sage's offspring forth.
meaning: आ वच्यस्व महि प्सरो वृषेन्दो द्युम्नवत्तमः आ योनिं धर्णसिः सदः
sanskrit_iast: ā vacyasva mahi psaro vr̥ṣendo dyumnavattamaḥ ā yoniṃ dʰarṇasiḥ sadaḥ

text: The Sun beholdeth with his eye the heaven's dear quarter which the priests Have set within the sacred cell. II Soma Pavamana
meaning: अधुक्षत प्रियं मधु धारा सुतस्य वेधसः अपो वसिष्ट सुक्रतुः
sanskrit_iast: adʰukṣata priyaṃ madʰu dʰārā sutasya vedʰasaḥ apo vasiṣṭa sukratuḥ

text: Forth on their way the glorious drops have flowed for maintenance of Law, Knowing what suits this worshipper.
meaning: महान्तं त्वा महीरन्वापो अर्षन्ति सिन्धवः यद्गोभिर्वासयिष्यसे
sanskrit_iast: mahāntaṃ tvā mahīranvāpo arṣanti sindʰavaḥ yadgobʰirvāsayiṣyase

text: Down in the mighty waters sinks the stream of Meath, most excellent, Oblation best of all in worth.
meaning: समुद्रो अप्सु मामृजे विष्टम्भो धरुणो दिवः सोमः पवित्रे अस्मयुः
sanskrit_iast: samudro apsu māmr̥je viṣṭambʰo dʰaruṇo divaḥ somaḥ pavitre asmayuḥ

text: About the holy place the Steer, true, guileless, noblest, hath sent forth, Continuous voices in the wood.
meaning: अचिक्रदद्वृषा हरिर्महान्मित्रो न दर्शतः सꣳ सूर्येण दिद्युते
sanskrit_iast: acikradadvr̥ṣā harirmahānmitro na darśataḥ sam̐ sūryeṇa didyute

text: When the Sage, purging manly deeds and lofty wisdom flows, around,
meaning: गिरस्त इन्द ओजसा मर्मृज्यन्ते अपस्युवः याभिर्मदाय शुम्भसे
sanskrit_iast: girasta inda ojasā marmr̥jyante apasyuvaḥ yābʰirmadāya śumbʰase

text: When purified, he sits enthroned as King over the warring clans. What time the sages speed him on.
meaning: तं त्वा मदाय घृष्वय उ लोककृत्नुमीमहे तव प्रशस्तये महे
sanskrit_iast: taṃ tvā madāya gʰr̥ṣvaya u lokakr̥tnumīmahe tava praśastaye mahe

text: Most dear, gold-coloured, in the fleece he sinks, and settles in the wood: The singer is besieged with song.
meaning: गोषा इन्दो नृषा अस्यश्वसा वाजसा उत आत्मा यज्ञस्य पूर्व्यः
sanskrit_iast: goṣā indo nr̥ṣā asyaśvasā vājasā uta ātmā yajñasya pūrvyaḥ

text: He goes to Indra, Vayu, and the Asvins with the rapturous joy, To whomsoe'er his power delights.
meaning: अस्मभ्यमिन्दविन्द्रियं मधोः पवस्व धारया पर्जन्यो वृष्टिमाꣳ इव
sanskrit_iast: asmabʰyamindavindriyaṃ madʰoḥ pavasva dʰārayā parjanyo vr̥ṣṭimām̐ iva

text: The waves of pleasant Soma flow to Bhaga, Mitra, Varuna, Well knowing, through his mighty powers.
meaning: सना च सोम जेषि च पवमान महि श्रवः अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: sanā ca soma jeṣi ca pavamāna mahi śravaḥ atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: Gain for us, O ye Heaven and Earth, riches of Meath to win us strength: Gain for us treasures and renown.
meaning: सना ज्योतिः सना स्वा३र्विश्वा च सोम सौभगा अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: sanā jyotiḥ sanā svā3rviśvā ca soma saubʰagā atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: We choose to-day that chariot-steed of thine, the strong, that brings us bliss, The guardian, the desire of all;
meaning: सना दक्षमुत क्रतुमप सोम मृधो जहि अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: sanā dakṣamuta kratumapa soma mr̥dʰo jahi atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: The excellent, the gladdener, the Sage with heart that understands. The guardian, the desire of all;
meaning: पवीतारः पुनीतन सोममिन्द्राय पातवे अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: pavītāraḥ punītana somamindrāya pātave atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: Who for ourselves, O thou most wise, is wealth and fair intelligence, The guardian, the desire of all. III Agni
meaning: त्वꣳ सूर्ये न आ भज तव क्रत्वा तवोतिभिः अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ sūrye na ā bʰaja tava kratvā tavotibʰiḥ atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: Agni Vaisvanara, born in course of Order, the messenger of earth, the head of heaven, The Sage, the Sovran, guest of men, our vessel fit for their mouth, the Gods have generated.
meaning: तव क्रत्वा तवोतिभिर्ज्योक्पश्येम सूर्यम् अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: tava kratvā tavotibʰirjyokpaśyema sūryam atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: To thee, immortal! when to life thou springest all the Gods sing for joy as to their infant. They by thy mental powers were made immortal, Vaisvdnara when thou shonest from thy parents.
meaning: अभ्यर्ष स्वायुध सोम द्विबर्हसꣳ रयिम् अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: abʰyarṣa svāyudʰa soma dvibarhasam̐ rayim atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: Him have they praised, mid-point of sacrifices, great cistern of libations, seat of riches. Vaisvanara, conveyer of oblations, ensign of worship, have the Gods engendered. IV Mitra-Varuna
meaning: अभ्या३र्षानपच्युतो वाजिन्त्समत्सु सासहिः अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: abʰyā3rṣānapacyuto vājintsamatsu sāsahiḥ atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: Sing forth unto your Varuna and Mitra with a song inspired: They, mighty Lords, are lofty law.
meaning: त्वां यज्ञैरवीवृधन्पवमान विधर्मणि अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: tvāṃ yajñairavīvr̥dʰanpavamāna vidʰarmaṇi atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: Full springs of fatness, sovran Kings, Mitra and Varuna, the twain, Gods glorified among the Gods,
meaning: रयिं नश्चित्रमश्विनमिन्दो विश्वायुमा भर अथा नो वस्यसस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: rayiṃ naścitramaśvinamindo viśvāyumā bʰara atʰā no vasyasaskr̥dʰi

text: So help ye us to riches, great celestial and terrestrial wealth! Vast is your sway among the Gods. V Indra
meaning: तरत्स मन्दी धावति धारा सुतस्यान्धसः तरत्स मन्दी धावति
sanskrit_iast: taratsa mandī dʰāvati dʰārā sutasyāndʰasaḥ taratsa mandī dʰāvati

text: O Indra marvellously bright, come, these libations long for thee, Thus by firie fingers purified!
meaning: उस्रा वेद वसूनां मर्त्तस्य देव्यवसः तरत्स मन्दी धावति
sanskrit_iast: usrā veda vasūnāṃ marttasya devyavasaḥ taratsa mandī dʰāvati

text: Urged by the holy singer, sped by song, come nigb, O Indra, to The sacrificing suppliant's pravers!
meaning: ध्वस्रयोः पुरुषन्त्योरा सहस्राणि दद्महे तरत्स मन्दी धावति
sanskrit_iast: dʰvasrayoḥ puruṣantyorā sahasrāṇi dadmahe taratsa mandī dʰāvati

text: Approach, O Indra, basting thee, Lord of bay horses, to our prayers: In our libation t ake delight! VI Indra-Agni
meaning: आ ययोस्त्रिꣳशतं तना सहस्राणि च दद्महे तरत्स मन्दी धावति
sanskrit_iast: ā yayostrim̐śataṃ tanā sahasrāṇi ca dadmahe taratsa mandī dʰāvati

text: Glorify him who compasses all forests with his glowing Dame, And leaves them blackened by his tongue.
meaning: एते सोमा असृक्षत गृणानाः शवसे महे मदिन्तमस्य धारया
sanskrit_iast: ete somā asr̥kṣata gr̥ṇānāḥ śavase mahe madintamasya dʰārayā

text: He who gains Indra's grace by fire enkindled, finds as easy way Over the floods to splendid wealth.
meaning: अभि गव्यानि वीतये नृम्णा पुनानो अर्षसि सनद्वाजः परि स्रव
sanskrit_iast: abʰi gavyāni vītaye nr̥mṇā punāno arṣasi sanadvājaḥ pari srava

text: Give us, ye twain, swift steeds to bring Indra and Agni, and bestow Abundant food with wealth on us. VII Soma Pavamana.
meaning: उत नो गोमतीरिषो विश्वा अर्ष परिष्टुभः गृणानो जमदग्निना
sanskrit_iast: uta no gomatīriṣo viśvā arṣa pariṣṭubʰaḥ gr̥ṇāno jamadagninā

text: Indu hath started forth for Indra's settled place, and slights not,. as a friend, the promise of his friend. Soma comes onward like a youth with youthful maids, and gains the beaker by a course of hundred paths.
meaning: इमꣳ स्तोममर्हते जातवेदसे रथमिव सं महेमा मनीषया भद्रा हि नः प्रमतिरस्य सꣳसद्यग्ने सख्ये मा रिषामा वयं तव
sanskrit_iast: imam̐ stomamarhate jātavedase ratʰamiva saṃ mahemā manīṣayā bʰadrā hi naḥ pramatirasya sam̐sadyagne sakʰye mā riṣāmā vayaṃ tava

text: Your hymns of pleasant sound, praiseworthy, fond of lauds, have come into the hall enclosed for sacrifice. Singers have hymned the golden-coloured as he sports, and milchkine have come near to meet him with their milk,
meaning: भरामेध्मं कृणवामा हवीꣳषि ते चितयन्तः पर्वणापर्वणा वयम् जीवातवे प्रतरꣳ साधया धियो ऽग्ने सख्ये म रिषामा वयं तव
sanskrit_iast: bʰarāmedʰmaṃ kr̥ṇavāmā havīm̐ṣi te citayantaḥ parvaṇāparvaṇā vayam jīvātave prataram̐ sādʰayā dʰiyo 'gne sakʰye ma riṣāmā vayaṃ tava

text: O Soma, Indu, while they cleanse thee, with thy wave pour orb us plentiful accumulated food, Which, ceaseless, thrice a day shall yield us hero power enriched. with store of nourishment, and strength, and meath. VIII Indra.
meaning: शकेम त्वा समिधꣳ साधया धियस्त्वे देवा हविरदन्त्याहुतम् त्वमादित्याꣳ आ वह तान्ह्यू३श्मस्यग्ने सख्ये मा रिषामा वयं तव
sanskrit_iast: śakema tvā samidʰam̐ sādʰayā dʰiyastve devā haviradantyāhutam tvamādityām̐ ā vaha tānhyū3śmasyagne sakʰye mā riṣāmā vayaṃ tava

text: No one by deed attains to him who works and strengthensevermore: No, not by sacrifice, to Indra praised of all, resistless, daring, bold in might;
meaning: प्रति वाꣳ सूर उदिते मित्रं गृणीषे वरुणम् अर्यमणꣳ रिशादसम्
sanskrit_iast: prati vām̐ sūra udite mitraṃ gr̥ṇīṣe varuṇam aryamaṇam̐ riśādasam

text: The powerful conqueror, invincible in war, him at whose birth the mighty ones, The kine who spread afar, sent their loud voices out, heavens, earths sent their loud voices out. IX Soma Vaisvanara
meaning: राया हिरण्यया मतिरियमवृकाय शवसे इयं विप्रामेधसातये
sanskrit_iast: rāyā hiraṇyayā matiriyamavr̥kāya śavase iyaṃ viprāmedʰasātaye

text: Sit down, O friends, and sing aloud to him who purifies himself: Deck him for glory, like a child, with holy rites
meaning: ते स्याम देव वरुण ते मित्र सूरिभिः सह इषꣳ स्वश्च धीमहि
sanskrit_iast: te syāma deva varuṇa te mitra sūribʰiḥ saha iṣam̐ svaśca dʰīmahi

text: Loose him who bringeth household wealth, even as a calf with. mother kine, Him who bath double strength, strong, god-delighting juice!
meaning: भिन्धि विश्वा अप द्विषः परि बाधो जही मृधः वसु स्पार्हं तदा भर
sanskrit_iast: bʰindʰi viśvā apa dviṣaḥ pari bādʰo jahī mr̥dʰaḥ vasu spārhaṃ tadā bʰara

text: Purify him who gives us power, most blissful one, that he may be A banquet for the troop, Mitra, and Varuna! X Soma Pavamana
meaning: यस्य ते विश्वमानुषग्भूरेर्दत्तस्य वेदति वसु स्पार्हं तदा भर
sanskrit_iast: yasya te viśvamānuṣagbʰūrerdattasya vedati vasu spārhaṃ tadā bʰara

text: The Strong hath flowed forth in a thousand streams, flowed through the filter and the sheep's long wool.
meaning: यद्वीडाविन्द्र यत्स्थिरे यत्पर्शाने पराभृतम् वसु स्पार्हं तदा भर
sanskrit_iast: yadvīḍāvindra yatstʰire yatparśāne parābʰr̥tam vasu spārhaṃ tadā bʰara

text: With ceaseless genial flow the Strong hath run, purified by the waters, blent with milk.
meaning: यज्ञस्य हि स्थ ऋत्विजा सस्नी वाजेषु कर्मसु इन्द्राग्नी तस्य बोधतम्
sanskrit_iast: yajñasya hi stʰa r̥tvijā sasnī vājeṣu karmasu indrāgnī tasya bodʰatam

text: Pressed out with stones, directed by the men, go forth, O Soma, into Indra's throat! XI Soma Pavamana
meaning: तोशासा रथयावाना वृत्रहणापराजिता इन्द्राग्नी तस्य बोधतम्
sanskrit_iast: tośāsā ratʰayāvānā vr̥trahaṇāparājitā indrāgnī tasya bodʰatam

text: The Soma juices which have been expressed afar or near at hand, Or there on Saryanavan's bank,
meaning: इदं वां मदिरं मध्वधुक्षन्नद्रिभिर्नरः इन्द्राग्नी तस्य बोधतम्
sanskrit_iast: idaṃ vāṃ madiraṃ madʰvadʰukṣannadribʰirnaraḥ indrāgnī tasya bodʰatam

text: Those pressed among Arjikas, pressed among the active, in, men's homes, Or pressed among the Fivefold Tribes--
meaning: इन्द्रायेन्दो मरुत्वते पवस्व मधुमत्तमः अर्कस्य योनिमासदम्
sanskrit_iast: indrāyendo marutvate pavasva madʰumattamaḥ arkasya yonimāsadam

text: May these celestial drops, expressed, pour forth upon us, as they flow, Rain from the heavens and hero strength! XII Agni
meaning: तं त्वा विप्रा वचोविदः परिष्कृण्वन्ति धर्णसिम् सं त्वा मृजन्त्यायवः
sanskrit_iast: taṃ tvā viprā vacovidaḥ pariṣkr̥ṇvanti dʰarṇasim saṃ tvā mr̥jantyāyavaḥ

text: May Vatsa draw thy mind away even from thy loftiest dwelling-place! Agni, I yearn for thee with song.
meaning: रसं ते मित्रो अर्यमा पिबन्तु वरुणः कवे पवमानस्य मरुतः
sanskrit_iast: rasaṃ te mitro aryamā pibantu varuṇaḥ kave pavamānasya marutaḥ

text: Thou art alike in many a place: through all the regions thou art Lord. In fray and fight we call on thee.
meaning: मृज्यमानः सुहस्त्य समुद्रे वाचमिन्वसि रयिं पिशङ्गं बहुलं पुरुस्पृहं पवमानाभ्यर्षसि
sanskrit_iast: mr̥jyamānaḥ suhastya samudre vācaminvasi rayiṃ piśaṅgaṃ bahulaṃ puruspr̥haṃ pavamānābʰyarṣasi

text: When we are seeking spoil we call Agni to help us in the strife, Giver of wordrous gifts in war. XIII Indra 1, O Indra, bring great strength to us, bring valour, 5atakratu, thou most active, bring A hero conquering in war!
meaning: पुनानो वरे पवमनो अव्यये वृषो अचिक्रदद्वने देवानाꣳ सोम पवमान निष्कृतं गोभिरञ्जानो अर्षसि
sanskrit_iast: punāno vare pavamano avyaye vr̥ṣo acikradadvane devānām̐ soma pavamāna niṣkr̥taṃ gobʰirañjāno arṣasi

text: For, gracious Satakratu, thou hast ever been a mother and a sire to us, So now for bliss we pray to thee.
meaning: एतमु त्यं दश क्षिपो मृजन्ति सिन्धुमातरम् समादित्येभिरख्यत
sanskrit_iast: etamu tyaṃ daśa kṣipo mr̥janti sindʰumātaram samādityebʰirakʰyata

text: To thee, strong! much-invoked! who showest forth thy strength, made very mighty! do I speak: So grant thou us heroic power! XIV Indra
meaning: समिन्द्रेणोत वायुना सुत एति पवित्र आ सꣳ सूर्यस्य रश्मिभिः
sanskrit_iast: samindreṇota vāyunā suta eti pavitra ā sam̐ sūryasya raśmibʰiḥ

text: Stone-Darting Indra, wonderous God, what wealth thou hast not given me here, That bounty, treasure-finder! bring, filling full both thy hands, to us!
meaning: स नो भगाय वायवे पूष्णे पवस्व मधुमान् चारुर्मित्रे वरुणे च
sanskrit_iast: sa no bʰagāya vāyave pūṣṇe pavasva madʰumān cārurmitre varuṇe ca

text: Bring what thou deemest worth the wish, O Indra that which is in heavem! So may we know thee as thou art a giver boundless in thy gifts!
meaning: रेवतीर्नः सधमाद इन्द्रे सन्तु तुविवाजाः क्षुमन्तो याभिर्मदेम
sanskrit_iast: revatīrnaḥ sadʰamāda indre santu tuvivājāḥ kṣumanto yābʰirmadema

text: Thy lofty spirit famed in all the regions as appeasable,-- With this thou rendest even things firm, Stone-darter! so to win thee strength. I Soma Pavamana
meaning: आ घ त्वावां त्मना युक्तः स्तोतृभ्यो धृष्णवीयानः ऋणोरक्षं न चक्र्योः
sanskrit_iast: ā gʰa tvāvāṃ tmanā yuktaḥ stotr̥bʰyo dʰr̥ṣṇavīyānaḥ r̥ṇorakṣaṃ na cakryoḥ

text: The Maruts with their troop adorn and brighten, even at his birth, the Sage, the lovely infant. By songs a poet, and a Sage by wisdom, Soma goes singing through the cleansing filter.
meaning: आ यद्दुवः शतक्रतवा कामं जरितॄणाम् ऋणोरक्षं न शचीभिः
sanskrit_iast: ā yadduvaḥ śatakratavā kāmaṃ jaritr̥̄ṇām r̥ṇorakṣaṃ na śacībʰiḥ

text: Light-winner, Rishi-minded, Rishi-maker, hymned in a thousand hymns, leader of sages, Eager to gain his third form, mighty, Soma is, like Viraj, resplendent as a singer.
meaning: सुरूपकृत्नुमूतये सुदुघामिव गोदुहे जुहूमसि द्यविद्यवि
sanskrit_iast: surūpakr̥tnumūtaye sudugʰāmiva goduhe juhūmasi dyavidyavi

text: Hawk seated in the press, bird wide-extended, the banner seeking kine and wielding weapons, Uniting with the sea, the wave of waters, the mighty tells his fourth form and declares it. II Soma Pavamana
meaning: उप नः सवना गहि सोमस्य सोमपाः पिब गोदा इद्रेवतो मदः
sanskrit_iast: upa naḥ savanā gahi somasya somapāḥ piba godā idrevato madaḥ

text: Obeying Indra's dear desire these Soma juices have flowed forth Increasing his heroic might.
meaning: अथा ते अन्तमानां विद्याम सुमतीनाम् मा नो अति ख्य आ गहि
sanskrit_iast: atʰā te antamānāṃ vidyāma sumatīnām mā no ati kʰya ā gahi

text: Laid in the press and flowing pure to Vayu and the Asvins, may These give us great heroic strength.
meaning: उभे यदिन्द्र रोदसी आपप्राथोषा इव महान्तं त्वा महीनाꣳ सम्राजं चर्षणीनाम् देवी जनित्र्यजीजनद्भद्रा जनित्र्यजीजनत्
sanskrit_iast: ubʰe yadindra rodasī āpaprātʰoṣā iva mahāntaṃ tvā mahīnām̐ samrājaṃ carṣaṇīnām devī janitryajījanadbʰadrā janitryajījanat

text: Soma, as thou art purified, incite to bounty Indra's heart, To seat him in the shrine of Gods!
meaning: दीर्घꣳ ह्यङ्कुशं यथा शक्तिं बिभर्षि मन्तुमः पूर्वेण मघवन्पदा वयामजो यथा यमः देवी जनित्र्यजीजनद्भद्रा जनित्र्यजीजनत्
sanskrit_iast: dīrgʰam̐ hyaṅkuśaṃ yatʰā śaktiṃ bibʰarṣi mantumaḥ pūrveṇa magʰavanpadā vayāmajo yatʰā yamaḥ devī janitryajījanadbʰadrā janitryajījanat

text: The ten swift fingers deck thee forth seven ministers impel thee on, The sages have rejoiced in thee.
meaning: अव स्म दुर्हृणायतो मर्त्तस्य तनुहि स्थिरम् अधस्पदं तमीं कृधि यो अस्माꣳ अभिदासति देवी जनित्र्यजीजनद्भद्रा जनित्र्यजीजनत्
sanskrit_iast: ava sma durhr̥ṇāyato marttasya tanuhi stʰiram adʰaspadaṃ tamīṃ kr̥dʰi yo asmām̐ abʰidāsati devī janitryajījanadbʰadrā janitryajījanat

text: When through the filter thou art poured we clothe thee with a robe of milk, To be a rapturous feast for Gods.
meaning: परि स्वानो गिरिष्ठाः पवित्रे सोमो अक्षरत् मदेषु सर्वधा असि
sanskrit_iast: pari svāno giriṣṭʰāḥ pavitre somo akṣarat madeṣu sarvadʰā asi

text: When purified within the jars, Soma bright-red and golden-hued, Hath veiled him in a milky dress.
meaning: त्वं विप्रस्त्वं कविर्मधु प्र जातमन्धसः मदेषु सर्वधा असि
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ viprastvaṃ kavirmadʰu pra jātamandʰasaḥ madeṣu sarvadʰā asi

text: Flow onward to our wealthy lords. Drive all our enemies away: O lndu, pass into thy friend!
meaning: त्वे विश्वे सजोषसो देवासः पीतिमाशत मदेषु सर्वधा असि
sanskrit_iast: tve viśve sajoṣaso devāsaḥ pītimāśata madeṣu sarvadʰā asi

text: May we obtain thee, Indra's drink, who viewest men and findest light, Gain thee and progeny and food!
meaning: स सुन्वे यो वसूनां यो रायामानेता य इडानाम् सोमो यः सुक्षितीनाम्
sanskrit_iast: sa sunve yo vasūnāṃ yo rāyāmānetā ya iḍānām somo yaḥ sukṣitīnām

text: Send down the rain from heaven and make splendour upon the earth! Give us, O Soma, victory in war! III Soma Pavamana
meaning: यस्य त इन्द्रः पिबाद्यस्य मरुतो यस्य वार्यमणा भगः आ येन मित्रावरुणा करामह एन्द्रमवसे महे
sanskrit_iast: yasya ta indraḥ pibādyasya maruto yasya vāryamaṇā bʰagaḥ ā yena mitrāvaruṇā karāmaha endramavase mahe

text: Poured through the fleece in thousand streams purified Soma floweth to, Indra's and Vayu's meeting-place.
meaning: तं वः सखायो मदाय पुनानमभि गायत शिशुं न हव्यैः स्वदयन्त गूर्तिभिः
sanskrit_iast: taṃ vaḥ sakʰāyo madāya punānamabʰi gāyata śiśuṃ na havyaiḥ svadayanta gūrtibʰiḥ

text: Sing forth, ye men who long for help, to Pavamana, to the Sage, Effused to entertain the Gods!
meaning: सं वत्स इव मातृभिरिन्दुर्हिन्वानो अज्यते देवावीर्मदो मतिभिः परिष्कृतः
sanskrit_iast: saṃ vatsa iva mātr̥bʰirindurhinvāno ajyate devāvīrmado matibʰiḥ pariṣkr̥taḥ

text: The Soma drops with thousand powers are purified to win us strength, Hymned to become the feast of Gods.
meaning: अयं दक्षाय साधनो ऽयꣳ शर्धाय वीतये अयं देवेभ्यो मधुमत्तरः सुतः
sanskrit_iast: ayaṃ dakṣāya sādʰano 'yam̐ śardʰāya vītaye ayaṃ devebʰyo madʰumattaraḥ sutaḥ

text: Yea, as thou flowest bring great store of food that we may win us strength: Indu, bring splendid manly might
meaning: सोमाः पवन्त इन्दवो ऽस्मभ्यं गातुवित्तमाः मित्राः सुवाना अरेपसः स्वाध्यः स्वर्विदः
sanskrit_iast: somāḥ pavanta indavo 'smabʰyaṃ gātuvittamāḥ mitrāḥ suvānā arepasaḥ svādʰyaḥ svarvidaḥ

text: Like coursers by their drivers urged, they were poured forth, to win us strength, Swift through the woollen straining-cloth.
meaning: ते पूतासो विपश्चितः सोमासो दध्याशिरः सूरासो न दर्शतासो जिगत्नवो ध्रुवा घृते
sanskrit_iast: te pūtāso vipaścitaḥ somāso dadʰyāśiraḥ sūrāso na darśatāso jigatnavo dʰruvā gʰr̥te

text: May they in flowing give us wealth in thousands, and heroic power,-- These godlike Soma drops effused!
meaning: सुष्वाणासो व्यद्रिभिश्चिताना गोरधि त्वचि इषमस्मभ्यमभितः समस्वरन्वसुविदः
sanskrit_iast: suṣvāṇāso vyadribʰiścitānā goradʰi tvaci iṣamasmabʰyamabʰitaḥ samasvaranvasuvidaḥ

text: The roaring Soma drops flow on, like milch-kine lowing to, their calves: They have run forth from both the hands.
meaning: अया पवा पवस्वैना वसूनि माꣳश्चत्व इन्दो सरसि प्र धन्व ब्रघ्नश्चिद्यस्य वातो न जूतिं पुरुमेधाश्चित्तकवे नरं धात्
sanskrit_iast: ayā pavā pavasvainā vasūni mām̐ścatva indo sarasi pra dʰanva bragʰnaścidyasya vāto na jūtiṃ purumedʰāścittakave naraṃ dʰāt

text: Beloved by Indra, bringing joy, roaring as thou art purified, Drive all our enemies away.
meaning: उत न एना पवया पवस्वाधि श्रुते श्रवाय्यस्य तीर्थे षष्टिꣳ सहस्रा नैगुतो वसूनि वृक्षं न पक्वं धूनवद्रणाय
sanskrit_iast: uta na enā pavayā pavasvādʰi śrute śravāyyasya tīrtʰe ṣaṣṭim̐ sahasrā naiguto vasūni vr̥kṣaṃ na pakvaṃ dʰūnavadraṇāya

text: As Pavamanas, driving off the godless, looking on the light, Sit in the place of sacrifice. IV Soma Pavamana
meaning: महीमे अस्य वृष नाम शूषे माꣳश्चत्वे वा पृशने वा वधत्रे अस्वापयन्निगुतः स्नेहयच्चापामित्राꣳ अपाचितो अचेतः
sanskrit_iast: mahīme asya vr̥ṣa nāma śūṣe mām̐ścatve vā pr̥śane vā vadʰatre asvāpayannigutaḥ snehayaccāpāmitrām̐ apācito acetaḥ

text: The Soma drops, exceeding rich in sweets, to Indra have been poured, Shed with the stream of sacrifice.
meaning: अग्ने त्वं नो अन्तम उत त्राता शिवो भुवो वरूथ्यः
sanskrit_iast: agne tvaṃ no antama uta trātā śivo bʰuvo varūtʰyaḥ

text: Sages have called to Indra, like cows, milch-kine, lowing to their calves, Called him to drink the Soma juice.
meaning: वसुरग्निर्वसुश्रवा अच्छा नक्षि द्युमत्तमो रयिं दाः
sanskrit_iast: vasuragnirvasuśravā accʰā nakṣi dyumattamo rayiṃ dāḥ

text: In the stream's wave wise Soma dwells, distilling rapture, in his. seat, Resting upon a wild cow's hide.
meaning: तं त्वा शोचिष्ठ दीदिवः सुम्नाय नूनमीमहे सखिभ्यः
sanskrit_iast: taṃ tvā śociṣṭʰa dīdivaḥ sumnāya nūnamīmahe sakʰibʰyaḥ

text: Far-sighted Soma, Sage and bard, is worshipped in the central point, Of heaven, the straining-cloth of wool.
meaning: इमा नु कं भुवना सीषधेमेन्द्रश्च विश्वे च देवाः
sanskrit_iast: imā nu kaṃ bʰuvanā sīṣadʰemendraśca viśve ca devāḥ

text: In close embracement Indu holds Soma when poured within the: jars. And on the purifying sieve.
meaning: यज्ञं च नस्तन्वं च प्रजां चादित्यैरिन्द्रः सह सीषधातु
sanskrit_iast: yajñaṃ ca nastanvaṃ ca prajāṃ cādityairindraḥ saha sīṣadʰātu

text: Indu sends forth a voice on high, up in the region of the sea. Stirring the cask that drops with meath.
meaning: आदित्यैरिन्द्रः सगणो मरुद्भिरस्मभ्यं भेषजा करत्
sanskrit_iast: ādityairindraḥ sagaṇo marudbʰirasmabʰyaṃ bʰeṣajā karat

text: The tree whose praises never fail dwells in the stream of holy milk, Urged onward by its human friend.
meaning: प्र व इन्द्राय वृत्रहन्तमाय विप्राय गाथं गायत यं जुजोषते
sanskrit_iast: pra va indrāya vr̥trahantamāya viprāya gātʰaṃ gāyata yaṃ jujoṣate

text: O Pavamana bring us wealth bright with a thousand splendours; yea, O Indu, give us ready help!
meaning: अर्चन्त्यर्कं मरुतः स्वर्का आ स्तोभति श्रुतो युवा स इन्द्रः
sanskrit_iast: arcantyarkaṃ marutaḥ svarkā ā stobʰati śruto yuvā sa indraḥ

text: Sage, poet, poured with all his stream, Soma is driven, far away, To the dear places of the sky. V Soma Pavamana
meaning: उप प्रक्षे मधुमति क्षियन्तः पुष्येम रयिं धीमहे त इन्द्र
sanskrit_iast: upa prakṣe madʰumati kṣiyantaḥ puṣyema rayiṃ dʰīmahe ta indra

text: Loud as a river's roaring wave thy powers have lifted up themselves: Urge on thine arrow's sharpened point!
meaning: प्र काव्यमुशनेव ब्रुवाणो देवो देवानां जनिमा विवक्ति महिव्रतः शुचिबन्धुः पावकः पदा वराहो अभ्येति रेभन्
sanskrit_iast: pra kāvyamuśaneva bruvāṇo devo devānāṃ janimā vivakti mahivrataḥ śucibandʰuḥ pāvakaḥ padā varāho abʰyeti rebʰan

text: At thine effusion upward rise three voices fresh and strong, when thou. Flowest upon the fleecy ridge.
meaning: प्र हꣳसासस्तृपला वग्नुमच्छामादस्तं वृषगणा अयासुः आङ्गोषिणं पवमानꣳ सखायो दुर्मर्षं वाणं प्र वदन्ति साकम्
sanskrit_iast: pra ham̐sāsastr̥palā vagnumaccʰāmādastaṃ vr̥ṣagaṇā ayāsuḥ āṅgoṣiṇaṃ pavamānam̐ sakʰāyo durmarṣaṃ vāṇaṃ pra vadanti sākam

text: On to the fleece they urge with stones the dear, the goldencoloured one, Even Pavamana dropping meath.
meaning: स योजत उरुगायस्य जूतिं वृथा क्रीडन्तं मिमते न गावः परीणसं कृणुते तिग्मशृङ्गो दिवा हरिर्ददृशे नक्तमृज्रः
sanskrit_iast: sa yojata urugāyasya jūtiṃ vr̥tʰā krīḍantaṃ mimate na gāvaḥ parīṇasaṃ kr̥ṇute tigmaśr̥ṅgo divā harirdadr̥śe naktamr̥jraḥ

text: Flow with thy current to the sieve, O Sage, best giver of delight, To seat these in the shrine of song!
meaning: प्र स्वानासो रथा इवार्वन्तो न अवस्यवः सोमासो राये अक्रमुः
sanskrit_iast: pra svānāso ratʰā ivārvanto na avasyavaḥ somāso rāye akramuḥ

text: Best giver of delight, flow on anointed with the milk for balm, And enter into Indra's throat! VI Soma Pavamana
meaning: हिन्वानासो रथा इव दधन्विरे गभस्त्योः भरासः कारिणामिव
sanskrit_iast: hinvānāso ratʰā iva dadʰanvire gabʰastyoḥ bʰarāsaḥ kāriṇāmiva

text: Flow onward, Indu, with this food for him who in thy wild delights, Battered the nine-and-ninety down.
meaning: राजानो न प्रशस्तिभिः सोमासो गोभिरञ्जते यज्ञो न सप्त धातृभिः
sanskrit_iast: rājāno na praśastibʰiḥ somāso gobʰirañjate yajño na sapta dʰātr̥bʰiḥ

text: Smote swiftly forts, and Sambara, then Yadu and that Turvasa, For pious Divodasa's sake!
meaning: परि स्वानास इन्दवो मदाय बर्हणा गिरा मधो अर्षन्ति धारया
sanskrit_iast: pari svānāsa indavo madāya barhaṇā girā madʰo arṣanti dʰārayā

text: Finder of horses, pour on us horses and wealth in kine and gold, And Indu, food in boundless store! VII Soma Pavamana
meaning: आपानासो विवस्वतो जिन्वन्त उषसो भगम् सूरा अण्वं वि तन्वते
sanskrit_iast: āpānāso vivasvato jinvanta uṣaso bʰagam sūrā aṇvaṃ vi tanvate

text: Chasing our foemen, driving off the godless, Soma floweth on, Going to Indra's settled place.
meaning: अप द्वारा मतीनां प्रत्ना ऋण्वन्ति कारवः वृष्णो हरस आयवः
sanskrit_iast: apa dvārā matīnāṃ pratnā r̥ṇvanti kāravaḥ vr̥ṣṇo harasa āyavaḥ

text: O Pavamana, hither bring great riches, and destroy our foes: O Indu, grant heroic fame!
meaning: समीचीनास आशत होतारः सप्तजानयः पदमेकस्य पिप्रतः
sanskrit_iast: samīcīnāsa āśata hotāraḥ saptajānayaḥ padamekasya piprataḥ

text: A hundred obstacles have ne'er checked thee when rain to give thy boons, When, being cleansed, thou combatest. VIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: नाभा नाभिं न आ ददे चक्षुषा सूर्य दृशे कवेरपत्यमा दुहे
sanskrit_iast: nābʰā nābʰiṃ na ā dade cakṣuṣā sūrya dr̥śe kaverapatyamā duhe

text: Flow onward with that stream wherewith thou gavest splendour to the sun, Speeding the waters kind to man!
meaning: अभि प्रियं दिवस्पदमध्वर्युभिर्गुहा हितम् सूरः पस्यति चक्षसा
sanskrit_iast: abʰi priyaṃ divaspadamadʰvaryubʰirguhā hitam sūraḥ pasyati cakṣasā

text: He, Pavamana, high o'er man, yoked the Sun's courser Etasa, To travel through the realm of air.
meaning: असृग्रमिन्दवः पथा धर्मन्नृतस्य सुश्रियः विदाना अस्य योजना
sanskrit_iast: asr̥gramindavaḥ patʰā dʰarmannr̥tasya suśriyaḥ vidānā asya yojanā

text: Yea, those bay steeds he harnessed to the chariot that the Sun might come: Indu, he said, is Indra's self. IX Agni
meaning: प्र धारा मधो अग्रियो महीरपो वि गाहते हविर्हविःषु वन्द्यः
sanskrit_iast: pra dʰārā madʰo agriyo mahīrapo vi gāhate havirhaviḥṣu vandyaḥ

text: Associate with fires, make your God Agni envoy at sacrifice, best skilled in worship, Established firm among mankind, the holy flame-crowned and fed with oil, the purifier!
meaning: प्र युजा वाचो अग्रियो वृषो अचिक्रदद्वने सद्माभि सत्यो अध्वरः
sanskrit_iast: pra yujā vāco agriyo vr̥ṣo acikradadvane sadmābʰi satyo adʰvaraḥ

text: Like a steed neighing eager for the pasture, when he hath stepped forth from the great enclosure: Then the wind following blows upon his splendour, and, straight, the path is black which thou hast travelled.
meaning: परि यत्काव्या कविर्नृम्णा पुनानो अर्षति स्वर्वाजी सिषासति
sanskrit_iast: pari yatkāvyā kavirnr̥mṇā punāno arṣati svarvājī siṣāsati

text: From thee, a bull but newly born, O Agni, the kindled everlasting flames rise upward. Aloft to heaven as ruddy smoke thou mountest: Agni, thou speedest to the Gods as envoy. X Indra
meaning: पवमानो अभि स्पृधो विशो राजेव सीदति यदीमृण्वन्ति वेधसः
sanskrit_iast: pavamāno abʰi spr̥dʰo viśo rājeva sīdati yadīmr̥ṇvanti vedʰasaḥ

text: We make this Indra very strong to strike the mighty Vritra dead: A vigorous hero shall he be.
meaning: अव्या वारे परि प्रियो हरिर्वनेषु सीदति रेभो वनुष्यते मति
sanskrit_iast: avyā vāre pari priyo harirvaneṣu sīdati rebʰo vanuṣyate mati

text: This Indra, made for giving gifts, is stablished, mightiest, in strength, Bright, meet for Soma, famed in song.
meaning: स वायुमिन्द्रमश्विना साकं मदेन गच्छति रणा यो अस्य धर्मणा
sanskrit_iast: sa vāyumindramaśvinā sākaṃ madena gaccʰati raṇā yo asya dʰarmaṇā

text: By song, as 'twere' the powerful bolt which none may parry, was prepared: Strong and invincible he grew. XI Soma Pavamana I. Adhvaryu, to the filter lead the Soma-juice expressed with stones: Make thou it pure for Indra's drink!
meaning: आ मित्रे वरुणे भगे मधोः पवन्त ऊर्मयः विदाना अस्य शक्मभिः
sanskrit_iast: ā mitre varuṇe bʰage madʰoḥ pavanta ūrmayaḥ vidānā asya śakmabʰiḥ

text: These Gods and all the Marut host, Indu! enjoy this juice of thine, This Pavamana's flowing meath.
meaning: अस्मभ्यꣳ रोदसी रयिं मध्वो वाजस्य सातये श्रवो वसूनि सञ्जितम्
sanskrit_iast: asmabʰyam̐ rodasī rayiṃ madʰvo vājasya sātaye śravo vasūni sañjitam

text: Pour out for Indra, Thunder-armed, the milk of heaven, the Soma's juice, Most excellent, most rich in sweets! XII Soma Pavamana
meaning: आ ते दक्षं मयोभुवं वह्निमद्या वृणीमहे पान्तमा पुरुस्पृहम्
sanskrit_iast: ā te dakṣaṃ mayobʰuvaṃ vahnimadyā vr̥ṇīmahe pāntamā puruspr̥ham

text: On flows the potent juice, sustainer of the heavens, the strength of Gods, whom men must hail with shouts of joy, Thou, gold-hued, started like a courser by brave men, art lightly showing forth thy splendour in the streams.
meaning: आ मन्द्रमा वरेण्यमा विप्रमा मनीषिणम् पान्तमा पुरुस्पृहम्
sanskrit_iast: ā mandramā vareṇyamā vipramā manīṣiṇam pāntamā puruspr̥ham

text: He takes his weapons, like a hero, in his hands, fain to win light, car-borne, in forays for the kine. Indu, while stimulating Indra's might, is urged forward and balmed by sages skilful in their task.
meaning: आ रयिमा सुचेतुनमा सुक्रतो तनूष्वा पान्तमा पुरुस्पृहम्
sanskrit_iast: ā rayimā sucetunamā sukrato tanūṣvā pāntamā puruspr̥ham

text: Soma, as thou art purified with flowing wave, exhibiting thy strength enter thou Indra's throat. Make both worlds stream for us, as lightning doth the clouds: mete out exhaustless powers for us through this our prayer! XIII Indra
meaning: मूर्धानं दिवो अरतिं पृथिव्या वैश्वानरमृत आ जातमग्निम् कविꣳ सम्राजमतिथिं जनानामासन्नः पात्रं जनयन्त देवाः
sanskrit_iast: mūrdʰānaṃ divo aratiṃ pr̥tʰivyā vaiśvānaramr̥ta ā jātamagnim kavim̐ samrājamatitʰiṃ janānāmāsannaḥ pātraṃ janayanta devāḥ

text: Though, Indra, thou art called by men eastward and westward, north and south, Thou chiefly art with Anava and Turvasa, brave champion! urged by men to come.
meaning: त्वां विश्वे अमृत जायमानꣳ शिशुं न देवा अभि सं नवन्ते तव क्रतुभिरमृतत्वमायन्वैश्वानर यत्पित्रोरदीदेः
sanskrit_iast: tvāṃ viśve amr̥ta jāyamānam̐ śiśuṃ na devā abʰi saṃ navante tava kratubʰiramr̥tatvamāyanvaiśvānara yatpitroradīdeḥ

text: Or, Indra, when with Ruma, Rusama, Syavaka, and Kripa thou rejoicest thee, Still do the Kanvas, bringing prayer, with hymns of praise O Indra, draw thee hither: come! XIV Indra
meaning: नाभिं यज्ञानाꣳ सदनꣳ रयीणां महामाहावमभि सं नवन्त वैश्वानरꣳ रथ्यमध्वराणां यज्ञस्य केतुं जनयन्त देवाः
sanskrit_iast: nābʰiṃ yajñānām̐ sadanam̐ rayīṇāṃ mahāmāhāvamabʰi saṃ navanta vaiśvānaram̐ ratʰyamadʰvarāṇāṃ yajñasya ketuṃ janayanta devāḥ

text: Both boons,-may, Indra, hitherward turned, listen to this prayer of ours. And mightiest Maghavan with thought inclined to us come near to drink to Soma juice!
meaning: प्र वो मित्राय गायत वरुणाय विपा गिरा महिक्षत्रावृतं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: pra vo mitrāya gāyata varuṇāya vipā girā mahikṣatrāvr̥taṃ br̥hat

text: For him, strong, independent ruler, Heaven and Earth have fashioned forth with power and might. Thou seatest thee as first among thy peers in place, for thy soul longs for Soma juice. XV Soma Pavamana
meaning: सम्राजा या घृतयोनी मित्रश्चोभा वरुणश्च देवा देवेषु प्रशस्ता
sanskrit_iast: samrājā yā gʰr̥tayonī mitraścobʰā varuṇaśca devā deveṣu praśastā

text: God, working with mankind flow on; to Indra go thy gladdening juice: To Vayu mount as Law commands!
meaning: ता नः शक्तं पर्थिवस्य महो रायो दिव्यस्य महि वां क्षत्रं देवेषु
sanskrit_iast: tā naḥ śaktaṃ partʰivasya maho rāyo divyasya mahi vāṃ kṣatraṃ deveṣu

text: O Soma Pavamana, thou pourest out wealth that may be famed: O Indu, pass into the lake!
meaning: इन्द्रा याहि चित्रभानो सुता इमे त्वायवः अण्वीभिस्तना पूतासः
sanskrit_iast: indrā yāhi citrabʰāno sutā ime tvāyavaḥ aṇvībʰistanā pūtāsaḥ

text: Soma, thou flowest chasing foes, finder of wisdom and delight: Drive thou the godless folk afar! XVI Soma Pavamana
meaning: इन्द्रा याहि धियेषितो विप्रजूतः सुतावतः उप ब्रह्माणि वाघतः
sanskrit_iast: indrā yāhi dʰiyeṣito viprajūtaḥ sutāvataḥ upa brahmāṇi vāgʰataḥ

text: Stream on us riches that are craved by hundreds, best at winning spoil, Riches, O Indu, thousandfold, most splendid, that surpass the light!
meaning: इन्द्रा याहि तूतुजान उप ब्रह्माणि हरिवः सुते दधिष्व नश्चनः
sanskrit_iast: indrā yāhi tūtujāna upa brahmāṇi harivaḥ sute dadʰiṣva naścanaḥ

text: May we, O Vasu, be most near to this thy bounty, food, and wealth! Desired by many men, and in thy favour, O resistless one!
meaning: तमीडिष्व यो अर्चिषा वना विश्वा परिष्वजत् कृष्णा कृणोति जिह्वया
sanskrit_iast: tamīḍiṣva yo arciṣā vanā viśvā pariṣvajat kr̥ṣṇā kr̥ṇoti jihvayā

text: Effused, this Indu hath flowed on, distilling rapture, to the fleece. He streams erect to sacrifice, as 'twere with splendour, seeking kine. XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: य इद्ध आविवासति सुम्नमिन्द्रस्य मर्त्यः द्युम्नाय सुतरा अपः
sanskrit_iast: ya iddʰa āvivāsati sumnamindrasya martyaḥ dyumnāya sutarā apaḥ

text: Flow onward, Soma, as a mighty sea, as Father of the Gods, to every form!
meaning: ता नो वाजवतीरिष आशून्पिपृतमर्वतः एन्द्रमग्निं च वोढवे
sanskrit_iast: tā no vājavatīriṣa āśūnpipr̥tamarvataḥ endramagniṃ ca voḍʰave

text: Flow on, O Soma, radiant for the Gods, blissful to heaven and earth and living things!
meaning: प्रो अयासीदिन्दुरिन्द्रस्य निष्कृतꣳ सखा सख्युर्न प्र मिनाति सङ्गिरम् मर्य इव युवतिभिः समर्षति सोमः कलशे शतयाम्ना पथा
sanskrit_iast: pro ayāsīdindurindrasya niṣkr̥tam̐ sakʰā sakʰyurna pra mināti saṅgiram marya iva yuvatibʰiḥ samarṣati somaḥ kalaśe śatayāmnā patʰā

text: Thou art, bright juice, sustainer of the sky: flow, mighty, in accordance with true law! XVIII Agni I. I laud your most beloved guest, like a dear friend, O Agni, him! Who, like a chariot, wins us wealth.
meaning: प्र वो धियो मन्द्रयुवो विपन्युवः पनस्युवः संवरणेष्वक्रमुः हरिं क्रीडन्तमभ्यनूषत स्तुभो ऽभि धेनवः पयसेदशिश्रयुः
sanskrit_iast: pra vo dʰiyo mandrayuvo vipanyuvaḥ panasyuvaḥ saṃvaraṇeṣvakramuḥ hariṃ krīḍantamabʰyanūṣata stubʰo 'bʰi dʰenavaḥ payasedaśiśrayuḥ

text: Whom as a Sage who merits praise the Gods have, from the olden time, Established among mortal men.
meaning: आ नः सोम संयतं पिप्युषीमिषमिन्दो पवस्व पवमान ऊर्मिणा या नो दोहते त्रिरहन्नसश्चुषी क्षुमद्वाजवन्मधुमत्सुवीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: ā naḥ soma saṃyataṃ pipyuṣīmiṣamindo pavasva pavamāna ūrmiṇā yā no dohate trirahannasaścuṣī kṣumadvājavanmadʰumatsuvīryam

text: Do thou, most youthful God, protect the men who offer, hear their songs, And of thyself preserve their seed! XIX Indra
meaning: न किष्टं कर्मणा नशद्यश्चकार सदावृधम् इन्द्रं न यज्ञैर्विश्वगूर्त्तमृभ्वसमधृष्टं धृष्णुमोजसा
sanskrit_iast: na kiṣṭaṃ karmaṇā naśadyaścakāra sadāvr̥dʰam indraṃ na yajñairviśvagūrttamr̥bʰvasamadʰr̥ṣṭaṃ dʰr̥ṣṇumojasā

text: Come unto us, O Indra, dear, still conquering, unconcealable Wide as a mountain spread on all sides, Lord of heaven.
meaning: अषाढमुग्रं पृतनासु सासहिं यस्मिन्महीरुरुज्रयः सं धेनवो जायमाने अनोनवुर्द्यावः क्षामीरनोनवुः
sanskrit_iast: aṣāḍʰamugraṃ pr̥tanāsu sāsahiṃ yasminmahīrurujrayaḥ saṃ dʰenavo jāyamāne anonavurdyāvaḥ kṣāmīranonavuḥ

text: O truthful Soma-drinker, thou art mightier than both the worlds. Thou strengthenest him who pours'libation, Lord of heaven.
meaning: सखाय आ नि षीदत पुनानाय प्र गायत शिशुं न यज्ञैः परि भूषत श्रिये
sanskrit_iast: sakʰāya ā ni ṣīdata punānāya pra gāyata śiśuṃ na yajñaiḥ pari bʰūṣata śriye

text: For thou art he, O Indra, who upholdeth all our fortresses, The Dasyu's slayer, man's sustainer, Lord of heaven. XX Indra
meaning: समी वत्सं न मातृभिः सृजता गयसाधनम् देवाव्या३ं मदमभि द्विशवसम्
sanskrit_iast: samī vatsaṃ na mātr̥bʰiḥ sr̥jatā gayasādʰanam devāvyā3ṃ madamabʰi dviśavasam

text: Render of forts, the young, the wise, of strength unmeasured, was he born, Sustainer of each sacred rite, Indra, the Thunderer, much extolled,
meaning: पुनाता दक्षसाधनं यथा शर्धाय वीतये यथा मित्राय वरुणाय शन्तमम्
sanskrit_iast: punātā dakṣasādʰanaṃ yatʰā śardʰāya vītaye yatʰā mitrāya varuṇāya śantamam

text: Thou wielder of the stone, didst burst the cave of Vala rich in kine. The Gods came pressing to thy side, and free from terror aided thee.
meaning: प्र वाज्यक्षाः सहस्रधारस्तिरः पवित्रं वि वारमव्यम्
sanskrit_iast: pra vājyakṣāḥ sahasradʰārastiraḥ pavitraṃ vi vāramavyam

text: They glorified with hymns of praise Indra who reigneth by his might, Whose bounteous gifts in thousands come, yea, even more abundantly. I Soma Pavamana
meaning: स वाज्यक्षाः सहस्ररेता अद्भिर्मृजानो गोभिः श्रीणानः
sanskrit_iast: sa vājyakṣāḥ sahasraretā adbʰirmr̥jāno gobʰiḥ śrīṇānaḥ

text: Guard of all being, generating creatures, loud roared the sea as highest law commanded. Strong in the filter, on the fleecy summit, pressed from the stone, Soma hath waxen mighty.
meaning: प्र सोम याहीन्द्रस्य कुक्षा नृभिर्येमानो अद्रिभिः सुतः
sanskrit_iast: pra soma yāhīndrasya kukṣā nr̥bʰiryemāno adribʰiḥ sutaḥ

text: Make Vayu glad, for furtherance and bounty: cheer Varuna and Mitra, as they cleanse thee! Gladden the Gods, gladden the host of Maruts: make Heaven and Earth rejoice, O God, O Soma!
meaning: ये सोमासः परावति ये अर्वावति सुन्विरे ये वादः शर्यणावति
sanskrit_iast: ye somāsaḥ parāvati ye arvāvati sunvire ye vādaḥ śaryaṇāvati

text: Soma, the mighty, when, the water's offspring, he chose the Gods, performed that great achievement. He, Pavamana, granted strength to Indra: he, Indu, generated strength in Surya. II Soma Pavamana
meaning: य आर्जीकेषु कृत्वसु ये मध्ये पस्त्यानाम् ये वा जनेषु पञ्चसु
sanskrit_iast: ya ārjīkeṣu kr̥tvasu ye madʰye pastyānām ye vā janeṣu pañcasu

text: Here present this immortal God flies, like a bird upon her wings, To settle in the vats of wood.
meaning: ते नो वृष्टिं दिवस्परि पवन्तामा सुवीर्यम् स्वाना देवास इन्दवः
sanskrit_iast: te no vr̥ṣṭiṃ divaspari pavantāmā suvīryam svānā devāsa indavaḥ

text: Praised by the sacred bards, this God dives into waters, and bestows Rich gifts upon the worshipper.
meaning: आ ते वत्सो मनो यमत्परमाच्चित्सधस्थात् अग्ने त्वां कामये गिरा
sanskrit_iast: ā te vatso mano yamatparamāccitsadʰastʰāt agne tvāṃ kāmaye girā

text: He. like a warrior going forth with heroes, as he flows along. Is fain to win all precious boons.
meaning: पुरुत्रा हि सदृङ्ङसि दिशो विश्वा अनु प्रभुः समत्सु त्वा हवामहे
sanskrit_iast: purutrā hi sadr̥ṅṅasi diśo viśvā anu prabʰuḥ samatsu tvā havāmahe

text: This God as he is flowirig on speeds like a car and gives his aid: He lets his voice be heard of all.
meaning: समत्स्वग्निमवसे वाजयन्तो हवामहे वाजेषु चित्रराधसम्
sanskrit_iast: samatsvagnimavase vājayanto havāmahe vājeṣu citrarādʰasam

text: This God, while flowing, is adorned, gold-coloured, for the spoil, by men Devout and skilled in holy songs.
meaning: त्वं न इन्द्रा भर ओजो नृम्णꣳ शतक्रतो विचर्षणे आ वीरं पृतनासहम्
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ na indrā bʰara ojo nr̥mṇam̐ śatakrato vicarṣaṇe ā vīraṃ pr̥tanāsaham

text: This God, made ready with the hymn runs swiftly through the winding ways, Inviolable as he flows.
meaning: त्वꣳ हि नः पिता वसो त्वं माता शतक्रतो बभूविथ अथा ते सुम्नमीमहे
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hi naḥ pitā vaso tvaṃ mātā śatakrato babʰūvitʰa atʰā te sumnamīmahe

text: A way he rushes with his stream, across the regions, into heaven, And roars as he is flowing on.
meaning: त्वाꣳ शुष्मिन्पुरुहूत वाजयन्तमुप ब्रुवे सहस्कृत स नो रास्व सुवीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: tvām̐ śuṣminpuruhūta vājayantamupa bruve sahaskr̥ta sa no rāsva suvīryam

text: While flowing, meet for sacrifice, he hath gone up to heaven, across The regions, never overthrown.
meaning: यदिन्द्र चित्र म इह नास्ति त्वादातमद्रिवः राधस्तन्नो विदद्वस उभयाहस्त्या भर
sanskrit_iast: yadindra citra ma iha nāsti tvādātamadrivaḥ rādʰastanno vidadvasa ubʰayāhastyā bʰara

text: By generation long ago, this God, engendered for the Gods, Flows tawny to the straining-cloth.
meaning: यन्मन्यसे वरेण्यमिन्द्र द्युक्षं तदा भर विद्याम तस्य ते वयमकूपारस्य दावनः
sanskrit_iast: yanmanyase vareṇyamindra dyukṣaṃ tadā bʰara vidyāma tasya te vayamakūpārasya dāvanaḥ

text: This Lord of many holy laws, even at his birth engendering strength, Effused, flows onward in a stream. III Soma Pavamana
meaning: यत्ते दिक्षु प्रराध्यं मनो अस्ति श्रुतं बृहत् तेन दृढा चिदद्रिव आ वाजं दर्षि सातये
sanskrit_iast: yatte dikṣu prarādʰyaṃ mano asti śrutaṃ br̥hat tena dr̥ḍʰā cidadriva ā vājaṃ darṣi sātaye

text: Through the fine fingers, with the song, this hero comes with rapid cars, Going to Indra's settled place.
meaning: शिशुं जज्ञानꣳ हर्यतं मृजन्ति शुम्भन्ति विप्रं मरुतो गणेन कविर्गीर्भिः काव्येना कविः सन्त्सोमः पवित्रमत्येति रेभन्
sanskrit_iast: śiśuṃ jajñānam̐ haryataṃ mr̥janti śumbʰanti vipraṃ maruto gaṇena kavirgīrbʰiḥ kāvyenā kaviḥ santsomaḥ pavitramatyeti rebʰan

text: In holy thought he ponders much for the great service of theGods, Where the immortals have their seat.
meaning: ऋषिमना य ऋषिकृत्स्वर्षाः सहस्रनीथः पदवीः कवीनाम् तृतीयं धाम महिषः सिषासन्त्सोमो विराजमनु राजति ष्टुप्
sanskrit_iast: r̥ṣimanā ya r̥ṣikr̥tsvarṣāḥ sahasranītʰaḥ padavīḥ kavīnām tr̥tīyaṃ dʰāma mahiṣaḥ siṣāsantsomo virājamanu rājati ṣṭup

text: Men beautify him in the vats, him worthy to be beautified, Him who brings forth abundant food.
meaning: चमूषच्छ्येनः शकुनो विभृत्वा गोविन्दुर्द्रप्स आयुधानि बिभ्रत् अपामूर्मिꣳ सचमानः समुद्रं तुरीयं धाम महिषो विवक्ति
sanskrit_iast: camūṣaccʰyenaḥ śakuno vibʰr̥tvā govindurdrapsa āyudʰāni bibʰrat apāmūrmim̐ sacamānaḥ samudraṃ turīyaṃ dʰāma mahiṣo vivakti

text: He is deposited and led along the consecrated path When zealous men are urging him,
meaning: एते सोमा अभि प्रियमिन्द्रस्य काममक्षरन् वर्धन्तो अस्य वीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: ete somā abʰi priyamindrasya kāmamakṣaran vardʰanto asya vīryam

text: He moves, a vigorous steed, adorned with beauteous rays of shining gold, He who is Sovran of the streams.
He brandishes his horns on high, and whets them, bull who leads the herd, Doing with might heroic deeds.
meaning: इन्द्रस्य सोम राधसे पुनानो हार्दि चोदय देवानां योनिमासदम्
sanskrit_iast: indrasya soma rādʰase punāno hārdi codaya devānāṃ yonimāsadam

text: He, over places rough to pass bringing rich treasures, closely pressed. Descends into the reservoirs.
meaning: मृजन्ति त्वा देश क्षिपो हिन्वन्ति सप्त धीतयः अनु विप्रा अमादिषुः
sanskrit_iast: mr̥janti tvā deśa kṣipo hinvanti sapta dʰītayaḥ anu viprā amādiṣuḥ

text: Him, even him the golden-hued, well armed, best giver of delight, Ten fingers urge to run his course. IV Soma Pavamana
meaning: देवेभ्यस्त्वा मदाय कꣳ सृजानमति मेष्यः स गोभिर्वासयामसि
sanskrit_iast: devebʰyastvā madāya kam̐ sr̥jānamati meṣyaḥ sa gobʰirvāsayāmasi

text: This Bull, this chariot robes him in the sheep's long wool as heproceeds. To war that wins a thousand spoils.
meaning: पुनानः कलशेष्वा वस्त्राण्यरुषो हरिः परि गव्यान्यव्यत
sanskrit_iast: punānaḥ kalaśeṣvā vastrāṇyaruṣo hariḥ pari gavyānyavyata

text: The dames of Trita with the stones urge forth this goldencoloured one, Indu to Indra for his drink.
meaning: मघोन आ पवस्व नो जहि विश्वा अप द्विषः इन्दो सखायमा विश
sanskrit_iast: magʰona ā pavasva no jahi viśvā apa dviṣaḥ indo sakʰāyamā viśa

text: He like a falcon settles down amid the families of men, Like lover speeding to his love.
meaning: नृचक्षसं त्वा वयमिन्द्रपीतꣳ स्वर्विदम् भक्षीमहि प्रजामिषम्
sanskrit_iast: nr̥cakṣasaṃ tvā vayamindrapītam̐ svarvidam bʰakṣīmahi prajāmiṣam

text: This young exhilarating juice looks downward from its place in heaven, This Soma drop that pierced the sieve.
meaning: वृष्टिं दिवः परि स्रव द्युम्नं पृथिव्या अधि सहो नः सोम पृत्सु धाः
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣṭiṃ divaḥ pari srava dyumnaṃ pr̥tʰivyā adʰi saho naḥ soma pr̥tsu dʰāḥ

text: Pressed for the draught, this tawny juice flows forth intelligent, calling out, Unto the well-beloved place.
meaning: सोमः पुनानो अर्षति सहस्रधारो अत्यविः वायोरिन्द्रस्य निष्कृतम्
sanskrit_iast: somaḥ punāno arṣati sahasradʰāro atyaviḥ vāyorindrasya niṣkr̥tam

text: Him, here, the gold-decked skilful ten cleanse carefully, who make him bright. And beauteous for the gladdening draught. V Soma Pavamana
meaning: पवमानमवस्यवो विप्रमभि प्र गायत सुष्वाणं देववीतये
sanskrit_iast: pavamānamavasyavo vipramabʰi pra gāyata suṣvāṇaṃ devavītaye

text: Urged by the men, this vigorous steed, Lord of the mind omniscient, Flies to the long wool of the sheep.
meaning: पवन्ते वाजसातये सोमाः सहस्रपाजसः गृणाना देववीतये
sanskrit_iast: pavante vājasātaye somāḥ sahasrapājasaḥ gr̥ṇānā devavītaye

text: Within the filter hath he flowed, this Soma for the Gods effused. Entering all their essences.
meaning: उत नो वाजसातये पवस्व बृहतीरिषः द्युमदिन्दो सुवीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: uta no vājasātaye pavasva br̥hatīriṣaḥ dyumadindo suvīryam

text: He shines in beauty there, this God, immortal, in his dwellingplace, Foe-slayer, dearest to the Gods.
meaning: अत्या हियाना न हेतृभिरसृग्रं वाजसातये वि वारमव्यमाशवः
sanskrit_iast: atyā hiyānā na hetr̥bʰirasr̥graṃ vājasātaye vi vāramavyamāśavaḥ

text: Directed by the sisters ten, bellowing on his way this Steer Runs onward to the wooden vats.
meaning: ते नः सहस्रिणꣳ रयिं पवन्तामा सुवीर्यम् सुवाना देवास इन्दवः
sanskrit_iast: te naḥ sahasriṇam̐ rayiṃ pavantāmā suvīryam suvānā devāsa indavaḥ

text: This Pavamana, gladdening drink within the purifying sieve, Gave splendour to the Sun in heaven.
meaning: वाश्रा अर्षन्तीन्दवो ऽभि वत्सं न मातरः दधन्विरे गभस्त्योः
sanskrit_iast: vāśrā arṣantīndavo 'bʰi vatsaṃ na mātaraḥ dadʰanvire gabʰastyoḥ

text: Unconquerable Lord of speech, dwelling beside Viavasvan, he Mounts up together with the Sun. VI Soma Pavamana
meaning: जुष्ट इन्द्राय मत्सरः पवमान कनिक्रदत् विश्वा अप द्विषो जहि
sanskrit_iast: juṣṭa indrāya matsaraḥ pavamāna kanikradat viśvā apa dviṣo jahi

text: This Sage, exalted by our lands, flows to the purifying sieve, Scattering foes as he is cleansed.
meaning: अपघ्नन्तो अराव्णः पवमानाः स्वर्दृशः योनावृतस्य सीदत
sanskrit_iast: apagʰnanto arāvṇaḥ pavamānāḥ svardr̥śaḥ yonāvr̥tasya sīdata

text: Giver of strength, winner of light, for Indra and for Vayu he Is poured upon the filtering-cloth.
meaning: सोमा असृग्रमिन्दवः सुता ऋतस्य धारया इन्द्राय मधुमत्तमाः
sanskrit_iast: somā asr̥gramindavaḥ sutā r̥tasya dʰārayā indrāya madʰumattamāḥ

text: The men conduct him, Soma, Steer, omniscient the head of heaven. Effused into the vats of wood.
meaning: अभि विप्रा अनूषत गावो वत्सं न धेनवः इन्द्रꣳ सोमस्य पीतये
sanskrit_iast: abʰi viprā anūṣata gāvo vatsaṃ na dʰenavaḥ indram̐ somasya pītaye

text: Longing for kine, longing for gold hath Indu Pavamana roared, Still conqueror, never overcome.
meaning: मदच्युत्क्षेति सादने सिन्धोरूर्मा विपश्चित् सोमो गौरी अधि श्रितः
sanskrit_iast: madacyutkṣeti sādane sindʰorūrmā vipaścit somo gaurī adʰi śritaḥ

text: To Indra in the firmament this mighty tawny Steer hath flowed This Indu, being purified.
meaning: दिवो नाभा विचक्षणो ऽव्यो वारे महीयते सोमो यः सुक्रतुः कविः
sanskrit_iast: divo nābʰā vicakṣaṇo 'vyo vāre mahīyate somo yaḥ sukratuḥ kaviḥ

text: This Soma being purified flows mighty and invincible, Slayer of sinners, dear to Gods. VII Soma Pavamana
meaning: यः सोमः कलशेष्वा अन्तः पवित्र आहितः तमिन्दुः परि षस्वजे
sanskrit_iast: yaḥ somaḥ kalaśeṣvā antaḥ pavitra āhitaḥ taminduḥ pari ṣasvaje

text: This Soma, strong effused for draught, flows to the purifying sieve, Slaying the fiends, loving the Gods.
meaning: प्र वाचमिन्दुरिष्यति समुद्रस्याधि विष्टपि जिन्वन्कोशं मधुश्चुतम्
sanskrit_iast: pra vācaminduriṣyati samudrasyādʰi viṣṭapi jinvankośaṃ madʰuścutam

text: Far sighted, tawny-coloured, he flows to the sieve intelligent, Bellowing to his place of rest.
meaning: नित्यस्तोत्रो वनस्पतिर्धेनामन्तः सबर्दुघाम् हिन्वानो मानुषा युजा
sanskrit_iast: nityastotro vanaspatirdʰenāmantaḥ sabardugʰām hinvāno mānuṣā yujā

text: This vigorous Pavamana runs forth to the luminous realm of heaven, Fiend-slayer, through the sheep's long wool.
meaning: आ पवमान धारय रयिꣳ सहस्रवर्चसम् अस्मे इन्दो स्वाभुवम्
sanskrit_iast: ā pavamāna dʰāraya rayim̐ sahasravarcasam asme indo svābʰuvam

text: This Pavamana, up above on Trita's ridge, hath made the Sun, Together with the Sisters, shine.
meaning: अभि प्रिया दिवः कविर्विप्रः स धारया सुतः सोमो हिन्वे परावति
sanskrit_iast: abʰi priyā divaḥ kavirvipraḥ sa dʰārayā sutaḥ somo hinve parāvati

text: Effused, this Soma, Steer, who slays Vritra, room-giver, unbeguiled, Hath gone as 'twere to win the spoil.
meaning: उत्ते शुष्मास ईरते सिन्धोरूर्मेरिव स्वनः वाणस्य चोदया पविम्
sanskrit_iast: utte śuṣmāsa īrate sindʰorūrmeriva svanaḥ vāṇasya codayā pavim

text: Urged by the sage upon his way, this God speeds forward to the: vats, Indu to Indra, giving boons. VIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: प्रसवे त उदीरते तिस्रो वाचो मखस्युवः यदव्य एषि सानवि
sanskrit_iast: prasave ta udīrate tisro vāco makʰasyuvaḥ yadavya eṣi sānavi

text: The man who reads the essence stored by saints, the Pavamana hymns, Tastes food completely purified, made sweet by Matarisvan's touch.
meaning: अव्या वारैः परि प्रियꣳ हरिꣳ हिन्वन्त्यद्रिभिः पवमानं मधुश्चुतम्
sanskrit_iast: avyā vāraiḥ pari priyam̐ harim̐ hinvantyadribʰiḥ pavamānaṃ madʰuścutam

text: Whoever reads the essence stored by saints, the Pavamana hymns, For him Sarasvat! pours forth water and butter, milk and meath.
meaning: आ पवस्व मदिन्तम पवित्रं धारया कवे अर्कस्य योनिमासदम्
sanskrit_iast: ā pavasva madintama pavitraṃ dʰārayā kave arkasya yonimāsadam

text: Yea, for the Pavamanas flow richly, drop fatness, bring us weal,-- Amrit deposited among the Brahmans, essence stored by saints.
meaning: स पवस्व मदिन्तम गोभिरञ्जानो अक्तुभिः एन्द्रस्य जठरं विश
sanskrit_iast: sa pavasva madintama gobʰirañjāno aktubʰiḥ endrasya jaṭʰaraṃ viśa

text: So may the Pavamana hymns bestow on us this world and that, And gratify our hearts' desires'-the Goddesses combined with Gods!
meaning: अया वीती परि स्रव यस्त इन्दो मदेष्वा अवाहन्नवतीर्नव
sanskrit_iast: ayā vītī pari srava yasta indo madeṣvā avāhannavatīrnava

text: The purifying flood wherewith Gods ever purify themselves,-- With that, in thousand currents, may the Pavamanas make us clean!
The Pavamana hymns bring weal: by these man goes to Paradise, And, eating pure and holy food, attains to immortality. IX Agni
meaning: पुरः सद्य इत्थाधिये दिवोदासाय शंबरम् अध त्यं तुर्वशं यदुम् १२१च्ल्स्दिर् परि नो अश्वमश्वविद्गोमदिन्दो हिरण्यवत् क्षरा सहस्रिणीरिषः
sanskrit_iast: puraḥ sadya ittʰādʰiye divodāsāya śaṃbaram adʰa tyaṃ turvaśaṃ yadum 121clsdir pari no aśvamaśvavidgomadindo hiraṇyavat kṣarā sahasriṇīriṣaḥ

text: We with great reverence have approached the Youngest, who hath shone forth well kindled in his dwelling, Wondrously bright between wide earth and heaven, well worshipped, looking forth in all directions.
meaning: अपघ्नन्पवते मृधो ऽप सोमो अराव्णः गच्छन्निन्द्रस्य निष्कृतम्
sanskrit_iast: apagʰnanpavate mr̥dʰo 'pa somo arāvṇaḥ gaccʰannindrasya niṣkr̥tam

text: Through his great might o'ercoming all misfortunes, praised in the house is Agni Jatavedas. May he preserve us from disgrace and trouble, both us who laud him and our wealthy princes!
meaning: महो नो राय आ भर पवमान जही मृधः रास्वेन्दो वीरवद्यशः
sanskrit_iast: maho no rāya ā bʰara pavamāna jahī mr̥dʰaḥ rāsvendo vīravadyaśaḥ

text: O Agni, thou art Varuna and Mitra: Vasishthas! with their holy hymns exalt thee. With thee be most abundant gain of treasure! Do ye preserve us evermore with blessing! X Indra
meaning: न त्वा शतं च न ह्रुतो राधो दित्सन्तमा मिनन् यत्पुनानो मखस्यसे
sanskrit_iast: na tvā śataṃ ca na hruto rādʰo ditsantamā minan yatpunāno makʰasyase

text: Indra, great in his power and might, and like Parjanya rich in rain. Hath been increased by Vatsa's lauds.
meaning: अया पवस्व धारया यया सूर्यमरोचयः हिन्वानो मानुषीरपः
sanskrit_iast: ayā pavasva dʰārayā yayā sūryamarocayaḥ hinvāno mānuṣīrapaḥ

text: Since Kanvas have with lauds made him completer of the sacrifice, Words are their own appropriate arms.
meaning: अयुक्त सूर एतशं पवमानो मनावधि अन्तरिक्षेण यातवे
sanskrit_iast: ayukta sūra etaśaṃ pavamāno manāvadʰi antarikṣeṇa yātave

text: When priests who magnify the Son of holy law present their gifts, Sages with Order's hymn of praise. XI Soma Pavamana
meaning: उत त्या हरितो रथे सूरो अयुक्त यातवे इन्दुरिन्द्र इति ब्रुवन्
sanskrit_iast: uta tyā harito ratʰe sūro ayukta yātave indurindra iti bruvan

text: Of gold-hued Pavamana, great destroyer, radiant streams have flowed, Swift streams of him whose gleams are swift.
meaning: अग्निं वो देवमग्निभिः सजोषा यजिष्ठं दूतमध्वरे कृणुध्वम् यो मर्त्येषु निध्रुविरृतावा तपुर्मूर्धा घृतान्नः पावकः
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ vo devamagnibʰiḥ sajoṣā yajiṣṭʰaṃ dūtamadʰvare kr̥ṇudʰvam yo martyeṣu nidʰruvirr̥tāvā tapurmūrdʰā gʰr̥tānnaḥ pāvakaḥ

text: Best rider of the chariot, praised with fairest praise 'mid beauteous ones, Gold gleaming with the Marut host,
meaning: प्रोथदश्वो न यवसे ऽविष्यन्यदा महः संवरणाद्व्यस्थात् आदस्य वातो अनु वाति शोचिरध स्म ते व्रजनं कृष्णमस्ति
sanskrit_iast: protʰadaśvo na yavase 'viṣyanyadā mahaḥ saṃvaraṇādvyastʰāt ādasya vāto anu vāti śociradʰa sma te vrajanaṃ kr̥ṣṇamasti

text: Penetrate, Pavamana, best at winning booty, with thy rays, Giving the Singer hero strength! XII Soma Pavamana
meaning: उद्यस्य ते नवजातस्य वृष्णो ऽग्ने चरन्त्यजरा इधानाः अच्छा द्यामरुषो धूम एषि सं दूतो अग्न ईयसे हि देवान्
sanskrit_iast: udyasya te navajātasya vr̥ṣṇo 'gne carantyajarā idʰānāḥ accʰā dyāmaruṣo dʰūma eṣi saṃ dūto agna īyase hi devān

text: Hence sprinkle forth the juice effused, Soma, the best of sacred gifts, Who, friend of man, hath run among the water-streams He hath pressed Soma out with stones.
meaning: तमिन्द्रं वाजयामसि महे वृत्राय हन्तवे स वृषा वृषभो भुवत्
sanskrit_iast: tamindraṃ vājayāmasi mahe vr̥trāya hantave sa vr̥ṣā vr̥ṣabʰo bʰuvat

text: Now, being purified, flow hither through the fleece, invincible and more odorous! We joy in thee in waters when thou art effused, blending thee still with juice and milk.
meaning: इन्द्रः स दामने कृत ओजिष्ठः स बले हितः द्युम्नी श्लोकी स सोम्यः
sanskrit_iast: indraḥ sa dāmane kr̥ta ojiṣṭʰaḥ sa bale hitaḥ dyumnī ślokī sa somyaḥ

text: Pressed out for all to see, delighting Gods, Indu, far-seeing one, is mental power. XIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: गिरा वज्रो न सम्भृतः सबलो अनपच्युतः ववक्ष उग्रो अस्तृतः
sanskrit_iast: girā vajro na sambʰr̥taḥ sabalo anapacyutaḥ vavakṣa ugro astr̥taḥ

text: Even as a King hath Soma, red and tawny Bull, been pressed the wondrous one hath bellowed to the kine. While purified thou passest through the filtering fleece to seat thee hawk-like in the place that drops with oil.
meaning: अध्वर्यो अद्रिभिः सुतꣳ सोमं पवित्र आ नय पुनाहीन्द्राय पातवे
sanskrit_iast: adʰvaryo adribʰiḥ sutam̐ somaṃ pavitra ā naya punāhīndrāya pātave

text: Parjanya is the sire of the leaf-bearing Bull: on mountains, in earth's centre hath he made his home. The waters have flowed forth, the Sisters, to the kine: he meets the pressing-stones at the beloved rite.
meaning: तव त्य इन्दो अन्धसो देवा मधोर्व्याशत पवमानस्य मरुतः
sanskrit_iast: tava tya indo andʰaso devā madʰorvyāśata pavamānasya marutaḥ

text: To glory goest thou, a Sage with ordering skill, like a groomed steed thou rushest forward to the prize. Be gracious to us, Soma, driving off distress! Thou goest, clothed in butter, to a robe of state. XIV Indra
meaning: दिवः पीयूषमुत्तमꣳ सोममिन्द्राय वज्रिणे सुनोता मधुमत्तमम्
sanskrit_iast: divaḥ pīyūṣamuttamam̐ somamindrāya vajriṇe sunotā madʰumattamam

text: Turning as 'twere to meet the Sun, enjoy from Indra all good things! When he who will be born is born with power we look to treasures as our heritage.
meaning: धर्त्ता दिवः पवते कृत्व्यो रसो दक्षो देवानामनुमाद्यो नृभिः हरिः सृजानो अत्यो न सत्वभिर्वृथा पाजाꣳसि कृणुषे नदीष्वा
sanskrit_iast: dʰarttā divaḥ pavate kr̥tvyo raso dakṣo devānāmanumādyo nr̥bʰiḥ hariḥ sr̥jāno atyo na satvabʰirvr̥tʰā pājām̐si kr̥ṇuṣe nadīṣvā

text: Praise him who sends us wealth, prompt with his liberal boons Good 4re the gifts that Indra gives. He is not wroth with one who satisfies his wish: he instigates, his mind to give. XV Indra
meaning: शूरो न धत्त आयुधा गभस्त्योः स्वा३ः सिषासन्रथिरो गविष्टिषु इन्द्रस्य शुष्ममीरयन्नपस्युभिरिन्दुर्हिन्वानो अज्यते मनीषिभिः
sanskrit_iast: śūro na dʰatta āyudʰā gabʰastyoḥ svā3ḥ siṣāsanratʰiro gaviṣṭiṣu indrasya śuṣmamīrayannapasyubʰirindurhinvāno ajyate manīṣibʰiḥ

text: Indra, give us security from that whereof we are afraid Help us, O Maghavan, let thy favour aid us thus drive away foes and enemies!
meaning: इन्द्रस्य सोम पवमान ऊर्मिणा तविष्यमाणो जठरेष्वा विश प्र नः पिन्व विद्युदभ्रेव रोदसी धिया नो वाजाꣳ उप माहि शश्वतः
sanskrit_iast: indrasya soma pavamāna ūrmiṇā taviṣyamāṇo jaṭʰareṣvā viśa pra naḥ pinva vidyudabʰreva rodasī dʰiyā no vājām̐ upa māhi śaśvataḥ

text: For thou, O liberal Lord of ample bounty, art the ruler of our house and home. So, Indra Maghavan, thou lover of the song, we with pressed Soma call on thee. XVI Soma Pavamana
meaning: यदिन्द्र प्रागपागुदङ्न्यग्वा हूयसे नृभिः सिमा पुरू नृषूतो अस्यानवे ऽसि प्रशर्ध तुर्वशे
sanskrit_iast: yadindra prāgapāgudaṅnyagvā hūyase nr̥bʰiḥ simā purū nr̥ṣūto asyānave 'si praśardʰa turvaśe

text: Thou, Soma, hast a running stream, sweet-toned most strong at sacrifice: Flow bounteously bestowing wealth
meaning: यद्वा रुमे रुशमे श्यावके कृप इन्द्र मादयसे सचा कण्वासस्त्वा स्तोमेभिर्ब्रह्मवाहस इन्द्रा यच्छन्त्या गहि
sanskrit_iast: yadvā rume ruśame śyāvake kr̥pa indra mādayase sacā kaṇvāsastvā stomebʰirbrahmavāhasa indrā yaccʰantyā gahi

text: Thou most delightful, when effused, running, the best of gladdeners, art Indu, still conquering, ne'er subdued.
meaning: उभयꣳ शृणवच्च न इन्द्रो अर्वागिदं वचः सत्राच्या मघवान्त्सोमपीतये धिया शविष्ठ आ गमत्
sanskrit_iast: ubʰayam̐ śr̥ṇavacca na indro arvāgidaṃ vacaḥ satrācyā magʰavāntsomapītaye dʰiyā śaviṣṭʰa ā gamat

text: Do thou, poured forth by pressing- stones, flow hither uttering a roar, And bring us brightly-glorious strength! XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: तꣳ हि स्वराजं वृषभं तमोजसा धिषणे निष्टतक्षतुः उतोपमानां प्रथमो नि षीदसि सोमकामꣳ हि ते मनः
sanskrit_iast: tam̐ hi svarājaṃ vr̥ṣabʰaṃ tamojasā dʰiṣaṇe niṣṭatakṣatuḥ utopamānāṃ pratʰamo ni ṣīdasi somakāmam̐ hi te manaḥ

text: In might, O Indu, with thy streams flow for the banquet of the Gods: Rich in meath, Soma, in our beaker take thy seat!
meaning: पवस्व देव आयुषगिन्द्रं गच्छतु ते मदः वायुमा रोह धर्मणा
sanskrit_iast: pavasva deva āyuṣagindraṃ gaccʰatu te madaḥ vāyumā roha dʰarmaṇā

text: Thy drops that swim in water have exalted Indra to delight The Gods have drunk thee up for immortality.
meaning: पवमान नि तोशसे रयिꣳ सोम श्रवाय्यम् इन्दो समुद्रमा विश
sanskrit_iast: pavamāna ni tośase rayim̐ soma śravāyyam indo samudramā viśa

text: Stream opulence to us, ye drops of Soma, pressed and purified Pouring down rain from heaven in floods, and finding light! XVIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: अपघ्नन्पवसे मृधः क्रतुवित्सोम मत्सरः नुदस्वादेवयुं जनम्
sanskrit_iast: apagʰnanpavase mr̥dʰaḥ kratuvitsoma matsaraḥ nudasvādevayuṃ janam

text: Him with the fleece they purify, brown, golden-hued beloved of all, Who with exhilarating juice goes forth to all the deities
meaning: अभी नो वाजसातमꣳ रयिमर्ष शतस्पृहम् इन्दो सहस्रभर्णसं तुविद्युम्नं विभासहम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰī no vājasātamam̐ rayimarṣa śataspr̥ham indo sahasrabʰarṇasaṃ tuvidyumnaṃ vibʰāsaham

text: Whom, bright with native splendour, crushed between the preesing-stones, a friend. Whom Indra dearly loves, the waves and ten companions dip and bathe
meaning: वयं ते अस्य राधसो वसोर्वसो पुरुस्पृहः नि नेदिष्ठतमा इषः स्याम सुम्ने ते आध्रिगो
sanskrit_iast: vayaṃ te asya rādʰaso vasorvaso puruspr̥haḥ ni nediṣṭʰatamā iṣaḥ syāma sumne te ādʰrigo

text: For Vritra-slaying Indra, thou, Soma, art poured that he may drink, And for the guerdon-giving man, the hero sitting in his seat. XIX Soma Pavamana
meaning: परि स्य स्वानो अक्षरिदिन्दुरव्ये मदच्युतः धारा य ऊर्ध्वो अध्वरे भ्राजा न याति गव्ययुः
sanskrit_iast: pari sya svāno akṣaridinduravye madacyutaḥ dʰārā ya ūrdʰvo adʰvare bʰrājā na yāti gavyayuḥ

text: Flow onward Soma, flow for mighty strength, as a strong courser, bathed, to win the prize.
meaning: पवस्व सोम महान्त्समुद्रः पिता देवानां विश्वाभि धाम
sanskrit_iast: pavasva soma mahāntsamudraḥ pitā devānāṃ viśvābʰi dʰāma

text: The pressers clarify this juice of thine, the Soma for delight and lofty fame.
meaning: शुक्रः पवस्व देवेभ्यः सोम दिवे पृथिव्यै शं च प्रजाभ्यः
sanskrit_iast: śukraḥ pavasva devebʰyaḥ soma dive pr̥tʰivyai śaṃ ca prajābʰyaḥ

text: They deck the gold-hued infant, newly-born, even Soma, Indu, in the sieve, for Gods. XX Soma Pavamana
meaning: दिवो धर्त्तासि शुक्रः पीयूषः सत्ये विधर्मन्वाजी पवस्व
sanskrit_iast: divo dʰarttāsi śukraḥ pīyūṣaḥ satye vidʰarmanvājī pavasva

text: The Gods have come to Indu well-descended, beautified with milk, The active crusher of the foe.
meaning: प्रेष्ठं वो अतिर्थिꣳ स्तुषे मित्रमिव प्रियम् अग्ने रथं न वेद्यम्
sanskrit_iast: preṣṭʰaṃ vo atirtʰim̐ stuṣe mitramiva priyam agne ratʰaṃ na vedyam

text: Even as mother cows their calf, so let our praise-songs strengthen him, Yea, him who winneth Indra's heart!
meaning: कविमिव प्रशꣳस्यं यं देवास इति द्विता नि मर्त्येष्वादधुः
sanskrit_iast: kavimiva praśam̐syaṃ yaṃ devāsa iti dvitā ni martyeṣvādadʰuḥ

text: Soma, pour blessings on our kine, pour forth the food that streams with milk: Increase the sea, praiseworthy one! XXI Indra
meaning: त्वं यविष्ठ दाशुषो नॄꣳपाहि शृणुही गिरः रक्षा तोकमुत त्मना
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ yaviṣṭʰa dāśuṣo nr̥̄m̐pāhi śr̥ṇuhī giraḥ rakṣā tokamuta tmanā

text: Hitherward! they who light the flame and straightway trim the sacred grass, Whose friend is Indra ever young.
meaning: एन्द्र नो गधि प्रिय सत्राजिदगोह्य गिरिर्न विश्वतः पृथुः पतिर्दिवः
sanskrit_iast: endra no gadʰi priya satrājidagohya girirna viśvataḥ pr̥tʰuḥ patirdivaḥ

text: Large is their fuel, much their laud, wide is their splinter from the stake, Whose friend is Indra ever young.
meaning: अभि हि सत्य सोमपा उभे बभूथ रोदसी इन्द्रासि सुन्वतो वृधः पतिर्दिवः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi hi satya somapā ubʰe babʰūtʰa rodasī indrāsi sunvato vr̥dʰaḥ patirdivaḥ

text: Unquelled in fight the hero leads his army with the warrior chiefs, Whose friend is Indra ever young. XXII Indra
meaning: त्वꣳ हि शश्वतीनामिन्द्र धर्त्ता पुरामसि हन्ता दस्योर्मनोर्वृधः पतिर्दिवः
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hi śaśvatīnāmindra dʰarttā purāmasi hantā dasyormanorvr̥dʰaḥ patirdivaḥ

text: He who alone bestoweth wealth on mortal man who offereth gifts, Is Indra only, potent Lord whom none resist.
meaning: पुरां भिन्दुर्युवा कविरमितौजा अजायत इन्द्रो विश्वस्य कर्मणो धर्त्ता वज्री पुरुष्टुतः
sanskrit_iast: purāṃ bʰinduryuvā kaviramitaujā ajāyata indro viśvasya karmaṇo dʰarttā vajrī puruṣṭutaḥ

text: Whoever with the Soma pressed draws thee away from many men,- Verily Indra gains thereby tremendous power.
meaning: त्वं वलस्य गोमतो ऽपावरद्रिवो बिलम् त्वां देवा अबिभ्युषस्तुज्यमानास आविषुः
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ valasya gomato 'pāvaradrivo bilam tvāṃ devā abibʰyuṣastujyamānāsa āviṣuḥ

text: When willhe trample, like a weed, the man who hath no gift for him? When, verily, will Indra hear our songs of praise? XXIII Indra
meaning: इन्द्रमीशानमोजसाभि स्तोमैरनूषत सहस्रं यस्य रातय उत वा सन्ति भूयसीः
sanskrit_iast: indramīśānamojasābʰi stomairanūṣata sahasraṃ yasya rātaya uta vā santi bʰūyasīḥ

text: The singers hymn thee, they who chant the psalm of praise are lauding thee. The Brahmans have exalted thee, O Satakratu, like a pole. 2, When thou wast climbing ridge from ridge, he looked upon the toilsome task: Indra takes notice of that wish, and the Ram hastens with his troop.
meaning: अक्रान्त्समुद्रः प्रथमे विधर्मं जनयन्प्रजा भुवनस्य गोपाः वृषा पवित्रे अधि सानो अव्ये बृहत्सोमो वावृधे स्वानो अद्रिः
sanskrit_iast: akrāntsamudraḥ pratʰame vidʰarmaṃ janayanprajā bʰuvanasya gopāḥ vr̥ṣā pavitre adʰi sāno avye br̥hatsomo vāvr̥dʰe svāno adriḥ

text: Harness thy pair of strong bay steeds, long-maned, whose bodies fill the girths. And, Indra, Soma drinker, come to listen to our songs Of praise! I Agni
meaning: मत्सि वायुमिष्टये राधसे च मत्सि मित्रावरुणा पूयमानः मत्सि शर्धो मारुतं मत्सि देवान्मत्सि द्यावापृथिवी देव सोम
sanskrit_iast: matsi vāyumiṣṭaye rādʰase ca matsi mitrāvaruṇā pūyamānaḥ matsi śardʰo mārutaṃ matsi devānmatsi dyāvāpr̥tʰivī deva soma

text: Agni,well kindled bring the Gods for him who offers holy gifts; And worship them, pure Hotar-priest!
meaning: महत्तत्सोमो महिषश्चकारापां यद्गर्भो ऽवृणीत देवान् अदधादिन्द्रे पवमान ओजो ऽजनयत्सूर्ये ज्योतिरिन्दुः
sanskrit_iast: mahattatsomo mahiṣaścakārāpāṃ yadgarbʰo 'vr̥ṇīta devān adadʰādindre pavamāna ojo 'janayatsūrye jyotirinduḥ

text: O Sage, Tanunapat, present our sacrifice to Gods to-day, Sweet to the taste, that they may help!
meaning: एष देवो अमर्त्यः पर्णवीरिव दीयते अभि द्रोणान्यासदम्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa devo amartyaḥ parṇavīriva dīyate abʰi droṇānyāsadam
