text: Dear Narasansa, sweet of tongue, presenter of oblations, I Invoke to this our sacrifice.
meaning: एष विप्रैरभिष्टुतो ऽपो देवो वि गाहते दधद्रत्नानि दाशुषे
sanskrit_iast: eṣa viprairabʰiṣṭuto 'po devo vi gāhate dadʰadratnāni dāśuṣe

text: Agni, on thy most easy car, entreated, hither bring the Gods! Manus-appointed Priest art thou. II Adityas
meaning: एष विश्वानि वार्या शूरो यन्निव सत्वभिः पवमानः सिषासति
sanskrit_iast: eṣa viśvāni vāryā śūro yanniva satvabʰiḥ pavamānaḥ siṣāsati

text: So when the Sun hath risen to-day may sinless Mitra, Aryaman, Bhaga, and Savitar send us forth!
meaning: एष देवो रथर्यति पवमानो दिशस्यति आविष्कृणोति वग्वनुम्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa devo ratʰaryati pavamāno diśasyati āviṣkr̥ṇoti vagvanum

text: May this our home be guarded well: forward, ye bounteous, on the way, Who bear us safely o'er distress!
meaning: एष देवो विपन्युभिः पवमान ऋतायुभिः हरिर्वाजाय मृज्यते
sanskrit_iast: eṣa devo vipanyubʰiḥ pavamāna r̥tāyubʰiḥ harirvājāya mr̥jyate

text: Yea, Aditi, and those great Kings whose statute is inviolate, Are sovrans of a vast domain. III Indra
meaning: एष देवो विपा कृतो ऽति ह्वराꣳसि धावति पवमानो अदाभ्यः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa devo vipā kr̥to 'ti hvarām̐si dʰāvati pavamāno adābʰyaḥ

text: Let Soma juices make thee glad! Display thy bounty, Thunderer: Drive off the enemies of prayer!
meaning: एष दिवं वि धावति तिरो रजाꣳसि धारया पवमानः कनिक्रदत्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa divaṃ vi dʰāvati tiro rajām̐si dʰārayā pavamānaḥ kanikradat

text: Crush with thy foot the niggard churls who bring no gifts! mighty art thou: There is not one to equal thee.
meaning: एष दिवं व्यासरत्तिरो रजाꣳस्यस्पृतः पवमानः स्वध्वरः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa divaṃ vyāsarattiro rajām̐syaspr̥taḥ pavamānaḥ svadʰvaraḥ

text: Thou art the Lord of Somas pressed, Somas unpressed are also thine: Thou art the Sovran of the folk. IV Soma Pavamana
meaning: एष प्रत्नेन जन्मना देवो देवेभ्यः सुतः हरिः पवित्रे अर्षति
sanskrit_iast: eṣa pratnena janmanā devo devebʰyaḥ sutaḥ hariḥ pavitre arṣati

text: True object of our hymns, Sage, watchful Soma hath settled in the press as they refine him. Him the Adhvaryus, paired and eager, follow, leaders of sacrifice and skilful-handed.
meaning: एष उ स्य पुरुव्रतो जज्ञानो जनयन्निषः धारया पवते सुतः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa u sya puruvrato jajñāno janayanniṣaḥ dʰārayā pavate sutaḥ

text: He, purified and bringing gifts to Surya, hath filled full heaven and earth, and hath disclosed them. He by whose dear help heroes gain their wishes will yield the precious meed as to a victor.
meaning: एष धिया यात्यण्व्य शूरो रथेभिराशुभिः गच्छन्निन्द्रस्य निष्कृतम्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa dʰiyā yātyaṇvya śūro ratʰebʰirāśubʰiḥ gaccʰannindrasya niṣkr̥tam

text: He, being cleansed, the strengthener and increaser, bountiful Soma helped us his lustre, Wherein our sires of old who knew the footsteps found light and sought the kine within the mountain. V Indra
meaning: एष पुरू धियायते बृहते देवतातये यत्रामृतास आशत
sanskrit_iast: eṣa purū dʰiyāyate br̥hate devatātaye yatrāmr̥tāsa āśata

text: Glorify naught besides, O friends, so shall no sorrow trouble you! Praise only mighty Indra, when the juice is shed, and say your lauds repeatedly!
meaning: एतं मृजन्ति मर्ज्यमुप द्रोणेष्वायवः प्रचक्राणं महीरिषः
sanskrit_iast: etaṃ mr̥janti marjyamupa droṇeṣvāyavaḥ pracakrāṇaṃ mahīriṣaḥ

text: Even him, the swift one, like a bull who rushes down men's conqueror, bounteous like a cow; Him who is cause of both, of enmity and peace, to both sides most munificent. VI Indra
meaning: एष हितो वि नीयते ऽन्तः शुन्ध्यावता पथा यदी तुञ्जन्ति भूर्णयः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa hito vi nīyate 'ntaḥ śundʰyāvatā patʰā yadī tuñjanti bʰūrṇayaḥ

text: These songs of our exceeding sweet, these hymns of praise ascend to thee, Like ever-conquering chariots that display their strength, gain wealth and give unfailing help.
meaning: एष रुक्मिभिरीयते वाजि शुभ्रेभिरꣳशुभिः पतिः सिन्धूनां भवन्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa rukmibʰirīyate vāji śubʰrebʰiram̐śubʰiḥ patiḥ sindʰūnāṃ bʰavan

text: The Bhrigus are like suns, like Kanvas, and have gained each thing whereon their thought was bent. The living men of Priyamedha's race have sun g exalting Indra with their lauds. VII Soma Pavamana
meaning: एष शृङ्गाणि दोधुवच्छिशीते यूथ्यो३ वृषा नृम्णा दधान ओजसा
sanskrit_iast: eṣa śr̥ṅgāṇi dodʰuvaccʰiśīte yūtʰyo3 vr̥ṣā nr̥mṇā dadʰāna ojasā

text: Run forth to battle conquering the Vritras! thou Speedest to quell the foe like one exacting debts.
meaning: एष वसूनि पिब्दनः परुषा ययिवाꣳ अति अव शादेषु गच्छति
sanskrit_iast: eṣa vasūni pibdanaḥ paruṣā yayivām̐ ati ava śādeṣu gaccʰati

text: Thou Pavamana, didst beget the Sun with might, and rain in the supporting sky, Hasting to us with plenty vivified with milk.
meaning: एतमु त्यं दश क्षिपो हरिꣳ हिवन्ति यातवे स्वायुधं मदिन्तमम्
sanskrit_iast: etamu tyaṃ daśa kṣipo harim̐ hivanti yātave svāyudʰaṃ madintamam

text: For, Soma, we rejoice ourselves in thee effused for great supremacy in fight; Thou, Pavamana, enterest into mighty deeds. VIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: एष उ स्य वृषा रथो ऽव्या वारेभिरव्यत गच्छन्वाजꣳ सहस्रिणम्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa u sya vr̥ṣā ratʰo 'vyā vārebʰiravyata gaccʰanvājam̐ sahasriṇam

text: Flow forth, O Soma, flow thou onward, sweet to Indra's, Mitra's, Pushan's, Bhaga's taste!
meaning: एतं त्रितस्य योषणो हरिꣳ हिन्वन्त्यद्रिभिः इन्दुमिन्द्राय पीतये
sanskrit_iast: etaṃ tritasya yoṣaṇo harim̐ hinvantyadribʰiḥ indumindrāya pītaye

text: So flow thou on as bright celestial juice, flow to the vast immortal dwelling-place!
meaning: एष स्य मानुषीष्वा श्येनो न विक्षु सीदति गच्छं जारो न योषितम्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa sya mānuṣīṣvā śyeno na vikṣu sīdati gaccʰaṃ jāro na yoṣitam

text: Let Indra drink, O Soma, of thy juice for wisdom, and all deities for strength! IX Soma Pavamana
meaning: एष स्य मद्यो रसो ऽव चष्टे दिवः शिशुः य इन्दुर्वारमाविशत्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa sya madyo raso 'va caṣṭe divaḥ śiśuḥ ya indurvāramāviśat

text: Even as the beams of Surya, urging men to speed, they issue forth together, gladdening as they flow, These swift outpourings in long course of holy rites: no form save only Indra shows itself so pure.
meaning: एष स्य पीतये सुतो हरिरर्षति धर्णसिः क्रन्दन्योनिमभि प्रियम्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa sya pītaye suto harirarṣati dʰarṇasiḥ krandanyonimabʰi priyam

text: The thought is deeply fixed, the savoury juice is shed; the tongue with joyous sound is stirring in the mouth: And Pavamana, like the shout of those who press, the drop, rich in sweet juice, is flowing through the fleece.
meaning: एतं त्यꣳ हरितो दश मर्मृज्यन्ते अपस्युवः याभिर्मदाय शुम्भते
sanskrit_iast: etaṃ tyam̐ harito daśa marmr̥jyante apasyuvaḥ yābʰirmadāya śumbʰate

text: The bull is bellowing; the cows are coming nigh: the Goddesses approach the God's own resting-place. Onward hath Soma pressed through the sheep's fair bright fleece, and hath, as 'twere, endued a garment newly washed. X Agni
meaning: एष वाजी हितो नृभिर्विश्वविन्मनसस्पतिः अव्यो वारं वि धावति
sanskrit_iast: eṣa vājī hito nr̥bʰirviśvavinmanasaspatiḥ avyo vāraṃ vi dʰāvati

text: From the two fire-sticks have the men engendered, with thought, urged by the hand, the glorious Agni, Far-seen, with pointed flame, Lord of the Homestead.
meaning: एष पवित्रे अक्षरत्सोमो देवेभ्यः सुतः विश्वा धामान्याविशन्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa pavitre akṣaratsomo devebʰyaḥ sutaḥ viśvā dʰāmānyāviśan

text: The Vasus set that Agni in the dwelling, fair to behold, for help, from every quarter: Who, in the house for ever, must be honoured.
meaning: एष देवः शुभायते ऽधि योनावमर्त्यः वृत्रहा देववीतमः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa devaḥ śubʰāyate 'dʰi yonāvamartyaḥ vr̥trahā devavītamaḥ

text: Shine thou before us, Agni, well-enkindled, with flame, most youthful God, that never fadeth! To thee come goods and treasures all together. XI Surya
meaning: एष वृषा कनिक्रदद्दशभिर्जामिभिर्यतः अभि द्रोणानि धावति
sanskrit_iast: eṣa vr̥ṣā kanikradaddaśabʰirjāmibʰiryataḥ abʰi droṇāni dʰāvati

text: This spotted Bull hath come and sat before the mother in the east, Advancing to his father heaven.
meaning: एष सूर्यमरोचयत्पवमानो अधि द्यवि पवित्रे मत्सरो मदः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa sūryamarocayatpavamāno adʰi dyavi pavitre matsaro madaḥ

text: As expiration from his breath, his radiance penetrates within The Bull shines out through all the sky.
meaning: एष सूर्येण हासते संवसानो विवस्वता पतिर्वाचो अदाभ्यः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa sūryeṇa hāsate saṃvasāno vivasvatā patirvāco adābʰyaḥ

text: Song is bestowed upon the Bird: it reigns supreme through thirty realms. Throughout the days at break of morn. I Agni
meaning: एष कविरभिष्टुतः पवित्रे अधि तोशते पुनानो घ्नन्नप द्विषः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa kavirabʰiṣṭutaḥ pavitre adʰi tośate punāno gʰnannapa dviṣaḥ

text: Chant we a hymn to Agni while we go to sacrifice, to him Who hears us even from afar!
meaning: एष इन्द्राय वायवे स्वर्जित्परि षिच्यते पवित्रे दक्षसाधनः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa indrāya vāyave svarjitpari ṣicyate pavitre dakṣasādʰanaḥ

text: Who from of old, in carnage, when the folk were gathered, hath preserved. His household for the worshipper.
meaning: एष नृभिर्वि नीयते दिवो मूर्धा वृषा सुतः सोमो वनेषु विश्ववित्
sanskrit_iast: eṣa nr̥bʰirvi nīyate divo mūrdʰā vr̥ṣā sutaḥ somo vaneṣu viśvavit

text: May that most blissful Agni guard our wealth and all ourfamily. And keep us safe from pain and grief
meaning: एष गव्युरचिक्रदत्पवमानो हिरण्ययुः इन्दुः सत्राजिदस्तृतः
sanskrit_iast: eṣa gavyuracikradatpavamāno hiraṇyayuḥ induḥ satrājidastr̥taḥ

text: Yea, let men say, Agni is born, even he who slayeth Vritra, he, Who winneth wealth in every fight! II Agni
meaning: एष शुष्म्यसिष्यददन्तरिक्षे वृषा हरिः पुनान इन्दुरिन्द्रमा
sanskrit_iast: eṣa śuṣmyasiṣyadadantarikṣe vr̥ṣā hariḥ punāna indurindramā

text: Harness, O Agni, O thou God, thy steeds which are most excellent! The fleet ones bring the rapidly.
meaning: एष शुष्म्यदाभ्यः सोमः पुनानो अर्षति देवावीरघशꣳसहा
sanskrit_iast: eṣa śuṣmyadābʰyaḥ somaḥ punāno arṣati devāvīragʰaśam̐sahā

text: Come hither, bring the Gods to us to taste the sacrificial feast, To drink the draught of Soma juice!
meaning: स सुतः पीतये वृषा सोमः पवित्रे अर्षति विघ्नन्रक्षाꣳसि देवयुः
sanskrit_iast: sa sutaḥ pītaye vr̥ṣā somaḥ pavitre arṣati vigʰnanrakṣām̐si devayuḥ

text: O Agni of the Bharatas, flame splendid with unfading might Shine forth and gleam, eternal one! III Soma Pavamana
meaning: स पवित्रे विचक्षणो हरिरर्षति धर्णसिः अभि योनिं कनिक्रदत्
sanskrit_iast: sa pavitre vicakṣaṇo harirarṣati dʰarṇasiḥ abʰi yoniṃ kanikradat

text: Let him, as mortal, crave this speech for him who presses of the juice! As Bhrigu's sons chased Makha, so drive ye the niggard hound away.
meaning: स वाजी रोचना दिवः पवमानो वि धावति रक्षोहा वारमव्ययम्
sanskrit_iast: sa vājī rocanā divaḥ pavamāno vi dʰāvati rakṣohā vāramavyayam

text: The kinsman hath endued his robe even as a son is clasped in arms. He went, as lover to a dame, to take his station suitor-like.
meaning: स त्रितस्याधि सानवि पवमानो अरोचयत् जामिभिः सूर्यꣳ सह
sanskrit_iast: sa tritasyādʰi sānavi pavamāno arocayat jāmibʰiḥ sūryam̐ saha

text: That hero who produces strength, he who hath propped both worlds apart, Gold-hued, hath wrapped him in the sieve to settle, priest-like, in his place. IV Indra
meaning: स वृत्रहा वृषा सुतो वरिवोविददाभ्यः सोमो वाजमिवासरत्
sanskrit_iast: sa vr̥trahā vr̥ṣā suto varivovidadābʰyaḥ somo vājamivāsarat

text: Still, Indra, from all ancient time rivalless ever and companionless art thou: Thou seekest friendship but in war.
meaning: स देवः कविनेषितो३ ऽभि द्रोणानि धावति इन्दुरिन्द्राय मꣳहयन्
sanskrit_iast: sa devaḥ kavineṣito3 'bʰi droṇāni dʰāvati indurindrāya mam̐hayan

text: Thou findest not the wealthy man to be thy friend: those scorn thee who are flown with wine. What time thou thunderest and gatherest, then thou, even as a father, art invoked. V Indra
meaning: यः पावमानीरध्येत्यृषिभिः सम्भृतꣳ रसम् सर्वꣳ स पूतमश्नाति स्वदितं मातरिश्वना
sanskrit_iast: yaḥ pāvamānīradʰyetyr̥ṣibʰiḥ sambʰr̥tam̐ rasam sarvam̐ sa pūtamaśnāti svaditaṃ mātariśvanā

text: A thousand and a hundred steeds are harnessed to thy golden car: Yoked by devotion, Indra, let the long-maned bays bring thee to drink the Soma juice!
meaning: पावमानीर्यो अध्येत्यृषिभिः सम्भृतꣳ रसम् तस्मै सरस्वती दुहे क्षीरꣳ सर्पिर्मधूदकम्
sanskrit_iast: pāvamānīryo adʰyetyr̥ṣibʰiḥ sambʰr̥tam̐ rasam tasmai sarasvatī duhe kṣīram̐ sarpirmadʰūdakam

text: Yoked to thy chariot wrought of gold, may thy two bays with, peacock tails. Convey thee hither, steeds with their white backs, to quaff sweet juice that makes us eloquent!
meaning: पावमानीः स्वस्त्ययनीः सुदुघा हि घृतश्चुतः ऋषिभिः संभृतो रसो ब्राह्मणेष्वमृतꣳ हितम्
sanskrit_iast: pāvamānīḥ svastyayanīḥ sudugʰā hi gʰr̥taścutaḥ r̥ṣibʰiḥ saṃbʰr̥to raso brāhmaṇeṣvamr̥tam̐ hitam

text: So drink, thou lover of the song, as the first drinker, of this juice. This the outpouring of the savoury sap prepared is good and meet to gladden thee. VI Soma Pavamana
meaning: पावमानीर्दधन्तु न इमं लोकमथो अमुम् कामान्त्समर्धयन्तु नो देवीर्देवैः समाहृताः
sanskrit_iast: pāvamānīrdadʰantu na imaṃ lokamatʰo amum kāmāntsamardʰayantu no devīrdevaiḥ samāhr̥tāḥ

text: Press ye and pour him, like a steed, laud-worthy, speeding through the region and the flood, Who swims in water, dwells in wood
meaning: येन देवाः पवित्रेणात्मानं पुनते सदा तेन सहस्रधारेण पावमानीः पुनन्तु नः
sanskrit_iast: yena devāḥ pavitreṇātmānaṃ punate sadā tena sahasradʰāreṇa pāvamānīḥ punantu naḥ

text: The Steer with thousand streams who poureth out the rain, dear to the race of deities; Who, born in Law, hath waxen mighty by the Law, King, God, and lofty ordinance. VII Agni
meaning: पावमानीः स्वस्त्ययनीस्ताभिर्गच्छति नान्दनम् पुण्याꣳश्च भक्षान्भक्षयत्यमृतत्वं च गच्छति
sanskrit_iast: pāvamānīḥ svastyayanīstābʰirgaccʰati nāndanam puṇyām̐śca bʰakṣānbʰakṣayatyamr̥tatvaṃ ca gaccʰati

text: Served with oblation, kindled, bright, through love of song, may Agni, bent On riches, smite the Vritras dead
meaning: अगन्म महा नमसा यविष्ठं यो दीदाय समिद्धः स्वे दुरोणे चित्रभानुꣳ रोदसी अन्तरुर्वी स्वाहुतं विश्वतः प्रत्यञ्चम्
sanskrit_iast: aganma mahā namasā yaviṣṭʰaṃ yo dīdāya samiddʰaḥ sve duroṇe citrabʰānum̐ rodasī antarurvī svāhutaṃ viśvataḥ pratyañcam

text: His father's father, shining in his mother's ever-lasting side, Set on the seat of sacrifice!
meaning: स मह्ना विश्वा दुरितानि साह्वानग्नि ष्टवे दम आ जातवेदाः स नो रक्षिषद्दुरितादवद्यादस्मान्गृणत उत नो मघोनः
sanskrit_iast: sa mahnā viśvā duritāni sāhvānagni ṣṭave dama ā jātavedāḥ sa no rakṣiṣadduritādavadyādasmāngr̥ṇata uta no magʰonaḥ

text: O active Jatavedas, bring devotion that wins progeny, Agni, that it may shine to heaven! VIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: त्वं वरुण उत मित्रो अग्ने त्वां वर्धन्ति मतिभिर्वसिष्ठाः त्वे वसु सुषणनानि सन्तु यूयं पात स्वस्तिभिः सदा नः
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ varuṇa uta mitro agne tvāṃ vardʰanti matibʰirvasiṣṭʰāḥ tve vasu suṣaṇanāni santu yūyaṃ pāta svastibʰiḥ sadā naḥ

text: Made pure by this man's urgent zeal and impulse, the God hath with his juice the Gods pervaded. Pressed, singing, to the sieve he goes, as passes the Hotar to enclosures hoiding cattle.
meaning: महाꣳ इन्द्रो य ओजसा पर्जन्यो वृष्टिमाꣳ इव स्तोमैर्वत्सस्य वावृधे
sanskrit_iast: mahām̐ indro ya ojasā parjanyo vr̥ṣṭimām̐ iva stomairvatsasya vāvr̥dʰe

text: Robed in fair raiment meet to wear in combat, a mighty Sage pronouncing invocations, Roll onward to the press-boards as they cleanse thee, far-seeing at the feast of Gods and watchful!
meaning: कण्वा इन्द्रं यदक्रत स्तोमैर्यज्ञस्य साधनम् जामि ब्रुवत आयुधा
sanskrit_iast: kaṇvā indraṃ yadakrata stomairyajñasya sādʰanam jāmi bruvata āyudʰā

text: Dear, he is brightened on the fleecy summit, a prince among us, nobler than the noble. Roar out as thou art purified, run forward! Do ye preserve us evermore with blessings! IX Indra
meaning: प्रजामृतस्य पिप्रतः प्र यद्भरन्त वह्नयः विप्रा ऋतस्य वाहसा
sanskrit_iast: prajāmr̥tasya piprataḥ pra yadbʰaranta vahnayaḥ viprā r̥tasya vāhasā

text: Come now and let us glorify pure Indra with pure Sama hymn! Let milk-blent juice delight him made stronger with pure, pure songs of praise!
meaning: पवमानस्य जिघ्नतो हरेश्चन्द्रा असृक्षत जीरा अजिरशोचिषः
sanskrit_iast: pavamānasya jigʰnato hareścandrā asr̥kṣata jīrā ajiraśociṣaḥ

text: O Indra, come thou pure to us, with pure assistance pure thyself! Pure, send thou riches down to us, and, meet for Soma! pure, rejoice!
meaning: पवमानो रथीतमः शुभ्रेभिः शुभ्रशस्तमः हरिश्चन्द्रो मरुद्गणः
sanskrit_iast: pavamāno ratʰītamaḥ śubʰrebʰiḥ śubʰraśastamaḥ hariścandro marudgaṇaḥ

text: O Indra, pure, vouchsafe us wealth, and, pure enrich the worshipper! Pure, thou dost strike the Vritras dead, and strivest pure, to win the spoil. X Agni
meaning: पवमान् व्यश्नुहि रश्मिभिर्वाजसातमः दधत्स्तोत्रे सुवीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: pavamān vyaśnuhi raśmibʰirvājasātamaḥ dadʰatstotre suvīryam

text: Eager for wealth we meditate Agni's effectual laud to-day, Laud of the God who touches heaven.
meaning: परीतो षिञ्चता सुतꣳ सोमो य उत्तमꣳ हविः दधन्वाꣳ यो नर्यो अप्स्वा३न्तरा सुषाव सोममद्रिभिः
sanskrit_iast: parīto ṣiñcatā sutam̐ somo ya uttamam̐ haviḥ dadʰanvām̐ yo naryo apsvā3ntarā suṣāva somamadribʰiḥ

text: May Agni who is Hotar-priest among mankind accept our songs, And worship the celestial folk!
meaning: नूनं पुनानो ऽविभिः परि स्रवादब्धः सुरभिन्तरः सुते चित्वाप्सु मदामो अन्धसा श्रीणन्तो गोभिरुत्तरम्
sanskrit_iast: nūnaṃ punāno 'vibʰiḥ pari sravādabdʰaḥ surabʰintaraḥ sute citvāpsu madāmo andʰasā śrīṇanto gobʰiruttaram

text: Thou, Agni, art spread widely forth, Priest dear and excellent through thee Men make the sacrifice complete. XI Soma Pavamana
meaning: परि स्वानश्चक्षसे देवमादनः क्रतुरिन्दुर्विचक्षणः
sanskrit_iast: pari svānaścakṣase devamādanaḥ kraturindurvicakṣaṇaḥ

text: To him, praiseworthy, sacred tones have sounded, Steer of the triple height, the life-bestower. Dwelling in wood, like Varuna, a river, lavishing treasure, he distributes blessings.
meaning: असावि सोमो अरुषो वृषा हरी राजेव दस्मो अभि गा अचिक्रदत् पुनानो वारमत्येष्यव्ययꣳ श्येनो न योनिं घृतवन्तमासदत्
sanskrit_iast: asāvi somo aruṣo vr̥ṣā harī rājeva dasmo abʰi gā acikradat punāno vāramatyeṣyavyayam̐ śyeno na yoniṃ gʰr̥tavantamāsadat

text: Great conqueror, warrior girt, Lord of all heroes, flow on thy way as he who winneth riches: With sharpened arms, with swift bow, never vanquished in battle, vanquishing in fight the foemen!
meaning: पर्जन्यः पिता महिषस्य पर्णिनो नाभा पृथिव्या गिरिषु क्षयं दधे स्वसार आपो अभि गा उदासरन्त्सं ग्रावभिर्वसते वीते अध्वरे
sanskrit_iast: parjanyaḥ pitā mahiṣasya parṇino nābʰā pr̥tʰivyā giriṣu kṣayaṃ dadʰe svasāra āpo abʰi gā udāsarantsaṃ grāvabʰirvasate vīte adʰvare

text: Giving security, Lord of wide dominion, send us both heaven and earth with all their fulness! Striving to win the Dawns, the light, the waters, and cattle, call to us abundant booty! XII Indra
meaning: कविर्वेधस्या पर्येषि माहिनमत्यो न मृष्टो अभि वाजमर्षसि अपसेधन्दुरिता सोम नो मृड घृता वसानः परि यासि निर्णिजम्
sanskrit_iast: kavirvedʰasyā paryeṣi māhinamatyo na mr̥ṣṭo abʰi vājamarṣasi apasedʰanduritā soma no mr̥ḍa gʰr̥tā vasānaḥ pari yāsi nirṇijam

text: O Indra, thou art far-renowned, impetuous Lord of power and might. Alone, the never-conquered guardian of mankind, thou smitest down resistless foes.
meaning: श्रायन्त इव सूर्यं विश्वेदिन्द्रस्य भक्षत वसूनि जातो जनिमान्योजसा प्रति भागं न दीधिमः
sanskrit_iast: śrāyanta iva sūryaṃ viśvedindrasya bʰakṣata vasūni jāto janimānyojasā prati bʰāgaṃ na dīdʰimaḥ

text: As such we seek thee now, O Asura, the most wise, craving thy bounty as our share Thy sheltering defence is like an ample cloak. So may thy favours reach to us. XIII Agni
meaning: अलर्षिरातिं वसुदामुप स्तुहि भद्रा इन्द्रस्य रातयः यो अस्य कामं विधतो न रोषति मनो दानाय चोदयन्
sanskrit_iast: alarṣirātiṃ vasudāmupa stuhi bʰadrā indrasya rātayaḥ yo asya kāmaṃ vidʰato na roṣati mano dānāya codayan

text: Thee have we chosen, skilfullest in sacrifice, immortal, Priest, among the Gods, Best finisher of this holy rite:
meaning: यत इन्द्र भयामहे ततो नो अभ्यं कृधि मघवन्छग्धि तव तन्न ऊतये वि द्विषो वि मृधो जहि
sanskrit_iast: yata indra bʰayāmahe tato no abʰyaṃ kr̥dʰi magʰavancʰagdʰi tava tanna ūtaye vi dviṣo vi mr̥dʰo jahi

text: The Waters' Child, the blessed brightly-shining one, Agni whose, light is excellent. May he by sacrifice win us in heaven the grace of Mitra, Varuna, and the Floods! XIV Agni
meaning: त्वꣳ हि राधस्पते राधसो महः क्षयस्यासि विध्रत्ता तं त्वा वयं मघवन्निन्द्र गिर्वणः सुतावन्तो हवामहे
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hi rādʰaspate rādʰaso mahaḥ kṣayasyāsi vidʰrattā taṃ tvā vayaṃ magʰavannindra girvaṇaḥ sutāvanto havāmahe

text: Lord of all food is he, the man whom thou protectest in the fight, Agni, and urgest to the fray.
meaning: त्वꣳ सोमासि धारयुर्मन्द्र ओजिष्ठो अध्वरे पवस्व मꣳहयद्रयिः
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ somāsi dʰārayurmandra ojiṣṭʰo adʰvare pavasva mam̐hayadrayiḥ

text: Him, whosoever he may be, no one may vanquish, mighty one! Nay, very glorious wealth is his.
meaning: त्वꣳ सुतो मदिन्तमो दधन्वान्मत्सरिन्तमः इन्दुः सत्राजिदस्तृतः
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ suto madintamo dadʰanvānmatsarintamaḥ induḥ satrājidastr̥taḥ

text: May he who dwells with all mankind conquer in fight with steeds of war, With sages may he win the spoil. XV Soma Pavamana
meaning: त्वꣳ सुष्वाणो अद्रिभिरभ्यर्ष कनिक्रदत् द्युमन्तꣳ शुष्मा भर
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ suṣvāṇo adribʰirabʰyarṣa kanikradat dyumantam̐ śuṣmā bʰara

text: Ten sisters, pouring out the rain together, the sage's quickly moving thoughts, adorn him. Hither hath run the gold-hued Child of Surya, and reached the vat like a fleet vigorous courser.
meaning: पवस्व देववीतय इन्दो धाराभिरोजसा आ कलशं मधुमान्त्सोम नः सदः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva devavītaya indo dʰārābʰirojasā ā kalaśaṃ madʰumāntsoma naḥ sadaḥ

text: Even as a youngling shouting with his mothers, the bounteous Steer hath flowed along with waters. As youth to damsel, so with milk he hastens on to the settled meeting-place, the beaker.
meaning: तव द्रप्सा उदप्रुत इन्द्रं मदाय वावृधुः त्वां देवासो अमृताय कं पपुः
sanskrit_iast: tava drapsā udapruta indraṃ madāya vāvr̥dʰuḥ tvāṃ devāso amr̥tāya kaṃ papuḥ

text: Yea, swollen is the udder of the milch-cow; thither in streams. comes very sapient Indu. The kine make ready, as with new-washed treasures, the head and chief with milk within the vessels. XVI Indra
meaning: आ नः सुतास इन्दवः पुनाना धावता रयिम् वृष्टिद्यावो रीत्यापः स्वर्विदः
sanskrit_iast: ā naḥ sutāsa indavaḥ punānā dʰāvatā rayim vr̥ṣṭidyāvo rītyāpaḥ svarvidaḥ

text: Drink, Indra, of the savoury juice, and cheer thee, with our milky draught! Be, for our weal, our friend and sharer of the feast, and let thy wisdom guard us well!
meaning: परि त्यꣳ हर्यतꣳ हरिं बभ्रुं पुनन्ति वारेण यो देवान्विश्वाꣳ इत्परि मदेन सह गच्छति
sanskrit_iast: pari tyam̐ haryatam̐ hariṃ babʰruṃ punanti vāreṇa yo devānviśvām̐ itpari madena saha gaccʰati

text: In thy kind grace and favour may we still be strong: cast us not down before the foe! With manifold assistance guard and succour us, and stablish us in thy good-will! XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: द्विर्यं पञ्च स्वयशसꣳ सखायो अद्रिसꣳहतम् प्रियमिन्द्रस्य काम्यं प्रस्नापयन्त ऊर्मयः
sanskrit_iast: dviryaṃ pañca svayaśasam̐ sakʰāyo adrisam̐hatam priyamindrasya kāmyaṃ prasnāpayanta ūrmayaḥ

text: The three-times seven milch-kine in the loftiest heaven have for this Soma poured the genuine milky draught. Four other beauteous creatures hath he made for his adornment when he waxed in strength through holy rites.
meaning: इन्द्राय सोम पातवे वृत्रघ्ने परि षिच्यसे नरे च दक्षिणावते वीराय सदनासदे
sanskrit_iast: indrāya soma pātave vr̥tragʰne pari ṣicyase nare ca dakṣiṇāvate vīrāya sadanāsade

text: Enjoying lovely Amrit by his wisdom he divided, each apart from other, earth and heaven. He gladly wrapped himself in the most lucid floods, when through their glory they-found the God's resting-place.
meaning: पवस्व सोम महे दक्षायाश्वो न निक्तो वाजी धनाय
sanskrit_iast: pavasva soma mahe dakṣāyāśvo na nikto vājī dʰanāya

text: May those his brilliant rays be ever free from death, inviolate for both classes of created things-- Rays wherewith powers of men and Gods are purified! Yea, even for this have sages welcomed him as King. XVIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: प्र ते सोतारो रसं मदाय पुनन्ति सोमं महे द्युम्नाय
sanskrit_iast: pra te sotāro rasaṃ madāya punanti somaṃ mahe dyumnāya

text: Lauded with song, to feast him, flow to Vayu, flow purified to Varuna and Mitra! Flow to the song inspiring car-borne hero, to mighty Indra, him who wields the thunder!
meaning: शिशुं जज्ञानꣳ हरिं मृजन्ति पवित्रे सोमं देवेभ्य इन्दुम्
sanskrit_iast: śiśuṃ jajñānam̐ hariṃ mr̥janti pavitre somaṃ devebʰya indum

text: Pour on us garments that shall clothe us meetly, send, purified, milch-kine, abundant yielders! God Soma, send us cbariot-drawing horses that they may bring us treasures bright and golden!
meaning: उषो षु जातमप्तुरं गोभिर्भङ्गं परिष्कृतम् इन्दुं देवा अयासिषुः
sanskrit_iast: uṣo ṣu jātamapturaṃ gobʰirbʰaṅgaṃ pariṣkr̥tam induṃ devā ayāsiṣuḥ

text: Send to us in a stream celestial riches, send us when thou art cleansed, what earth containeth, So that thereby we may acquire possessions and Rishihood in Jamadagni's manner! XIX Indra
meaning: तमिद्वर्धन्तु नो गिरो वत्सꣳ सꣳशिश्वरीरिव य इन्द्रस्य हृदꣳसनिः
sanskrit_iast: tamidvardʰantu no giro vatsam̐ sam̐śiśvarīriva ya indrasya hr̥dam̐saniḥ

text: When thou, unequalled Maghavan, wast born to smite the Vritras dead, Thou spreadest out the spacious earth and didst support and prop the heavens.
meaning: अर्षा नः सोम शं गवे धुक्षस्व पिप्युषीमिषम् वर्धा समुद्रमुक्थ्यम्
sanskrit_iast: arṣā naḥ soma śaṃ gave dʰukṣasva pipyuṣīmiṣam vardʰā samudramuktʰyam

text: Then was the sacrifice produced for thee, the laud, and song of joy. In might thou art above this All, all that now is and yet shall be.
meaning: आ घा ये अग्निमिन्धते स्तृणन्ति बर्हिरानुषक् येषामिन्द्रो युवा सखा
sanskrit_iast: ā gʰā ye agnimindʰate str̥ṇanti barhirānuṣak yeṣāmindro yuvā sakʰā

text: Raw kine thou filledst with ripe milk. Thou madest Surya rise to heaven. Heat him as milk is heated with pure Sdma hymns, great joy to him who loves the song! XX Indra
meaning: बृहन्निदिध्म एषां भूरि शस्त्रं पृथुः स्वरुः येषामिन्द्रो युवा सखा
sanskrit_iast: br̥hannididʰma eṣāṃ bʰūri śastraṃ pr̥tʰuḥ svaruḥ yeṣāmindro yuvā sakʰā

text: Rejoice: thy glory hath been quaffed, Lord of bay steeds! as 'twere the bowl's enlivening mead. Thine, Steer, is Indu, Steer, the Strong, best winner of a thousand spoils.
meaning: अयुद्ध इद्युधा वृतꣳ शूर आजति सत्वभिः येषामिन्द्रो युवा सखा
sanskrit_iast: ayuddʰa idyudʰā vr̥tam̐ śūra ājati satvabʰiḥ yeṣāmindro yuvā sakʰā

text: Let our strong drink, most excellent, exhilarating, come to thee, Victorious, Indra! bringing gain, immortal conquering in fight!
meaning: य एक इद्विदयते वसु मर्त्ताय दाशुषे ईशानो अप्रतिष्कुत इन्द्रो अङ्ग
sanskrit_iast: ya eka idvidayate vasu marttāya dāśuṣe īśāno apratiṣkuta indro aṅga

text: Thou, hero, winner of the spoil, urgest to speed the car of man. Burn, like a vessel with the flame, the riteless Dasyu, conqueror! I Soma Pavamana
meaning: यश्चिद्धि त्वा बहुभ्य आ सुतावाꣳ आविवासति उग्रं तत्पत्यते शव इन्द्रो अङ्ग
sanskrit_iast: yaściddʰi tvā bahubʰya ā sutāvām̐ āvivāsati ugraṃ tatpatyate śava indro aṅga

text: Pour down the rain upon us, pour a wave of waters from the sky. And plenteous store of wholesome foood!
meaning: कदा मर्त्तमराधसं पदा क्षुम्पमिव स्फुरत् कदा नः शुश्रवद्गिर इन्द्रो अङ्ग
sanskrit_iast: kadā marttamarādʰasaṃ padā kṣumpamiva spʰurat kadā naḥ śuśravadgira indro aṅga

text: Flow onward with that stream of thine, whereby the cows have come to us. The kine of strangers to our home.
meaning: गायन्ति त्वा गायत्रिणो ऽर्चन्त्यर्कमर्किणः ब्रह्माणस्त्वा शतक्रत उद्वꣳशमिव येमिरे
sanskrit_iast: gāyanti tvā gāyatriṇo 'rcantyarkamarkiṇaḥ brahmāṇastvā śatakrata udvam̐śamiva yemire

text: Dearest to Gods in sacred rites, pour on us fatness with thy stream, Pour down on us a flood of rain!
meaning: यत्सानोः सान्वारुहो भूर्यस्पष्ट कर्त्त्वम् तदिन्द्रो अर्थं चेतति यूथेन वृष्णिरेजति
sanskrit_iast: yatsānoḥ sānvāruho bʰūryaspaṣṭa karttvam tadindro artʰaṃ cetati yūtʰena vr̥ṣṇirejati

text: To give as vigour, with thy stream run through the fleecy straining-cloth! For verily the Gods will hear.
meaning: युङ्क्ष्वा हि केशिना हरी वृषणा कक्ष्यप्रा अथा न इन्द्र सोमपा गिरामुपश्रुतिं चर
sanskrit_iast: yuṅkṣvā hi keśinā harī vr̥ṣaṇā kakṣyaprā atʰā na indra somapā girāmupaśrutiṃ cara

text: Onward hath Pavamana flowed and beaten off the Rakshasas. Flashing out splendour as of old. II Indra
meaning: सुषमिद्धो न आ वह देवाꣳ अग्ने हविष्मते होतः पावक यक्षि च
sanskrit_iast: suṣamiddʰo na ā vaha devām̐ agne haviṣmate hotaḥ pāvaka yakṣi ca

text: Bring forth oblations to the God who knoweth all, who fain would drink. The wanderer, lagging not behind the hero, coming nigh with, speed!
meaning: मधुमन्तं तनूनपाद्यज्ञं देवेषु नः कवे अद्या कृणुय्हूतये
sanskrit_iast: madʰumantaṃ tanūnapādyajñaṃ deveṣu naḥ kave adyā kr̥ṇuyhūtaye

text: With Somas go ye nigh to him chief drinker of the Soma's. juice: With beakers to the impetuous God, to Indra with the flowing, drops!
meaning: नराशꣳसमिह प्रियमस्मिन्यज्ञ उप ह्वये मधुजिह्वꣳ हविष्कृतम्
sanskrit_iast: narāśam̐samiha priyamasminyajña upa hvaye madʰujihvam̐ haviṣkr̥tam

text: What time with Somas, with the drops effused,, ye come beforethe God, Full wise, he knows the hope of each, and, bold one strikes this. foe and that.
meaning: अग्ने सुखतमे रथे देवाꣳ ईडित आ वह असि होता मनुर्हितः
sanskrit_iast: agne sukʰatame ratʰe devām̐ īḍita ā vaha asi hotā manurhitaḥ

text: To him, Adhvaryu! yea, to him give offerings of the juiceexpressed! Will he not keep us safely from the spiteful curse of each, presumptuous high-born foe? III Soma Pavamana
meaning: यदद्य सूर उदिते ऽनागा मित्रो अर्यमा सुवाति सविता भगः
sanskrit_iast: yadadya sūra udite 'nāgā mitro aryamā suvāti savitā bʰagaḥ

text: Sing ye a song to Soma brown of hue, of independent might, The Red, who reaches up to heaven!
meaning: सुप्रावीरस्तु स क्षयः प्र नु यामन्त्सुदानवः ये नो अꣳहो ऽतिपिप्रति
sanskrit_iast: suprāvīrastu sa kṣayaḥ pra nu yāmantsudānavaḥ ye no am̐ho 'tipiprati

text: Purify Soma when effused with stones which hands move rapidly, And pour the sweet milk in the meath.
meaning: उत स्वराजो अदितिरदब्धस्य व्रतस्य ये महो राजान ईशते
sanskrit_iast: uta svarājo aditiradabdʰasya vratasya ye maho rājāna īśate

text: With humble homage draw ye nigh; blend the libation with the curds: To Indra offer Indu up
meaning: उ त्वा मन्दन्तु सोमाः कृणुष्व राधो अद्रिवः अव ब्रह्मद्विषो जहि
sanskrit_iast: u tvā mandantu somāḥ kr̥ṇuṣva rādʰo adrivaḥ ava brahmadviṣo jahi

text: Soma, foe-queller, strong and swift, doing the will of Gods, pour forth, Prosperity upon our kine
meaning: पदा पणीनराधसो नि बाधस्व महाꣳ असि न हि त्वा कश्च न प्रति
sanskrit_iast: padā paṇīnarādʰaso ni bādʰasva mahām̐ asi na hi tvā kaśca na prati

text: Heart-knower, Sovran of the heart, thou art effused, O Soma, Tthat, Indra. may drink thee and rejoice.
meaning: त्वमीशिषे सुतानामिन्द्र त्वमसुतानाम् त्वꣳ राजा जनानाम्
sanskrit_iast: tvamīśiṣe sutānāmindra tvamasutānām tvam̐ rājā janānām

text: O Soma Pavamana, give us riches and heroic strength, Indu, with Indra. our ally! IV Indra I. Surya, thou mountest up to meet the hero famous for his wealth, Who hurls the bolt and works for men;
meaning: आ जागृविर्विप्र ऋतां मतीनाꣳ सोमः पुनानो असदच्चमूषु सपन्ति यं मिथुनासो निकामा अध्वर्यवो रथिरासः सुहस्ताः
sanskrit_iast: ā jāgr̥virvipra r̥tāṃ matīnām̐ somaḥ punāno asadaccamūṣu sapanti yaṃ mitʰunāso nikāmā adʰvaryavo ratʰirāsaḥ suhastāḥ

text: Him who with might of both his arms broke nine-and-ninety castles down, Slew Vritra and smote Ahi dead.
meaning: स पुनान उप सूरे दधान ओबे अप्रा रोदसी वि ष आवः प्रिया चिद्यस्य प्रियसास ऊती सतो धनं कारिणे न प्र यꣳसत्
sanskrit_iast: sa punāna upa sūre dadʰāna obe aprā rodasī vi ṣa āvaḥ priyā cidyasya priyasāsa ūtī sato dʰanaṃ kāriṇe na pra yam̐sat

text: This Indra is our gracious friend. He sends, like a full-streaming cow, Riches in horses, kine, and corn. V Surya
meaning: स वर्धिता वर्धनः पूयमानः सोमो मीढ्वाꣳ अभि नो ज्योतिषावीत् यत्र नः पूर्वे पितरः पदज्ञाः स्वर्विदो अभि गा अद्रिमिष्णन्
sanskrit_iast: sa vardʰitā vardʰanaḥ pūyamānaḥ somo mīḍʰvām̐ abʰi no jyotiṣāvīt yatra naḥ pūrve pitaraḥ padajñāḥ svarvido abʰi gā adrimiṣṇan

text: May the bright God drink glorious Soma-mingled meath, giving the sacrifices lord unbroken life He who, wind-urged, in person guards our offspring well, nourishes them with food and shines o'er many a land.
meaning: मा चिदन्यद्वि शꣳसत सखायो मा रिषण्यत इन्द्रमित्स्तोता वृषणꣳ सचा सुते मुहुरुक्था च शꣳसत
sanskrit_iast: mā cidanyadvi śam̐sata sakʰāyo mā riṣaṇyata indramitstotā vr̥ṣaṇam̐ sacā sute muhuruktʰā ca śam̐sata

text: Radiant, as high Truth, cherished, best at winning strength, Truth based upon the statute that supports the heavens, He rose, a light that kills Vritras and enemies, best slayer of the Dasyus, Asuras, and foes.
meaning: अवक्रक्षिणं वृषभं यथा जुवं गां न चर्षणीसहम् विद्वेषणꣳ संवननमुभयङ्करं मꣳहिष्ठमुभयाविनम्
sanskrit_iast: avakrakṣiṇaṃ vr̥ṣabʰaṃ yatʰā juvaṃ gāṃ na carṣaṇīsaham vidveṣaṇam̐ saṃvananamubʰayaṅkaraṃ mam̐hiṣṭʰamubʰayāvinam

text: This light, the best of lights, supreme, all conquering, winner of riches, is exalted with high laud. All-lighting, radiant, mighty as the Sun to see, he spreadeth wide unshaken victory and strength. VI Indra
meaning: उदु त्ये मधुमत्तमा गिर स्तोमास ईरते सत्राजितो धनसा अक्षितोतयो वाजन्तो रथा इव
sanskrit_iast: udu tye madʰumattamā gira stomāsa īrate satrājito dʰanasā akṣitotayo vājanto ratʰā iva

text: O Indra, give us wisdom as a sire gives wisdom to his sons, Guide us, O much-invoked, in this our way: may we still livc and look upon the light!
meaning: कण्वा इव भृगवः सूर्या इव विश्वमिद्धीतमाशत इन्द्रꣳ स्तोमेभिर्महयन्त आयवः प्रियमेधासो अस्वरन्
sanskrit_iast: kaṇvā iva bʰr̥gavaḥ sūryā iva viśvamiddʰītamāśata indram̐ stomebʰirmahayanta āyavaḥ priyamedʰāso asvaran

text: Grant that no mighty foes, unknown, malevolent unhallowed, tread us to the ground! With thine assistance, hero, may we pass through all the waters that are rushing down! VII Indra
meaning: पर्यू षु प्र धन्व वाजसातये परि वृत्राणि सक्षणिः द्विषस्तरध्या ऋणया न ईरसे
sanskrit_iast: paryū ṣu pra dʰanva vājasātaye pari vr̥trāṇi sakṣaṇiḥ dviṣastaradʰyā r̥ṇayā na īrase

text: Protect us, Indra, each to-day, each to morrow, and each following day! Through all the days shalt thou, Lord of the brave, preserve our singers both by day and night!
meaning: अजीजनो हि पवमान सूर्यं विधारे शक्मना पयः गोजीरया रꣳहमानः पुरन्ध्या
sanskrit_iast: ajījano hi pavamāna sūryaṃ vidʰāre śakmanā payaḥ gojīrayā ram̐hamānaḥ purandʰyā

text: A crushing warrior, passing rich, is Maghavan, endowed with all heroic strength. Thine arms, O Satakratu, are exceeding strong, those arms, which grasp the thunderbolt. VIII Sarasvan
meaning: अनु हि त्वा सुतꣳ सोम मदामसि महे समर्यराज्ये वाजाꣳ अभि पवमान प्र गाहसे
sanskrit_iast: anu hi tvā sutam̐ soma madāmasi mahe samaryarājye vājām̐ abʰi pavamāna pra gāhase

text: We call upon Sarasvan as unmarried men who long for wives, As bounteous men who yearn for sons. IX Sarasvati
meaning: परि प्र धन्वेन्द्राय सोम स्वादुर्मित्राय पूष्णे भगाय
sanskrit_iast: pari pra dʰanvendrāya soma svādurmitrāya pūṣṇe bʰagāya

text: Yea, she most dear amid dear streams-seven-sistered, loved with foundest love. Sarasvati, hath earned our praise. X Svitar. Brahmapaspati. Agni
meaning: एवामृताय महे क्षयाय स शुक्रो अर्ष दिव्यः पीयूषः
sanskrit_iast: evāmr̥tāya mahe kṣayāya sa śukro arṣa divyaḥ pīyūṣaḥ

text: May we attain that excellent glory of Savitar the God: So may he stimulate our prayers!
meaning: इन्द्रस्ते सोम सुतस्य पेयात्क्रत्वे दक्षाय विश्वे च देवाः
sanskrit_iast: indraste soma sutasya peyātkratve dakṣāya viśve ca devāḥ

text: O Brahmanaspati, make thou Kakshivan Ausija a loud Chanter of flowing Soma juice!
meaning: सूर्यस्येव रश्मयो द्रावयित्नवो मत्सरासः प्रसुतः साकमीरते तन्तुं ततं परि सर्गास आशवो नेन्द्रादृते पवते धाम किं चन
sanskrit_iast: sūryasyeva raśmayo drāvayitnavo matsarāsaḥ prasutaḥ sākamīrate tantuṃ tataṃ pari sargāsa āśavo nendrādr̥te pavate dʰāma kiṃ cana

text: Agni, thou pourest life: send down upon us food and vigorous strength; Drive thou misfortune far away! XI Mitra-Varuva
meaning: उपो मतिः पृच्यते सिच्यते मधु मन्द्राजनी चोदते अन्तरासनि पवमानः सन्तनिः सुन्वतामिव मधुमान्द्रप्सः परि वारमर्षति
sanskrit_iast: upo matiḥ pr̥cyate sicyate madʰu mandrājanī codate antarāsani pavamānaḥ santaniḥ sunvatāmiva madʰumāndrapsaḥ pari vāramarṣati

text: So help ye us to riches, great celestial and terrestrial wealth Vast is your sway among the Gods!
meaning: उक्षा मिमेति प्रति यन्ति धेनवो देवस्य देवीरुप यन्ति निष्कृतम् अत्यक्रमीदर्जुनं वारमव्ययमत्कं न निक्तं परि सोमो अव्यत
sanskrit_iast: ukṣā mimeti prati yanti dʰenavo devasya devīrupa yanti niṣkr̥tam atyakramīdarjunaṃ vāramavyayamatkaṃ na niktaṃ pari somo avyata

text: Carefully tending Law with law they have attained their vigorous might: Both Gods, devoid of guile, wax strong.
meaning: अग्निं नरो दीधितिभिररण्योर्हस्तच्युतं जनयत प्रशस्तम् दूरेदृशं गृहपतिमथव्युम्
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ naro dīdʰitibʰiraraṇyorhastacyutaṃ janayata praśastam dūredr̥śaṃ gr̥hapatimatʰavyum

text: With rainy skies and streaming floods, Lords of the food that falls in dew, A lofty seat have they attained. XII Indra I. They who stand round him as he moves harness the bright, the ruddy steed: The lights shining in the sky.
meaning: तमग्निमस्ते वसवो न्यृण्वन्त्सुप्रतिचक्षमवसे कुतश्चित् दक्षाय्यो यो दम आस नित्यः
sanskrit_iast: tamagnimaste vasavo nyr̥ṇvantsupraticakṣamavase kutaścit dakṣāyyo yo dama āsa nityaḥ

text: On both sides to the car they yoke the two bay coursers dear to him, Brown, bold, who bear the hero on.
meaning: प्रेद्धो अग्ने दीदिहि पुरो नो ऽजस्रया सूर्म्या यविष्ठ त्वाꣳ शश्वन्त उप यन्ति वाजाः
sanskrit_iast: preddʰo agne dīdihi puro no 'jasrayā sūrmyā yaviṣṭʰa tvām̐ śaśvanta upa yanti vājāḥ

text: Thou, making light where no light was, and form, O men where form was not, Wast born together with the Dawns. XIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: आयं गौः पृश्निरक्रमीदसदन्मातरं पुरः पितरं च प्रयन्त्स्वः
sanskrit_iast: āyaṃ gauḥ pr̥śnirakramīdasadanmātaraṃ puraḥ pitaraṃ ca prayantsvaḥ

text: For thee this Soma is effused. O Indra: drink of this j uice; for thee the stream is flowing-- Soma, which thou thyself hast made and chosen, even Indu for thy special drink to cheer thee!
meaning: अन्तश्चरति रोचनास्य प्राणादपानती व्यख्यन्महिषो दिवम्
sanskrit_iast: antaścarati rocanāsya prāṇādapānatī vyakʰyanmahiṣo divam

text: Like a capacious car hath it been harnessed, the mighty, to acquire abundant treasures. Then in the sacrifice they shouted lauding all triumphs won by Nahus in the battle.
meaning: त्रिꣳशद्धाम वि राजति वाक्पतङ्गाय धीयते प्रति वस्तोरह द्युभिः
sanskrit_iast: trim̐śaddʰāma vi rājati vākpataṅgāya dʰīyate prati vastoraha dyubʰiḥ

text: Flow onward like the potent band of Maruts, like that celestial host which none revileth! Quickly be gracious unto us like waters, like sacrifice victorious, thousand-fashioned! XIV Agni
meaning: उपप्रयन्तो अध्वरं मन्त्रं वोचेमाग्नये आरे अस्मे च शृण्वते
sanskrit_iast: upaprayanto adʰvaraṃ mantraṃ vocemāgnaye āre asme ca śr̥ṇvate

text: O Agni, thou hast been ordained Hotar of every sacrifice, By Gods, among the race of men. So with sweet-sounding tongues for us sacrifice nobly in this rite: Bring thou the Gods and worship them
meaning: यः स्नीहितीषु पूर्व्यः संजग्मानासु कृष्टिषु अरक्षद्दाशुषे गयम्
sanskrit_iast: yaḥ snīhitīṣu pūrvyaḥ saṃjagmānāsu kr̥ṣṭiṣu arakṣaddāśuṣe gayam

text: For, as disposer, Agni, God, most wise in sacrifices, thou Knowest straightway the roads and paths. XV Agni
meaning: स नो वेदो अमात्यमग्नी रक्षतु शन्तमः उतास्मान्पात्वꣳहसः
sanskrit_iast: sa no vedo amātyamagnī rakṣatu śantamaḥ utāsmānpātvam̐hasaḥ

text: Immortal, Hotar-priest, and God, with wondrous power heleads the way, Urging the congregations on.
meaning: उत ब्रुवन्तु जन्तव उदग्निर्वृत्रहाजनि धनञ्जयो रणेरणे
sanskrit_iast: uta bruvantu jantava udagnirvr̥trahājani dʰanañjayo raṇeraṇe

text: Strong, he is set on deeds of strength. He is led forth in holy rites, Sage who completes the sacrifice.
meaning: अग्ने युङ्क्ष्वा हि ये तवाश्वासो देव साधवः अरं वहन्त्याशवः
sanskrit_iast: agne yuṅkṣvā hi ye tavāśvāso deva sādʰavaḥ araṃ vahantyāśavaḥ

text: Excellent, he was made by thought. The germ of beings have gained. Yea, and the Sire of active power. XVI Agni
meaning: अच्छा नो याह्या वहाभि प्रयाꣳसि वीतये आ देवान्त्सोमपीतये
sanskrit_iast: accʰā no yāhyā vahābʰi prayām̐si vītaye ā devāntsomapītaye

text: Pour on the juice the heated milk which hasteneth to heaven and. earth; Bestow the liquid on the Bull!
meaning: उदग्ने भारत द्युमदजस्रेण दविद्युतत् शोचा वि भाह्यजर
sanskrit_iast: udagne bʰārata dyumadajasreṇa davidyutat śocā vi bʰāhyajara

text: These know their own abiding-place: like calves beside themother cows, They come together with their kin.
meaning: प्र सुन्वानायान्धसो मर्त्तो न वष्ट तद्वचः अप श्वानमराधसꣳ हता मखं न भृगवः
sanskrit_iast: pra sunvānāyāndʰaso martto na vaṣṭa tadvacaḥ apa śvānamarādʰasam̐ hatā makʰaṃ na bʰr̥gavaḥ

text: Devouring in their greedy jaws, they make sustaining food irb heaven, For Indra, Agni, homage, light. XVII Indra
meaning: आ जामिरत्के अव्यत भुजे न पुत्र ओण्योः सरज्जारो न योषणां वरो न योनिमासदम्
sanskrit_iast: ā jāmiratke avyata bʰuje na putra oṇyoḥ sarajjāro na yoṣaṇāṃ varo na yonimāsadam

text: In all the worlds That was the best and highest whence sprang the mighty one, of splendid valour, As soon as he is born he smites his foemen, he in whom all who lend him aid are joyful foe
meaning: स वीरो दक्षसाधनो वि यस्तस्तम्भ रोदसी हरिः पवित्रे अव्यत वेधा न योनिमासदम्
sanskrit_iast: sa vīro dakṣasādʰano vi yastastambʰa rodasī hariḥ pavitre avyata vedʰā na yonimāsadam

text: Grown mighty in his strength, of ample vigour, he as a strikes fear into the Dasa, Eager to win the breathing and the breathless. All sang thy praise at banquet and oblation.
meaning: अभ्रातृव्यो अना त्वमनापिरिन्द्र जनुषा सनादसि युधेदापित्वमिच्छसे
sanskrit_iast: abʰrātr̥vyo anā tvamanāpirindra januṣā sanādasi yudʰedāpitvamiccʰase

text: All concentrate on thee their mental vigour, what time these, once or twice, are thine assistants. Blend what is sweeter than the sweet with sweetness: win quickly with our meath that meath in battle. XVIII Indra
meaning: न की रेवन्तꣳ सख्याय विन्दसे पीयन्ति ते सुराश्वः यदा कृणोषि नदनुꣳ समूहस्यादित्पितेव हूयसे
sanskrit_iast: na kī revantam̐ sakʰyāya vindase pīyanti te surāśvaḥ yadā kr̥ṇoṣi nadanum̐ samūhasyāditpiteva hūyase

text: At the Trikadrukas the great and strong enjoyed the barley-brew. With Vishnu did he drink the pressed-out Soma juice, even as he would. That hath so heightened him the great, the wide, to do his mighty work. So may the God attend the God, true Indu Indra who is true!
meaning: आ त्वा सहस्रमा शतं युक्ता रथे हिरण्यये ब्रह्मयुजो हरय इन्द्र केशिनो वहन्तु सोमपीतये
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā sahasramā śataṃ yuktā ratʰe hiraṇyaye brahmayujo haraya indra keśino vahantu somapītaye

text: Brought forth together with wisdom and potent strength thou grewest great: with hero deeds subduing the malevolent, most swift in act; Giving prosperity and lovely wealth to him who praiseth thee. So may the God attend the God, true Indu Indra who is true!
meaning: आ त्वा रथे हिरण्यये हरी मयूरशेप्या शितिपृष्ठा वहतां मध्वो अन्धसो विवक्षणस्य पीतये
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā ratʰe hiraṇyaye harī mayūraśepyā śitipr̥ṣṭʰā vahatāṃ madʰvo andʰaso vivakṣaṇasya pītaye

text: So he resplendent in the battle overcame Krivi by might. He with his majesty bath filled the earth and heaven, and waxen strong. One share of the libation bath he swallowed down: one share he left. Enlighten us! So may the God attend the God, true Indu Indra who is true! I Indra
meaning: पिबा त्वा३स्य गिर्वणः सुतस्य पूर्वपा इव परिष्कृतस्य रसिन इयमासुतिश्चारुर्मदाय पत्यते
sanskrit_iast: pibā tvā3sya girvaṇaḥ sutasya pūrvapā iva pariṣkr̥tasya rasina iyamāsutiścārurmadāya patyate

text: Praise, even as he is known, with song Indra the guardian of the kine, The Son of Truth, Lord of the brave,
meaning: आ सोता परि षिञ्चताश्वं न स्तोममप्तुरꣳ रजस्तुरम् वनप्रक्षमुदप्रुतम्
sanskrit_iast: ā sotā pari ṣiñcatāśvaṃ na stomamapturam̐ rajasturam vanaprakṣamudaprutam

text: Hither have his bay steeds been sent, red steeds are on the sacred grass Where we in concert sing our songs.
meaning: सहस्रधारं वृषभं पयोदुहं प्रियं देवाय जन्मने ऋतेन य ऋतजातो विवावृधे राजा देव ऋतं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: sahasradʰāraṃ vr̥ṣabʰaṃ payoduhaṃ priyaṃ devāya janmane r̥tena ya r̥tajāto vivāvr̥dʰe rājā deva r̥taṃ br̥hat

text: For Indra, thunder-armed, the kine have yielded mingled milk and meath, What time he found them in the vault. II Indra
Draw near unto our Indra who must be invoked in every fight! Come, thou most mighty Vritra-slayer, meet for praise come to libations and to hymns.
meaning: अग्निर्वृत्राणि जङ्घनद्द्रविणस्युर्विपन्यया समिद्धः शुक्र आहुतः ՙ चोम्परे संमिद्धः गर्भे मातुः पितुष्पिता विदिद्युतानो अक्षरे सीदन्नृतस्य योनिमा
sanskrit_iast: agnirvr̥trāṇi jaṅgʰanaddraviṇasyurvipanyayā samiddʰaḥ śukra āhutaḥ ՙ compare saṃmiddʰaḥ garbʰe mātuḥ pituṣpitā vididyutāno akṣare sīdannr̥tasya yonimā

text: Thou art the best of all in sending bounteous gyifts, true art thou,, lordly in thine act. We claim alliance with the very glorious one, yea, with the mighty Son of Strength. III Soma Pavamana I. They have drained forth from out the great depth of the sky the old divine primeval milk that claims the laud: They lifted up their voice to Indra at his birth.
meaning: ब्रह्म प्रजावदा भर जातवेदो विचर्षणे अग्ने यद्दीदयद्दिवि
sanskrit_iast: brahma prajāvadā bʰara jātavedo vicarṣaṇe agne yaddīdayaddivi

text: Then, beautifully radiant, certain heavenly ones proclaimed their kinship with him as they looked thereon: Savitar opens, as it were, the fold of heaven.
meaning: अस्य प्रेषा हेमना पूयमानो देवो देवेभिः समपृक्त रसम् सुतः पवित्रं पर्येति रेभन्मितेव सद्म पशुमन्ति होता
sanskrit_iast: asya preṣā hemanā pūyamāno devo devebʰiḥ samapr̥kta rasam sutaḥ pavitraṃ paryeti rebʰanmiteva sadma paśumanti hotā

text: And now that thou, O Pavamana, art above this earth and heaven and all existence in thy might, Thou shinest like a bull supreme among the herd. IV Agni
meaning: भद्रा वस्त्रा समन्या ऽ ऽ३ वसानो महान्कविर्निवचनानि शꣳसन् आ वच्यस्व चम्वोः पूयमानो विचक्षणो जागृविर्देववीतौ
sanskrit_iast: bʰadrā vastrā samanyā ' '3 vasāno mahānkavirnivacanāni śam̐san ā vacyasva camvoḥ pūyamāno vicakṣaṇo jāgr̥virdevavītau

text: O Agni, graciously announce this our good fortune to the Gods, And this our newest hymn of praise!
meaning: समु प्रियो मृज्यते सानो अव्ये यशस्तरो यशसां क्षैतो अस्मे अभि स्वर धन्वा पूयमानो यूयं पात स्वस्तिभिः सदा नः
sanskrit_iast: samu priyo mr̥jyate sāno avye yaśastaro yaśasāṃ kṣaito asme abʰi svara dʰanvā pūyamāno yūyaṃ pāta svastibʰiḥ sadā naḥ

text: Thou dealest gifts, resplendent one! nigh, as with wave of Sindhu, thou Swift strearnest to the worshipper.
meaning: एतो न्विन्द्रꣳ स्तवाम शुद्धꣳ शुद्धेन साम्ना शुद्धैरुक्थैर्वावृध्वाꣳसꣳ शुद्धैराशीर्वान्ममत्तु
sanskrit_iast: eto nvindram̐ stavāma śuddʰam̐ śuddʰena sāmnā śuddʰairuktʰairvāvr̥dʰvām̐sam̐ śuddʰairāśīrvānmamattu

text: Give us a share of wealth most high, a share of wealth most near to us, A share of wealth that is between. V Indra
meaning: इन्द्र शुद्धो न आ गहि शुद्धः शुद्धाभिरूतिभिः शुद्धो रयिं नि धारय शुद्धो ममद्धि सोम्य
sanskrit_iast: indra śuddʰo na ā gahi śuddʰaḥ śuddʰābʰirūtibʰiḥ śuddʰo rayiṃ ni dʰāraya śuddʰo mamaddʰi somya

text: I from my Father have obtained deep knowledge of eternal Law; I was born like unto the Sun.
meaning: इन्द्र शुद्धो हि नो रयिꣳ शुद्धो रत्नानि दाशुषे शुद्धो वृत्राणि जिघ्नसे शुद्धो वाजꣳ सिषाससि
sanskrit_iast: indra śuddʰo hi no rayim̐ śuddʰo ratnāni dāśuṣe śuddʰo vr̥trāṇi jigʰnase śuddʰo vājam̐ siṣāsasi

text: After the ancient manner I, like Kanva, beautify my songs, And Indra's self gains power thereby.
meaning: अग्ने स्तोमं मनामहे सिध्रमद्य दिविस्पृशः देवस्य द्रविणस्यवः
sanskrit_iast: agne stomaṃ manāmahe sidʰramadya divispr̥śaḥ devasya draviṇasyavaḥ

text: Whatever gishis have not praised thee, Indra, or have praised thee, wax Mighty indeed when praised by me! VI Agni
meaning: अग्निर्जुषत नो गिरो होता यो मानुषेष्वा स यक्षद्दैव्यं जनम्
sanskrit_iast: agnirjuṣata no giro hotā yo mānuṣeṣvā sa yakṣaddaivyaṃ janam

text: Agni, produced by strength, do thou with all thy fires accept our prayer: With those that are with Gods, with those that are with men exalt our songs!
meaning: त्वमग्ने सप्रथा असि जुष्टो होता वरेण्यः त्वया यज्ञं वि तन्वते
sanskrit_iast: tvamagne sapratʰā asi juṣṭo hotā vareṇyaḥ tvayā yajñaṃ vi tanvate

text: Forth come to us with all his fires that Agni, whose the mighty are, Come, fully girt about with wealth for us and for our kith and kin!
meaning: अभि त्रिपृष्ठं वृषणं वयोधामाङ्गोषिणमवावशंत वाणीः वना वसानो वरुणो न सिन्धूर्वि रत्नधा दयते वार्याणि
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tripr̥ṣṭʰaṃ vr̥ṣaṇaṃ vayodʰāmāṅgoṣiṇamavāvaśaṃta vāṇīḥ vanā vasāno varuṇo na sindʰūrvi ratnadʰā dayate vāryāṇi

text: Do thou, O Agni, with thy fires strengthen our prayer and sacrifices: Incite them to bestow their wealth to aid our service of the Gods! VII Soma Pavamana
meaning: शूरग्रामः सर्ववीरः सहावान्जेता पवस्व सनिता धनानि तिग्मायुधः क्षिप्रधन्वा समत्स्वषाढः साह्वान्पृतनासु शत्रून्
sanskrit_iast: śūragrāmaḥ sarvavīraḥ sahāvānjetā pavasva sanitā dʰanāni tigmāyudʰaḥ kṣipradʰanvā samatsvaṣāḍʰaḥ sāhvānpr̥tanāsu śatrūn

text: Some, the men of old whose grass was trimmed addressed the hymn to thee for mighty strength and for renown: So, hero, urge us onward to heroic power'
meaning: उरुगव्यूतिरभयानि कृण्वन्त्समीचीने आ पवस्वा पुरन्धी अपः सिषासन्नुषसः स्वा३र्गाः सं चिक्रदो महो अस्मभ्यं वाजान्
sanskrit_iast: urugavyūtirabʰayāni kr̥ṇvantsamīcīne ā pavasvā purandʰī apaḥ siṣāsannuṣasaḥ svā3rgāḥ saṃ cikrado maho asmabʰyaṃ vājān

text: All round about hast thou with glory pierced for us as 'twere a never-failing well for men to drink, Borne on thy way as 'twere in fragments from both arms.
meaning: त्वमिन्द्र यशा अस्यृजीषी शवसस्पतिः त्वं वृत्राणि हꣳस्यप्रतीन्येक इत्पुर्वनुत्तश्चर्षणीधृतिः
sanskrit_iast: tvamindra yaśā asyr̥jīṣī śavasaspatiḥ tvaṃ vr̥trāṇi ham̐syapratīnyeka itpurvanuttaścarṣaṇīdʰr̥tiḥ

text: Thou didst produce him, deathless one! for mortal man, for maintenance of Law and lovely Amrita: Thou evermore hast moved making wealth flow to us. VIII Indra
meaning: तमु त्वा नूनमसुर प्रचेतसꣳ राधो भागमिवेमहे महीव कृत्तिः शरणा त इन्द्र प्र ते सुम्ना नो अश्नवन्
sanskrit_iast: tamu tvā nūnamasura pracetasam̐ rādʰo bʰāgamivemahe mahīva kr̥ttiḥ śaraṇā ta indra pra te sumnā no aśnavan

text: Pour out the drops f or Indra; let him drink the meath of Soma Juice! He through his majesty sends forth his bounteous gifts.
meaning: यजिष्ठं त्वा ववृमहे देवं देवत्रा होतारममर्त्यम् अस्य यज्ञस्य सुक्रतुम्
sanskrit_iast: yajiṣṭʰaṃ tvā vavr̥mahe devaṃ devatrā hotāramamartyam asya yajñasya sukratum

text: I spake to the bay coursers' Lord, to him who grants the boon. of wealth: Now hear the son of Asva as he praises thee?
meaning: अपां नपातꣳ सुभगꣳ सुदीदितिमग्निमु श्रेष्ठशोचिषम् स नो मित्रस्य वरुणस्य सो अपामा सुम्नं यक्षते दिवि
sanskrit_iast: apāṃ napātam̐ subʰagam̐ sudīditimagnimu śreṣṭʰaśociṣam sa no mitrasya varuṇasya so apāmā sumnaṃ yakṣate divi

text: Never was any hero born before thee mightier than thou: None certainly like thee in riches and in praise. IX Indra
meaning: यमग्ने पृत्सु मर्त्यमवा वाजेषु यं जुनाः स यन्ता शश्वतीरिषः
sanskrit_iast: yamagne pr̥tsu martyamavā vājeṣu yaṃ junāḥ sa yantā śaśvatīriṣaḥ

text: Thou wishest for thy kine a bull, lord of thy cows whom none may kill, For those who long for his approach, for those who turn away from him. X Agni
meaning: न किरस्य सहन्त्य पर्येता कयस्य चित् वाजो अस्ति श्रवाय्यः
sanskrit_iast: na kirasya sahantya paryetā kayasya cit vājo asti śravāyyaḥ

text: The God who giveth wealth accept the full libation poured to him! Pour ye it out, then fill the vessel full again, for so the God regardeth you!
meaning: स वाजं विश्वचर्षणिरर्वद्भिरस्तु तरुता विप्रेभिरस्तु सनिता
sanskrit_iast: sa vājaṃ viśvacarṣaṇirarvadbʰirastu tarutā viprebʰirastu sanitā

text: The Gods made him the Hotar-priest of sacrifice, oblationbearer, passing wise. Agni gives wealth and valour to the worshipper, to man who offers up his gifts. XI Agni
meaning: साकमुक्षो मर्जयन्त स्वसारो दश धीरस्य धीतयो धनुत्रीः हरिः पर्यद्रवज्जाः सूर्यस्य द्रोणं ननक्षे अत्यो न वाजी
sanskrit_iast: sākamukṣo marjayanta svasāro daśa dʰīrasya dʰītayo dʰanutrīḥ hariḥ paryadravajjāḥ sūryasya droṇaṃ nanakṣe atyo na vājī

text: He hath appeared, best prosperer, in whom men lay their holy acts: So may our songs of praise come nigh to Agni who was born to give the Arya strength.
meaning: सं मातृभिर्न शिशुर्वावशानो वृषा दधन्वे पुरुवारो अद्भिः मर्यो न योषामभि निष्कृतं यन्त्सं गच्छते कलश उस्रियाभिः
sanskrit_iast: saṃ mātr̥bʰirna śiśurvāvaśāno vr̥ṣā dadʰanve puruvāro adbʰiḥ maryo na yoṣāmabʰi niṣkr̥taṃ yantsaṃ gaccʰate kalaśa usriyābʰiḥ

text: Him before whom the people shrink when he performs his glorious deeds, Him who wins thousands at the sacrifice, himself, that Agni, reverence with songs!
meaning: उत प्र पिप्य ऊधरघ्न्याया इन्दुर्धाराभिः सचते सुमेधाः मूर्धानं गावः पयसा चमूष्वभि श्रीणन्ति वसुभिर्न निक्तैः
sanskrit_iast: uta pra pipya ūdʰaragʰnyāyā indurdʰārābʰiḥ sacate sumedʰāḥ mūrdʰānaṃ gāvaḥ payasā camūṣvabʰi śrīṇanti vasubʰirna niktaiḥ

text: Agni of Divoddsa, God, comes forth like Indra in his might. Rapidly hath he moved along his mother earth; he stands in high heaven's dwelling-place. XII Agni
meaning: पिबा सुतस्य रसिनो मत्स्वा न इन्द्र गोमतः आपिर्नो बोधि सधमाद्ये वृधे३ ऽस्माꣳ अवन्तु ते धियः
sanskrit_iast: pibā sutasya rasino matsvā na indra gomataḥ āpirno bodʰi sadʰamādye vr̥dʰe3 'smām̐ avantu te dʰiyaḥ

text: Agni, thou pourest life: send down upon us food and vigorous strength: Drive thou misfortune far away!
meaning: भूयाम ते सुमतौ वाजिनो वयं मा न स्तरभिमातये अस्मां चित्राभिरवतादभिष्टिभिरा नः सुम्नेषु यामय
sanskrit_iast: bʰūyāma te sumatau vājino vayaṃ mā na starabʰimātaye asmāṃ citrābʰiravatādabʰiṣṭibʰirā naḥ sumneṣu yāmaya

text: Agni is Pavamana, Sage, Chief Priest of all the fivefold tribes; To him whose wealth is great we pray.
meaning: त्रिरस्मै सप्त धेनवो दुदुह्रिरे सत्यामाशिरं परमे व्योमनि चत्वार्यन्या भुवनानि निर्णिजे चारूणि चक्रे यदृतैरवर्धत
sanskrit_iast: trirasmai sapta dʰenavo duduhrire satyāmāśiraṃ parame vyomani catvāryanyā bʰuvanāni nirṇije cārūṇi cakre yadr̥tairavardʰata

text: Skilled in thy task, O Agni, pour splendour with hero strength on us, Granting me wealth that nourishes! XIII Agni
meaning: स भक्षमाणो अमृतस्य चारुण उभे द्यावा काव्येना वि शश्रथे तेजिष्ठा अपो मꣳहना परि व्यत यदी देवस्य श्रवसा सदो विदुः
sanskrit_iast: sa bʰakṣamāṇo amr̥tasya cāruṇa ubʰe dyāvā kāvyenā vi śaśratʰe tejiṣṭʰā apo mam̐hanā pari vyata yadī devasya śravasā sado viduḥ

text: O Agni, holy and divine with splendour and thy pleasant tongue. Bring thou the Gods and worship them!
meaning: ते अस्य सन्तु केतवो ऽमृत्यवो ऽदाभ्यासो जनुषी उभे अनु येभिर्नृम्णा च देव्या च पुनत आदिद्राजानं मनना अगृभ्णत
sanskrit_iast: te asya santu ketavo 'mr̥tyavo 'dābʰyāso januṣī ubʰe anu yebʰirnr̥mṇā ca devyā ca punata ādidrājānaṃ mananā agr̥bʰṇata

text: We pray thee bathed in butter, O bright-rayed! who lookest on the sun, Bring the Gods hither to the feast!
meaning: अभि वायुं वीत्यर्षा गृणानो३ ऽभि मित्रावरुणा पूयमानः अभी नरं धीजवनꣳ रथेष्ठामभीन्द्रं वृषणं वज्रबाहुम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi vāyuṃ vītyarṣā gr̥ṇāno3 'bʰi mitrāvaruṇā pūyamānaḥ abʰī naraṃ dʰījavanam̐ ratʰeṣṭʰāmabʰīndraṃ vr̥ṣaṇaṃ vajrabāhum

text: Sage, we have kindled thee, the bright, the feaster on oblation, thee, O Agni, great in sacrifice! XIV Agni I. Adorable in all our prayers, favour us, Agni, with thine aid. What time the psalm is chanted forth!
meaning: अभि वस्त्रा सुवसनान्यर्षाभि धेनूः सुदुघाः पूयमानः अभि चन्द्रा भर्त्तवे नो हिरण्याभ्यश्वान्रथिनो देव सोम
sanskrit_iast: abʰi vastrā suvasanānyarṣābʰi dʰenūḥ sudugʰāḥ pūyamānaḥ abʰi candrā bʰarttave no hiraṇyābʰyaśvānratʰino deva soma

text: Bring to us ever-conquering wealth, wealth, Agni, worthy of our choice, Invincible in all our frays!
meaning: अभी नो अर्ष दिव्या वसून्यभि विश्वा पार्थिवा पूयमानः अभि येन द्रविणमश्नवामाभ्यार्षेयं जमदग्निवन्नः
sanskrit_iast: abʰī no arṣa divyā vasūnyabʰi viśvā pārtʰivā pūyamānaḥ abʰi yena draviṇamaśnavāmābʰyārṣeyaṃ jamadagnivannaḥ

text: Grant us, O Agni, through thy grace wealth to support us evermore, Thy favour so that we may live! XV Agni
meaning: यज्जायथा अपूर्व्य मघवन्वृत्रहत्याय तत्पृथिवीमप्रथयस्तदस्तभ्ना उतो दिवम्
sanskrit_iast: yajjāyatʰā apūrvya magʰavanvr̥trahatyāya tatpr̥tʰivīmapratʰayastadastabʰnā uto divam

text: Let songs of ours speed Agni forth like a fleet courser in the race, And we will win each prize through him
meaning: तत्ते यज्ञो अजायत तदर्क उत हस्कृतिः तद्विश्वमभिभूरसि यज्जातं यच्च जन्त्वम्
sanskrit_iast: tatte yajño ajāyata tadarka uta haskr̥tiḥ tadviśvamabʰibʰūrasi yajjātaṃ yacca jantvam

text: Agni! the host whereby we gain kine for ourselves with help from thee,- That send us for the gain of wealth!
meaning: आमासु पक्वमैरय आ सूर्यꣳ रोहयो दिवि घर्मं न सामं तपता सुवृक्तिभिर्जुष्टं गिर्वणसे बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: āmāsu pakvamairaya ā sūryam̐ rohayo divi gʰarmaṃ na sāmaṃ tapatā suvr̥ktibʰirjuṣṭaṃ girvaṇase br̥hat

text: O Agni, bring us wealth secure, vast wealth in horses and in kine: Oil thou the socket, turn the wheel!
meaning: मत्स्यपायि ते महः पात्रस्येव हरिवो मत्सरो मदः वृषा ते वृष्ण इन्दुर्वाजी सहस्रसातमः
sanskrit_iast: matsyapāyi te mahaḥ pātrasyeva harivo matsaro madaḥ vr̥ṣā te vr̥ṣṇa indurvājī sahasrasātamaḥ

text: O Agni, thou hast made the Sun, the eternal star, to mount the sky, Giving the boon of light to men.
meaning: आ नस्ते गन्तु मत्सरो वृषा मदो वरेण्यः सहावाꣳ इन्द्र सानसिः पृतनषाडमर्त्यः
sanskrit_iast: ā naste gantu matsaro vr̥ṣā mado vareṇyaḥ sahāvām̐ indra sānasiḥ pr̥tanaṣāḍamartyaḥ

text: Thou, Agni, art the people's light, best, dearest, seated in thy shrine Watch for the singer, give him life! XVI Agni
meaning: त्वꣳ हि शूरः सनिता चोदयो मनुषो रथम् सहावान्दस्युमव्रतमोषः पात्रं न शोचिषा
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hi śūraḥ sanitā codayo manuṣo ratʰam sahāvāndasyumavratamoṣaḥ pātraṃ na śociṣā

text: Agni is head and height of heaven, the master of the earth is he: He quickeneth the waters' seed.
meaning: पवस्व वृष्टिमा सु नो ऽपामूर्मिं दिवस्परि अयक्ष्मा बृहतीरिषः
sanskrit_iast: pavasva vr̥ṣṭimā su no 'pāmūrmiṃ divaspari ayakṣmā br̥hatīriṣaḥ

text: Yea, Agni, thou as Lord of light rulest o'er choicest gifts may I, Thy singer, find defence in thee
meaning: तया पवस्व धारया यया गाव इहागमन् जन्यास उप नो गृहम्
sanskrit_iast: tayā pavasva dʰārayā yayā gāva ihāgaman janyāsa upa no gr̥ham

text: Upward, O Agni, rise thy flames, pure and resplendent, blazing high, Thy lustres, fair effulgences. I Agni
meaning: घृतं पवस्व धारया यज्ञेषु देववीतमः अस्मभ्यं वृष्टिमा पव
sanskrit_iast: gʰr̥taṃ pavasva dʰārayā yajñeṣu devavītamaḥ asmabʰyaṃ vr̥ṣṭimā pava

text: Who, Agni, is thy kin, of men? who honours thee with sacrifice? On whom dependent? who art thou?
meaning: स न ऊर्जे व्या३व्ययं पवित्रं धाव धारया देवासः शृणवन्हि कम्
sanskrit_iast: sa na ūrje vyā3vyayaṃ pavitraṃ dʰāva dʰārayā devāsaḥ śr̥ṇavanhi kam

text: The kinsman, Agni! of mankind, their well-beiaved friend art thou, A friend whom friends may supplicate.
meaning: पवमानो असिष्यदद्रक्षाꣳस्यपजङ्घनत् प्रत्नवद्रोचयन्रुचः
sanskrit_iast: pavamāno asiṣyadadrakṣām̐syapajaṅgʰanat pratnavadrocayanrucaḥ

text: Bring Mitra, Varukia, bring the Gods hither to. our great sacrifice: Bring them, O Agni, to thine home II Agni
meaning: प्रत्यस्मै पिपीषते विश्वानि विदुषे भर अरङ्गमाय जग्मये ऽपश्चादध्वने नरः
sanskrit_iast: pratyasmai pipīṣate viśvāni viduṣe bʰara araṅgamāya jagmaye 'paścādadʰvane naraḥ

text: Meet to be worshipped and implored, showing in beauty through the gloom, Agni, the strong, is kindled well.
meaning: एमेनं प्रत्येतन सोमेभिः सोमपातमम् अमत्रेभिरृजीषिणमिन्द्रꣳ सुतेभिरिन्दुभिः
sanskrit_iast: emenaṃ pratyetana somebʰiḥ somapātamam amatrebʰirr̥jīṣiṇamindram̐ sutebʰirindubʰiḥ

text: Strong Agni is enkindled well, even as the horse that brings the Gods: Men with oblations pray to him.
meaning: यदी सुतेभिरिन्दुभिः सोमेभिः प्रतिभूषथ वेदा विश्वस्य मेधिरो धृषत्तन्तमिदेषते
sanskrit_iast: yadī sutebʰirindubʰiḥ somebʰiḥ pratibʰūṣatʰa vedā viśvasya medʰiro dʰr̥ṣattantamideṣate

text: We will enkindle thee, the strong, we, hero! who axe strong ourselves, III Agni
meaning: अस्माअस्मा इदन्धसो ऽध्वर्यो प्र भरा सुतम् कुवित्समस्य जेन्यस्य शर्धतो ऽभिशस्तेरवस्वरत्
sanskrit_iast: asmāasmā idandʰaso 'dʰvaryo pra bʰarā sutam kuvitsamasya jenyasya śardʰato 'bʰiśasteravasvarat

text: Thy mighty flames, O Agni, when thou art enkindled, rise on high, Thy bright flames, thou refulgent one
meaning: बभ्रवे नु स्वतवसे ऽरुणाय दिविस्पृशे सोमाय गाथमर्चत
sanskrit_iast: babʰrave nu svatavase 'ruṇāya divispr̥śe somāya gātʰamarcata

text: Beloved! let my ladies full of sacred oil come nigh to thee. Agni, accept our offerings!
meaning: हस्तच्युतेभिरद्रिभिः सुतꣳ सोमं पुनीतन मधावा धावता मधु
sanskrit_iast: hastacyutebʰiradribʰiḥ sutam̐ somaṃ punītana madʰāvā dʰāvatā madʰu

text: I pray to Agni--may he hear!--the Hotar with sweet tones, the Priest, Wondrously splendid, rich in light, V Agni
meaning: नमसेदुप सीदत दध्नेदभि श्रीणीतन इन्दुमिन्द्रे दधातन
sanskrit_iast: namasedupa sīdata dadʰnedabʰi śrīṇītana indumindre dadʰātana

text: O King, the potent and terrific envoy, kindled for strength, is manifest in beauty. He shines, observant, with his lofty splendour; chasing black night he comes with white-rayed morning.
meaning: अमित्रहा विचर्षणिः पवस्व सोम शं गवे देवेभ्यो अनुकामकृत्
sanskrit_iast: amitrahā vicarṣaṇiḥ pavasva soma śaṃ gave devebʰyo anukāmakr̥t

text: Having o'ercome the glimmering Black with beauty, and bringing forth the Dame, the great Sire's daughter, Holding aloft the radiant lights of Surya, as messenger of heaven he shines with treasures.
meaning: इन्द्राय सोम पातवे मदाय परि षिच्यसे मनश्चिन्मनसस्पतिः
sanskrit_iast: indrāya soma pātave madāya pari ṣicyase manaścinmanasaspatiḥ

text: Attendant on the blessed Dame the blessed hath come: the lover followeth his sister. Agni, far-spreading with conspicuous lustre, hath covered night with whitely-shining garments. VI Agni
meaning: पवमान सुवीर्यꣳ रयिꣳ सोम रिरीहि नः इन्दविन्द्रेण नो युजा
sanskrit_iast: pavamāna suvīryam̐ rayim̐ soma rirīhi naḥ indavindreṇa no yujā

text: What is the praise wherewith, O God, Angiras, Agni, Son of Strength, We, after thine own wish and thought,
meaning: उद्धेदभि श्रुतामघं वृषमं नर्यापसम् अस्तारमेषि सूर्य
sanskrit_iast: uddʰedabʰi śrutāmagʰaṃ vr̥ṣamaṃ naryāpasam astārameṣi sūrya

text: May serve thee, O thou Child of Power, and with what sacrifice's plan? What reverent word shall I speak here? VII Agni
meaning: नव यो नवतिं पुरो बिभेद बाह्वोजसा अहिं च वृत्रहावधीत्
sanskrit_iast: nava yo navatiṃ puro bibʰeda bāhvojasā ahiṃ ca vr̥trahāvadʰīt

text: Agni, come hither with thy fires; we choose thee as our Hotar; let The proffered ladle filled with offerings balm thee, best of priests, to sit on sacred grass!
meaning: स न इन्द्रः शिवः सखाश्वावद्गोमद्यवमत् उरुधारेव दोहते
sanskrit_iast: sa na indraḥ śivaḥ sakʰāśvāvadgomadyavamat urudʰāreva dohate

text: For unto thee, O Angiras, O Son of Strength, move ladles in the sacrifice. We pray to Agni, Child of Force, whose locks drop oil, foremost in sacrificial rites. VIII Agni
meaning: विभ्राड् बृहत्पिबतु सोम्यं मध्वायुर्दधद्यज्ञपतावविह्रुतम् वातजूतो यो अभिरक्षति त्मना प्रजाः पिपर्ति बहुधा वि राजति
sanskrit_iast: vibʰrāḍ br̥hatpibatu somyaṃ madʰvāyurdadʰadyajñapatāvavihrutam vātajūto yo abʰirakṣati tmanā prajāḥ piparti bahudʰā vi rājati

text: Let our songs come anear to him beauteous and bright with piercing flame, Our sacrifices with our homage unto him much-lauded, very rich, for help:
meaning: विभ्राड् बृहत्सुभृतं वाजसातमं धर्मं दिवो धरुणे सत्यमर्पितम् अमित्रहा वृत्रहा दस्युहन्तमं ज्योतिर्जज्ञे असुरहा सपत्नहा
sanskrit_iast: vibʰrāḍ br̥hatsubʰr̥taṃ vājasātamaṃ dʰarmaṃ divo dʰaruṇe satyamarpitam amitrahā vr̥trahā dasyuhantamaṃ jyotirjajñe asurahā sapatnahā

text: To Agni Jatavedas, to the Son of Strength, that he may give us precious gifts,
meaning: इदꣳ श्रेष्ठं ज्योतिषां ज्योतिरुत्तमं विश्वजिद्धनजिदुच्यते बृहत् विश्वभ्राड् भ्राजो महि सूर्यो दृश उरु पप्रथे सह ओजो अच्युतम्
sanskrit_iast: idam̐ śreṣṭʰaṃ jyotiṣāṃ jyotiruttamaṃ viśvajiddʰanajiducyate br̥hat viśvabʰrāḍ bʰrājo mahi sūryo dr̥śa uru papratʰe saha ojo acyutam

text: Immortal, from of old Priest among mortal men, whose tones are sweetest in the house! X Agni
meaning: इन्द्र क्रतुं न आ भर पिता पुत्रेभ्यो यथा शिक्षा णो अस्मिन्पुरुहूत यामनि जीव ज्योतिरशीमहि
sanskrit_iast: indra kratuṃ na ā bʰara pitā putrebʰyo yatʰā śikṣā ṇo asminpuruhūta yāmani jīva jyotiraśīmahi

text: Invincible is Agni, he who goes before the tribes of men, A chariot swift and ever new.
meaning: मा नो अज्ञाता वृजना दुराध्यो३ माशिवासो ऽव क्रमुः त्वया वयं प्रवतः शश्वतीरपो ऽति शूर तरामसि
sanskrit_iast: mā no ajñātā vr̥janā durādʰyo3 māśivāso 'va kramuḥ tvayā vayaṃ pravataḥ śaśvatīrapo 'ti śūra tarāmasi

text: By bringing offerings unto him the mortal worshipper obtains A home from him whose light is pure.
meaning: अद्याद्या श्वःश्व इन्द्र त्रास्व परे च नः विश्वा च नो जरितॄन्त्सत्पते अहा दिवा नक्तं च रक्षिषः
sanskrit_iast: adyādyā śvaḥśva indra trāsva pare ca naḥ viśvā ca no jaritr̥̄ntsatpate ahā divā naktaṃ ca rakṣiṣaḥ

text: Inviolable power of Gods, subduing all his enemies, Agni is mightiest in fame. XI Agni
meaning: प्रभङ्गी शूरो मघवा तुवीमघः सम्मिश्लो विर्याय कम् उभा ते बाहू वृषणा शतक्रतो नि या वज्रं मिमिक्षतुः
sanskrit_iast: prabʰaṅgī śūro magʰavā tuvīmagʰaḥ sammiślo viryāya kam ubʰā te bāhū vr̥ṣaṇā śatakrato ni yā vajraṃ mimikṣatuḥ

text: May Agni, worshipped, bring us bliss: may the gift, blessed one! and sacrifice bring bliss, Yea, may our eulogies bring bliss
meaning: जनीयन्तो न्वग्रवः पुत्रीयन्तः सुदानवः सरस्वन्तꣳ हवामहे
sanskrit_iast: janīyanto nvagravaḥ putrīyantaḥ sudānavaḥ sarasvantam̐ havāmahe

text: Show forth the mind that brings success in war with fiends, wherewith thou conquerest in fight! Bring down the many firm hopes of our enemies, and for thy victory let us win! XII Agni
meaning: उत नः प्रिया प्रियासु सप्तस्वसा सुजुष्टा सरस्वती स्तोम्या भूत्
sanskrit_iast: uta naḥ priyā priyāsu saptasvasā sujuṣṭā sarasvatī stomyā bʰūt

text: O Agni thou who art the Lord of wealth in kine, thou Son of Strength, Bestow on us, O Jatavedas, high renown
meaning: तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात्
sanskrit_iast: tatsaviturvareṇyaṃ bʰargo devasya dʰīmahi dʰiyo yo naḥ pracodayāt

text: He, Agni, kindled, good and wise, must be entreated with a. song; Shine, thou of many forms, shine thou with wealth on us
meaning: सोमानाꣳ स्वरणं कृणुहि ब्रह्मणस्पते कक्षीवन्तꣳ य औशिजः
sanskrit_iast: somānām̐ svaraṇaṃ kr̥ṇuhi brahmaṇaspate kakṣīvantam̐ ya auśijaḥ

text: And, Agni, shining of thyself by night and when the morning breaks, Burn, thou whose teeth are sharp, against the Rakshasas XIII Agni
meaning: अग्न आयूꣳषि पवसे आ सुवोर्जं इषं च नः आरे बाधस्व दुच्छुनाम्
sanskrit_iast: agna āyūm̐ṣi pavase ā suvorjaṃ iṣaṃ ca naḥ āre bādʰasva duccʰunām

text: Exerting all our strength with thoughts of power we glorify in speech, Agni, your dear familiar friend, the darling guest of every house:
meaning: ता नः शक्तं पार्थिवस्य महो रायो दिव्यस्य महि वा क्षत्रं देवेषु
sanskrit_iast: tā naḥ śaktaṃ pārtʰivasya maho rāyo divyasya mahi vā kṣatraṃ deveṣu

text: Whom, served with sacrificial oil, like Mitra, men presenting gifts, Glorify with their songs of praise
meaning: ऋतमृतेन सपन्तेषिरं दक्षमाशाते अद्रुहा देवौ वर्धेते
sanskrit_iast: r̥tamr̥tena sapanteṣiraṃ dakṣamāśāte adruhā devau vardʰete

text: Much-lauded Jatavedas, him who sends oblations up to heaven, Prepared in service of the Gods. XIV Agni
meaning: वृष्टिद्यावा रीत्यापेषस्पती दानुमत्याः बृहन्तं गर्त्तमाशाते
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣṭidyāvā rītyāpeṣaspatī dānumatyāḥ br̥hantaṃ garttamāśāte

text: Agni, inflamed with fuel, in my song I sing, pure bright, and stedfast set in front at sacrifice. Wise Jatavedas we implore with prayers for grace, the Sage, the Hotar-priest, bounteous, and void of guile.
meaning: युञ्जन्ति ब्रध्नमरुषं चरन्तं परि तस्थुषः रोचन्ते रोचना दिवि
sanskrit_iast: yuñjanti bradʰnamaruṣaṃ carantaṃ pari tastʰuṣaḥ rocante rocanā divi

text: Men, Agni, in each age, have made thee, deathless one, their envoy, offering-bearer, guard adorable. With reverence Gods and mortals have established thee as everwatchful and almighty household Lord.
meaning: युञ्जन्त्यस्य काम्या हरी विपक्षसा रथे शोणा धृष्णू नृवाहसा
sanskrit_iast: yuñjantyasya kāmyā harī vipakṣasā ratʰe śoṇā dʰr̥ṣṇū nr̥vāhasā

text: Though, Agni ordering the works and ways of both, as envoy of the Gods traversest both the realms. When we lay claim to thy regard and gracious care, be thou to us a th rice- protecting friendly guard? XV Agni
meaning: केतुं कृण्वन्नकेतवे पेशो मर्या अपेशसे समुषद्भिरजायथाः
sanskrit_iast: ketuṃ kr̥ṇvannaketave peśo maryā apeśase samuṣadbʰirajāyatʰāḥ

text: Still turning to their aim in thee the sacrificer's sister hymns Have come to thee before the wind.
meaning: अयꣳ सोम इन्द्र तुभ्यꣳ सुन्वे तुभ्यं पवते त्वमस्य पाहि त्वꣳ ह यं चकृषे त्वं ववृष इन्दुं मदाय युज्याय सोमम्
sanskrit_iast: ayam̐ soma indra tubʰyam̐ sunve tubʰyaṃ pavate tvamasya pāhi tvam̐ ha yaṃ cakr̥ṣe tvaṃ vavr̥ṣa induṃ madāya yujyāya somam

text: Even the waters find their place in him whose three fold sacred grass Is spread unbound, unlimited.
meaning: स ईꣳ रथो न भुरिषाडयोजि महः पुरूणि सातये वसूनि आदीं विश्वा नहुष्याणि जाता स्वर्षाता वन ऊर्ध्वा नवन्त
sanskrit_iast: sa īm̐ ratʰo na bʰuriṣāḍayoji mahaḥ purūṇi sātaye vasūni ādīṃ viśvā nahuṣyāṇi jātā svarṣātā vana ūrdʰvā navanta

text: The station of the bounteous God, by his unconquerable aid, Hath a fair aspect like the Sun. I Indra
meaning: शुष्मी शर्धो न मारुतं पवस्वानभिशस्ता दिव्या यथा विट् आपो न मक्षू सुमतिर्भवा नः सहस्राप्साः पृतनाषाण्न यज्ञः
sanskrit_iast: śuṣmī śardʰo na mārutaṃ pavasvānabʰiśastā divyā yatʰā viṭ āpo na makṣū sumatirbʰavā naḥ sahasrāpsāḥ pr̥tanāṣāṇna yajñaḥ

text: Men with their lauds are urging thee, Indra, to drink the Soma first. The Ribhus in accord have lifted up their voice, and Rudras sung thee as the first.
meaning: त्वमग्ने यज्ञानाꣳ होता विश्वेषाꣳ हितः देवेभिर्मानुषे जने
sanskrit_iast: tvamagne yajñānām̐ hotā viśveṣām̐ hitaḥ devebʰirmānuṣe jane

text: Indra, at sacrifice, increased his manly strength, in the wild rapture of this juice: And living men to-day, even as of old, sing forth their praises to his majesty. II Indra-Agni
meaning: स नो मन्द्राभिरध्वरे जिह्वाभिर्यजा महः आ देवान्वक्षि यक्षि च
sanskrit_iast: sa no mandrābʰiradʰvare jihvābʰiryajā mahaḥ ā devānvakṣi yakṣi ca

text: Indra and Agni! singers skilled in melody, with lauds, hymn you: I choose you both to bring me food.
meaning: वेत्था हि वेधो अध्वनः पथश्च देवाञ्जसा अग्ने यज्ञेषु सुक्रतो
sanskrit_iast: vettʰā hi vedʰo adʰvanaḥ patʰaśca devāñjasā agne yajñeṣu sukrato

text: Indra and Agni! ye shook down, together, with one mightyr deed, The ninety forts which Dasas held.
meaning: होता देवो अमर्त्यः पुरस्तादेति मायया विदथानि प्रचोदयन्
sanskrit_iast: hotā devo amartyaḥ purastādeti māyayā vidatʰāni pracodayan

text: To Indra and to Agni prayers go forward from the holy task, Along the path of sacred Law.
meaning: वाजी वाजेषु धीयते ऽध्वरेषु प्र णीयते विप्रो यज्ञस्य साधनः
sanskrit_iast: vājī vājeṣu dʰīyate 'dʰvareṣu pra ṇīyate vipro yajñasya sādʰanaḥ

text: Indra and Agni, powers are yours, yours are oblations ano abodes: Good is your zealous energy. III Indra
meaning: धिया चक्रे वरेण्यो भूतानां गर्भमा दधे दक्षस्य पितरं तना
sanskrit_iast: dʰiyā cakre vareṇyo bʰūtānāṃ garbʰamā dadʰe dakṣasya pitaraṃ tanā

text: Indra, with all thy saving helps assist us, Lord of power and might! For after thee we follow even as glorious bliss, thee, hero, finder-out of wealth!
meaning: आ सुते सिञ्चत श्रियꣳ रोदस्योरभिश्रियम् रसा दधीत वृषभम्
sanskrit_iast: ā sute siñcata śriyam̐ rodasyorabʰiśriyam rasā dadʰīta vr̥ṣabʰam

text: Increaser of our steeds and multiplying kine, a golden well, G God, art thou, For no one may impair the gift laid up in thee. Bring me whatever thing I ask! IV Indra
meaning: ते जानत स्वमोक्या३ꣳ सं वत्सासो न मातृभिः मिथो नसन्त जामिभिः
sanskrit_iast: te jānata svamokyā3m̐ saṃ vatsāso na mātr̥bʰiḥ mitʰo nasanta jāmibʰiḥ

text: For thou--come to the worshipper!--wilt find great wealth to make us rich. Fill thyself full, O Maghavan, for gain of kine, full, Indra, forthe gain of steeds!
meaning: उप स्रक्वेषु बप्सतः कृण्वते धरुणं दिवि इन्द्रे अग्ना नमः स्वः
sanskrit_iast: upa srakveṣu bapsataḥ kr̥ṇvate dʰaruṇaṃ divi indre agnā namaḥ svaḥ

text: Thou as thy gift bestowest many hundred herds, yea, many thou-sands dost thou give. With singers' hymns have we brought the fortrender near, singing to Indra for his grace. V Agni
meaning: तदिदास भुवनेषु ज्येष्टं यतो जज्ञा उग्रस्त्वेषनृम्णः सद्यो जज्ञानो नि रिणाति शत्रूननु यं विश्वे मदन्त्यूमाः
sanskrit_iast: tadidāsa bʰuvaneṣu jyeṣṭaṃ yato jajñā ugrastveṣanr̥mṇaḥ sadyo jajñāno ni riṇāti śatrūnanu yaṃ viśve madantyūmāḥ

text: To him who dealeth out all wealth, the sweet-toned Hotar-priest of men, To him, like the first vessels filled with savoury juice, to Agni let the lauds go forth!
meaning: वावृधानः शवसा भूर्योजाः शत्रुर्दासाय भियसं दधाति अव्यनच्च व्यनच्च सस्नि सं ते नवन्त प्रभृता मदेषु
sanskrit_iast: vāvr̥dʰānaḥ śavasā bʰūryojāḥ śatrurdāsāya bʰiyasaṃ dadʰāti avyanacca vyanacca sasni saṃ te navanta prabʰr̥tā madeṣu

text: Votaries, bounteous givers, deck him with their songs, even as the steed who draws the car. To both, strong Lord of men! to kith and kin convey the bounties of our wealthy lords! VI Varuna
meaning: त्वे क्रतुमपि वृञ्जन्ति विश्वे द्विर्यदेते त्रिर्भवन्त्यूमाः स्वादोः स्वादीयः स्वादुना सृजा समदः सु मधु मधुनाभि योधीः
sanskrit_iast: tve kratumapi vr̥ñjanti viśve dviryadete trirbʰavantyūmāḥ svādoḥ svādīyaḥ svādunā sr̥jā samadaḥ su madʰu madʰunābʰi yodʰīḥ

text: Hear this my call, O Varuna, and show thy gracious love today: Desiring help I long for thee! VII Indra
meaning: त्रिकद्रुकेषु महिषो यवाशिरं तुविशुष्मस्तृम्पत्सोममपिबद्विष्णुना सुतं यथावशम् स ईं ममाद महि कर्म कर्तवे महामुरुꣳ सैनꣳ सश्चद्देवो देवꣳ सत्य इन्दुः सत्यमिन्द्रम्
sanskrit_iast: trikadrukeṣu mahiṣo yavāśiraṃ tuviśuṣmastr̥mpatsomamapibadviṣṇunā sutaṃ yatʰāvaśam sa īṃ mamāda mahi karma kartave mahāmurum̐ sainam̐ saścaddevo devam̐ satya induḥ satyamindram

text: O Hero, with what aid dost thou delight us, with what succour bring, Riches to those who worship thee? VIII Indra
meaning: साकं जातः क्रतुना साकमोजसा ववक्षिथ साकं वृद्धो वीर्यैः सासहिर्मृधो विचर्षणिः दाता राध स्तुवते काम्यं वसु प्रचेतन सैनꣳ सश्चद्देवो देवꣳ सत्य इन्दुः सत्यमिन्द्रम्
sanskrit_iast: sākaṃ jātaḥ kratunā sākamojasā vavakṣitʰa sākaṃ vr̥ddʰo vīryaiḥ sāsahirmr̥dʰo vicarṣaṇiḥ dātā rādʰa stuvate kāmyaṃ vasu pracetana sainam̐ saścaddevo devam̐ satya induḥ satyamindram

text: Indra, for service of the Gods, Indra while sacrifice proceeds, Indra, as worshippers, in battle-shock we call, Indra that we may win the spoil.
meaning: अध त्विषीमाꣳ अभ्योजसा कृविं युधाभवदा रोदसी अपृणदस्य मज्मना प्र वावृधे अधत्तान्यं जठरे प्रेमरिच्यत प्र चेतय सैनꣳ सश्चद्देवो देवꣳ सत्य इन्दुः सत्यमिन्द्रम्
sanskrit_iast: adʰa tviṣīmām̐ abʰyojasā kr̥viṃ yudʰābʰavadā rodasī apr̥ṇadasya majmanā pra vāvr̥dʰe adʰattānyaṃ jaṭʰare premaricyata pra cetaya sainam̐ saścaddevo devam̐ satya induḥ satyamindram

text: With might hath Indra spread out heaven and earth, with power hath indra lighten up the Sun. In Indra are all creatures closely held; in him meet the distilling Soma-drops. IX Visvakarman
meaning: अभि प्र गोपतिं गिरेन्द्रमर्च यथा विदे मूनुꣳ सत्यस्य सत्पतिम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi pra gopatiṃ girendramarca yatʰā vide mūnum̐ satyasya satpatim

text: Bring, Visvakarman strengthened by oblation, thyself, thy body-'tis thine own-for worship Let other men around us live in folly here let us have', a rich and liberal patron! X Soma Pavamana
meaning: आ हरयः ससृज्रिरे ऽरुषीरधि बर्हिषि यत्राभि संनवामहे
sanskrit_iast: ā harayaḥ sasr̥jrire 'ruṣīradʰi barhiṣi yatrābʰi saṃnavāmahe

text: With this his golden splendour purifying him, he with his own allies subdues all enemies. as Sura with his own allies. Cleansing himself with stream of juice he shines forth yellow-hued and red, when with his praisers he encompasses all forms, with praisers having seven mouths.
meaning: इन्द्राय गाव आशिरं दुदुह्रे वज्रिणे मधु यत्सीमुपह्वरे विदत्
sanskrit_iast: indrāya gāva āśiraṃ duduhre vajriṇe madʰu yatsīmupahvare vidat

text: He moves intelligent directed to the east. The every beauteous car rivals the beams of light, the beautiful celestial car. Hymns, lauding manly valour, came inciting Indra to success, that ye may be unconquered, both thy bolt and thou, both be unconquered in the war.
meaning: आ नो विश्वासु हव्यमिन्द्रꣳ समत्सु भूषत उप ब्रह्माणि सवनानि वृत्रहन्परमज्या ऋचीषम
sanskrit_iast: ā no viśvāsu havyamindram̐ samatsu bʰūṣata upa brahmāṇi savanāni vr̥trahanparamajyā r̥cīṣama

text: That treasure of the Panis thou discoveredst. Thou with the Mothers deckest thee in thine abode, with, songs of worship in thine home. As 'twere from far away is heard the psalm where hymns resound in joy. He, with the triple Dames red-hued, hath won life-power, he, gleaming, hath won vital strength. XI Pusan
meaning: त्वं दाता प्रथमो राधसामस्यसि सत्य ईशानकृत् तुविद्युम्नस्य युज्या वृणीमहे पुत्रस्य शवसो महः
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ dātā pratʰamo rādʰasāmasyasi satya īśānakr̥t tuvidyumnasya yujyā vr̥ṇīmahe putrasya śavaso mahaḥ

text: Yea, cause our hymn to gain for us cattle and steeds and store of wealth, That it may help us manfully! XII Maruts
meaning: प्रत्नं पीयूषं पूर्व्यं यदुक्थ्यं महो गाहद्दिव आ निरधुक्षत इन्द्रमभि जायमानꣳ समस्वरन्
sanskrit_iast: pratnaṃ pīyūṣaṃ pūrvyaṃ yaduktʰyaṃ maho gāhaddiva ā niradʰukṣata indramabʰi jāyamānam̐ samasvaran

text: Heroes of real strength, ye mark either the sweat of him who toils, Or his desire who supplicates. XIII Visvedevas
meaning: आदीं के चित्पश्यमानास आप्यं वसुरुचो दिव्या अभ्यनूषत दिवो न वारꣳ सविता व्यूर्णुते
sanskrit_iast: ādīṃ ke citpaśyamānāsa āpyaṃ vasuruco divyā abʰyanūṣata divo na vāram̐ savitā vyūrṇute

text: The Sons of immortality shall listen to our songs of praise, And be exceeding kind to us. XIV Heaven and Earth
meaning: अध यदिमे पवमान रोदसी इमा च विश्वा भुवनाभि मज्मना यूथे न निष्ठा वृषभो वि राजसि
sanskrit_iast: adʰa yadime pavamāna rodasī imā ca viśvā bʰuvanābʰi majmanā yūtʰe na niṣṭʰā vr̥ṣabʰo vi rājasi

text: To both of you, O Heaven and Earth, we bring our lofty song of praise, Pure pair! to glorify you both.
meaning: इममू षु त्वमस्माकꣳ सनिं गायत्रं नव्याꣳसम् अग्ने देवेषु प्र वोचः
sanskrit_iast: imamū ṣu tvamasmākam̐ saniṃ gāyatraṃ navyām̐sam agne deveṣu pra vocaḥ

text: Ye sanctify each other's form by your own proper strength ye rule: Further the sacrifice evermore!
meaning: विभक्तासि चित्रभानो सिन्धोरूर्मा उपाक आ सद्यो दाशुषे क्षरसि
sanskrit_iast: vibʰaktāsi citrabʰāno sindʰorūrmā upāka ā sadyo dāśuṣe kṣarasi

text: Promoting and fulfilling, ye, mighty ones, perfect Mitra's law: Ye sit around our sacrifice. XV Indra
meaning: आ नो भज परमेष्वा वाजेषु मध्यमेषु शिक्षा वस्वो अन्तमस्य
sanskrit_iast: ā no bʰaja parameṣvā vājeṣu madʰyameṣu śikṣā vasvo antamasya

text: This is thine own. Thou drawest near, as turns a pigeon to his mate: Thou carest, too, for this our prayer.
meaning: अहमिद्धि पितुष्परि मेधामृतस्य जग्रह अहꣳ सूर्य इवाजनि
sanskrit_iast: ahamiddʰi pituṣpari medʰāmr̥tasya jagraha aham̐ sūrya ivājani

text: O hero, Lord of bounties, praised in hymns, may glorious fame and might Be his who sings the laud to thee
meaning: अहं प्रत्नेन जन्मना गिरः शुम्भामि कण्ववत् येनेन्द्रः शुष्ममिद्दधे
sanskrit_iast: ahaṃ pratnena janmanā giraḥ śumbʰāmi kaṇvavat yenendraḥ śuṣmamiddadʰe

text: Lord of a Hundred Powers, rise up to be our succour in this fight: In other fights let us agree XVI Oblations
meaning: ये त्वामिन्द्र न तुष्टुवुरृषयो ये च तुष्टुवुः ममेद्वर्धस्व सुष्टुतः
