sanskrit_iast: ye tvāmindra na tuṣṭuvurr̥ṣayo ye ca tuṣṭuvuḥ mamedvardʰasva suṣṭutaḥ

text: Ye cows, protect the fount: the two mighty ones bless the sacrifice. The handles twain are wrought of gold.
meaning: अग्ने विश्वेभिरग्निभिर्जोषि ब्रह्म सहस्कृत ये देवत्रा य आयुषु तेभिर्नो महया गिरः
sanskrit_iast: agne viśvebʰiragnibʰirjoṣi brahma sahaskr̥ta ye devatrā ya āyuṣu tebʰirno mahayā giraḥ

text: The pressing-stones are set at work: the meath is poured into the tank At the out-shedding of the fount.
meaning: प्र स विश्वेभिरग्निभिरग्निः स यस्य वाजिनः तनये तोके अस्मदा सम्यङ्वाजैः परीवृतः
sanskrit_iast: pra sa viśvebʰiragnibʰiragniḥ sa yasya vājinaḥ tanaye toke asmadā samyaṅvājaiḥ parīvr̥taḥ

text: With reverence they drain the fount that circles with its wheel above. Exhaustless, with the mouth below. XVII Indra
meaning: त्वं नो अग्ने अग्निभिर्ब्रह्म यज्ञं च वर्धय त्वं नो देवतातये रायो दानाय चोदय
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ no agne agnibʰirbrahma yajñaṃ ca vardʰaya tvaṃ no devatātaye rāyo dānāya codaya

text: Let us not tire or be afraid with thee, the mighty, for our friend! May we see Turvasa and Yadu! thy great deed, O hero, must be glorified.
meaning: त्वे सोम प्रथमा वृक्तबर्हिषो महे वाजाय श्रवसे धियन् दधुः स त्वं नो वीर वीर्याय चोदय
sanskrit_iast: tve soma pratʰamā vr̥ktabarhiṣo mahe vājāya śravase dʰiyan dadʰuḥ sa tvaṃ no vīra vīryāya codaya

text: On his left hip the hero hath reclined himself: the proffered feast offends him not. The milk is blended with the honey of the bee: quickly come hither, haste, and drink! XVIII Indra
meaning: अभ्यभि हि श्रवसा ततर्दिथोत्सं न कं चिज्जनपानमक्षितम् शर्याभिर्न भरमाणो गभस्त्योः
sanskrit_iast: abʰyabʰi hi śravasā tatarditʰotsaṃ na kaṃ cijjanapānamakṣitam śaryābʰirna bʰaramāṇo gabʰastyoḥ

text: May these my songs of praise exalt thee, Lord, who hast abundant wealth! Men skilled in holy hymns, pure, with the hues of fire, have sung them with their lauds to thee.
meaning: अजीजनो अमृत मर्त्याय अमृतस्य धर्मन्नमृतस्य चारुणः सदासरो वाजमच्छा सनिष्यदत्
sanskrit_iast: ajījano amr̥ta martyāya amr̥tasya dʰarmannamr̥tasya cāruṇaḥ sadāsaro vājamaccʰā saniṣyadat

text: He, when a thousand Rishis have enhanced his might, hath like an ocean spread himself. His majesty is praised as true at solemn rites, his power where holy singers rule. XIX Indra
meaning: एन्दुमिन्द्राय सिञ्चत पिबाति सोम्यं मधु प्र राधाꣳसि चोदयते महित्वना
sanskrit_iast: endumindrāya siñcata pibāti somyaṃ madʰu pra rādʰām̐si codayate mahitvanā

text: Good Lord of wealth is he to whom all Aryas, Dasas here belong. Directly unto thee, the pious Rusama Paviru, is that wealth brought nigh.
meaning: उपो हरीणां पतिꣳ राधः पृञ्चन्तमब्रवम् नूनꣳ श्रुधि स्तुवतो अश्व्यस्य
sanskrit_iast: upo harīṇāṃ patim̐ rādʰaḥ pr̥ñcantamabravam nūnam̐ śrudʰi stuvato aśvyasya

text: In zealous haste the singers have sung forth a song distilling fatness, rich in sweets. Riches have spread among us and heroic strength, with us are flowing Soma-drops. XX Soma Pavamana
meaning: न ह्याङ्३ग पुरा च न जज्ञे वीरतरस्त्वत् न की राया नैवथा न भन्दना
sanskrit_iast: na hyāṅ3ga purā ca na jajñe vīratarastvat na kī rāyā naivatʰā na bʰandanā

text: Flow to us, Indu, very strong, effused, with wealth of kine and steeds, And do thou lay above the milk thy radiant hue
meaning: नदं व ओदतीनां नदं योयुवतीनाम् पतिं वो अघ्न्यानां धेनूनामिषुध्यसि
sanskrit_iast: nadaṃ va odatīnāṃ nadaṃ yoyuvatīnām patiṃ vo agʰnyānāṃ dʰenūnāmiṣudʰyasi

text: Lord of the tawny, Indu, thou who art the Gods' most special food, As friend to friend, for splendour be thou good to men!
meaning: देवो वो द्रविणोदाः पूर्णां विवष्ट्वासिचम् उद्वा सिञ्चध्वमुप वा पृणध्वमादिद्वो देव ओहते
sanskrit_iast: devo vo draviṇodāḥ pūrṇāṃ vivaṣṭvāsicam udvā siñcadʰvamupa vā pr̥ṇadʰvamādidvo deva ohate

text: Drive utterly, far away from us each godless, each voracious; foe; O Indu, overcome and drive the false afar! XXI Soma Pavamana.
meaning: तꣳ होतारमध्वरस्य प्रचेतसं वह्निं देवा अकृण्वत दधाति रत्नं विधते सुवीर्यमग्निर्जनाय दाशुषे
sanskrit_iast: tam̐ hotāramadʰvarasya pracetasaṃ vahniṃ devā akr̥ṇvata dadʰāti ratnaṃ vidʰate suvīryamagnirjanāya dāśuṣe

text: They balm him, balm him over, balm him thoroughly, caress. the mighty strength and balm it with the meath. They seize the flying Steer at the stream's breathing place cleansing with gold they grasp the animal herein.
meaning: अदर्शि गातुवित्तमो यस्मिन्व्रतान्यादधुः उपोषु जातमार्यस्य वर्धनमग्निं नक्षन्तु नो गिरः
sanskrit_iast: adarśi gātuvittamo yasminvratānyādadʰuḥ upoṣu jātamāryasya vardʰanamagniṃ nakṣantu no giraḥ

text: Sing forth to Pavamana skilled in holy song! the juice is flowing onward like a mighty stream. He glideth like a serpent from his ancient skin, and like a. playful horse the tawny Steer hath run.
meaning: यस्माद्रेजन्त कृष्टयश्चर्कृत्यानि कृण्वतः सहस्रसां मेधसाताविव त्मनाग्निं धीभिर्नमस्यत
sanskrit_iast: yasmādrejanta kr̥ṣṭayaścarkr̥tyāni kr̥ṇvataḥ sahasrasāṃ medʰasātāviva tmanāgniṃ dʰībʰirnamasyata

text: Dweller in floods, King, foremost, he displays his might, set among living things as measure of days. Distilling oil he flows, fair, billowy, golden-hued, borne on car of light, sharing on home with wealth. I Agni
meaning: प्र दैवोदासो अग्निर्देव इन्द्रो न मज्मना अनु मातरं पृथिवीं वि वावृते तस्थौ नाकस्य शर्मणि
sanskrit_iast: pra daivodāso agnirdeva indro na majmanā anu mātaraṃ pr̥tʰivīṃ vi vāvr̥te tastʰau nākasya śarmaṇi

text: With all thy fires, O Agni, find pleasure in this our sacrifice, And this our speech, O son of Strength!
meaning: अग्न आयूꣳषि पवसे आसुवोर्जमिषं च नः आरे बाधस्व दुच्छुनाम्
sanskrit_iast: agna āyūm̐ṣi pavase āsuvorjamiṣaṃ ca naḥ āre bādʰasva duccʰunām

text: Whate'er, in this perpetual course, we sacrifice to God and God, That gift is offered but in thee.
meaning: अग्निरृषिः पवमानः पाञ्चजन्यः पुरोहितः तमीमहे महागयम्
sanskrit_iast: agnirr̥ṣiḥ pavamānaḥ pāñcajanyaḥ purohitaḥ tamīmahe mahāgayam

text: May he be our beloved King and excellent sweet-toned Hotar may We with bright fires be dear to him II Indra
meaning: अग्ने पवस्व स्वपा अस्मे वर्चः सुवीर्यम् दधद्रयिं मयि योषम्
sanskrit_iast: agne pavasva svapā asme varcaḥ suvīryam dadʰadrayiṃ mayi yoṣam

text: For you from every side we call Indra away from other men Ours, and none others, may he be!
meaning: अग्ने पावक रोचिषा मन्द्रया देव जिह्वया आ देवान्वक्षि यक्षि च
sanskrit_iast: agne pāvaka rociṣā mandrayā deva jihvayā ā devānvakṣi yakṣi ca

text: Unclose, our manly hero! thou for ever bounteous, yonder cloud For us, thou irresistible
meaning: तं त्वा घृतस्नवीमहे चित्रभानो स्वर्दृशम् देवाꣳ आ वीतये वह
sanskrit_iast: taṃ tvā gʰr̥tasnavīmahe citrabʰāno svardr̥śam devām̐ ā vītaye vaha

text: As the strong bull leads on the herds, he stirs the people with his might, The ruler irresistible. III Agni
meaning: वीतिहोत्रं त्वा कवे द्युमन्तꣳ समिधीमहि अग्ने बृहन्तमध्वरे
sanskrit_iast: vītihotraṃ tvā kave dyumantam̐ samidʰīmahi agne br̥hantamadʰvare

text: Wonderful, with thy saving help, send us thy bounties, gracious Lord! Thou art the charioteer, Agni, of earthly wealth: find rest and safety for our seed!
meaning: अवा नो अग्न ऊतिभिर्गायत्रस्य प्रभर्मणि विश्वासु धीषु वन्द्य
sanskrit_iast: avā no agna ūtibʰirgāyatrasya prabʰarmaṇi viśvāsu dʰīṣu vandya

text: Prosper our kith and kin with thy protecting powers inviolate, never negligent! Keep far from us, O Agni, all celestial wrath. and wickedness of godless men! IV Vishnu
meaning: आ नो अग्ने रयिं भर सत्रासाहं वरेण्यम् विश्वासु पृत्सु दुष्टरम्
sanskrit_iast: ā no agne rayiṃ bʰara satrāsāhaṃ vareṇyam viśvāsu pr̥tsu duṣṭaram

text: What, Vishnu, is the name that thou proclaimest when thou declaredst, I am Sipivishta? Hide not this form from us, nor keep it secret, since thou didst wear another shape in battle.
meaning: आ नो अग्ने सुचेतुना रयिं विश्वायुपोषसम् मार्डीकं धेहि जीवसे
sanskrit_iast: ā no agne sucetunā rayiṃ viśvāyupoṣasam mārḍīkaṃ dʰehi jīvase

text: This offering to-day, O Sipivishta, I, skilled in rules, extol, to thee the noble. Yea, I, the poor and weak, praise thee, the mighty, who dwellest in the realm beyond this region.
meaning: अग्निꣳ हिन्वन्तु नो धियः सप्तिमाशुमिवाजिषु तेन जेष्म धनंधनम्
sanskrit_iast: agnim̐ hinvantu no dʰiyaḥ saptimāśumivājiṣu tena jeṣma dʰanaṃdʰanam

text: O Vishnu, unto thee my lips cry Vashat! Let this mine offering, Sipivishta, please thee! May these my songs of eulogy exalt thee! Do ye preserve us evermore with blessings! V Vayu, Indra and Vayu I. Vayu, the bright is offered thee, best of the meath, at morning rites. Come thou to drink the Soma juice, God, longed for on thy team-drawn car!
meaning: यया गा आकरामहै सेनयाग्ने तवोत्या तां नो हिन्व मघत्तये
sanskrit_iast: yayā gā ākarāmahai senayāgne tavotyā tāṃ no hinva magʰattaye

text: O Vayu, thou and Indra are meet drinkers of these Soma draughts, For unto you the drops proceed like waters gathering to the vale.
meaning: आग्ने स्थूरꣳ रयिं भर पृथुं गोमन्तमश्विनम् अङ्धि खं वर्त्तया पविम्
sanskrit_iast: āgne stʰūram̐ rayiṃ bʰara pr̥tʰuṃ gomantamaśvinam aṅdʰi kʰaṃ varttayā pavim

text: Vayu and Indra, mighty twain, borne on one chariot, Lords of strength, Come to ouf succour with your steeds, that ye may drink the Soma juice! VI Soma Pavamana
meaning: अग्ने नक्षत्रमजरमा सूर्यꣳ रोहयो दिवि दधज्ज्योतिर्जनेभ्यः
sanskrit_iast: agne nakṣatramajaramā sūryam̐ rohayo divi dadʰajjyotirjanebʰyaḥ

text: Then thou, made beautiful by night, enterest into mighty deeds, When prayers impel the golden-hued to hasten from Vivasvan's place.
meaning: अग्ने केतुर्विशामसि प्रेष्ठः श्रेष्ठ उपस्थसत् बोधा स्तोत्रे वयो दधत्
sanskrit_iast: agne keturviśāmasi preṣṭʰaḥ śreṣṭʰa upastʰasat bodʰā stotre vayo dadʰat

text: We cleanse this gladdening drink of his, the juice which Indra chiefly drinks, That which kine took into their mouths, oF old, and princes take it now.
meaning: अग्निर्मूर्धा दिवः ककुत्पतिः पृथिव्या अयम् अपाꣳ रेताꣳसि जिन्वति
sanskrit_iast: agnirmūrdʰā divaḥ kakutpatiḥ pr̥tʰivyā ayam apām̐ retām̐si jinvati

text: Thy with the ancient psalm have sung to him as he is purified, And sacred songs which bear the Dames of Gods have supplicated him. VI Agni
meaning: ईशिषे वार्यस्य हि दात्रस्याग्ने स्वःपतिः स्तोता स्यां तव शर्मणि
sanskrit_iast: īśiṣe vāryasya hi dātrasyāgne svaḥpatiḥ stotā syāṃ tava śarmaṇi

text: With homage will I reverence thee, Agni, like a long-tailed steed, Imperial Lord of holy rites.
meaning: उदग्ने शुचयस्तव शुक्रा भ्राजन्त ईरते तव ज्योतीꣳष्यर्चयः
sanskrit_iast: udagne śucayastava śukrā bʰrājanta īrate tava jyotīm̐ṣyarcayaḥ

text: May the far-striding Son of Strength, our friend who brings felicity, Who pours his gifts like rain, be ours
meaning: कस्ते जामिर्जनानामग्ने को दाश्वध्वरः को ह कस्मिन्नसि श्रितः
sanskrit_iast: kaste jāmirjanānāmagne ko dāśvadʰvaraḥ ko ha kasminnasi śritaḥ

text: From near and far away do thou, the everlasting, evermore Protect us from the sinful man! VIII Indra
meaning: त्वं जामिर्जनानामग्ने मित्रो असि प्रियः सखा सखिभ्य ईड्यः
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ jāmirjanānāmagne mitro asi priyaḥ sakʰā sakʰibʰya īḍyaḥ

text: Thou in thy battles, Indra, art subduer of all hostile bands. Father art thou, all-conquering, cancelling the curse, thou victor of the vanquisher!
meaning: यजा नो मित्रावरुणा यजा देवाꣳ ऋतं बृहत् अग्ने यक्षि स्वं दमम्
sanskrit_iast: yajā no mitrāvaruṇā yajā devām̐ r̥taṃ br̥hat agne yakṣi svaṃ damam

text: The earth and heaven cling close to thy victorious might, as sire and mother to their child. When thou attackest Vritra, all the hostile bands shrink and faint, Indra, at thy wrath. IX Indra
meaning: ईडेन्यो नमस्यस्तिरस्तमाꣳसि दर्शतः समग्निरिध्यते वृषा
sanskrit_iast: īḍenyo namasyastirastamām̐si darśataḥ samagniridʰyate vr̥ṣā

text: The sacrifice made Indra great when he unrolled the earth, and made Himself a diadem in heaven.
meaning: वृषो अग्निः समिध्यते ऽश्वो न देववाहनः तꣳ हविष्मन्त ईडते
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣo agniḥ samidʰyate 'śvo na devavāhanaḥ tam̐ haviṣmanta īḍate

text: In Soma's ecstasy Indra spread the firmament and realms of light, When he cleft Vala limb from limb.
meaning: वृषणं त्वा वयं वृषन्वृषणः समिधीमहि अग्ने दीद्यतं बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: vr̥ṣaṇaṃ tvā vayaṃ vr̥ṣanvr̥ṣaṇaḥ samidʰīmahi agne dīdyataṃ br̥hat

text: Showing the hidden, he drave forth the cows for the Angirasas, And Vala he cast headlong down. X Indra
meaning: उत्ते बृहन्तो अर्चयः समिधानस्य दीदिवः अग्ने शुक्रास ईरते
sanskrit_iast: utte br̥hanto arcayaḥ samidʰānasya dīdivaḥ agne śukrāsa īrate

text: Thou speedest down to succour us this-ever-conquering God of yours, Him who is drawn to all our songs; 2, The warrior whom none may wound, the Soma-drinker ne'er o'erthrown, The chieftain of resistless might.
meaning: उप त्वा जुह्वो३ मम घृताचीर्यन्तु हर्यत अग्ने हव्या जुषस्व नः
sanskrit_iast: upa tvā juhvo3 mama gʰr̥tācīryantu haryata agne havyā juṣasva naḥ

text: O Indra, send us riches, thou omniscient, worthy of our hymns: Help us in the decisive fray! XI Indra
meaning: मन्द्रꣳ होतारमृत्विजं चित्रभानुं विभावसुम् अग्निमीडे स उ श्रवत्
sanskrit_iast: mandram̐ hotāramr̥tvijaṃ citrabʰānuṃ vibʰāvasum agnimīḍe sa u śravat

text: That lofty power and might of thine, thy strength and thine intelligence, And thy surpassing thunderbolt, the wish makes keen.
meaning: पाहि नो अग्न एकया पाह्यू३त द्वितीयया पाहि गीर्भिस्तिसृभिरूर्जां पते पाहि चतसृभिर्वसो
sanskrit_iast: pāhi no agna ekayā pāhyū3ta dvitīyayā pāhi gīrbʰistisr̥bʰirūrjāṃ pate pāhi catasr̥bʰirvaso

text: O Indra, heaven and earth augment thy manly force and thy renown: The waters and the mountains stir and urge thee on:
meaning: पाहि विश्वस्माद्रक्षसो अराव्णः प्र स्म वाजेषु नो ऽव त्वामिद्धि नेदिष्ठं देवतातय आपिं नक्षामहे वृधे
sanskrit_iast: pāhi viśvasmādrakṣaso arāvṇaḥ pra sma vājeṣu no 'va tvāmiddʰi nediṣṭʰaṃ devatātaya āpiṃ nakṣāmahe vr̥dʰe

text: Vishnu in the lofty ruling power, Varuna, Mitra sing thy praise: In thee the Maruts' company have great delight. XII Agni
meaning: इनो राजन्नरतिः समिद्धो रौद्रो दक्षाय सुषुमाꣳ अदर्शि चिकिद्वि भाति भासा बृहतासिक्नीमेति रुशतीमपाजन्
sanskrit_iast: ino rājannaratiḥ samiddʰo raudro dakṣāya suṣumām̐ adarśi cikidvi bʰāti bʰāsā br̥hatāsiknīmeti ruśatīmapājan

text: O Agni, God, the people sing reverent praise to thee for strength: With terrors trouble thou the foe
meaning: कृष्णां यदेनीमभि वर्पसाभूज्जनयन्योषां बृहतः पितुर्जाम् ऊर्ध्वं भानुꣳ सूर्यस्य स्तभायन्दिवो वसुभिररतिर्वि भाति

text: Wilt thou not, Agni, lend us aid to win the cattle, win the wealth? Maker of room, make room for us
meaning: भद्रो भद्रया सचमान आगात्स्वसारं जारो अभ्येति पश्चात् सुप्रकेतैर्द्युभिरग्निर्वितिष्ठन्रुशद्भिर्वर्णैरभि राममस्थात्
sanskrit_iast: bʰadro bʰadrayā sacamāna āgātsvasāraṃ jāro abʰyeti paścāt supraketairdyubʰiragnirvitiṣṭʰanruśadbʰirvarṇairabʰi rāmamastʰāt

text: In the great fight cast us not off, Agni, as one who bears a load: Snatch up the wealth and win it all! XIII Indra
meaning: कया ते अग्ने अङ्गिर ऊर्जो नपादुपस्तुतिम् वराय देव मन्यवे
sanskrit_iast: kayā te agne aṅgira ūrjo napādupastutim varāya deva manyave

text: Before his hot displeasure all the peoples, all the men bow down, As rivers bow them to the sea.
meaning: दाशेम कस्य मनसा यज्ञस्य सहसो यहो कदु वोच इदं नमः
sanskrit_iast: dāśema kasya manasā yajñasya sahaso yaho kadu voca idaṃ namaḥ

text: Even fiercely-moving Vritra's head he served with his thunderbolt, His mighty hundred-knotted bolt.
meaning: अधा त्वꣳ हि नस्करो विश्वा अस्मभ्यꣳ सुक्षितीः वाजद्रविणसो गिरः
sanskrit_iast: adʰā tvam̐ hi naskaro viśvā asmabʰyam̐ sukṣitīḥ vājadraviṇaso giraḥ

text: That might of his shone brightly forth when Indra brought together, like A skin, the worlds of heaven and earth. XIV Indra
meaning: अग्न आ याह्यग्निभिर्होतारं त्वा वृणीमहे आ त्वामनक्तु प्रयता हविष्मती यजिष्ठं बर्हिरासदे
sanskrit_iast: agna ā yāhyagnibʰirhotāraṃ tvā vr̥ṇīmahe ā tvāmanaktu prayatā haviṣmatī yajiṣṭʰaṃ barhirāsade

text: Kind-thoughted is the noble, gladdening, friendly one.
meaning: अच्छा हि त्वा सहसः सूनो अङ्गिरः स्रुचश्चरन्त्यध्वरे ऊर्जो नपातं घृतकेशमीमहे ऽग्निं यज्ञेषु पूर्व्यम्
sanskrit_iast: accʰā hi tvā sahasaḥ sūno aṅgiraḥ srucaścarantyadʰvare ūrjo napātaṃ gʰr̥takeśamīmahe 'gniṃ yajñeṣu pūrvyam

text: Approach, O beauteous hero, this auspicious pair that draws the car! These two are coming near to us.
meaning: अच्छा नः शीरशोचिषं गिरो यन्तु दर्शतम् अच्छा यज्ञासो नमसा पुरूवसुं पुरुप्रशस्तमूतये
sanskrit_iast: accʰā naḥ śīraśociṣaṃ giro yantu darśatam accʰā yajñāso namasā purūvasuṃ purupraśastamūtaye

text: Bend lowly down, as 'twere, your beads: be stands amid the water-flood, Pointing with his ten horns the way. I Indra
meaning: अग्निꣳ सूनुꣳ सहसो जातवेदसं दानाय वार्याणाम् द्विता यो भूदमृतो मर्त्येष्वा होता मन्द्रतमो विशि
sanskrit_iast: agnim̐ sūnum̐ sahaso jātavedasaṃ dānāya vāryāṇām dvitā yo bʰūdamr̥to martyeṣvā hotā mandratamo viśi

text: Pressers, blend Soma juice for him, each draugbt most excellent, for him The brave, the: hero, for his joy!
meaning: अदाभ्यः पुरएता विशामग्निर्मानुषीणाम् तूर्णी रथः सदा नवः
sanskrit_iast: adābʰyaḥ puraetā viśāmagnirmānuṣīṇām tūrṇī ratʰaḥ sadā navaḥ

text: The two stroing bay steeds, voked by prayer, hither shall bring to us our friend, Indra, song-lover, through our songs.
meaning: अभि प्रयाꣳसि वाहसा दाश्वाꣳ अश्नोति मर्त्यः क्षयं पावकशोचिषः
sanskrit_iast: abʰi prayām̐si vāhasā dāśvām̐ aśnoti martyaḥ kṣayaṃ pāvakaśociṣaḥ

meaning: साह्वान्विश्वा अभियुजः क्रतुर्देवानाममृक्तः अग्निस्तुविश्रवस्तमः
sanskrit_iast: sāhvānviśvā abʰiyujaḥ kraturdevānāmamr̥ktaḥ agnistuviśravastamaḥ

text: Let the drops pass within thee as the rivers flow into the sea O Indra, naught excelleth thee.
meaning: भद्रो नो अग्निराहुतो भद्रा रातिः सुभग भद्रो अध्वरः भद्रा उत प्रशस्तयः
sanskrit_iast: bʰadro no agnirāhuto bʰadrā rātiḥ subʰaga bʰadro adʰvaraḥ bʰadrā uta praśastayaḥ

meaning: भद्रं मनः कृणुष्व वृत्रतूर्ये येना समत्सु सासहिः अव स्थिरा तनुहि भूरि शर्धतां वनेमा ते अभिष्टये
sanskrit_iast: bʰadraṃ manaḥ kr̥ṇuṣva vr̥tratūrye yenā samatsu sāsahiḥ ava stʰirā tanuhi bʰūri śardʰatāṃ vanemā te abʰiṣṭaye

text: O Indra, Vritra-slayer, let Soma be ready for thy maw, The drops be ready for thy forms! III Agni
meaning: अग्ने वाजस्य गोमत ईशानः सहसो यहो अस्मे देहि जातवेदो महि श्रवः
sanskrit_iast: agne vājasya gomata īśānaḥ sahaso yaho asme dehi jātavedo mahi śravaḥ

text: Help, thou who knowest lauds, this work, a lovely hymn in Rudra's praise, Adorable in every house
meaning: स इधानो वसुष्कविरग्निरीडेन्यो गिरा रेवदस्मभ्यं पुर्वणीक दीदिहि
sanskrit_iast: sa idʰāno vasuṣkaviragnirīḍenyo girā revadasmabʰyaṃ purvaṇīka dīdihi

text: May this our God, great, limitless, smoke-bannered, excellently bright, Urge us to holy thought and wealth
meaning: क्षपो राजन्नुत त्मनाग्ने वस्तोरुतोषसः स तिग्मजम्भ रक्षसो दह प्रति
sanskrit_iast: kṣapo rājannuta tmanāgne vastorutoṣasaḥ sa tigmajambʰa rakṣaso daha prati

text: Like soma rich lord of men, may he, Agni, the banner of the Gods, Refulgent, hear us through our lauds! IV Indra
meaning: विशोविशो वो अतिथिं वाजयन्तः पुरुप्रियम् अग्निं वो दुर्यं वच स्तुषे शूषस्य मन्मभिः
sanskrit_iast: viśoviśo vo atitʰiṃ vājayantaḥ purupriyam agniṃ vo duryaṃ vaca stuṣe śūṣasya manmabʰiḥ

text: Sing this, beside the flowing juice, to him, your hero, much invoked, To please him as a mighty Bull!
meaning: यं जनासो हविष्मन्तो मित्रं न सर्पिरासुतिम् प्रशꣳसन्ति प्रशस्तिभिः
sanskrit_iast: yaṃ janāso haviṣmanto mitraṃ na sarpirāsutim praśam̐santi praśastibʰiḥ

text: He, excellent, withholdeth not his bounteous gift of wealth in kine. When lie bath listened to our songs.
meaning: पन्याꣳसं जातवेदसं यो देवतात्युद्यता हव्यान्यैरयद्दिवि
sanskrit_iast: panyām̐saṃ jātavedasaṃ yo devatātyudyatā havyānyairayaddivi

text: May he with might unclose for us the cow's stall, whosesoe'er it be, To which the Dasyu-slayer goes! V Vishnu
meaning: समिद्धमग्निꣳ समिधा गिरा गृणे शुचिं पावकं पुरो अध्वरे ध्रुवम् विप्रꣳ होतारं पुरुवारमद्रुहं कविꣳ सुम्नैरीमहे जातवेदसम्
