text: Through all this world strode Vishnu: thrice his foot he planted, and the whole Was gathered in his footstep's dust.
meaning: त्वां दूतमग्ने अमृतं युगेयुगे हव्यवाहं दधिरे पायुमीड्यम् देवासश्च मर्त्तासश्च जागृविं विभुं विश्पतिं नमसा नि षेदिरे
sanskrit_iast: tvāṃ dūtamagne amr̥taṃ yugeyuge havyavāhaṃ dadʰire pāyumīḍyam devāsaśca marttāsaśca jāgr̥viṃ vibʰuṃ viśpatiṃ namasā ni ṣedire

text: Vishnu, the guardian, he whom none deceiveth, made three steps, thenceforth Establishing his high decrees.
meaning: विभूषन्नग्न उभयाꣳ अनु व्रता दूतो देवानाꣳ रजसी समीयसे यत्ते धीतिꣳ सुमतिमावृणीमहे ऽध स्मा नस्त्रिवरूथः शिवो भव
sanskrit_iast: vibʰūṣannagna ubʰayām̐ anu vratā dūto devānām̐ rajasī samīyase yatte dʰītim̐ sumatimāvr̥ṇīmahe 'dʰa smā nastrivarūtʰaḥ śivo bʰava

text: Look ye on Vishnu's works whereby the friend of Indra, close allied, Hath let his holy ways be seen
meaning: उप त्वा जामयो गिरो देदिशतीर्हविष्कृतः वायोरनीके अस्थिरन्
sanskrit_iast: upa tvā jāmayo giro dediśatīrhaviṣkr̥taḥ vāyoranīke astʰiran

text: The princes evermore behold that loftiest place of Vishnu, like An eye extended through the heavens.
meaning: यस्य त्रिधात्ववृतं बर्हिस्तस्थावसन्दिनम् आपश्चिन्नि दधा पदम्
sanskrit_iast: yasya tridʰātvavr̥taṃ barhistastʰāvasandinam āpaścinni dadʰā padam

text: This, Vishou's station most sublime, the sages, ever-vigilant, Lovers of holy song, light up.
meaning: पदं देवस्य मीढुषो ऽनाधृष्टाभिरूतिभिः भद्रा सूर्य इवोपदृक्
sanskrit_iast: padaṃ devasya mīḍʰuṣo 'nādʰr̥ṣṭābʰirūtibʰiḥ bʰadrā sūrya ivopadr̥k

text: May the Gods help and favour us out of the place whence Vishnu strode Over the back and ridge of earth. VI Indra
meaning: अभि त्वा पूर्वपीतय इन्द्र स्तोमेभिरायवः समीचीनास ऋभवः समस्वरन्रुद्रा गृणन्त पूर्व्यम्
sanskrit_iast: abʰi tvā pūrvapītaya indra stomebʰirāyavaḥ samīcīnāsa r̥bʰavaḥ samasvaranrudrā gr̥ṇanta pūrvyam

text: Let none, no, not thy worshippers, delay thee far away from us! Even from far away come thou unto our feast, or listen it already here!
meaning: अस्येदिन्द्रो वावृधे वृष्ण्यꣳ शवो मदे सुतस्य विष्णवि अद्या तमस्य महिमानमायवो ऽनु ष्टुवन्ति पूर्वथा
sanskrit_iast: asyedindro vāvr̥dʰe vr̥ṣṇyam̐ śavo made sutasya viṣṇavi adyā tamasya mahimānamāyavo 'nu ṣṭuvanti pūrvatʰā

text: For here, like rites on honey, those who pray to thee sit by the juice that they have poured. Wealth-craving singers have on Indra set their hope, as men set foot upon a car. VII Indra
meaning: प्र वामर्चन्त्युक्थिनो नीथाविदो जरितारः इन्द्राग्नी इष आ वृणे
sanskrit_iast: pra vāmarcantyuktʰino nītʰāvido jaritāraḥ indrāgnī iṣa ā vr̥ṇe

text: Sung is the song of ancient time: to Indra have ye said the prayer. They have sung many a Brihati of sacrifice, poured forth the worshipper's many thoughts.
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी नवतिं पुरो दासपत्नीरधूनुतम् साकमेकेन कर्मणा
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī navatiṃ puro dāsapatnīradʰūnutam sākamekena karmaṇā

text: Indra hath tossed together mighty stores of wealth, and both the worlds, yea, and the sun. Pure, brightly-shining, mingled with the milk, the draughts of Soma have made Indra glad. VIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी अपसस्पर्युप प्र यन्ति धीतयः ऋतस्य पथ्या ऽ ऽ३ अनु
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī apasasparyupa pra yanti dʰītayaḥ r̥tasya patʰyā ' '3 anu

text: For Vritra-slaying Indra, thou, Soma, art poured that he may drink, And for the guerdon-giving man, the hero sitting in his seat.
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी तविषाणी वाꣳ सधस्थानि प्रयाꣳसि च युवोरप्तूर्यꣳ हितम्
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī taviṣāṇī vām̐ sadʰastʰāni prayām̐si ca yuvoraptūryam̐ hitam

text: Friends, may the princes, ye and we, obtain this most resplendent one, Gain him who hath the smell of strength, win him whose home is very strength!
meaning: शग्ध्यू३ षु शचीपत इन्द्र विश्वाभिरूतिभिः भगं न हि त्वा यशसं वसुविदमनु शूर चरामसि
sanskrit_iast: śagdʰyū3 ṣu śacīpata indra viśvābʰirūtibʰiḥ bʰagaṃ na hi tvā yaśasaṃ vasuvidamanu śūra carāmasi

text: Him with the fleece they purify, brown, golden-hued, beloved of all. Who with exhilarating juice flows forth to all the deities. IX Indra
meaning: पौरो अश्वस्य पुरुकृद्गवामस्युत्सो देव हिरण्ययः न किर्हि दानं परि मर्धिषत्वे यद्यद्यामि तदा भर
sanskrit_iast: pauro aśvasya purukr̥dgavāmasyutso deva hiraṇyayaḥ na kirhi dānaṃ pari mardʰiṣatve yadyadyāmi tadā bʰara

text: Indra whose wealth is in thyself, what mortal will attack this man? The strong will win the spoil on the decisive day through faith in thee, O Maghavan!
meaning: त्वꣳ ह्येहि चेरवे विदा भगं वसुत्तये उद्वावृषस्व मधवन्गविष्टय उदिन्द्राश्वमिष्टये
sanskrit_iast: tvam̐ hyehi cerave vidā bʰagaṃ vasuttaye udvāvr̥ṣasva madʰavangaviṣṭaya udindrāśvamiṣṭaye

text: In battles with the foe urge on our mighty ones who give the treasures dear to thee And may we with our princes, Lord of tawny steeds! pass through all peril, led by thee! X Indra
meaning: त्वं पुरू सहस्राणि शतानि च यूथा दानाय मꣳहसे आ पुरन्दरं चकृम विप्रवचस इन्द्रं गायन्तो ऽवसे
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ purū sahasrāṇi śatāni ca yūtʰā dānāya mam̐hase ā purandaraṃ cakr̥ma vipravacasa indraṃ gāyanto 'vase

text: Come, priest, and of the savoury juice pour forth a yet more gladdening draught! So is the hero praised who ever prospers us.
meaning: यो विश्वा दयते वसु होता मन्द्रो जनानाम् मधोर्न पात्रा प्रथमान्यस्मै प्र स्तोमा यन्त्वग्नये
sanskrit_iast: yo viśvā dayate vasu hotā mandro janānām madʰorna pātrā pratʰamānyasmai pra stomā yantvagnaye

text: Indra, whom tawny coursers bear, praise such as thine, preeminent, None by his power or by his goodness hath attained.
meaning: अश्व न गीर्भी रथ्यꣳ सुदानवो मर्मृज्यन्ते देवयवः उभे तोके तनये दस्म विस्पते पर्षि राधो मघोनाम्
sanskrit_iast: aśva na gīrbʰī ratʰyam̐ sudānavo marmr̥jyante devayavaḥ ubʰe toke tanaye dasma vispate parṣi rādʰo magʰonām

text: We, seeking glory, have invoked this God of yours, the Lord of wealth, Who must be magnified by constant sacrifice. XI Agni
meaning: इमं मे वरुण श्रुधी हवमद्या च मृडय त्वामवस्युरा चके
sanskrit_iast: imaṃ me varuṇa śrudʰī havamadyā ca mr̥ḍaya tvāmavasyurā cake

text: Sing praise to him, the Lord of light. The Gods have made the God to be their messenger, To bear oblation to the Gods.
meaning: कया त्वं न ऊत्याभि प्र मन्दसे वृषन् कया स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: kayā tvaṃ na ūtyābʰi pra mandase vr̥ṣan kayā stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: Agni, the bounteous giver, bright with varied flames, laud thou, O singer Sobhari, Him who controls this sacred food with Soma blent, who hath first claim to sacrifice! XII Soma Pavamana
meaning: इन्द्रमिद्देवतातय इन्द्रं प्रयत्यध्वरे इन्द्रꣳ समीके वनिनो हवामह इन्द्रं धनस्य सातये
sanskrit_iast: indramiddevatātaya indraṃ prayatyadʰvare indram̐ samīke vanino havāmaha indraṃ dʰanasya sātaye

text: Expressed by stones, O Soma, and urged through the long wool of the sheep, Thou, entering the press-boards, even as men a fort, goldbued, hast settled in the vats.
meaning: इन्द्रो मह्ना रोदसी पप्रथच्छव इन्द्रः सूर्यमरोचयत् इन्द्रे ह विश्वा भुवनानि येमिर इन्द्रे सुवानास इन्दवः
sanskrit_iast: indro mahnā rodasī papratʰaccʰava indraḥ sūryamarocayat indre ha viśvā bʰuvanāni yemira indre suvānāsa indavaḥ

text: He beautifies himself through the sheep's long fine wool, the bounteous, like the racing steed, Even Soma Pavamana who shall be the joy of sages and of holy bards. XIII Indra
meaning: विश्वकर्मन्हविषा वावृधानः स्वयं यजस्व तन्वा३ꣳ स्वा हि ते मुह्यन्त्वन्ये अभितो जनास इहास्माकं मघवा सूरिरस्तु
sanskrit_iast: viśvakarmanhaviṣā vāvr̥dʰānaḥ svayaṃ yajasva tanvā3m̐ svā hi te muhyantvanye abʰito janāsa ihāsmākaṃ magʰavā sūrirastu

text: Here, verily, yesterday we let the Thunder-wielder drink his fill. Bring him the juice poured forth in sacrifice to-day! Now range you by the glorious one!
meaning: अया रुचा हरिण्या पुनानो विश्वा द्वेषाꣳसि तरति सयुग्वभिः सूरो न सयुग्वभिः धारा पृष्ठस्य रोचते पुनानो अरुषो हरिः विश्वा यद्रूपा परियास्यृक्वभिः सप्तास्येभिरृक्वभिः
sanskrit_iast: ayā rucā hariṇyā punāno viśvā dveṣām̐si tarati sayugvabʰiḥ sūro na sayugvabʰiḥ dʰārā pr̥ṣṭʰasya rocate punāno aruṣo hariḥ viśvā yadrūpā pariyāsyr̥kvabʰiḥ saptāsyebʰirr̥kvabʰiḥ

text: Even the wolf, the savage beast that rends the sheep, follows the path of his decrees. So graciously accepting, Indra, this our praise, with wondrous thought come forth to us! XIV Indra-Agni
meaning: प्राचीमनु प्रदिशं पाति चेकितत्सꣳ रश्मिभिर्यतते दर्शतो रथो दैव्यो दर्शतो रथः अग्मन्नुक्थानि पौꣳस्येन्द्रं जैत्राय हर्षयत वज्रश्च यद्भवथो अनपच्युता समत्स्वनपच्युता
sanskrit_iast: prācīmanu pradiśaṃ pāti cekitatsam̐ raśmibʰiryatate darśato ratʰo daivyo darśato ratʰaḥ agmannuktʰāni paum̐syendraṃ jaitrāya harṣayata vajraśca yadbʰavatʰo anapacyutā samatsvanapacyutā

text: Indra and Agni, in your deeds of might ye deck heaven's lucid realms: Famed is that hero strength of yours.
meaning: त्वं ह त्यत्पणीनां विदो वसु सं मातृभिर्मर्जयसि स्व आ दम ऋतस्य धीतिभिर्दमे परावतो न साम तद्यत्रा रणन्ति धीतयः त्रिधातुभिररुषीभिर्वयो दधे रोचमानो वयो दधे
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ ha tyatpaṇīnāṃ vido vasu saṃ mātr̥bʰirmarjayasi sva ā dama r̥tasya dʰītibʰirdame parāvato na sāma tadyatrā raṇanti dʰītayaḥ tridʰātubʰiraruṣībʰirvayo dadʰe rocamāno vayo dadʰe

text: To Indra and to Agni prayers go forward from the holy task. Along the path of sacred Law.
meaning: उत नो गोषणिं धियमश्वसां वाजसामुत नृवत्कृणुह्यूतये
sanskrit_iast: uta no goṣaṇiṃ dʰiyamaśvasāṃ vājasāmuta nr̥vatkr̥ṇuhyūtaye

text: Indra and Agni, powers are yours, yours are oblations and abodes: Good is your zealous energy. XV Indra
meaning: शशमानस्य वा नरः स्वेदस्य सत्यशवसः विदा कामस्य वेनतः
sanskrit_iast: śaśamānasya vā naraḥ svedasya satyaśavasaḥ vidā kāmasya venataḥ

text: Who knows what vital power he wins, drinking beside the flowing juice? This is the fair-cheeked God who, joying in the draught, breaks down the castles in his strength.
meaning: उप नः सूनवो गिरः शृण्वन्त्वमृतस्य ये सुमृडीका भवन्तु नः
sanskrit_iast: upa naḥ sūnavo giraḥ śr̥ṇvantvamr̥tasya ye sumr̥ḍīkā bʰavantu naḥ

text: As a wild elephant rushes on, this way and that way mad with heat, None may restrain thee, yet come hither to the draught! Thou, movest mighty in thy power.
meaning: प्र वां महि द्यवी अभ्युपस्तुतिं भरामहे शुची उप प्रशस्तये
sanskrit_iast: pra vāṃ mahi dyavī abʰyupastutiṃ bʰarāmahe śucī upa praśastaye

text: When he, the terrible, ne'er o'erthrown, stedfast, made ready for the fight-- When Indra Maghavan lists to his praiser's call, he will not stand aloof, but come. XVI Soma Pavamana
meaning: पुनाने तन्वा मिथः स्वेन दक्षेण राजथः ऊह्याथे सनादृतम्
sanskrit_iast: punāne tanvā mitʰaḥ svena dakṣeṇa rājatʰaḥ ūhyātʰe sanādr̥tam

text: The Pavamanas have been poured, the brilliant drops of Soma juice, For holy lore of every kind.
meaning: मही मित्रस्य साधथस्तरन्ती पिप्रती ऋतम् परि यज्ञं नि षेदथुः
sanskrit_iast: mahī mitrasya sādʰatʰastarantī pipratī r̥tam pari yajñaṃ ni ṣedatʰuḥ

text: From heaven, from out the firmament hath PavamAna been effused Upon the back and ridge of earth.
meaning: अयमु ते समतसि कपोत इव गर्भधिम् वचस्तच्चिन्न ओहसे
sanskrit_iast: ayamu te samatasi kapota iva garbʰadʰim vacastaccinna ohase

text: The Pavamanas have been shed, the beautified swift Somadrops, Driving all enemies afar. XVII Indra-Agni I. Indra and Agni I invoke, joint-victors, bounteous, unsubdued, Foe-slayers, best to win the spoil.
meaning: स्तोत्रꣳ राधानां पते गिर्वाहो वीर यस्य ते विभूतिरस्तु सूनृता
sanskrit_iast: stotram̐ rādʰānāṃ pate girvāho vīra yasya te vibʰūtirastu sūnr̥tā

text: Indra and Agni, singers skilled in melody hymn you bringing lauds: I choose you both to bring me food.
meaning: ऊर्ध्वस्तिष्ठा न ऊतये ऽस्मिन्वाजे शतक्रतो समन्येषु ब्रवावहै
sanskrit_iast: ūrdʰvastiṣṭʰā na ūtaye 'sminvāje śatakrato samanyeṣu bravāvahai

text: Together, with one mighty deed, Indra and Agni, ye shook down. The ninety forts which Dasas held. XVIII Agni
meaning: गाव उप वदावटे महि यज्ञस्य रप्सुदा उभा कर्णा हिरण्यया
sanskrit_iast: gāva upa vadāvaṭe mahi yajñasya rapsudā ubʰā karṇā hiraṇyayā

text: O Child of Strength, to thee whose look is lovely, with oblations we, O Agni, have poured forth our songs.
meaning: अभ्यारमिदद्रयो निषिक्तं पुष्करे मधु अवटस्य विसर्जने
sanskrit_iast: abʰyāramidadrayo niṣiktaṃ puṣkare madʰu avaṭasya visarjane

text: To thee for shelter are we come, as to the shade from fervent heat, Agni, who glitterest like gold
meaning: सिञ्चन्ति नमसावटमुच्चाचक्रं परिज्मानम् नीचीनबारमक्षितम्
sanskrit_iast: siñcanti namasāvaṭamuccācakraṃ parijmānam nīcīnabāramakṣitam

text: Mighty as one who slays with shafts, or like a bull with sharpened horn, Agni, thou brakest down the forts. XIX Agni
meaning: मा भेम मा श्रमिष्मोग्रस्य सख्ये तव महत्ते वृष्णो अभिचक्ष्यं कृतं पश्येम तुर्वशं यदुम्
sanskrit_iast: mā bʰema mā śramiṣmograsya sakʰye tava mahatte vr̥ṣṇo abʰicakṣyaṃ kr̥taṃ paśyema turvaśaṃ yadum

text: To give eternal glow, we pray Vaisvanara the holy one, Lord of the light of sacrifice.
meaning: सव्यामनु स्फिग्यं वावसे वृष्ना न दानो अस्य रोषति मध्वा संपृक्ताः सारघेण धेनवस्तूयमेहि द्रवा पिब
sanskrit_iast: savyāmanu spʰigyaṃ vāvase vr̥ṣnā na dāno asya roṣati madʰvā saṃpr̥ktāḥ sāragʰeṇa dʰenavastūyamehi dravā piba

text: Who, furthering the light of Law, hath spread himself to meet this work: He sends the seasons, mighty one.
meaning: इमा उ त्वा पुरूवसो गिरो वर्धन्तु या मम पावकवर्णाः शुचयो विपश्चितो ऽभि स्तोमैरनूषत
sanskrit_iast: imā u tvā purūvaso giro vardʰantu yā mama pāvakavarṇāḥ śucayo vipaścito 'bʰi stomairanūṣata

text: Love of what is and what shall be, Agni, in his beloved forms, Shines forth alone as sovran Lord. I Agni
meaning: अयꣳ सहस्रमृषिभिः सहस्कृतः समुद्र इव पप्रथे सत्यः सो अस्य महिमा गृणे शवो यज्ञेषु विप्रराज्ये
sanskrit_iast: ayam̐ sahasramr̥ṣibʰiḥ sahaskr̥taḥ samudra iva papratʰe satyaḥ so asya mahimā gr̥ṇe śavo yajñeṣu viprarājye

text: Wise Agni, in the ancient way, making his body beautiful, Hath been exalted by the sage.
meaning: यस्यायं विश्व आर्यो दासः शेवधिपा अरिः तिरश्चिदर्ये रुशमे पवीरवि तुभ्येत्सो अज्यते रयिः
sanskrit_iast: yasyāyaṃ viśva āryo dāsaḥ śevadʰipā ariḥ tiraścidarye ruśame pavīravi tubʰyetso ajyate rayiḥ

text: I invocate the Child of Strength, Agni whose glow is bright and pure, In this well-ordered sacrifice.
meaning: तुरण्यवो मधुमन्तं घृतश्चतं विप्रासो अर्कमानृचुः अस्मे रयिः पप्रथे वृष्ण्यं शवो ऽस्मे स्वानास इन्दवः
sanskrit_iast: turaṇyavo madʰumantaṃ gʰr̥taścataṃ viprāso arkamānr̥cuḥ asme rayiḥ papratʰe vr̥ṣṇyaṃ śavo 'sme svānāsa indavaḥ

text: So, Agni, rich in many friends, with fiery splendour seat thyself. With Gods upon our sacred grass! II Soma Pavamana
meaning: गोमन्न इन्दो अश्ववत्सुतः सुदक्ष धनिव शुचिं च वर्णमधि गोषु धार्य
sanskrit_iast: gomanna indo aśvavatsutaḥ sudakṣa dʰaniva śuciṃ ca varṇamadʰi goṣu dʰārya

text: O thou with stones for arms, thy powers, rending the fiends, have raised themselves: Drive off the foes who compass us
meaning: स नो हरीणां पत इन्दो देवप्सरस्तमः सखेव सख्ये नर्यो रुचे भव
sanskrit_iast: sa no harīṇāṃ pata indo devapsarastamaḥ sakʰeva sakʰye naryo ruce bʰava

text: Hence conquering with might when car meets car, and when the prize is staked, With fearless heart will I sing praise.
meaning: सनेमि त्वमस्मदा अदेवं कं चिदत्रिणम् साह्वाꣳ इन्दो परि बाधो अप द्वयुम्
sanskrit_iast: sanemi tvamasmadā adevaṃ kaṃ cidatriṇam sāhvām̐ indo pari bādʰo apa dvayum

text: None, evil-minded, may assail this Pavamana's holy laws Crush him who fain would fight with thee!
meaning: अञ्जते व्यञ्जते समञ्जते क्रतुꣳ रिहन्ति मध्वाभ्यञ्जते सिन्धोरु ऽच्छ्वासे पतयन्तमुक्षणꣳ हिरण्यपावाः पशुमप्सु गृभ्णते
sanskrit_iast: añjate vyañjate samañjate kratum̐ rihanti madʰvābʰyañjate sindʰoru 'ccʰvāse patayantamukṣaṇam̐ hiraṇyapāvāḥ paśumapsu gr̥bʰṇate

text: For Indra to the streams they urge the tawny rapture-dropping steed, Indu, the bringer of delight. III Indra
meaning: विपश्चिते पवमानाय गायत मही न धारात्यन्धो अर्षति अहिर्न जूर्णामति सर्पति त्वचमत्यो न क्रीडन्नसरद्वृषा हरिः
sanskrit_iast: vipaścite pavamānāya gāyata mahī na dʰārātyandʰo arṣati ahirna jūrṇāmati sarpati tvacamatyo na krīḍannasaradvr̥ṣā hariḥ

text: Come hither, Indra, with bay steeds, joyous, with tails like peacocks' plumes! Let no men check thy course as fowlers stay the bird: pass o'er them as o'er desert lands!
meaning: अग्रेगो राजाप्यस्तविष्यते विमानो अह्नां भुवनेष्वर्पितः हरिर्घृतस्नुः सुदृशीको अर्णवो ज्योतीरथः पवते राय ओक्यः
sanskrit_iast: agrego rājāpyastaviṣyate vimāno ahnāṃ bʰuvaneṣvarpitaḥ harirgʰr̥tasnuḥ sudr̥śīko arṇavo jyotīratʰaḥ pavate rāya okyaḥ

text: Vritra's devourer, he who burst the cloud, brake forts, and drave the floods, Indra, who mounts his chariot at his bay steeds' cry, shatters e'en things that stand most firm.
meaning: विश्वेभिरग्ने अग्निभिरिमं यज्ञमिदं वचः चनो घाः सहसा यहो
sanskrit_iast: viśvebʰiragne agnibʰirimaṃ yajñamidaṃ vacaḥ cano gʰāḥ sahasā yaho

text: Like pools of water deep and full, like kine thou cherishest thy might; Like the milch-cows that go well-guarded to the mead, like water-brooks that reach the lake. IV Indra
meaning: यच्चिद्धि शश्वा तना देवंदेवं यजामहे त्वे इद्धूयते हविः
sanskrit_iast: yacciddʰi śaśvā tanā devaṃdevaṃ yajāmahe tve iddʰūyate haviḥ

text: Even as the wild bull, when he thirsts, goes to the desert's watery pool, Come hither quickly both at morning and at eve, and with the Kanvas drink thy fill!
meaning: प्रियो नो अस्तु विश्पतिर्होता मन्द्रो वरेण्यः प्रियाः स्वग्नयो वयम्
sanskrit_iast: priyo no astu viśpatirhotā mandro vareṇyaḥ priyāḥ svagnayo vayam

text: May the drops gladden thee, Lord Indra, and obtain bounty for him who pours the juice! Soma, shed in the press, thou stolest and didst drink, and hence hast won surpassing might. V Indra I. Thou as a God. O mightiest, verily blessest mortal man. O Maghavan, there is no comforter but thou: Indra, I speak my words to thee.
meaning: इन्द्रं वो विश्वतस्परि हवामहे जनेभ्यः अस्माकमस्तु केवलः
sanskrit_iast: indraṃ vo viśvataspari havāmahe janebʰyaḥ asmākamastu kevalaḥ

text: Let not thy bounteous gifts, let not thy saving help all fail us good Lord, at any time! And measure out to us, thou lover of man-kind, all riches hitherward from men VI Dawn I. This Lady, excellent and kind, after her sister shining forth, Daughter of Heaven, hath shown herself.
meaning: स नो वृषन्नमुं चरुꣳ सत्रादावन्नपा वृधि अस्मभ्यमप्रतिष्कुतः
sanskrit_iast: sa no vr̥ṣannamuṃ carum̐ satrādāvannapā vr̥dʰi asmabʰyamapratiṣkutaḥ

text: Red, like a mare, and beautiful, holy, the mother of the kine, The Dawn became the Asvins' friend.
meaning: बृषा यूथेव वꣳसगः कृष्टीरियर्त्योजसा ईशानो अप्रतिष्कुतः
sanskrit_iast: br̥ṣā yūtʰeva vam̐sagaḥ kr̥ṣṭīriyartyojasā īśāno apratiṣkutaḥ

text: Yea, and thou art the Asvins', friend the mother of the cows art thou: O Dawn, thou rules over wealth VII Asvins
meaning: त्वं नश्चित्र ऊत्या वसो राधाꣳसि चोदय अस्य रायस्त्वमग्ने रथीरसि विदा गाधं तुचे तु नः
sanskrit_iast: tvaṃ naścitra ūtyā vaso rādʰām̐si codaya asya rāyastvamagne ratʰīrasi vidā gādʰaṃ tuce tu naḥ

text: Now Morning with her earliest light shines forth, dear daughter of the Sky: High, Asvins, I extol your praise
meaning: पर्षि तोकं तनयं पर्तृभिष्ट्वमदब्धैरप्रयुत्वभिः अग्ने हेडाꣳसि दैव्या युयोधि नो ऽदेवानि हराꣳसि च
sanskrit_iast: parṣi tokaṃ tanayaṃ partr̥bʰiṣṭvamadabdʰairaprayutvabʰiḥ agne heḍām̐si daivyā yuyodʰi no 'devāni harām̐si ca

text: Children of Ocean, mighty ones, discoverers of riches, Gods, Finders of treasure through our prayer!
meaning: किमित्ते विष्णो परिचक्षि नाम प्र यद्ववक्षे शिपिविष्टो अस्मि मा वर्पो अस्मदप गूह एतद्यदन्यरूपः समिथे बभूथ
sanskrit_iast: kimitte viṣṇo paricakṣi nāma pra yadvavakṣe śipiviṣṭo asmi mā varpo asmadapa gūha etadyadanyarūpaḥ samitʰe babʰūtʰa

text: Your lofty coursers hasten over the everlasting realm, whea your car flies with winged steeds. VIII Dawn
meaning: प्र तत्ते अद्य शिपिविष्ट हव्यमर्यः शꣳसामि वयुनानि विद्वान् तं त्वा गृणामि तवसमतव्यान्क्षयन्तमस्य रजसः पराके
sanskrit_iast: pra tatte adya śipiviṣṭa havyamaryaḥ śam̐sāmi vayunāni vidvān taṃ tvā gr̥ṇāmi tavasamatavyānkṣayantamasya rajasaḥ parāke

text: O Dawn who hast a store of wealth, bring unto us that splendid gift Wherewith we may support children and children's sons
meaning: वषट् ते विष्णवास आ कृणोमि तन्मे जुषस्व शिपिविष्ट हव्यम् वर्धन्तु त्वा सुष्टुतयो गिरि मे यूयं पात स्वस्तभिः सदा नः
sanskrit_iast: vaṣaṭ te viṣṇavāsa ā kr̥ṇomi tanme juṣasva śipiviṣṭa havyam vardʰantu tvā suṣṭutayo giri me yūyaṃ pāta svastabʰiḥ sadā naḥ

text: Thou radiant Lady of sweet strains, with wealth of horses and of kine Shine thou on us this day, O Dawn, auspiciously
meaning: वायो शुक्रो अयामि ते मध्वो अग्रं दिविष्टिषु आ याहि सोमपीतये स्पार्हो देव नियुत्वता
sanskrit_iast: vāyo śukro ayāmi te madʰvo agraṃ diviṣṭiṣu ā yāhi somapītaye spārho deva niyutvatā

text: O Dawn who hast a store of wealth, yoke red steeds to thy car to-day. Then bring us all delight and all felicities IX Asvins
meaning: इन्द्रश्च वायवेषाꣳ सोमानां पीतिमर्हथः युवाꣳ हि यन्तीन्दवो निम्नमापो न सध्र्यक्
sanskrit_iast: indraśca vāyaveṣām̐ somānāṃ pītimarhatʰaḥ yuvām̐ hi yantīndavo nimnamāpo na sadʰryak

text: O Asvins, wonderful in act, do ye unanimous direct Your chariot to our home wealthy in kine and gold!
meaning: वायविन्द्रश्च शुष्मिणा सरथꣳ शवसस्पती नियुत्वन्ता न ऊतय आ यातꣳ सोमपीतये
sanskrit_iast: vāyavindraśca śuṣmiṇā saratʰam̐ śavasaspatī niyutvantā na ūtaya ā yātam̐ somapītaye

text: Hither may they who wake at dawn bring, to drink Soma, both the Gods, Health-givers, wonder-workers, borne on paths of gold!
meaning: अध क्षपा परिष्कृतो वाजाꣳ अभि प्र गाहते यदी विवस्वतो धियो हरिꣳ हिन्वन्ति यातवे
sanskrit_iast: adʰa kṣapā pariṣkr̥to vājām̐ abʰi pra gāhate yadī vivasvato dʰiyo harim̐ hinvanti yātave

text: Ye who brought down the hymn from heaven, a light that giveth light to men, Do ye, O Asvins, bring strength hither unto us! X Agni
meaning: तमस्य मर्जयामसि मदो य इन्द्रपातमः यं गाव आसभिर्दधुः पुरा नूनं च सूरयः
sanskrit_iast: tamasya marjayāmasi mado ya indrapātamaḥ yaṃ gāva āsabʰirdadʰuḥ purā nūnaṃ ca sūrayaḥ

text: I think of Agni who is kind, whom, as their home, the milch-kine seek; Whom fleet-foot coursers seek as home, and strong enduring, steeds as home. Bring food to those who sing thy praise!
meaning: तं गाथया पुराण्या पुनानमभ्यनूषत उतो कृपन्त धीतयो देवानां नाम बिभ्रतीः
sanskrit_iast: taṃ gātʰayā purāṇyā punānamabʰyanūṣata uto kr̥panta dʰītayo devānāṃ nāma bibʰratīḥ

text: For Agni, God of all mankind, gives the strong courser to theman. Agni gives ready gear for wealth, he gives the best when he ix pleased. Bring food to those who sing thy praise!
meaning: अश्वं न त्वा वारवन्तं वन्दध्या अग्निं नमोभिः सम्राजन्तमध्वराणाम्
sanskrit_iast: aśvaṃ na tvā vāravantaṃ vandadʰyā agniṃ namobʰiḥ samrājantamadʰvarāṇām

text: The Agni who is praised as kind, to whom the milch-kine come. in herds, To whom the racers, swift of foot, to whom our wellborn princes come. Bring food to those who sing thy praise! XI Dawn
meaning: स घा नः सूनुः शवसा पृथुप्रगामा सुशेवः मीढ्वाꣳ अस्माकं बभूयात्
sanskrit_iast: sa gʰā naḥ sūnuḥ śavasā pr̥tʰupragāmā suśevaḥ mīḍʰvām̐ asmākaṃ babʰūyāt

text: O heavenly Dawn, awaken us to ample opulence today, Even as thou didst waken us with Satyasravas, Vayya's, Son, high-born! delightful with thy steeds!
meaning: स नो दूराच्चासाच्च नि मर्त्यादघायोः पाहि सदमिद्विश्वायुः
sanskrit_iast: sa no dūrāccāsācca ni martyādagʰāyoḥ pāhi sadamidviśvāyuḥ

text: Daughter of heaven, thou dawnedst of Sunitha, Suchadratha's son; So dawn thou on one mightier still, on Satyasravas, Vayya's son, high-born! delightful with thy steeds!
meaning: त्वमिन्द्र प्रतूर्तिष्वभि विश्वा असि स्पृधः अशस्तिहा जनिता वृत्रतूरसि त्वं तूर्य तरुष्यतः
sanskrit_iast: tvamindra pratūrtiṣvabʰi viśvā asi spr̥dʰaḥ aśastihā janitā vr̥tratūrasi tvaṃ tūrya taruṣyataḥ

text: So bringing treasure, shine to-day on us, thou daughter, of the Sky, As on one mightier thou hast dawned, on Satyasravas, Vayya's son, high-born! delightful with thy steeds! XII Asvins
meaning: अनु ते शुष्मं तुरयन्तमीयतुः क्षोणी शिशुं न मातरा विश्वास्ते स्पृधः श्नथयन्त मन्यवे वृत्रं यदिन्द्र तूर्वसि
sanskrit_iast: anu te śuṣmaṃ turayantamīyatuḥ kṣoṇī śiśuṃ na mātarā viśvāste spr̥dʰaḥ śnatʰayanta manyave vr̥traṃ yadindra tūrvasi

text: To meet your treasure-bringing car, the car that is most dear to us, Asvins the Rishi is prepared, your worshipper with, songs of praise. Lovers of sweetness, hear my call
meaning: यज्ञ इन्द्रमवर्धयद्यद्भूमिं व्यवर्तयत् चक्राण ओपशं दिवि
sanskrit_iast: yajña indramavardʰayadyadbʰūmiṃ vyavartayat cakrāṇa opaśaṃ divi

text: Pass, Asvins, over all away. May I obtain you for myself, Wonderful, with your golden paths, most gracious, bringers of the flood! Lovers of sweetness, hear my call!
meaning: व्या३न्तरिक्षमतिरन्मदे सोमस्य रोचना इन्द्रो यदभिनद्वलम्
sanskrit_iast: vyā3ntarikṣamatiranmade somasya rocanā indro yadabʰinadvalam

text: Come to us, O ye Asvins twain, bringing your precious treasures, come Ye Rudras, on your paths of gold, rejoicing, with your store of wealth! Lovers of sweetness, hear my call! XIII Agni
meaning: उदगा आजदङ्गिरोभ्य आविष्कृण्वन्गुहा सतीः अर्वाञ्चं नुनुदे वलम्
sanskrit_iast: udagā ājadaṅgirobʰya āviṣkr̥ṇvanguhā satīḥ arvāñcaṃ nunude valam

text: Agni is wakened by the people's fuel to meet the Dawn who cometh like a milch-cow. Like young trees shooting up on high their branches, his flames mounting to the vault of heaven.
meaning: त्यमु वः सत्रासाहं विश्वासु गीर्ष्वायतम् आ च्यावयस्यूतये
sanskrit_iast: tyamu vaḥ satrāsāhaṃ viśvāsu gīrṣvāyatam ā cyāvayasyūtaye

text: For the Gods' worship hath the priest been wakened: kind Agni hath arisen erect at morning. Kindled, his radiant might is made apparent, and the great God hath been set free from darkness.
meaning: युध्मꣳ सन्तमनर्वाणꣳ सोमपामनपच्युतम् नरमवार्यक्रतुम्
sanskrit_iast: yudʰmam̐ santamanarvāṇam̐ somapāmanapacyutam naramavāryakratum

text: When he hath roused the line of his attendants, with the bright milk bright Agni is anointed. Then is prepared the effectual oblation, which spread in front, with tongues, erect, he drinketh, XIV Dawn
meaning: शिक्षा ण इन्द्र राय आ पुरु विद्वाꣳ ऋचीषम अवा नः पार्ये धने
sanskrit_iast: śikṣā ṇa indra rāya ā puru vidvām̐ r̥cīṣama avā naḥ pārye dʰane

text: This light is come, amid all lights the fairest: born is the brilliant, far-extending brightness. Night, sent away for Savitar's uprising, hath yielded up a birthplace for the morning.
meaning: तव त्यदिन्द्रियं बृहत्तव दक्ष्ममुत क्रतुम् वज्रꣳ शिशाति धिषणा वरेण्यम्
sanskrit_iast: tava tyadindriyaṃ br̥hattava dakṣmamuta kratum vajram̐ śiśāti dʰiṣaṇā vareṇyam

text: The fair, the bright is come with her white offspring to her the Dark one hath resigned her dwelling. Akin, immortal, following each other, changing their colours both the heavens move onward.
meaning: तव द्यौरिन्द्र पौꣳस्यं पृथिवी वर्धति श्रवः त्वामापः पर्वतासश्च हिन्विरे
sanskrit_iast: tava dyaurindra paum̐syaṃ pr̥tʰivī vardʰati śravaḥ tvāmāpaḥ parvatāsaśca hinvire

text: Common, unending is the sisters' pathway: taught by the Gods alternately they travel, Fair-formed, of different hues and yet one-minded, Night and Dawn clash not, neither do they tarry. XV Asvins
meaning: त्वां विष्णुर्बृहन्क्षयो मित्रो गृणाति वरुणः त्वाꣳ शर्धो मदत्यनु मारुतम्
sanskrit_iast: tvāṃ viṣṇurbr̥hankṣayo mitro gr̥ṇāti varuṇaḥ tvām̐ śardʰo madatyanu mārutam

text: Agni, the bright face of the Dawns, is shining: the singers' pious voices have ascended. Borne on your chariot, Asvins, turn you hither, and come unto our brimming warm libation!
meaning: नमस्ते अग्न ओजसे गृणन्ति देव कृष्टयः अमैरमित्रमर्दय
sanskrit_iast: namaste agna ojase gr̥ṇanti deva kr̥ṣṭayaḥ amairamitramardaya

text: Most frequent guests, they scorn not what is ready: even now the lauded Asvins are beside us. With promptest aid they come at morn and evening, the worshipper's most healthful guards from trouble.
meaning: कुवित्सु नो गविष्टये ऽग्ने संवेषिषो रयिम् उरुकृदुरु णस्कृधि
sanskrit_iast: kuvitsu no gaviṣṭaye 'gne saṃveṣiṣo rayim urukr̥duru ṇaskr̥dʰi

text: Yea, come at milking-time, at early morning, at noon of day, and when the Sun is setting, By day, at night, with most auspicious favour! Not only now the draught hath drawn the Asvins. XVI Dawn
meaning: मा नो अग्ने महाधने परा वर्ग्भारभृद्यथा संवर्गꣳ सꣳ रयिं जय
sanskrit_iast: mā no agne mahādʰane parā vargbʰārabʰr̥dyatʰā saṃvargam̐ sam̐ rayiṃ jaya

text: These Dawns have raised their banner: in the eastern half of middle air they spread abroad their shining light. Like heroes who prepare their weapons for the fray, the cows are coming on, the mothers, red of hue.
meaning: समस्य मन्यवे विशो विश्वा नमन्त कृष्टयः समुद्रायेव सिन्धवः
sanskrit_iast: samasya manyave viśo viśvā namanta kr̥ṣṭayaḥ samudrāyeva sindʰavaḥ

text: Rapidly have the ruddy beams of light shot up: the red cows have they harnessed, easy to be yoked. The Dawns have made their pathways as in former times: redhued, they have attained refulgent brilliancy.
meaning: वि चिद्वृत्रस्य दोधतः शिरो बिभेद वृष्णिना वज्रेण शतपर्वणा
sanskrit_iast: vi cidvr̥trasya dodʰataḥ śiro bibʰeda vr̥ṣṇinā vajreṇa śataparvaṇā

text: They sing their song like women active in their tasks, along their common path hither from far away, Bringing refreshment to the liberal devotee, yea, all things to the worshipper who pours the juice. XVII Asvins
meaning: ओजस्तदस्य तित्विष उभे यत्समवर्त्तयत् इन्द्रश्चर्मेव रोदसी
sanskrit_iast: ojastadasya titviṣa ubʰe yatsamavarttayat indraścarmeva rodasī

text: Agni is wakened: Surya riseth from the earth. Bright Dawn hath opened out the mighty twain with light. The Asvins have equipped their chariot for the course. God Savitar hath roused the world in sundry ways.
meaning: सुमन्मा वस्वी रन्ती सूनरी
sanskrit_iast: sumanmā vasvī rantī sūnarī

text: When, O ye Asvins, ye equip your mighty car, with fatness and with honey balm, ye twain, our power! To our devotion give victorious strength in war: may we win riches in the heroes' strife for spoil!
meaning: सरूप वृषन्ना गहीमौ भद्रौ धुर्यावभि ताविमा उप सर्पतः
sanskrit_iast: sarūpa vr̥ṣannā gahīmau bʰadrau dʰuryāvabʰi tāvimā upa sarpataḥ

text: Nigh to us come the Asvins' lauded three wheeled car, the car laden with meath and drawn by fleet-foot steeds, Three-seated, opulent, bestowing all delight: may it bring weal to us, to cattle and to men! XVIII Soma Pavamana
meaning: नीव शीर्षाणि मृढ्वं मध्य आपस्य तिष्ठति शृङ्गेभिर्दशभिर्दिशन्
sanskrit_iast: nīva śīrṣāṇi mr̥ḍʰvaṃ madʰya āpasya tiṣṭʰati śr̥ṅgebʰirdaśabʰirdiśan

text: Thy streams that never fail or waste flow forth like showers of rain from heaven, To bring a thousand stores of wealth.
meaning: पन्यंपन्यमित्सोतार आ धावत मद्याय सोमं वीराय शूराय
sanskrit_iast: panyaṃpanyamitsotāra ā dʰāvata madyāya somaṃ vīrāya śūrāya

text: He, flows beholding on his way all well-beloved sacred lore, Green-tinted, brandishing his arms.
meaning: एह हरी ब्रह्मयुजा शग्मा वक्षतः सखायम् इन्द्रं गीर्भिर्गिर्वणसम्
sanskrit_iast: eha harī brahmayujā śagmā vakṣataḥ sakʰāyam indraṃ gīrbʰirgirvaṇasam

text: He, when the people deck him like a docile king of elephants, Sits as a falcon in the wood.
meaning: पाता वृत्रहा सुतमा घा गमन्नारे अस्मत् नि यमते शतमूतिः
sanskrit_iast: pātā vr̥trahā sutamā gʰā gamannāre asmat ni yamate śatamūtiḥ

text: So bring thou hitherward to us, Indu, while thou art purified. All treasures both of heaven and earth! I Soma Pavamana
meaning: आ त्वा विशन्त्विन्दवः समुद्रमिव सिन्धवः न त्वामिन्द्राति रिच्यते
sanskrit_iast: ā tvā viśantvindavaḥ samudramiva sindʰavaḥ na tvāmindrāti ricyate

text: Forward have flowed the streams of power, of this the mighty one effused, Of him who waits upon the Gods.
meaning: विव्यक्थ महिना वृषन्भक्षꣳ सोमस्य जागृवे य इन्द्र जठरेषु ते
sanskrit_iast: vivyaktʰa mahinā vr̥ṣanbʰakṣam̐ somasya jāgr̥ve ya indra jaṭʰareṣu te

text: The singers praise him with their song, and learned priests adorn the steed Born as thelight that merits laud.
meaning: अरं त इन्द्र कुक्षये सोमो भवतु वृत्रहन् अरं धामभ्य इन्दवः
sanskrit_iast: araṃ ta indra kukṣaye somo bʰavatu vr̥trahan araṃ dʰāmabʰya indavaḥ

text: These things thou winnest quickly, while men cleanse thee, Soma, nobly rich! II Indra
meaning: जराबोध तद्विविड्ढि विशेविशे यज्ञियाय स्तोमꣳ रुद्राय दृशीकम्
sanskrit_iast: jarābodʰa tadviviḍḍʰi viśeviśe yajñiyāya stomam̐ rudrāya dr̥śīkam

text: This Brahman, comer at the due time, named Indra, is renowned and praised.
meaning: स नो महाꣳ अनिमानो धूमकेतुः पुरुश्चन्द्रः धिये वाजाय हिन्वतु
sanskrit_iast: sa no mahām̐ animāno dʰūmaketuḥ puruścandraḥ dʰiye vājāya hinvatu

text: To thee alone, O Lord of Strength, go, as it were, all songs of praise.
meaning: स रेवाꣳ इव विश्पतिर्दैव्यः केतुः शृणोतु नः उक्थैरग्निर्बृहद्भानुः
sanskrit_iast: sa revām̐ iva viśpatirdaivyaḥ ketuḥ śr̥ṇotu naḥ uktʰairagnirbr̥hadbʰānuḥ

text: Like streams of water on their way, let bounties, Indra, flow from thee! III Indra
meaning: तद्वो गाय सुते सचा पुरुहूताय सत्वने शं यद्गवे न शाकिने
sanskrit_iast: tadvo gāya sute sacā puruhūtāya satvane śaṃ yadgave na śākine

text: Even as a car to give us aid, we draw thee nigh to favour us, Strong in thy deeds, quelling attack, Indra, Lord, mightiest! of the brave.
meaning: न घा वसुर्नि यमते दानं वाजस्य गोमतः यत्सीमुपश्रवद्गिरः
sanskrit_iast: na gʰā vasurni yamate dānaṃ vājasya gomataḥ yatsīmupaśravadgiraḥ

text: Great in thou power and wisdom, strong, with thought that comprehendeth all! Wide hast thou spread in majesty.
meaning: कुवित्सस्य प्र हि व्रजं गोमन्तं दस्युहा गमत् शचीभिरप नो वरत्
sanskrit_iast: kuvitsasya pra hi vrajaṃ gomantaṃ dasyuhā gamat śacībʰirapa no varat

text: Thou very mighty one, whose hands by virtue of thy greatness wield The golden bolt that beaks its way! IV Agni
meaning: इदं विष्णुर्वि चक्रमे त्रेधा नि दधे पदम् समूढमस्य पाꣳसुले
sanskrit_iast: idaṃ viṣṇurvi cakrame tredʰā ni dadʰe padam samūḍʰamasya pām̐sule

text: He who hath lighted up the joyous castle, wise courser like the steed of cloudy heaven, Bright like the Sun with hundredfold existence
meaning: त्रीणि पदा वि चक्रमे विष्णुर्गोपा अदाभ्यः अतो धर्माणि धारयन्
sanskrit_iast: trīṇi padā vi cakrame viṣṇurgopā adābʰyaḥ ato dʰarmāṇi dʰārayan

text: He, doubly born, hath spread in his effulgence through the three luminous realms, through all the regions, Best sacrificing Priest where waters gather.
meaning: विष्णोः कर्माणि पश्यत यतो व्रतानि पस्पशे इन्द्रस्य युज्यः सखा
sanskrit_iast: viṣṇoḥ karmāṇi paśyata yato vratāni paspaśe indrasya yujyaḥ sakʰā

text: Priest doubly born, he through his love of glory hath in his keeping all things worth the choosing. The man who brings him gifts hath noble offspring. V Agni
meaning: तद्विष्णोः परमं पदꣳ सदा पश्यन्ति सूरयः दिवीव चक्षुराततम्
sanskrit_iast: tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam̐ sadā paśyanti sūrayaḥ divīva cakṣurātatam

text: Agni, with hymns may we now accomplish that which thou lovest, Strength, like a horse auspicious, with service!
meaning: तद्विप्रासो विपन्युवो जागृवाꣳसः समिन्धते विष्णोर्यत्परमं पदम्
sanskrit_iast: tadviprāso vipanyuvo jāgr̥vām̐saḥ samindʰate viṣṇoryatparamaṃ padam

text: For, Agni, thou art now the promoter of strength auspicious, Lofty sacrifice, power effective.
meaning: अतो देवा अवन्तु नो यतो विष्णुर्विचक्रमे पृथिव्या अधि सानवि
sanskrit_iast: ato devā avantu no yato viṣṇurvicakrame pr̥tʰivyā adʰi sānavi

text: Through these our praises, come thou to meet us, bright as the sunlight, Agni, kindly with all thy faces! VI Agni
meaning: मो षु त्वा वाघतश्च नारे अस्मन्नि रीरमन् आरात्ताद्व सधमादं न आ गहीह वा सन्नुप श्रुधि
sanskrit_iast: mo ṣu tvā vāgʰataśca nāre asmanni rīraman ārāttādva sadʰamādaṃ na ā gahīha vā sannupa śrudʰi

text: Immortal Jatavedas, thou bright-hued refulgent gift of Dawn. Agni, this day to him who pays oblations bring the Gods who waken with the morn!
meaning: इमे हि ते ब्रह्मकृतः सुते सचा मधौ न मक्ष आसते इन्द्रे कामं जरितारो वसूयवो रथे न पादमा दधुः
sanskrit_iast: ime hi te brahmakr̥taḥ sute sacā madʰau na makṣa āsate indre kāmaṃ jaritāro vasūyavo ratʰe na pādamā dadʰuḥ

text: For thou art offering-bearer, well-loved messenger, and charioteer of holy rites. Accordant with the Asvins and with Dawn grant us heroic strength and lofty fame! VII Indra
meaning: अस्तावि मन्म पूर्व्यं ब्रह्मेन्द्राय वोचत पूर्वीरृतस्य बृहतीरनूषत स्तोतुर्मेधा असृक्षत
sanskrit_iast: astāvi manma pūrvyaṃ brahmendrāya vocata pūrvīrr̥tasya br̥hatīranūṣata stoturmedʰā asr̥kṣata

text: The old hath waked the young Moon from his slumber who runs his circling course with many round him Behold the God's high wisdom in its greatness: he who died yesterday to-day is living.
meaning: समिन्द्रो रायो बृहतीरधूनुत सं क्षोणी समु सूर्यम् सꣳ शुक्रासः शुचयः सं गवाशिरः सोमा इन्द्रममन्दिषुः
sanskrit_iast: samindro rāyo br̥hatīradʰūnuta saṃ kṣoṇī samu sūryam sam̐ śukrāsaḥ śucayaḥ saṃ gavāśiraḥ somā indramamandiṣuḥ

text: Strong is the red Bird in his strength, great hero, who from of old bath had no nest to dwell in. That which he knows is truth and never idle: he wins and gives the wealth desired of many.
meaning: इन्द्राय सोम पातवे वृत्रघ्ने परि षिच्यसे नरे च दक्षिणावते देवाय सदनासदे
sanskrit_iast: indrāya soma pātave vr̥tragʰne pari ṣicyase nare ca dakṣiṇāvate devāya sadanāsade

text: Through these Thunderer gained strong manly vigour, through whom he waxed in stren gth to slaughter Vritra; These who through might of actual operation sprang forth as Gods in course of Law and Order. VIII Maruts
meaning: तꣳ सखायः पुरूरुचं यूयं वयं च सूरयः अश्याम वाजगन्ध्यꣳ सनेम वाजपस्त्यम्
sanskrit_iast: tam̐ sakʰāyaḥ purūrucaṃ yūyaṃ vayaṃ ca sūrayaḥ aśyāma vājagandʰyam̐ sanema vājapastyam

text: Here is the Soma ready pressed: of this the Maruts, yea, of this Self-luminous, the Asvins, drink.
meaning: परि त्यꣳ हर्यतꣳ हरिं बभ्रुं पुनन्ति वारेण यो देवान्विश्वाꣳ इत्परि मदेन सह गच्छति
sanskrit_iast: pari tyam̐ haryatam̐ hariṃ babʰruṃ punanti vāreṇa yo devānviśvām̐ itpari madena saha gaccʰati

text: Of this, moreover, purified, set in three places, procreant, Drink Varuna, Mitra, Aryaman.
meaning: कस्तमिन्द्र त्वावसो मर्त्यो दधर्षति श्रद्धा इत्तेमघवन् पार्ये दिवि वाजी वाजं सिषासति
sanskrit_iast: kastamindra tvāvaso martyo dadʰarṣati śraddʰā ittemagʰavan pārye divi vājī vājaṃ siṣāsati

text: Yea, Indra, like the Hotar-priest, will in the early morning drink, At pleasure, of the milky juice: IX Surya
meaning: मघोनः स्म वृत्रहत्येषु चोदय ये ददति प्रिया वसु तव प्रणीती हर्यश्व सूरिभिर्विश्वा तरेम दुरिता
sanskrit_iast: magʰonaḥ sma vr̥trahatyeṣu codaya ye dadati priyā vasu tava praṇītī haryaśva sūribʰirviśvā tarema duritā

text: Verily, Surya, thou art great; truly, Aditya, thou art great. O most admired for greatness of thy majesty, God, by thy greatn.ess thou art great.
meaning: एदु मधोर्मदिन्तरꣳ सिञ्चाध्वर्यो अन्धसः एवा हि वीर स्तवते सदावृधः
sanskrit_iast: edu madʰormadintaram̐ siñcādʰvaryo andʰasaḥ evā hi vīra stavate sadāvr̥dʰaḥ

text: Yea, Surya, thou art great in fame: thou evermore, O God, art great. Thou by thy greatness art the Gods' High-Priest, divine, farspread unconquerable light. X Indra
meaning: इन्द्र स्थातर्हरीणां न किष्टे पूर्व्यस्तुतिम् उदानꣳश शवसा न भन्दना
sanskrit_iast: indra stʰātarharīṇāṃ na kiṣṭe pūrvyastutim udānam̐śa śavasā na bʰandanā

text: Come, Lord of rapturous joys, to our libations with thy bay steeds, come With bay steeds to our flowing juice!
meaning: तं वो वाजानां पतिमहूमहि श्रवस्यवः अप्रायुभिर्ज्ञेभिर्वावृधेन्यम्
sanskrit_iast: taṃ vo vājānāṃ patimahūmahi śravasyavaḥ aprāyubʰirjñebʰirvāvr̥dʰenyam

text: Known as best Vritra-slayer erst, as Indra $atakratu, come With bay steeds to our flowing juice!
meaning: तं गूर्धया स्वर्णरं देवासो देवमरतिं दधन्विरे देवत्रा हव्यमूहिषे
sanskrit_iast: taṃ gūrdʰayā svarṇaraṃ devāso devamaratiṃ dadʰanvire devatrā havyamūhiṣe

text: For, Vritra-slayer, thou art he who drinks these drops of Soma come With bay steeds to our flowing juice! XI Indra
meaning: विभूतरातिं विप्र चित्रशोचिषमग्निमीडिष्व यन्तुरम् अस्य मेधस्य सोम्यस्य सोभरे प्रेमध्वराय पूर्व्यम्
sanskrit_iast: vibʰūtarātiṃ vipra citraśociṣamagnimīḍiṣva yanturam asya medʰasya somyasya sobʰare premadʰvarāya pūrvyam

text: Bring to the wise, the great, who waxeth mighty your offerings and make ready your devotion. Go forth to many tribes as man's controller!
meaning: आ सोम सवानो अद्रिभिस्तिरो वाराण्यव्यया जनो न पुरि चम्वोर्विशद्धरिः सदो वनेषु दध्रिषे
sanskrit_iast: ā soma savāno adribʰistiro vārāṇyavyayā jano na puri camvorviśaddʰariḥ sado vaneṣu dadʰriṣe

text: For Indra the sublime, the far-pervading, have singers generateo prayer and praises; The sages never violate his statutes.
meaning: स मामृजे तिरो अण्वानि मेष्यो मीड्वान्त्सप्तिर्न वाजयुः अनुमाद्यः पवमानो मनीषिभिः सोमो विप्रेभिरृक्वभिः
sanskrit_iast: sa māmr̥je tiro aṇvāni meṣyo mīḍvāntsaptirna vājayuḥ anumādyaḥ pavamāno manīṣibʰiḥ somo viprebʰirr̥kvabʰiḥ

text: The choirs have established Indra King for ever for victory him, whose anger is resistless: And for the bays' Lord strengthened those he loveth. XII Indra
meaning: वयमेनमिदा ह्यो ऽपीपेमेह वज्रिणम् तस्मा उ अद्य सवने सुतं भरा नूनं भूषत श्रुते
sanskrit_iast: vayamenamidā hyo 'pīpemeha vajriṇam tasmā u adya savane sutaṃ bʰarā nūnaṃ bʰūṣata śrute

text: If I, O Indra, were the lord of riches ample as thine own, I would support the singer, God who scatterest wealth! and, not abandon him to woe.
meaning: वृकश्चिदस्य वारण उरामथिरा वयुनेषु भूषति सेमं न स्तोमं जुजुषाण आ गहीन्द्र प्र चित्रया धिया
sanskrit_iast: vr̥kaścidasya vāraṇa urāmatʰirā vayuneṣu bʰūṣati semaṃ na stomaṃ jujuṣāṇa ā gahīndra pra citrayā dʰiyā

text: Each day would I enrich the man who sang my praise, in whatsoever place he were. No kinship is there better, Maghavan, than thine: a father even, is no more. XIII Indra
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी रोचना दिवः परि वाजेषु भूषथः तद्वां चेति प्र वीर्यम्
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī rocanā divaḥ pari vājeṣu bʰūṣatʰaḥ tadvāṃ ceti pra vīryam

text: Here thou the call of the juice-drinking press-stone: mark thou the sage's hymn who sings and lauds thee! Take to thine inmost self these adorations!
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी अपसस्परि उप प्र यन्ति धीतयः ऋतस्य पथ्या अनु
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī apasaspari upa pra yanti dʰītayaḥ r̥tasya patʰyā anu

text: I know and ne'er forget the hymns and praises of thee, theconqueror, of thy power immortal. Thy name I ever utter, self-refulgent!
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी तविषाणि वाम् सधस्थानि प्रयाꣳसि च युवोरप्तूर्यं हितम्
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī taviṣāṇi vām sadʰastʰāni prayām̐si ca yuvoraptūryaṃ hitam

text: Among mankind many are thy libations, and many a time the pious sage invokes thee. O Maghavan, be not long distant from us! XIV Indra
meaning: क ईं वेद सुते सचा पिबन्तं कद्वयो दधे अयं यः पुरो विभिनत्त्योजसा मन्दानः शिप्रयन्धसः
sanskrit_iast: ka īṃ veda sute sacā pibantaṃ kadvayo dadʰe ayaṃ yaḥ puro vibʰinattyojasā mandānaḥ śiprayandʰasaḥ

text: Sing strength to Indra that shall. set his chariot in the foremost place! Giver of room in closest fight, slayer of foes in shock of war, be thou our great encorager! Let the weak bowstrings break upon the bows of our weak mies!
meaning: दाना मृगो न वारणः पुरुत्रा चरथं दधे न किष्ट्वा नि यमदा सुते गमो महाꣳश्चरस्योजसा
sanskrit_iast: dānā mr̥go na vāraṇaḥ purutrā caratʰaṃ dadʰe na kiṣṭvā ni yamadā sute gamo mahām̐ścarasyojasā

text: Thou didst destroy the Dragon: thou sentest the rivers down to Earth. Foeless, O Indra, wast thou born. Thou tendest well each choicest thing. Therefore we draw us close to thee. Let the weak bowstrings break upon the bows of our weak enemies! Destroyed be all malignitics and all our enemy's designs!
meaning: य उग्रः सन्ननिष्टृतः स्थिरो रणाय सꣳस्कृतः यदि स्तोतुर्मघवा शृणवद्धवं नेन्द्रो योषत्या गमत्
sanskrit_iast: ya ugraḥ sannaniṣṭr̥taḥ stʰiro raṇāya sam̐skr̥taḥ yadi stoturmagʰavā śr̥ṇavaddʰavaṃ nendro yoṣatyā gamat

text: Thy bolt thou castest at the foe, O Indra, who would smite us dead: thy liberal bounty gives us wealth. Let the weak bowstrings break upon the bows of our weak enemies! XV Indra
meaning: पवमाना असृक्षत सोमाः शुक्रास इन्दवः अभि विश्वानि काव्या
sanskrit_iast: pavamānā asr̥kṣata somāḥ śukrāsa indavaḥ abʰi viśvāni kāvyā

text: Rich be the praiser of one rich and liberal, Lord of days! like thee: High rank be his who lauds the juice!
meaning: पवमाना दिवस्पर्यन्तरिक्षादसृक्षत पृथिव्या अधि सानवि
sanskrit_iast: pavamānā divasparyantarikṣādasr̥kṣata pr̥tʰivyā adʰi sānavi

text: His wealth who hath no store of kine hath ne'er found out recited laud, Nor song of praises that is sung.
meaning: पवमानास आशवः शुभ्रा असृग्रमिन्दवः घ्नन्तो विश्वा अप द्विषः
sanskrit_iast: pavamānāsa āśavaḥ śubʰrā asr̥gramindavaḥ gʰnanto viśvā apa dviṣaḥ

text: Give us not, Indra, as a prey unto the scornful or the proud: Help, mighty one, with power and might! XVI Indra
meaning: तोशा वृत्रहणा हुवे सजित्वानापराजिता इन्द्राग्नी वाजसातमा
sanskrit_iast: tośā vr̥trahaṇā huve sajitvānāparājitā indrāgnī vājasātamā

text: Come hither, Indra, with thy bays, come thou to Kanva's eulogy! Ye by command of yonder Dyaus, God bright by day! have gone to heaven.
meaning: प्र वामर्चन्त्युक्थिनो नीथाविदो जरितारः इन्द्राग्नी इष आ वृणे
sanskrit_iast: pra vāmarcantyuktʰino nītʰāvido jaritāraḥ indrāgnī iṣa ā vr̥ṇe

text: The stones' rim shakes the Soma here like a wolf worrying a sheep. Ye by command of yonder Dyaus, God bright by day I have gone to heaven.
meaning: इन्द्राग्नी नवतिं पुरो दासपत्नीरधूनुतम् साकमेकेन कर्मणा
sanskrit_iast: indrāgnī navatiṃ puro dāsapatnīradʰūnutam sākamekena karmaṇā

text: May the stone bring thee as it speaks, the Soma-stone with ringing voice! Ye by command of yonder Dyaus, God bright by day! have gone to heaven. XVII Soma Pavamana
meaning: उप त्वा रण्वसन्दृशं प्रयस्वन्तः सहस्कृत अग्ने ससृज्महे गिरः
sanskrit_iast: upa tvā raṇvasandr̥śaṃ prayasvantaḥ sahaskr̥ta agne sasr̥jmahe giraḥ

text: For Indra flow most rich in sweets, O Soma, bringing him delight!
meaning: उप च्छायामिव घृणेरगन्म शर्म ते वयम् अग्ने हिरण्यसन्दृशः
sanskrit_iast: upa ccʰāyāmiva gʰr̥ṇeraganma śarma te vayam agne hiraṇyasandr̥śaḥ

text: Bright, meditating sacred song, these juices have sent Vayu forth.
meaning: य उग्र इव शर्यहा तिग्मशृङ्गो न वꣳसगः अग्ने पुरो रुरोजिथ
sanskrit_iast: ya ugra iva śaryahā tigmaśr̥ṅgo na vam̐sagaḥ agne puro rurojitʰa

text: They were sent forth to feast the Gods, like chariots speeding in the race. XVIII Agni
meaning: ऋतावानं वैश्वानरमृतस्य ज्योतिषस्पतिम् अजस्रं घर्ममीमहे
sanskrit_iast: r̥tāvānaṃ vaiśvānaramr̥tasya jyotiṣaspatim ajasraṃ gʰarmamīmahe

text: Agni I deem our Hotar priest, munificent wealth-giver, Son of Strength, who knoweth all that is even as the Sage who knoweth all. Lord of fair rites, a God with form erected turning to the Gods, he when the flame hath sprung forth from the holy oil, the offered fatness, longs for it as it grows bright.
meaning: य इदं प्रतिपप्रथे यज्ञस्य स्वरुत्तिरन् ऋतूनुत्सृजते वशी
sanskrit_iast: ya idaṃ pratipapratʰe yajñasya svaruttiran r̥tūnutsr̥jate vaśī

text: We, sacrificing, call on the best worshipper thee eldest of Angirasas, singer! with hyrnns, thee, brilliant one! with singers' hymn; Thee, wandering round, as 'twere the sky, thee who art Hotar-priest of men, whom, Bull with hair of flame, the people must observe, tile people that he speed them on.
meaning: अग्निः प्रियेषु धामसु कामो भूतस्य भव्यस्य सभ्राडेको वि राजति
sanskrit_iast: agniḥ priyeṣu dʰāmasu kāmo bʰūtasya bʰavyasya sabʰrāḍeko vi rājati

text: He with his blazing Power refulgent far and wide, he verily it iswho conquers demon foes, conquers the demons like an axe: At whose close touch things solid partg and what is stable yields he keeps his ground and flinches not,like trees. Subduing all from the skilled archer flinches not. I Agni
meaning: अग्निः प्रत्नेन जन्मना शुम्भानस्तन्वा३ꣳ स्वाम् कविर्विप्रेण ववृधे
sanskrit_iast: agniḥ pratnena janmanā śumbʰānastanvā3m̐ svām kavirvipreṇa vavr̥dʰe

text: O Agni, strength and fame are thine: thy fires blaze forth on high, O thou refulgent God! Sage, passing bright, thou givest to the worshipper with power, the wealth that merits laud.
meaning: ऊर्ज्जो नपातमा हुवे ऽग्निं पावकशोचिषम् अस्मिन्यज्ञे स्वध्वरे
sanskrit_iast: ūrjjo napātamā huve 'gniṃ pāvakaśociṣam asminyajñe svadʰvare

text: With brilliantg purifying sheen, with perfect sheen thou liftest up thyself in light. Thou, visiting both thy mothers, aidest them as son; thou joinest close the earth and heaven.
meaning: स नो मित्रमहस्त्वमग्ने शुक्रेण शोचिषा देवैरा सत्सि बर्हिषि
sanskrit_iast: sa no mitramahastvamagne śukreṇa śociṣā devairā satsi barhiṣi

text: O Jatavedas, Son of Strength, rejoice thyself, gracious, in our fair hymns and songs! In thee have they heaped viands various, many formed; wealthborn, of wondrous help are they.
meaning: उत्ते शुष्मासो अस्थू रक्षो भिन्दन्तो अद्रिवः नुदस्व याः परिस्पृधः
sanskrit_iast: utte śuṣmāso astʰū rakṣo bʰindanto adrivaḥ nudasva yāḥ parispr̥dʰaḥ

text: Agni, spread forth, as ruler, over living things: give wealth, to us, immortal God! Thou shinest out from beauty fair to look upon: thou leadest us to beauteous Power.
meaning: अया निजघ्निरोजसा रथसङ्गे धने हिते स्तवा अबिभ्युषा हृदा
sanskrit_iast: ayā nijagʰnirojasā ratʰasaṅge dʰane hite stavā abibʰyuṣā hr̥dā

text: I laud the Sage, who orders sacrifice, who hath great riches under his control. Thou givest blest award of good, and plenteous food, thou givest wealth that wins success.
meaning: अस्य व्रतानि नाधृषे पवमानस्य दूढ्या रुज यस्त्वा पृतन्यति
sanskrit_iast: asya vratāni nādʰr̥ṣe pavamānasya dūḍʰyā ruja yastvā pr̥tanyati

text: The men have set before them, for his favour, Agni, strong, visible to all, the holy. Thee, Lord divine, with ears to hear, most famous, mens' generations magnify with praise-songs. II Agni
meaning: तꣳ हिन्वन्ति मदच्युतꣳ हरिं नदीषु वाजिनम् इन्दुमिन्द्राय मत्सरम्
sanskrit_iast: tam̐ hinvanti madacyutam̐ hariṃ nadīṣu vājinam indumindrāya matsaram

text: Agni, he conquers by thine aid that brings him store of valiant sons and does great deeds, Whose bond of friendship is thy choice.
meaning: आ मन्द्रैरिन्द्र हरिभिर्याहि मयूररोमभिः मा त्वा के चिन्नि येमुरिन्न पाशिनो ऽति धन्वेव ताꣳ इहि
sanskrit_iast: ā mandrairindra haribʰiryāhi mayūraromabʰiḥ mā tvā ke cinni yemurinna pāśino 'ti dʰanveva tām̐ ihi

text: Thy spark is black and crackling; kindled in due time, O bounteous, it is taken up. Thou art the dear friend of the mighty Mornings: thou shinest in glimmerings of the night. III Agni
meaning: वृत्रखादो वलꣳ रुजः पुरां दर्मो अपामजः स्थाता रथस्य हर्योरभिस्वर इन्द्रो दृढा चिदारुजः
sanskrit_iast: vr̥trakʰādo valam̐ rujaḥ purāṃ darmo apāmajaḥ stʰātā ratʰasya haryorabʰisvara indro dr̥ḍʰā cidārujaḥ

text: Him, duly coming, as their germ have plants received: this Agni have maternal Waters brought to life. So, in like manner, do the forest trees and plants bear him within them and produce him evermore. IV Agni
meaning: गम्भीराꣳ उदधीꣳरिव क्रतुं पुष्यसि गा इव प्र सुगोपा यवसं धेनवो यथा ह्रदं कुल्या इवाशत
sanskrit_iast: gambʰīrām̐ udadʰīm̐riva kratuṃ puṣyasi gā iva pra sugopā yavasaṃ dʰenavo yatʰā hradaṃ kulyā ivāśata

text: Agni grows bright for Indra: he shines far resplendent in the sky: He sends forth offspring like a queen. V Agni
meaning: यथा गौरो अपा कृतं तृष्यन्नेत्यवेरिणम् आपित्वे नः प्रपित्वे तूयमा गहि कण्वेषु सु सचा पिब
sanskrit_iast: yatʰā gauro apā kr̥taṃ tr̥ṣyannetyaveriṇam āpitve naḥ prapitve tūyamā gahi kaṇveṣu su sacā piba

text: The sacred hymns love him who wakes and watches: to him who watches the holy verses. This Soma saith to him Who wake my dwelling in thy friendship. VI Agni
meaning: मन्दन्तु त्वा मघवन्निन्द्रेन्दवो राधोदेयाय सुन्वते आमुष्या सोममपिबश्चमू सुतं ज्येष्ठं तद्दधिषे सहः
sanskrit_iast: mandantu tvā magʰavannindrendavo rādʰodeyāya sunvate āmuṣyā somamapibaścamū sutaṃ jyeṣṭʰaṃ taddadʰiṣe sahaḥ

text: Agni is watchful, and the Richas love him: Agni is watchful, Sama hymns approach him. Agni is watchful, to him saith this Soma, I rest and have my dwelling in thy friendship. VII Gods
meaning: त्वमङ्ग प्र शुꣳसिषो देवः शविष्ठ मर्त्यम् न त्वदन्यो मघवन्नस्ति मर्डितेन्द्र ब्रवीमि ते वचः
sanskrit_iast: tvamaṅga pra śum̐siṣo devaḥ śaviṣṭʰa martyam na tvadanyo magʰavannasti marḍitendra bravīmi te vacaḥ

text: Praise to the friends who sit in front! to those seated together,praise I use the hundred-footed speech speech.
meaning: मा ते राधाꣳसि मा त ऊतयो वसो ऽस्मान्कदा चना दभन् विश्वा च न उपमिमीहि मानुष वसूनि चर्षणिभ्य आ
sanskrit_iast: mā te rādʰām̐si mā ta ūtayo vaso 'smānkadā canā dabʰan viśvā ca na upamimīhi mānuṣa vasūni carṣaṇibʰya ā

text: I use the hundred-footed speech, I sing what hath a thousand paths, Gayatra, Trishtup, Jagat hymn.
meaning: प्रति ष्या सूनरी जनी व्युच्छन्ती परि स्वसुः दिवो अदर्शि दुहिता
sanskrit_iast: prati ṣyā sūnarī janī vyuccʰantī pari svasuḥ divo adarśi duhitā

text: Gayatra, Trishtup, Jagat hymn,the forms united and complete, Have the Gods made familiar friends. VIII Agni
meaning: अश्वेव चित्रारुषी माता गवामृतावरी सखा भूदश्विनोरुषाः
sanskrit_iast: aśveva citrāruṣī mātā gavāmr̥tāvarī sakʰā bʰūdaśvinoruṣāḥ

text: Agni, is light, light is Agni, Indra is light, light is Indra Surya is light, light is Surya.
meaning: उत सखास्यश्विनोरुत माता गवामसि उतोषो वस्व ईशिषे
sanskrit_iast: uta sakʰāsyaśvinoruta mātā gavāmasi utoṣo vasva īśiṣe

text: O Agni, turn again with strength, turn thou again with food and life: Save us again from grief and woe!
meaning: एषो उषा अपूर्व्य व्युच्छति प्रिया दिवः स्तुषे वामश्विना बृहत्
sanskrit_iast: eṣo uṣā apūrvya vyuccʰati priyā divaḥ stuṣe vāmaśvinā br̥hat

text: O Agni, turn again with wealth sprinkle thou us from everyside. With thine own all-supporting stream! IX Indra
meaning: या दस्रा सिन्धुमातरा मनोतरा रयीणाम् धिया देवा वसुविदा
sanskrit_iast: yā dasrā sindʰumātarā manotarā rayīṇām dʰiyā devā vasuvidā

text: If I, O Indra, were like thee, the single ruler over wealth. My worshipper should be rich in kine.
meaning: वच्यन्ते वां ककुहासो जूर्णायामधि विष्टपि यद्वाꣳ रथो विभिष्पतात्
sanskrit_iast: vacyante vāṃ kakuhāso jūrṇāyāmadʰi viṣṭapi yadvām̐ ratʰo vibʰiṣpatāt

text: I should be fain, O Lord of power, to strengthen and enrich thesage, Where I the ford of herds of kine.
meaning: उषस्तच्चित्रमा भरास्मभ्यं वाजिनीवति येन तोकं च तनयं च धामहे
sanskrit_iast: uṣastaccitramā bʰarāsmabʰyaṃ vājinīvati yena tokaṃ ca tanayaṃ ca dʰāmahe

text: Thy goodness, Indra, is a cow yielding in plenty kine and steeds. To worshippers who press the juice. X The Waters
meaning: उषो अद्येह गोमत्यश्वावति विभावरि रेवदस्मे व्युच्छ सूनृतावति
sanskrit_iast: uṣo adyeha gomatyaśvāvati vibʰāvari revadasme vyuccʰa sūnr̥tāvati

text: Yea, Waters, ye bring health and bliss: so help ye us to energy. That we may look on great delight!
meaning: युङ्क्ष्वा हि वाजिनीवत्यश्वाꣳ अद्यारुणाꣳ उषः अथा नो विश्वा सौभगान्या वह
sanskrit_iast: yuṅkṣvā hi vājinīvatyaśvām̐ adyāruṇām̐ uṣaḥ atʰā no viśvā saubʰagānyā vaha

text: Give us a portion of the dew, the most auspicious that ye have, Like mothers in their longing love!
meaning: अश्विना वर्तिरस्मदा गोमद्दस्रा हिरण्यवत् अर्वाग्रथꣳ समनसा नि यच्छतम्
sanskrit_iast: aśvinā vartirasmadā gomaddasrā hiraṇyavat arvāgratʰam̐ samanasā ni yaccʰatam

text: For you we gladly go to hirn to whose abode ye speed us on, And, Waters, give us procreant strength! XI Vata
meaning: एह देवा मयोभुवा दस्रा हिरण्यवर्त्तनी उषर्बुधो वहन्तु सोमपीतये
sanskrit_iast: eha devā mayobʰuvā dasrā hiraṇyavarttanī uṣarbudʰo vahantu somapītaye

text: May Vata breathe his balm on us, healthful, delightful to our heart: May he prolong our days of life!
meaning: यावित्था श्लोकमा दिवो ज्योतिर्जनाय चक्रथुः आ न ऊर्जं वहतमश्विना युवम्
sanskrit_iast: yāvittʰā ślokamā divo jyotirjanāya cakratʰuḥ ā na ūrjaṃ vahatamaśvinā yuvam

text: Thou art our father, Vata, yea, thou art our brother and our friend: So give us strength that we may live!
meaning: अग्निं तं मन्ये यो वसुरस्तं यं यन्ति धेनवः अस्तमर्वन्त आशवोस्तं नित्यासो वाजिन इषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: agniṃ taṃ manye yo vasurastaṃ yaṃ yanti dʰenavaḥ astamarvanta āśavostaṃ nityāso vājina iṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: The store of Amrit that laid away yonder, O Vata, in thine home-- Give us strength that we may live! XII Agni
meaning: अग्निर्हि वाजिनं विशे ददाति विश्वचर्षणिः अग्नी राये स्वाभुवꣳ स प्रीतो याति वार्यमिषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: agnirhi vājinaṃ viśe dadāti viśvacarṣaṇiḥ agnī rāye svābʰuvam̐ sa prīto yāti vāryamiṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: The fleet steed wearing divers forms, the eagle bearing his golden raiment to his birthplace, Clothed in due season with the light of Surya, red, hath begot the sacrifice in person.
meaning: सो अग्निर्यो वसुर्गृणे सं यमायन्ति धेनवः समर्वन्तो रघुद्रुवः सꣳ सुजातासः सूरय इषꣳ स्तोतृभ्य आ भर
sanskrit_iast: so agniryo vasurgr̥ṇe saṃ yamāyanti dʰenavaḥ samarvanto ragʰudruvaḥ sam̐ sujātāsaḥ sūraya iṣam̐ stotr̥bʰya ā bʰara

text: Multiform seed he laid in waters, lustre which gathered on the earth and there developed. In the mid-air establishing his greatness, he cries aloud, seed of the vigorous courser.
meaning: महे नो अद्य बोधयोषो राये दिवित्मती यथा चिन्नो अबोधयः सत्यश्रवसि वाय्ये सुजाते अश्वसूनृते
sanskrit_iast: mahe no adya bodʰayoṣo rāye divitmatī yatʰā cinno abodʰayaḥ satyaśravasi vāyye sujāte aśvasūnr̥te

text: He hath, enduing thousand robes that suit him, as sacrifice upheld the light of Surya, Giver of ample gifts in hundreds, thousands, supporter of the heavens, earth's Lord and ruler. XIII Vena
meaning: या सुनीथे शौचद्रथे व्यौच्छो दुहितर्दिवः सा व्युच्छ सहीयसि सत्यश्रवसि वाय्ये सुजाते अश्वसूनृते
sanskrit_iast: yā sunītʰe śaucadratʰe vyauccʰo duhitardivaḥ sā vyuccʰa sahīyasi satyaśravasi vāyye sujāte aśvasūnr̥te

text: They gaze on thee with longing in their spirit, as on a strong-winged bird that mounteth sky-ward; On thee with wings of gold, Varuna's envoy, the Bird that hasteneth to the home of Yama.
meaning: सा नो अद्याभरद्वसुर्व्युच्छा दुहितर्दिवः यो व्यौच्छः सहीयसि सत्यश्रवसि याय्ये सुजाते अश्वसूनृते
sanskrit_iast: sā no adyābʰaradvasurvyuccʰā duhitardivaḥ yo vyauccʰaḥ sahīyasi satyaśravasi yāyye sujāte aśvasūnr̥te

text: Erect, to heaven hath the Gandharva mounted, pointing at us his many-coloured weapons: Clad in sweet raiment beautiful to look on, for he, as light, produceth forms that please us..
meaning: प्रति प्रियतमꣳ रथं वृशणं वसुवाहनम् स्तोता वामश्विनावृषि स्तोमेभिर्भूषति प्रति माध्वी मम श्रुतꣳ हवम्
sanskrit_iast: prati priyatamam̐ ratʰaṃ vr̥śaṇaṃ vasuvāhanam stotā vāmaśvināvr̥ṣi stomebʰirbʰūṣati prati mādʰvī mama śrutam̐ havam

text: When as a spark he cometh ilear the ocean, looking with vulture's eye as Law commandeth, His lustre, joying in its own bright splendour, maketh dear glories in the loftiest region. I Indra
meaning: अत्यायातमश्विना तिरो विश्वा अहꣳ सना दस्रा हिरण्यवर्त्तनी सुषुम्णा सिन्धुवाहसा माध्वी मम श्रुतꣳ हवम्
sanskrit_iast: atyāyātamaśvinā tiro viśvā aham̐ sanā dasrā hiraṇyavarttanī suṣumṇā sindʰuvāhasā mādʰvī mama śrutam̐ havam

text: Swift, rapidly striking, like a bull who sharpens his horns, terrific, stirring up the people. With eyes that close not, bellowing, sole hero, Indra subdued at once a hundred armies.
meaning: आ नो रत्नानि बिभ्रतावश्विना गच्छतं युवम् रुद्रा हिरण्यवर्त्तनी जुषाणा वाजिनीवसू माध्वी मम श्रुतꣳ हवम्
sanskrit_iast: ā no ratnāni bibʰratāvaśvinā gaccʰataṃ yuvam rudrā hiraṇyavarttanī juṣāṇā vājinīvasū mādʰvī mama śrutam̐ havam

text: With him loud-roaring, ever watchful victcr, bold, hard to overthrow, rouser of battle, Indra. the strong, whose hand bears arrows, conquer, ye heroes, now, now vanquish in the combat!
meaning: अबोध्यग्निः समिधा जनानां प्रति धेनुमिवायतीमुषासम् यह्वा इव प्र वयामुज्जिहानाः प्र भानवः सस्रते नाकमच्छ
sanskrit_iast: abodʰyagniḥ samidʰā janānāṃ prati dʰenumivāyatīmuṣāsam yahvā iva pra vayāmujjihānāḥ pra bʰānavaḥ sasrate nākamaccʰa

text: He rules with those who carry shafts and quivers, Indra who with his band brings hosts together, Foe-conquering strong of arm the Soma-drinker, with mighty bow, shooting with well-laid arrows. II Brihaspati. Indra
meaning: अबोधि होता यजथाय देवानूर्ध्वो अग्निः सुमनाः प्रातरस्थात् समिद्धस्य रुशददर्शि पाजो महान्देवस्तमसो निरमोचि
sanskrit_iast: abodʰi hotā yajatʰāya devānūrdʰvo agniḥ sumanāḥ prātarastʰāt samiddʰasya ruśadadarśi pājo mahāndevastamaso niramoci

text: Brihaspati, fly with thy chariot hither, slayer of demons, driving off our foemen! Be thou protector of our cars, destroyer, victor in battle, breaker-up of armies! 2, Conspicuous. by thy strength, firm, foremost fighter, mighty and fierce, victorious, all-subduing, The Son of Conquest, passing men and heroes, kinewinner, mount thy conquering car, O Indra!
meaning: यदीं गणस्य रशनामजीगः शुचिरङ्क्ते शुचिभिर्गोभिरग्निः आद्दक्षिणा युज्यते वाजयन्त्युत्तानामूर्ध्वो अधयज्जुहूभिः
sanskrit_iast: yadīṃ gaṇasya raśanāmajīgaḥ śuciraṅkte śucibʰirgobʰiragniḥ āddakṣiṇā yujyate vājayantyuttānāmūrdʰvo adʰayajjuhūbʰiḥ

text: Cleaver of stalls, kine-winner, armed with thunder, who quells an army and with might destroys it-- Follow him, brothers! quit yourselves like heroes, and like this Indra show your zeal and courage! III Indra. Brihaspati
meaning: इदꣳ श्रेष्ठं ज्योतिषां ज्योतिरागाच्चित्रः प्रकेतो अजनिष्ट विभ्वा यथा प्रसूता सवितुः सवायैवा रात्र्युषसे योनिमारैक्
sanskrit_iast: idam̐ śreṣṭʰaṃ jyotiṣāṃ jyotirāgāccitraḥ praketo ajaniṣṭa vibʰvā yatʰā prasūtā savituḥ savāyaivā rātryuṣase yonimāraik

text: Piercing with conquering strength the cow-stalls, Indra, pitiless hero with unbounded anger, Victor in fight, unshaken and resistless--may he protect our armies in our battles!
meaning: रुशाद्वत्सा रुशती श्वेत्यागादारैगु कृष्णा सदनान्यस्याः समानबन्धू अमृते अनूची द्यावा वर्णं चरत आमिनाने
sanskrit_iast: ruśādvatsā ruśatī śvetyāgādāraigu kr̥ṣṇā sadanānyasyāḥ samānabandʰū amr̥te anūcī dyāvā varṇaṃ carata āmināne

text: Indra guide these! Brihaspati, and Soma, the guerdon and the sacrifice precede them; And let the banded Maruts march in forefront of heavenly hosts that conquer and demolish!
meaning: समानो अध्वा स्वस्रोरनन्तस्तमन्यान्या चरतो देवशिष्टे न मेथेते न तस्थतुः सुमेके नक्तोषासा समनसा विरूपे
sanskrit_iast: samāno adʰvā svasroranantastamanyānyā carato devaśiṣṭe na metʰete na tastʰatuḥ sumeke naktoṣāsā samanasā virūpe

text: Ours be the potent host of mighty Indra, King Varuna the Maruts, and Adityas! Uplifted is the shout of Gods who conquer, hightninded Gods who cause the worlds to tremble. IV Indra.Maruts
meaning: आ भात्यग्निरुषसामनीकमुद्विप्राणां देवया वाचो अस्थुः अर्वाञ्चा नूनꣳ रथ्येह यातं पीपिवाꣳसमश्विना घर्ममच्छ
sanskrit_iast: ā bʰātyagniruṣasāmanīkamudviprāṇāṃ devayā vāco astʰuḥ arvāñcā nūnam̐ ratʰyeha yātaṃ pīpivām̐samaśvinā gʰarmamaccʰa

text: Bristle thou up, O Maghavan, our weapons: excite the spirits, of my warring heroes! Urge on the strong steed's might, O Vyitra-slayer, and let the din of conquering cars go upward
meaning: न सꣳस्कृतं प्र मिमीतो गमिष्ठान्ति नूनमश्विनोपस्तुतेह दिवाभिपित्वेवसागमिष्ठा प्रत्यवर्त्तिं दाशुषे शम्भविष्ठा
sanskrit_iast: na sam̐skr̥taṃ pra mimīto gamiṣṭʰānti nūnamaśvinopastuteha divābʰipitvevasāgamiṣṭʰā pratyavarttiṃ dāśuṣe śambʰaviṣṭʰā

text: May Indra aid us when our flags are gathered: victorious be ther arrows of our army! May our brave men of war prevail in battle. Ye Gods, protect us in the shout of onset!
meaning: उता यातꣳ संगवे प्रातरह्नो मध्यन्दिन उदिता सूर्यस्य दिवा नक्तमवसा शन्तमेन नेदानीं पीतिरश्विना ततान
sanskrit_iast: utā yātam̐ saṃgave prātarahno madʰyandina uditā sūryasya divā naktamavasā śantamena nedānīṃ pītiraśvinā tatāna

text: That army of the foemen, O ye Maruts, which, striving in its. mighty strength, approaches, Hide ye and bury it in pathless darkness that not a man oF them may know the other! V Agha
meaning: एता उ त्या उषसः केतुमक्रत पूर्वे अर्धे रजसो भानुमञ्जते निष्कृण्वाना आयुधानीव धृष्णवः प्रति गावो ऽरुषीर्यन्ति मातरः
sanskrit_iast: etā u tyā uṣasaḥ ketumakrata pūrve ardʰe rajaso bʰānumañjate niṣkr̥ṇvānā āyudʰānīva dʰr̥ṣṇavaḥ prati gāvo 'ruṣīryanti mātaraḥ

text: Bewildering the senses of our foemen, seize thou their bodies, and depart, O Agha! Attack them, set their hearts on fare with sorrows; so let our foes abide in utter darkness!
meaning: उदपप्तन्नरुणा भानवो वृथा स्वायुजो अरुषीर्गा अयुक्षत अक्रन्नुषासो वयुनानि पूर्वथा रुशन्तं भानुमरुषीरशिश्रयुः
sanskrit_iast: udapaptannaruṇā bʰānavo vr̥tʰā svāyujo aruṣīrgā ayukṣata akrannuṣāso vayunāni pūrvatʰā ruśantaṃ bʰānumaruṣīraśiśrayuḥ

text: Advance, O heroes, win the day, May Indra be your sure defence! Mighty and awful be your arms, that none may wound or injure you!
meaning: अर्चन्ति नारीरपसो न विष्टिभिः समानेन योजनेना परावतः इषं वहन्तीः सुकृते सुदानवे विश्वेदह यजमानाय सुन्वते
sanskrit_iast: arcanti nārīrapaso na viṣṭibʰiḥ samānena yojanenā parāvataḥ iṣaṃ vahantīḥ sukr̥te sudānave viśvedaha yajamānāya sunvate

text: Loosed from the bowstring fly away, thou arrows sharpened by our prayer! Go to the foemen, strike them home, and let not one be left alive! VI Indra and others
meaning: अबोध्यग्निर्ज्म उदेति सूर्यो व्यू३षाश्चन्द्रा मह्यावो अर्चिषा आयुक्षातामश्विना यातवे रथं प्रासावीद्देवः सविता जगत्पृथक्
sanskrit_iast: abodʰyagnirjma udeti sūryo vyū3ṣāścandrā mahyāvo arciṣā āyukṣātāmaśvinā yātave ratʰaṃ prāsāvīddevaḥ savitā jagatpr̥tʰak

text: Let ravens and strong-pinioned birds pursue them: yea, let that army be the food of vultures! Indra, let none escape, no sin-remover: behind them all let following birds be gathered!
meaning: यद्युञ्जाथे वृषणमश्विना रथं घृतेन नो मधुना क्षत्रमुक्षतम् अस्माकं ब्रह्म पृतनासु जिन्वतं वयं धना शूरसाता भजेमहि
sanskrit_iast: yadyuñjātʰe vr̥ṣaṇamaśvinā ratʰaṃ gʰr̥tena no madʰunā kṣatramukṣatam asmākaṃ brahma pr̥tanāsu jinvataṃ vayaṃ dʰanā śūrasātā bʰajemahi

text: This host of foemen Maghavan! that cometh on in warlike show-- Meet it, O Vritra-slayer, thou, Indra, and Agni, with your flames!
meaning: अर्वाङ्त्रिचक्रो मधुवाहनो रथो जीराश्वो अश्विनोर्यातु सुष्टुतः त्रिवन्धुरो मघवा विश्वसौभगः शं न आ वक्षद्द्विपदे चतुष्पदे
sanskrit_iast: arvāṅtricakro madʰuvāhano ratʰo jīrāśvo aśvinoryātu suṣṭutaḥ trivandʰuro magʰavā viśvasaubʰagaḥ śaṃ na ā vakṣaddvipade catuṣpade

text: There where the flights of arrows fall like boys whose locks are yet unshorn. Even there may Brahmanaspati, may Aditi protect us well, protect us well through all our days! VII Indra
meaning: प्र ते धारा असश्चतो दिवो न यन्ति वृष्टयः अच्छा वाजꣳ सहस्रिणम्
sanskrit_iast: pra te dʰārā asaścato divo na yanti vr̥ṣṭayaḥ accʰā vājam̐ sahasriṇam

text: Drive Rakshasas and foes away, break thou in pieces Vritra's jaws: O Vritra-slaying Indra, quell the foeman's wrath who threatens us!
meaning: अभि प्रियाणि काव्या विश्वा चक्षाणो अर्षति हरिस्तुञ्जान आयुधा
sanskrit_iast: abʰi priyāṇi kāvyā viśvā cakṣāṇo arṣati haristuñjāna āyudʰā

text: O Indra, beat our foes away, humble the men who challenge us: Send down to nether darkness him who seeks to do us injury!
meaning: स मर्मृजान आयुभिरिभो राजेव सुव्रतः श्येनो न वꣳसु षीदति
sanskrit_iast: sa marmr̥jāna āyubʰiribʰo rājeva suvrataḥ śyeno na vam̐su ṣīdati

text: Strong, ever-youthful are the arms of Indra, fair unassailable, never to be vanquished: These first let him employ when need hath come on us, wherewith the Asuras' great might was overthrown. VIII Soma, Varuna
meaning: स नो विश्वा दिवो वसूतो पृथिव्या अधि पुनान इन्दवा भर
sanskrit_iast: sa no viśvā divo vasūto pr̥tʰivyā adʰi punāna indavā bʰara

text: Thy vital parts I cover with thine armour: with immortality King Soma clothe thee! Varuna give thee what is more than ample, and in thy victory may Gods be joyful!
meaning: प्रास्य धारा अक्षरन्वृष्णः सुतस्यौजसा देवाꣳ अनु प्रभूषतः
sanskrit_iast: prāsya dʰārā akṣaranvr̥ṣṇaḥ sutasyaujasā devām̐ anu prabʰūṣataḥ

text: Blind, O my foemen, shall ye be, even as headless serpents are May Indra slay each best of you when Agni's flame hath struck you down!
meaning: सप्तिं मृजन्ति वेधसो गृणन्तः कारवो गिरा ज्योतिर्जज्ञानमुक्थ्यम्
sanskrit_iast: saptiṃ mr̥janti vedʰaso gr̥ṇantaḥ kāravo girā jyotirjajñānamuktʰyam

text: Whoso would kill us, whether he be a stranger foe or one of us, May all the Gods discomfit him! My nearest, closest mail is prayer, my closest armour and defence. IX Indra. All-Gods
meaning: सुषहा सोम तानि ते पुनानाय प्रभूवसो वर्धा समुद्रमुक्थ्यम्
sanskrit_iast: suṣahā soma tāni te punānāya prabʰūvaso vardʰā samudramuktʰyam

text: Like a dread wild beast roaming on the mountain thou hast approached us from the farthest distance. Whetting thy bolt and thy sharp blade, O Indra, crush thou the foe and scatter those who hate us!
meaning: एष ब्रह्मा य ऋत्विय इन्द्रो नाम श्रुतो गृणे
sanskrit_iast: eṣa brahmā ya r̥tviya indro nāma śruto gr̥ṇe

text: Gods, may our ears hear that which is auspicious, may our eyes see that which is good, ye holy! Extolling you with still strong limbs and bodies, may we attain the age by Gods appointed!
meaning: त्वामिच्छवसस्पते यन्ति गिरो न संयतः
sanskrit_iast: tvāmiccʰavasaspate yanti giro na saṃyataḥ

text: Illustrious far and wide, may Indra bless us, may Pushan bless us, master of all riches! May Tarkshya with uninjured fellies bless us! Brihaspati bestow on us his favour! Brihaspati bestow on us his favour! Sacred Texts Hinduism « Previous: SONGS OF KABÎR Index Next: Title Page »
meaning: वि स्रुतयो यथा पथा इन्द्र त्वद्यन्तु रातयः
sanskrit_iast: vi srutayo yatʰā patʰā indra tvadyantu rātayaḥ
